en: Unh... errrg... arrhhh... AAAAAAAAHHHH!!!
Fall back! RETREAT!!!
zh: 后撤！快撤退！！！

en: Time ta die!
zh: 受死吧！

en: Aaaah! Aaaaaaah!!
This is no place to let your guard down. C'mon, let's see if we can't find my squad up ahead.
zh: 这地方可不能放松警惕。走，去前面看看能不能找到我的小队。

en: I heard the dropship you Rhinos were on took a direct hit. You're lucky to still be breathing.
zh: 听说你们犀牛小队坐的运输船被直接命中了。你还能喘气，算是走大运了。

en: We lost a lot of drop ships during the initial landing. The Strogg air defense cannons ripped us apart.
zh: 首轮登陆我们损失了不少运输船。Strogg 的防空炮把我们打得七零八落。

en: But now it our turn right? It's time to kick some Strogg ass.
zh: 不过现在轮到我们了，对吧？是时候去揍扁那帮 Strogg 了。

en: It would be best if you found Lt. Voss and the rest of Rhino Squad.
zh: 你最好去找 Voss 中尉和犀牛小队的其他人。

en: Why are you standing here? Go that way to find our squad.
zh: 还站在这儿干什么？往那边走，去找我们的小队。

en: Kane, you must rendezvous with our squad.
zh: Kane，你必须去和我们小队会合。

en: You're needed ASAP. Colonel Westmore has been wounded in the leg.
zh: 这边急需你。Westmore 上校腿部负伤了。

en: And I've got a Marine here with a collapsed lung.
zh: 可我这儿还有个陆战队员，肺都塌了。

en: Westmore demanded you.
zh: Westmore 点名要你。

en: Then he's gonna have to wait. Anderson out.
zh: 那他也得等着。Anderson 完毕。

en: My legs... I can't move 'em.
zh: 我的腿……动不了了。

en: {scared}H Q, I have a man down and require a medic. H Q, come in.
zh: {scared}总部，我这里有人员伤亡，需要医疗兵。总部，请回答。

en: {furrow}The damn squibs must be jamming our signal.
zh: {furrow}肯定是那帮该死的杂碎在干扰我们的信号。

en: Sorry, Sarge. I had a run in with a Strogg. And I met this Marine from Rhino squad.
zh: 抱歉，中士。我半路撞上了一个 Strogg，还碰到了这位犀牛小队的弟兄。

en: {confused}You're Rhino Squad? {idle}High tail it back to the landing site, grab your medic and bring him here.
zh: {confused}你是犀牛小队的？{idle}赶紧跑回登陆点，把你们的医疗兵带过来。

en: And what the hell are you doin' without a rifle, soldier?
zh: 还有，大兵，你他妈连枪都不带是想干什么？

en: Here take this.
zh: 来，拿着这个。

en: Kane, this is Sgt. Miller. I've got a man down. Get over here ASAP.
zh: Kane，我是 Miller 中士。我这儿有人受伤，马上过来。

en: Corporal Kane, this is Miller. There's an injured Marine here and I need your help.
zh: Kane 下士，我是 Miller。这里有个陆战队员受伤了，我需要你帮忙。

en: This is Miller, Corporal Kane. Get over here on the double.
zh: 我是 Miller，Kane 下士。跑步过来，快！

en: huuuuuhhh  haaaaaa  huuuuuhhhh
Stay with me, Metcalf.
zh: 撑住，Metcalf。

en: Don't you give up.
zh: 别给我放弃。

en: Come on.
zh: 挺住。

en: We can't lose a man with your medical skills.
zh: 像你这么好的医疗兵，我们可损失不起。

en: {furrow}Maybe you didn't hear me, soldier. Run to the site where your ship crashed, grab the medic and bring him back here.
zh: {furrow}你是没听清吗，大兵？跑回你们坠机的地方，把医疗兵给我带回来。

en: {furrow}Soldier, this man's life is depending on you. Get him a medic.
zh: {furrow}大兵，这个人的命就靠你了。去给他找个医疗兵。

en: {furrow}Damn it! I gave you a direct order!! Get a medic now!!!
zh: {furrow}妈的！我给你下的是死命令！！立刻去找医疗兵！！！

en: {puzzled}You're Kane, right? {idle}I'm Anderson. Our squad's already left. Go see Morris over there for orders.
zh: {puzzled}你是 Kane 吧？{idle}我是 Anderson。小队已经出发了。去那边找 Morris 领命令。

en: {furrow}This is insane. There's dozens wounded and I'm tryin' to save the life of the only other medic in this area.
zh: {furrow}这简直是疯了。几十号伤员等着，而我在抢救的，是这一带唯一的另一个医疗兵。

en: Found our pilot about a hundred yards from here. Looks like she died instantly.
zh: 在离这儿一百码左右找到了我们的飞行员。看样子她当场就牺牲了。

en: I'm gonna be here a while. You go and find Rhino Squad without me.
zh: 我得在这儿忙上一阵。你别等我了，先去找犀牛小队吧。

en: You mind backing off? I'm trying to save this man's life.
zh: 你能退后点吗？我正在救人。

en: You really should try to find the rest of our squad.
zh: 你真该去找咱们小队的其他人了。

en: Hold still.
zh: 别动。

en: Don't move.
zh: 不要动。

en: Stay put for a minute.
zh: 待着别动，一会儿就好。

en: Gimme a second to fix you up.
zh: 给我几秒，马上给你处理好。

en: You're good to go, Marine.
zh: 好了，上吧，大兵。

en: Okay, that's it.
zh: 行，搞定了。

en: I'm done.
zh: 处理完了。

en: There. Go get 'em.
zh: 好了。去收拾他们吧。

en: I'll fix you up, Kane.
zh: 我来给你治，Kane。

en: I'm on my way, Kane. You'll be back in the fight in no time.
zh: 我这就来，Kane。很快就能让你重返战斗。

en: Stay right there, Kane. I'll get you patched up.
zh: 待在原地，Kane。我来给你包扎。

en: Are you picking up our medical chips?
zh: 能收到我们的医疗芯片信号吗？

en: Affirmative, sir. I'm reading the entire squad's medchips.
zh: 收到，长官。全队的医疗芯片信号都在。

en: Good. Now establish an uplink with H Q. Voss out.
zh: 很好。现在和总部建立上行链路。Voss 完毕。

en: H Q, H Q. Come in H Q. This is Rhino Squad.
zh: 总部，总部，请回答。这里是犀牛小队。

en: H Q, do you read?
zh: 总部，能收到吗？

en: H Q, this is Rhino Squad. Please respond.
zh: 总部，这里是犀牛小队，请回应。

en: {puzzled}Well, shit. You're not dead. {happy}Lucky for you Lieutenant Voss was in a hurry to move out. {idle}Rhodes wanted to bury you.
zh: {puzzled}好家伙，你居然没死。{happy}算你走运，Voss 中尉急着出发。{idle}Rhodes 都想把你就地埋了。

en: The L T left orders that everyone's supposed to hook up with the squad ASAP.
zh: 中尉留了命令，所有人必须尽快归队。

en: Just go through those doors, you'll run into them eventually.
zh: 穿过那几道门一直走，总能碰上他们。

en: This landing's been a complete shit storm. Lots of squads were killed in flight and thousands of men missed their drop zones.
zh: 这次登陆简直是一场彻头彻尾的灾难。好多小队还没落地就全灭了，几千号人错过了空降区。

en: Transmissions are being jammed. I can't get in touch with H Q and even nearby signals are garbled.
zh: 通讯被干扰了。联系不上总部，连附近的信号都是乱码。

en: You better move out and rendezvous with Rhino Squad.
zh: 你最好赶紧出发，去和犀牛小队会合。

en: {furrow}It's hard enough working with all this interference. I don't need you hanging over my shoulder.
zh: {furrow}这么强的干扰已经够我受的了，用不着你还在旁边盯着我干活。

en: {furrow}Lieutenant Voss is gonna have your ass in a sling if you don't find Rhino Squad right now.
zh: {furrow}你再不去找犀牛小队，Voss 中尉非扒了你的皮不可。

en: My arm! Where's my arm?
zh: 我的胳膊！我的胳膊哪儿去了？

en: Medic! Meeediiiic!
zh: 医疗兵！医——疗——兵——！

en: Heeelp! I need a medic!
zh: 救命！我需要医疗兵！

en: Huuuuuuh, cough.
zh: 呼……咳咳。

en: Huuuuuuh, aaaahh, huuuuuuh aaahh.
Cough... cough, cough.
zh: 咳……咳咳。

en: This is Sargent Miller. I'm takin' Badger Squad in to clear out the facility.
zh: 我是 Miller 中士。我这就带猛獾小队进去清剿这处设施。

en: Mayday! Mayday! This is the U.S.S. Patton. We have sustained heavy damage...
zh: 求救！求救！这里是巴顿号。我舰受创严重……

en: ... aircraft loss of 65 percent. We're taking a lot of heat from the air defense cannon. Ground based troops...
zh: ……战机损失 65%。防空炮的火力压得我们抬不起头。地面部队……

en: We were dropped in the wrong freakin' zone! There's Strogg everywhere!! Get me outta here!!!
zh: 我们他妈投错空降区了！到处都是 Strogg！！快把我弄出去！！！

en: Let me go! LET ME GO!!!
zh: 放开我！放开我！！！

en: No! NOOOOOOO!!!
Behind you!
zh: 小心背后！

en: H Q, we can't advance. Dust is clogging the intakes of the hover tanks.
zh: 总部，我们无法推进。沙尘堵住了悬浮坦克的进气口。

en: We're being overrun! Launch an air strike on my position now!
zh: 我们被冲垮了！立刻对我的位置发动空袭！

en: We're a lost cause! Do not attempt to evac us.
zh: 我们没救了！不要再来撤离我们。

en: Kane, this is sargent Miller. What's the hold up? Get back here with a medic!
zh: Kane，我是 Miller 中士。磨蹭什么呢？赶紧带医疗兵回来！

en: Corporal Kane, this is Miller! I need that medic now!
zh: Kane 下士，我是 Miller！我现在就要医疗兵！

en: Where are you, Kane? We need that medic!
zh: 你在哪儿，Kane？我们等着医疗兵救命呢！

en: {confused}There's a marine down? {idle}Yeah, I can go. Lead the way.
zh: {confused}有陆战队员倒下了？{idle}行，我可以去。带路吧。

en: {furrow}Let's not lose focus here. Get me to that injured man.
zh: {furrow}别分心了，带我去伤员那儿。

en: {furrow}We can't afford to waste time. Show me where the injured man is.
zh: {furrow}时间耽误不起，带我去看伤员。

en: Morris, this is Lt.Voss. Move to the location I'm uploading now.
zh: Morris，我是 Voss 中尉。前往我正在上传的坐标。

en: Yes, sir. Give me a couple minutes to pack up. Morris, out. Finally, a chance for some action.
zh: 是，长官。给我几分钟收拾装备。Morris 完毕。终于有仗打了。

en: {pain}So many lives wasted...
zh: {pain}这么多人白白送了命……

en: Finally, a medic.
zh: 可算来了个医疗兵。

en: My legs... they're numb.
zh: 我的腿……没知觉了。

en: Don't worry. You aren't missing out on the fun today. Here.
zh: 别担心，今天的热闹少不了你的份。来。

en: I gave him a medpack and sedated him, but in ten minutes he'll be up and ready to fight the Strogg.
zh: 我给他用了医疗包，还打了镇静剂。不过十分钟后他就能爬起来接着打 Strogg 了。

en: Thanks, son. Kane, you're free to go now. Take that door and it'll get you to your squad.
zh: 谢了，小伙子。Kane，你可以走了。从那扇门过去，就能找到你的小队。

en: {happy}Ah, so you did survive. Ha, ha! I won the bet with Rhodes.
zh: {happy}啊，你果然活下来了。哈哈！我赢了和 Rhodes 打的赌。

en: We were not properly introduced. I am Alejandro Cortez, Rhino squad's sharp shooter. Lieutenant Voss stationed me here to guard the flank. But you are to proceed that way and rendezvous with the rest of our squad.
zh: 还没正式介绍过。我是 Alejandro Cortez，犀牛小队的神枪手。Voss 中尉派我在这儿守侧翼。你呢，从那边过去，和小队其他人会合。

en: Kane, this is Sergeant Bidwell. Rendezvous with Rhino squad A S A P. Follow the trenches that start just outside.
zh: Kane，我是 Bidwell 中士。尽快和犀牛小队会合。沿着外面那条战壕走。

en: Kane! This is sargent Bidwell. We need you here ASAP. We've gotta bring the air defense cannon down.
zh: Kane！我是 Bidwell 中士。马上过来，我们得把防空炮干掉。

en: What's the hold up, Kane? Find us immediately.
zh: 磨蹭什么呢，Kane？立刻来找我们。

en: Kane, this is sargent Bidwell. Stop pissin'around and hook up with us.
zh: Kane，我是 Bidwell 中士。别瞎晃悠了，赶紧归队。

en: Kane, this is Bidwell. Don't make me come lookin' for you.
zh: Kane，我是 Bidwell。别逼我亲自去找你。

en: I gotta stay here in case the Lieutenant needs us.
zh: 我得守在这儿，中尉随时可能要用我们。

en: No can do, partner. The L T gave orders for me to stay put.
zh: 不行啊，伙计。中尉下令让我在这儿待命。

en: Medic! I need a medic!
zh: 医疗兵！我需要医疗兵！

en: Nyet. I cannot go. Rhodes and I are to stay here.
zh: Nyet，不行。我走不开，我和 Rhodes 得守在这儿。

en: No, thank you. I must remain here.
zh: 不了，谢谢。我必须留在这里。

en: What are we waiting for? Let's find those hangars!
zh: 还等什么？我们去找机库！

en: Kane, trust me. You don't wanna see lieutenant Voss mad. Let's follow his orders.
zh: Kane，信我一句，你可不想见识 Voss 中尉发火的样子。照他的命令办吧。

en: {furrow}Enough foolin' around, Kane. Let's haul ass.
zh: {furrow}别瞎混了，Kane。赶紧开拔！

en: Was I hit? You see any blood? It's a freakin' meat grinder out there!
zh: 我中弹了吗？看到血没有？外面简直就是台绞肉机！

en: Sure, I'll follow you. Safety in numbers, right?
zh: 行，我跟你走。人多安全，对吧？

en: Okay, I'll stay here and keep this area secure.
zh: 好，我留在这儿守住这片区域。

en: Walker Squad Bison, advance. Fire at will.
zh: 野牛机甲小队，前进。自由开火。

en: Come on! Come on!!
zh: 来啊！来啊！！

en: Damn, that was close!
zh: 妈的，好险！

en: Yeah! Got ya!!
zh: 爽！干掉你了！！

en: Eat it!
zh: 吃我一发！

en: That the best you got, freak?
zh: 就这点本事吗，怪胎？

en: I've got orders to stay here.
zh: 我奉命守在这里。

en: You go on. I can't leave my post.
zh: 你先走吧，我不能离开岗位。

en: Look, buddy, I'm not leaving this position. So get lost!
zh: 听着，伙计，我是不会离开这个位置的。一边儿去！

en: The trench!! Finally I've made it!!!
zh: 战壕！！我总算到了！！！

en: Didn't see that comin' did ya?
zh: 没料到这招吧？

en: C'mon, show yourself!
zh: 来啊，有种出来！

en: Oh yeah
zh: 哦耶

en: Choke it down, squib!
zh: 给我咽下去，杂碎！

en: Oh, somebody's gettin' brave.
zh: 哟，有人胆子肥了。

en: Did ya hear the U.S.S. Patton went down?
zh: 听说了吗？巴顿号坠毁了。

en: She flew through a minefield and got her starboard side ripped open.
zh: 它闯进了雷区，右舷整个被撕开了。

en: There were twenty two hundred crewmen on board the Patton...
zh: 巴顿号上可是有两千二百名船员啊……

en: We're having no luck making a run on the air defense cannon. Strogg fliers are protecting it.
zh: 我们冲防空炮冲了几次都没成。Strogg 的飞行器护着它。

en: {puzzled}So you are alive. {furrow}Damn, Cortez won the bet.
zh: {puzzled}你还真活着。{furrow}该死，赌是 Cortez 赢了。

en: {puzzled}What have I missed?
zh: {puzzled}我错过什么了？

en: We're just getting started. We've gotta take out that air defense cannon but the Strogg fliers are keeping us pinned us down. There's no way to...
zh: 好戏才刚开场。我们得干掉那门防空炮，可 Strogg 的飞行器把我们压得死死的。根本没办法……

en: Sargent Bidwell, this is Voss. I think I've found a way to get at that cannon. Can you reach Kane?
zh: Bidwell 中士，我是 Voss。我好像找到接近那门炮的路子了。你能联系上 Kane 吗？

en: He's right here, sir.
zh: 他就在我旁边，长官。

en: Good. Kane, go to the Strogg hangars. Viper squad will rendezvous with you there. If you can take out the launching bays, the fliers won't be a problem. Voss out.
zh: 很好。Kane，前往 Strogg 机库，毒蛇小队会在那儿和你会合。只要端掉发射舱，飞行器就不足为惧了。Voss 完毕。

en: {furrow}You heard the man, Kane. Get to the hangars. Morris, you're with him. Move out!
zh: {furrow}都听见了吧，Kane。去机库。Morris，你跟他一起。出发！

en: {furrow}Marine, what are you waiting for? Get to the Strogg hangars.
zh: {furrow}大兵，还愣着干什么？去 Strogg 机库。

en: {furrow}You heard the Lieutenant. Move out and find those hangars!
zh: {furrow}中尉的命令你也听到了。出发，去找机库！

en: {furrow}Kane! Lieutenant Voss gave you an order! Get to those hangars now!
zh: {furrow}Kane！Voss 中尉给你下了命令！立刻去机库！

en: Hey! Hey you!
zh: 嘿！嘿，说你呢！

en: Got any extra rounds? I...aaaahhhhhh!
zh: 有多余的弹药吗？我……啊——！

en: Stay right there, Marine. I'll patch you up.
zh: 待在那儿别动，大兵。我来给你包扎。

en: Here. You'll be healthy in no time.
zh: 来。马上就让你生龙活虎。

en: Stay put for a minute and I'll heal you up.
zh: 稍微待一会儿别动，我给你治伤。

en: Armadillo Squad, you have to flank left. Flank left, damn it!
zh: 犰狳小队，从左翼包抄。左翼，妈的！

en: Aaaah! My leg...! I need a medic! Meedic!
zh: 啊——！我的腿……！我需要医疗兵！医疗兵！

en: Hold tight, Marine. We have your location and help is on the way.
zh: 撑住，大兵。我们已锁定你的位置，救援马上就到。

en: H Q, we're in the bunker now. All is quiet.
zh: 总部，我们已进入地堡。一切平静。

en: We copy. See if you can...
zh: 收到。看看你们能不能……

en: We got movement!
zh: 有动静！

en: Where? Where, dammit!
zh: 哪儿？妈的，到底在哪儿！

en: Behind us! Right behind us!
zh: 在我们后面！就在正后方！

en: It's a trap. Do not send another squad. I repeat, do not send...
zh: 这是陷阱。不要再派小队来。重复，不要再派……

en: H Q, this is Viper squad. we're pinned down and request backup.
zh: 总部，这里是毒蛇小队。我们被火力压制，请求支援。

en: This is H Q, Viper squad. Sting Ray squad has been notified. E T A ten minutes.
zh: 这里是总部，毒蛇小队。已通知黄貂鱼小队，预计十分钟后到达。

en: H Q, the Strogg bunker has been tagged with laser.
zh: 总部，已用激光标记 Strogg 地堡。

en: Orbital artillery has just been informed. Bombardment to commence in three...two...one.
zh: 轨道炮兵已接到通知。轰炸倒计时：三……二……一。

en: They did it, H Q! Target has been neutralized!
zh: 他们成功了，总部！目标已被摧毁！

en: Walker squad Bison has landed and is fully deployed.
zh: 野牛机甲小队已着陆，全员部署完毕。

en: Comm uplink has been established and systems are in the green. Proceed to your first target Bison squad.
zh: 通讯链路已建立，各系统一切正常。野牛小队，前往你们的第一个目标。

en: Roget that, H Q. Bison, advance!
zh: 收到，总部。野牛小队，前进！

en: Come on, you sons of bitches! You want a belly full of plasma? Step right up!
zh: 来啊，狗娘养的！想尝尝一肚子等离子的滋味吗？尽管上！

en: Viper squad, this is H Q. Sting Ray squad is M I A and unresponsive. Fall back to rally point alpha niner four.
zh: 毒蛇小队，这里是总部。黄貂鱼小队失踪，无法取得联系。后撤至 Alpha 94 集结点。

en: We'll try, H Q. But this zone is pretty hot. Give us an artillery strike nearby. Fire for effect.
zh: 我们尽力，总部。但这片区域交火太激烈了。请在附近来一轮炮击，效力射。

en: We copy that. Strike to occur in thirty seconds.
zh: 收到。炮击将于三十秒后开始。

en: Armadillo squad, it worked! The Strogg are trapped in the trench now! They aint goin nowhere!
zh: 犰狳小队，成了！Strogg 被困在战壕里了！它们哪儿也去不了！

en: We copy that, Cougar squad! It's like shottin fish in a barrel!
zh: 收到，美洲狮小队！这简直是瓮中捉鳖！

en: H Q, this is Bison Squad. Our primary target has been nullified. If possible, we'd like to aid the infantry now.
zh: 总部，这里是野牛小队。首要目标已被清除。如果可以，我们想立即支援步兵。

en: We copy that, bison squad. You are cleared to aid the foot soldiers.
zh: 收到，野牛小队。批准你们支援步兵。

en: Thanks, H Q. All right, boys. Time ta kick the shit outta some Strogg. Let's move!
zh: 多谢，总部。好了，弟兄们，该去把 Strogg 揍出屎来了。行动！

en: Freaks are streaming over the sides of the trenches! We cant hold em off. Fuck, there's hundreds of em! They just keep comin!
zh: 怪胎们从战壕两侧涌进来了！我们挡不住了。操，有好几百个！它们还在源源不断地冲！

en: The L T is dead! A squib tore his head off! H Q, what do we do? Help!
zh: 中尉阵亡了！一个杂碎把他的头拧了下来！总部，我们怎么办？救命！

en: Bison Walker squad has been informed of your status.
zh: 已将你们的状况通报野牛机甲小队。

en: Don't you get it? We're toast, H Q! There's no way...
zh: 你们还不明白吗？我们完蛋了，总部！根本不可能……

en: Holy shit! they're here already! The Walker squad made it!
zh: 我操！他们这就到了！机甲小队赶到了！

en: H Q, this is Bison Squad. The situation is under control.
zh: 总部，这里是野牛小队。局势已在掌控之中。

en: Roger that, Bison squad.
zh: 收到，野牛小队。

en: Yeee haa! Good job, men! We nailed their Strogg asses good!
zh: 呀哈！干得漂亮，弟兄们！把这帮 Strogg 揍得屁滚尿流！

en: Marine, switch to another frequency for inter squad communications.
zh: 陆战队员，小队内部通讯请切换到其他频率。

en: Oh, sorry about that, sweetheart. It won't happen again.
zh: 哦，抱歉啦，小甜心。下不为例。

en: H Q, this is Viper squad. We have arrived at the rally point.
zh: 总部，这里是毒蛇小队。我们已抵达集结点。

en: Well done. Wait there for further orders.
zh: 干得好。在原地等待进一步命令。

en: Holy crap! The fliers are chewing us up! H Q, we need help!
zh: 我的天！飞行器快把我们撕碎了！总部，请求支援！

en: We have been informed of the situation. A strategy is being formulated. H Q, out.
zh: 情况已了解。正在制定对策。总部，完毕。

en: H Q, H Q, this is Cougar Squad. Were havin no luck getting to the Air Defense Cannon.
zh: 总部，总部，这里是美洲狮小队。我们怎么也接近不了防空炮。

en: It is imperative you succeed, Cougar Squad.
zh: 美洲狮小队，你们务必成功。

en: There's too many damn fliers. They aren't letting us anywhere near the cannon.
zh: 该死的飞行器太多了，根本不让我们靠近那门炮。

en: H Q, this is Cougar Squad. You've gotta do something about the Strogg air support. Those fliers are stopping us from getting to the Air Defense Cannon.
zh: 总部，这里是美洲狮小队。你们得想办法解决 Strogg 的空中支援。那些飞行器拦着，我们根本到不了防空炮那儿。

en: I copy that, Cougar Squad. Options are being considered. H Q, out.
zh: 收到，美洲狮小队。正在研究方案。总部，完毕。

en: Yes sir!
zh: 是，长官！

en: {furrow}We need to get a cutting torch up here or we're gonna get slaughtered!
zh: {furrow}赶紧弄一把切割枪上来，不然我们都得死在这儿！

en: {furrow}Hey, the torch is here!
zh: {furrow}嘿，切割枪到了！

en: Hang on, helps comin. {scared}Medic, I need a MEDIC!
zh: 撑住，救援就来。{scared}医疗兵，快来医疗兵！

en: {scared}Seal it!  Seal the damn window, NOW!
zh: {scared}封上！把那扇该死的窗户封上，快！

en: {confused}Where the hell did that come from?
zh: {confused}那玩意儿到底是从哪儿冒出来的？

en: I got no idea!
zh: 我哪儿知道！

en: {scared}Shit!  {furrow}You almost got your fucking head ventilated.  Marines take your positions, we got company!
zh: {scared}妈的！{furrow}你脑袋差点被打出个窟窿。陆战队员们，各就各位，有敌人来了！

en: Scanner's clean.  Whatever it is, it's gone.
zh: 扫描仪没信号。不管那是什么，已经走了。

en: Hey!  HEY!  Turn on your freaking comlink!
zh: 嘿！嘿！把你那该死的通讯器打开！

en: There's your objective, get in there and deactive the defense grid!
zh: 目标就在那儿，进去关掉防御网！

en: Primary lock is cut.  Secondary lock is cut.  Cutting final interlock.  Done.  Hold up a second, let Jones check it out.
zh: 主锁已切开。副锁已切开。正在切最后一道联锁。搞定。稍等，让 Jones 先去查看。

en: Hey. Good job. The defense grid is down. We've got...
zh: 嘿，干得好。防御网瘫痪了。我们已经……

en: {confused}What the hell?  {scared}They got the main power!
zh: {confused}搞什么鬼？{scared}它们把主电源弄断了！

en: {furrow}Quiet!  Keep your eyes open!
zh: {furrow}安静！都睁大眼睛！

en: They could be anywhere!
zh: 它们可能藏在任何地方！

en: {confused}Who's got a scanner?
zh: {confused}谁带了扫描仪？

en: Gimme a second!
zh: 等我一下！

en: Scanner reads clear.  Whatever happened is already done.
zh: 扫描显示安全。不管刚才发生了什么，都已经结束了。

en: Medic! Medic! Where's the damn medic?
zh: 医疗兵！医疗兵！该死的医疗兵在哪儿？

en: Get your shit wired, Marines! I want this perimeter secured now!
zh: 都给我打起精神来，陆战队员们！立刻把警戒线布好！

en: Uplink established with H Q.
zh: 已与总部建立链路。

en: The Strogg do some seriously weird shit to prisoners.
zh: Strogg 对俘虏干的那些事，真是变态到家了。

en: Yeah, {puzzled}like what?
zh: 是吗，{puzzled}比如说？

en: They remove different organs just to see how long a human can last without em.
zh: 它们把人的器官一个个摘掉，就为了看人没了器官还能撑多久。

en: Hey, buddy! Whats the word? Has the perimeter been secured?
zh: 嘿，伙计！有什么消息？警戒线布好了吗？

en: What the hell? They got to main power!
zh: 搞什么鬼？它们把主电源弄断了！

en: Quiet! Keep your eyes open.
zh: 安静！睁大眼睛。

en: Watch the ceilings.
zh: 注意天花板。

en: Whos got a scanner?
zh: 谁带了扫描仪？

en: Gimmee a second.
zh: 等我一下。

en: Scanner reads clear. Theyre gone.
zh: 扫描显示安全。它们走了。

en: H Q, this is Fox Squad in sector six A. We have engaged the Strogg.
zh: 总部，这里是狐狸小队，位于 6A 区。我们已与 Strogg 交火。

en: Do you require assistance?
zh: 需要支援吗？

en: Affirmative. Send an additional squad immediately.
zh: 需要。请立即增派一个小队。

en: H Q, H Q, our squads pinned down and meeting heavy resistance. Weve run out of... aaaah!
zh: 总部，总部，我队被火力压制，遭遇顽强抵抗。我们的弹药已经……啊——！

en: Sarge. We got movement at bearing 2 2 1. I count six signals.
zh: 中士，方位 221 有动静。我数到六个信号。

en: I want a straight V formation. Holtz, you take point.
zh: 摆一个标准 V 字队形。Holtz，你打头。

en: Got it.
zh: 明白。

en: Dont bunch up and remember to check the ceilings.
zh: 别扎堆，记得留意天花板。

en: Destroyer, U S S Madison, has achieved sub orbital position. Com links established with primary tactical operation H Q. All company commanders transmit sit reps immediately.
zh: 驱逐舰麦迪逊号已进入亚轨道位置。已与主战术指挥总部建立通讯链路。各连指挥官立即上报战况。

en: H Q, we have engaged the Strogg.
zh: 总部，我们已与 Strogg 交火。

en: Roger that. We read you at sector twenty five L.
zh: 收到。定位显示你们在 25L 区。

en: Affirmative, H Q. Were meeting heavy resistance.
zh: 确认，总部。我们遭遇顽强抵抗。

en: Watch the left flank!
zh: 注意左翼！

en: Over here!
zh: 在这边！

en: Throw a charge!
zh: 扔炸药！

en: Get down!
zh: 卧倒！

en: Do you require reinforcements?
zh: 需要增援吗？

en: I repeat. Do you require reinforcements?
zh: 重复，需要增援吗？

en: Negative. The situation is under control.
zh: 不需要。局势已在掌控之中。

en: Private, whats your status?
zh: 列兵，你那边什么情况？

en: Its a difficult job, sir.
zh: 这活儿不好干，长官。

en: Son, I got two dozen Marines anxious to frag some Strogg and this door is keeping them from their fun.
zh: 小子，我这儿有二十几个陆战队员正等着杀 Strogg 解闷呢，就这扇门扫了他们的兴。

en: Another moment sir. Got it!
zh: 再等一下，长官。开了！

en: Good job. Lets go, Marines!
zh: 干得好。出发，陆战队员们！

en: Hey, back it up. The torch is here.
zh: 嘿，都让让，切割枪来了。

en: Ahhh... aaaaah... uuuuh...
Hang on. Helps comin.
zh: 撑住，救援就来。

en: {scared}Medic! I NEED A MEDIC!
zh: {scared}医疗兵！快来医疗兵！

en: Seal it! Seal the damn window now!
zh: 封上！马上把那扇该死的窗户封上！

en: Where the hell did that come from?
zh: 那玩意儿到底是从哪儿冒出来的？

en: Dont know. But we better inform the Sarge.
zh: 不知道。但最好报告中士。

en: Sarge, we got movement on the scanner.
zh: 中士，扫描仪上有动静。

en: Okay, be sure to lay down suppressing...
zh: 好，记得进行火力压制……

en: {scared}Shit. {furrow}You almost got your freakin head ventilated.
zh: {scared}妈的。{furrow}你脑袋差点被打出个窟窿。

en: Marines, take your positions! We got company.
zh: 陆战队员们，各就各位！有敌人来了。

en: Scanners clean. Whatever it was, its gone.
zh: 扫描仪没信号。不管那是什么，已经走了。

en: Hey! HEY!! Turn on your freakin comm link!
zh: 嘿！嘿！！把你那该死的通讯器打开！

en: Theres your objective, Corporal. Get to that console and deactivate the defense grid.
zh: 目标就在那儿，下士。到那个控制台前，关掉防御网。

en: This is Famine Convoy, grid is down.
zh: 这里是「饥荒」车队，防御网已瘫痪。

en: This is Pestilence Convoy, grid is down.
zh: 这里是「瘟疫」车队，防御网已瘫痪。

en: This is War. The Defense Grid is fully deactivated.
zh: 这里是「战争」车队。防御网已完全关闭。

en: Shit! Weve been spotted by Strogg fliers! Theyre coming in for a...
zh: 该死！我们被 Strogg 飞行器发现了！它们正俯冲过来……

en: War. Come in. War, please respond.
zh: 「战争」车队，请回答。「战争」车队，请回应。

en: Kane, we're movin out before the Strogg finds our convoy. We've left a hover tank for you. Grab it and you'll be able to rendezvous with us in no time. Bidwell, out.
zh: Kane，趁 Strogg 还没发现车队，我们先行出发了。给你留了一辆悬浮坦克，开上它很快就能赶上我们。Bidwell 完毕。

en: Wait here. Jones, you take point.
zh: 在这儿等着。Jones，你打头。

en: Gaahhh!
zh: 嘎啊！

en: Primary lock is cut.
zh: 主锁已切开。

en: Secondary lock is cut.
zh: 副锁已切开。

en: Cutting final interlock.
zh: 正在切最后一道联锁。

en: Done.
zh: 搞定。

en: {scared}Were gonna lose this war. I can feel it.
zh: {scared}这场仗我们要输。我有预感。

en: {furrow}Dont you be talkin like that.
zh: {furrow}别说这种丧气话。

en: {scared}Hey, youve heard the news from the front. You know how bad things are.
zh: {scared}嘿，前线的消息你也听到了。情况有多糟你心里清楚。

en: {furrow}I dont know nothin. I do my job and shut the hell up. Just like you should.
zh: {furrow}我什么都不知道。我只管干好自己的活，闭紧嘴巴。你也该这样。

en: Youre part of the Rhino Squad, arent ya? Is it true Sledge over there killed a Strogg with nothing but a lead pipe?
zh: 你是犀牛小队的吧？那边那个 Sledge，真用一根铅管干掉过一个 Strogg？

en: I heard he did it with his bare hands.
zh: 我听说他是赤手空拳干掉的。

en: Hang on, we got Strogg moving in for the kill!
zh: 抓稳了，Strogg 冲上来了，要下死手！

en: Ramming speed!
zh: 全速撞过去！

en: Keep back! We're coming in fast!
zh: 都让开！我们要冲进来了！

en: Take positions! This zone is hot!
zh: 各就各位！这里是交战区！

en: Hey, Kane!
zh: 嘿，Kane！

en: You must be my escort. Nice of you to show up. Lead the way back to this door they want cut.
zh: 你就是护送我的人吧。可算露面了。带路吧，去他们要切开的那扇门。

en: What are you standing around for? Lead me to the door Im supposed to cut!
zh: 还傻站着干什么？带我去我该切的那扇门！

en: Troops are waitin on us, Marine. Get me to that door pronto.
zh: 部队都在等咱们呢，大兵。赶紧带我去那扇门。

en: Damn it! You have to get me to the door Im supposed to cut!
zh: 该死！你得带我去我该切的那扇门！

en: You go ahead and get Newberry to the door they need opened.
zh: 你先走，把 Newberry 带到那扇要开的门那儿去。

en: Don't worry about us. We're stayin' right here.
zh: 别担心我们，我们就守在这儿。

en: Really, kid. Get going.
zh: 真的，小子，快走吧。

en: Thanks for getting us out of there. I thought we were goners.
zh: 多谢把我们救出来。我还以为我们死定了。

en: We were trapped in the tunnel because the power went out and locked us in.
zh: 断电把门全锁死了，我们被困在隧道里出不来。

en: We must have been stuck in that section of tunnel for over three hours.
zh: 我们在那段隧道里少说困了三个多小时。

en: Ah, Corporal Kane. You continue to surprise me by staying alive. Go to Lieutenant Voss in that control room. He has orders for you.
zh: 啊，Kane 下士。你还活着，真是一次次让我意外。去那间控制室找 Voss 中尉，他有命令给你。

en: I don't think it is wise to keep Lieutenant Voss waiting. He is in that control room.
zh: 让 Voss 中尉久等可不明智。他就在那间控制室里。

en: I advise you to go see lutenant Voss immediately.
zh: 我建议你立刻去见 Voss 中尉。

en: {furrow}Corporal, go see lutenant Voss now!
zh: {furrow}下士，马上去见 Voss 中尉！

en: Rhino Squad, huh? You guys are supposed to be pretty badass.
zh: 犀牛小队？听说你们都是狠角色。

en: {puzzled}Yeah, did Rhino really save Austin, back when the Strogg attacked Earth?
zh: {puzzled}对了，当年 Strogg 打地球的时候，奥斯汀真是犀牛小队救下来的？

en: Rodriguez, Singer. Go to containment door twelve. I am running a test.
zh: Rodriguez、Singer，去十二号隔离门。我要做个测试。

en: Rodger that.
zh: 收到。

en: {happy}Glad you made it back, Kane. {idle}Strauss, what's our situation?
zh: {happy}很高兴你回来了，Kane。{idle}Strauss，现在什么情况？

en: I now control almost all containment doors. We cannot reach the controls to turn off the laser fence. The security door is locked and I cannot open it from here.
zh: 隔离门现在几乎都归我控制了。但我们够不到关闭激光栅栏的控制装置——安全门锁着，我在这边打不开。

en: That's where you come in, Kane. Get down to Sub entrance one and free the engineering team that's trapped. Then escort one of the engineers up here to cut through that door. Take Singer and Rodriguez with you. Good luck.
zh: 所以就轮到你了，Kane。下到一号副入口，救出被困的工程队，然后护送一名工程师上来切开那扇门。带上 Singer 和 Rodriguez。祝你好运。

en: You've got your orders, Kane. Move out.
zh: 命令已经下了，Kane。出发。

en: {furrow}Kane, what are you doing here? Get down to Sub Entrance One. We need that engineer ASAP!
zh: {furrow}Kane，你还在这儿干什么？快下到一号副入口。我们急需那位工程师！

en: {furrow}Damn it, Kane. Get to Sub Entrance One now!
zh: {furrow}该死，Kane。立刻去一号副入口！

en: This Strogg technology is very complex. I'm much too busy to talk.
zh: 这套 Strogg 技术非常复杂，我忙得没空闲聊。

en: I have no time to chat. Leave me alone.
zh: 我没时间闲扯。别烦我。

en: {furrow}Go away!
zh: {furrow}走开！

en: {furrow}Why don't you take a step back?
zh: {furrow}你就不能退后一步吗？

en: {furrow}You're gettin' on my nerves, Soldier.
zh: {furrow}你惹毛我了，大兵。

en: {furrow}Please, do not crowd me.
zh: {furrow}拜托，别挤过来。

en: {furrow}I have no time for your games. Get away from me.
zh: {furrow}我没工夫陪你玩，离我远点。

en: Just got orders from lutenant Voss. We're accompanying you to Sub Entrance one.
zh: 刚接到 Voss 中尉的命令，我们陪你去一号副入口。

en: About damn time we get to frag some squibs.
zh: 妈的，可算能宰几个杂碎了。

en: Okay, Strauss. Open the door.
zh: 好了，Strauss，开门吧。

en: I will be locking the door behind you.
zh: 你们过去之后，我会把门锁上。

en: Let's get a move on. We're in Strogg territory.
zh: 抓紧走吧，这里可是 Strogg 的地盘。

en: Come on. We've got orders to get to Sub  entrance one.
zh: 走吧，我们奉命前往一号副入口。

en: Let's go. Those engineers in Sub Entrance one are waiting for us.
zh: 出发吧。一号副入口的工程师们还等着我们呢。

en: Stay quiet or the Strogg will hear us.
zh: 保持安静，不然会被 Strogg 听见。

en: Let's get down to Sub entrance one pronto.
zh: 赶紧下到一号副入口去。

en: We got our orders. Keep moving toward Sub entrance one.
zh: 命令在身，继续朝一号副入口前进。

en: Hit that console and get the elevator up here now!
zh: 快按那个控制台，把电梯升上来！

en: Damn. It's locked. Strauss, can you open this door?
zh: 该死，锁住了。Strauss，这扇门你能打开吗？

en: Negative.
zh: 不能。

en: This door's open. Let's go.
zh: 这扇门开了，走。

en: Kane, what's the hold up? It's imperative you get to Sub Entrance one ASAP.
zh: Kane，你在磨蹭什么？务必尽快赶到一号副入口。

en: To continue you must find the console that manually primes the door to sub entrance two.
zh: 要想继续前进，你得找到那个能手动预启二号副入口大门的控制台。

en: Very good. Now activating the door.
zh: 很好。正在启动大门。

en: Just got word the Engineering team has seen Strogg in their vicinity. Step it up, Kane.
zh: 刚收到消息，工程队在附近发现了 Strogg。加快速度，Kane。

en: Yes, I see where you are. I cannot open that door from here. Find the console that allows you to manually prime it.
zh: 对，我看到你的位置了。那扇门我从这边打不开。去找那个能手动预启它的控制台。

en: Ah, much better.
zh: 啊，这就好多了。

en: The kid here got careless. Didn't check the door before opening it. A Strogg was waitin' for him.
zh: 这小子大意了，开门前没检查。一个 Strogg 正等着他呢。

en: He's lost a lot of blood.
zh: 他失血很多。

en: H Q said a medic would be here in five minutes. That was ten minutes ago.
zh: 总部说医疗兵五分钟就到。那都是十分钟前的事了。

en: {confused}You know what I'm talking about, right? {scared}We're gettin' slaughtered on every front because the Strogg got us out numbered.
zh: {confused}我说的这些你懂吧？{scared}每条战线我们都在被屠杀，因为 Strogg 的数量远超我们。

en: {scared}The third armored walker division fought Strogg infantry about thirty clicks from here. Normally it'd be no contest, but there were so many Strogg, they swarmed the walkers.
zh: {scared}第三装甲机甲师在离这儿三十公里左右和 Strogg 步兵干了一仗。按理说毫无悬念，可 Strogg 实在太多，硬是把机甲给淹没了。

en: {scared}Hey, I'm just tellin' like it is. We're all gonna wind up Strogg.
zh: {scared}嘿，我只是实话实说。我们最后都得变成 Strogg。

en: {furrow}Don't listen to mister Sunshine over there. {idle}I've heard about plenty of battles we've won.
zh: {furrow}别听那边那位「阳光先生」瞎咧咧。{idle}我可听说我们打赢的仗多着呢。

en: We have to stand a chance of winning, {puzzled}right? {idle}I mean, H Q wouldn't just throw away our lives on a lost cause.
zh: 我们总该有赢的机会，{puzzled}对吧？{idle}我是说，总部不会拿我们的命去填一场必输的仗。

en: {furrow}We're gonna win this war, damn it. The Strogg can't be allowed to attack Earth again.
zh: {furrow}这场战争我们一定会赢，妈的。绝不能让 Strogg 再打到地球去。

en: {puzzled}You've heard the stories about what the Strogg do to prisoners, haven't ya?
zh: {puzzled}Strogg 怎么处置俘虏的那些传闻，你听说过吧？

en: {furrow}We're like animals to the freaks. They have no problems experimenting on us.
zh: {furrow}在那帮怪胎眼里我们就是牲口，拿我们做实验眼都不眨一下。

en: {furrow}I think we're gonna be in for a big shock if we ever storm one of their prisons.
zh: {furrow}真要是哪天攻进它们的监狱，我们怕是会被吓个半死。

en: {scared}Shit, did you see that? {idle}I thought I was dead meat.
zh: {scared}妈的，你看见没？{idle}我还以为自己死定了。

en: The squibs are tryin' to psyche us out and it's starting to work.
zh: 那帮杂碎在打心理战，而且还真开始见效了。

en: You can't take three steps around here without checkin' over your shoulder.
zh: 在这地方走三步就得回头看一眼。

en: Watch your step, Marine. This place is crawlin' with squibs.
zh: 走路当心点，大兵。这地方到处都是杂碎。

en: The Strogg are testing our defenses, hitting us in one place and pulling back, then hitting us in another.
zh: Strogg 在试探我们的防线：打一下就撤，换个地方再打。

en: So far we've done a damn good job of holdin' the squibs back. We just have to keep it up.
zh: 到目前为止，我们把杂碎挡得死死的。保持下去就行。

en: This hit and run bullshit by the freaks is getting to be real annoying.
zh: 这帮怪胎打了就跑的把戏，真是越来越烦人了。

en: Biessman was attacked a few minutes ago. Poor bastard opened a door and wound up flat on his back with a Strogg chewin' on his neck.
zh: Biessman 几分钟前遇袭了。可怜的家伙刚开门就被扑倒在地，一个 Strogg 死死咬住他的脖子。

en: Hey, you seen Biessman? I wonder how he's doin?
zh: 嘿，你见到 Biessman 了吗？不知道他现在怎么样了。

en: Hey, {puzzled}didn't I see you around the Air Defense Cannon? {idle}Yeah, you were part of the team that took the gun.
zh: 嘿，{puzzled}我是不是在防空炮那儿见过你？{idle}对，你就是夺炮小队的人。

en: {happy}You Marines got a major set of balls to storm a cannon like that. {idle}You could have just set charges around it and blown it up.
zh: {happy}你们这帮陆战队员胆子真够肥的，居然硬冲那门炮。{idle}明明在四周装点炸药，一炸了事就行。

en: {happy}Using the Strogg's own cannon to destroy the door was brilliant, absolutely brilliant.
zh: {happy}用 Strogg 自己的炮轰开那扇门，绝了，实在是绝了。

en: Kane, this is Voss. Grab a ride with Corporal Spencer. Hes in a truck nearby. Report to Sergeant Bidwell when you get to the Death convoy. Voss, out.
zh: Kane，我是 Voss。搭 Spencer 下士的车，他就在附近的一辆卡车上。到了「死亡」车队后，向 Bidwell 中士报到。Voss 完毕。

en: This is Eagle three on flyby, if theres Strogg in the area, theyre keeping out of sight.
zh: 这里是雄鹰三号，正在空中巡查。就算这一带有 Strogg，它们也躲得严严实实。

en: If youre the one needin a ride to the convoy, you better haul ass in that direction, Marine. From the sound of it, theyre gettin tired of waitin on you.
zh: 要搭车去车队的是你吧？那就赶紧朝那边跑，大兵。听那口气，他们等你都等得不耐烦了。

en: Watch yourself. This zone is not completely free of Strogg.
zh: 自己当心，这片区域还没完全肃清 Strogg。

en: No matter how many times we make a sweep of this area we still run into Strogg.
zh: 这片区域扫荡多少遍都没用，照样能撞见 Strogg。

en: Keep your head down. Theres no tellin when more of the bastards will pop up.
zh: 把头压低点，谁知道那帮混蛋什么时候又冒出来。

en: This is Walker 4 of Bison Squad on patrol. All clear.
zh: 这里是野牛小队四号机甲，巡逻中。一切安全。

en: Hey! Hey, Corporal Kane! Get over here on the double!
zh: 嘿！嘿，Kane 下士！跑步过来，快点！

en: Corporal Kane, Lieutenant Voss said youd be riding with us. Hop on up and well get going.
zh: Kane 下士，Voss 中尉说你跟我们一辆车。快上来，我们这就出发。

en: All right, Doyle. Get this shit heap moving.
zh: 好了，Doyle，把这堆破铜烂铁开起来。

en: Roger that. Lets move out.
zh: 收到。出发。

en: You got any idea how far into Strogg territory these convoys are goin?
zh: 你知道这些车队要往 Strogg 的地盘里开多深吗？

en: Far enough that youre gonna have to be fluent in Strogg if you wanna ask for directions.
zh: 深到你要想问个路，都得会一口流利的 Strogg 话。

en: {happy}Heh, guess we better not get lost, huh?
zh: {happy}呵，那咱们最好别迷路，是吧？

en: You got that right.
zh: 说得没错。

en: Kane here was with the squad that took that cannon out.
zh: 这位 Kane，就是端掉那门炮的小队里的人。

en: {puzzled}No shit? {idle}Nice work, soldier. Shuttin that down allowed the Hannibal to land. This is the only area on Stroggos we really control.
zh: {puzzled}真的假的？{idle}干得漂亮，大兵。那门炮一停，汉尼拔号才降得下来。这可是我们在 Stroggos 上唯一真正控制的区域。

en: We got nothin to worry about. Rhino squad is here. Right, Kane?
zh: 咱们没什么好怕的，犀牛小队在这儿呢。对吧，Kane？

en: Yeah, you boys have pulled off all sorts of impossible shit, havent you?
zh: 是啊，你们这帮家伙什么不可能的事都干成过，不是吗？

en: Theyre still talkin about what Rhino did in Dallas, during the Earth invasion.
zh: 地球保卫战那会儿犀牛小队在达拉斯的事迹，到现在还有人念叨呢。

en: Taking out an entire command center all by themselves. With talent like that, we got no worries at all.
zh: 单凭自己就端掉了一整个指挥中心。有这种本事的人在，咱们一点都不用愁。

en: Cut the chatter, gentlemen, and keep your eyes wide. Theres reports of Strogg in this area.
zh: 少闲聊，先生们，眼睛都放亮点。有报告说这一带有 Strogg。

en: Have you heard how things are going along the front?
zh: 你听说前线的战况了吗？

en: Same as usual. Soldiers are fightin and dyin and neither sides winnin.
zh: 老样子。士兵们打着、死着，可两边谁也赢不了。

en: The thing is though, we cant keep this battle up much longer. Weve got to win it soon or were just gonna run out of men.
zh: 问题是，这么耗下去撑不了多久。再不速战速决，我们的人就要拼光了。

en: And thats exactly why these convoys are going out, to tip the scales in our favor.
zh: 所以才要派出这些车队——为的就是把胜利的天平扳向我们这边。

en: {scared}What the hell is that?
zh: {scared}那到底是什么鬼东西？

en: I don't know and I don't wanna find out. C'mon Doyle! Get us out of here!
zh: 我不知道，也不想知道。快，Doyle！带我们离开这儿！

en: {happy}Woo hoo! Another flier bites it! {idle}Destroying the Strogg hangars really gave our flyboys the advantage they needed to gain air superiority in this zone.
zh: {happy}哇哦！又一架飞行器完蛋了！{idle}端掉 Strogg 机库这一手，真是让咱们的飞行员在这片空域占尽了上风。

en: You might want to keep your head down, Kane. This place is full of Strogg.
zh: 头最好压低点，Kane。这地方到处是 Strogg。

en: All right, Marines, keep on our toes. We might control this area, but the Strogg still like to make hit and run attacks.
zh: 好了，陆战队员们，都打起精神。这片区域虽说归我们控制，可 Strogg 还是喜欢打了就跑地偷袭。

en: The Strogg have got a squad pinned down!
zh: Strogg 把一支小队压制住了！

en: Hop on the last truck. We'll get you out of here!
zh: 跳上最后那辆卡车，我们带你们撤！

en: Move it, Marines! Go! Go! Go!
zh: 快跑，陆战队员们！上！上！上！

en: That flier just took out the end truck!
zh: 那架飞行器把队尾的卡车干掉了！

en: The flier's making a seond pass. I can't get a lock on him.
zh: 飞行器又绕回来了。我锁定不了它。

en: Don't worry. We got his ass dead in our sights.
zh: 别慌，它已经死死咬在我们的准星里了。

en: Ambush! Let's light em up!
zh: 有埋伏！给我狠狠打！

en: Cmon, bitch! Get a little closer!!
zh: 来啊，贱货！再靠近点！！

en: See any more Strogg?
zh: 还看得到 Strogg 吗？

en: Hey, squib! That all you freakin got?
zh: 嘿，杂碎！你就这么点能耐？

en: Dont be getting near me if you dont wanna die!
zh: 不想死就别靠近我！

en: Send some more friends my way!
zh: 再多叫几个同伙来送死啊！

en: You aint so bad!
zh: 你也不过如此！

en: Oooorah!
zh: 呜——啦！

en: You enjoying the show, Kane?
zh: 这场好戏看得过瘾吧，Kane？

en: Hooie, this is gettin fun.
zh: 嚯，越来越有意思了。

en: Damn this gun gets hot.
zh: 妈的，这枪烫得厉害。

en: Holy shit! A dropship's gonna auger in!
zh: 我操！一艘运输船要栽下来了！

en: Those poor bastards.
zh: 那些可怜的家伙。

en: So this where Raven squad got it?
zh: 渡鸦小队就是在这儿全灭的？

en: Yup, they took the brunt of it. Poor bastards never knew what they were walking into.
zh: 对，最狠的火力全砸他们头上了。可怜的家伙们到死都不知道自己踏进了什么鬼地方。

en: This is Walker 12 of Bison squad. Got a bogie at 6 o clock.
zh: 这里是野牛小队十二号机甲。六点钟方向发现不明目标。

en: Ive got signal lock. Hes not getting away from me this time.
zh: 信号已锁定。这次它别想从我手里溜掉。

en: Where the hell did he go?
zh: 它到底跑哪儿去了？

en: The target has been eliminated. Score one for the good guys.
zh: 目标已消灭。好人这边得一分。

en: You can get off, Kane. This is your stop.
zh: 可以下车了，Kane。你到站了。

en: See you around.
zh: 回头见。

en: Kane, this is voss. We can't move the convoy forward until you take out the Strogg turrets ahead.
zh: Kane，我是 Voss。你不把前面的 Strogg 炮塔清掉，车队就没法前进。

en: Get that door closed now!
zh: 马上把那扇门关上！

en: Ah, I see the proverbial bad penny has turned up yet again. Sergeant Bidwell is waiting for you at the front of this tunnel.
zh: 啊，俗话说得好，祸害遗千年——你又出现了。Bidwell 中士在隧道前头等你。

en: {furrow}Perhaps you do not realize that Sergeant Bidwell is not a man to be kept waiting.
zh: {furrow}你恐怕还没搞清楚，Bidwell 中士可不是个能让人晾着的主儿。

en: If I were you, I would go and find Sergeant Bidwell as soon as possible. He can be much more frightening than any Strogg.
zh: 换成我，就赶紧去找 Bidwell 中士。他发起火来可比任何 Strogg 都吓人。

en: {furrow}Kane, find Sergeant Bidwell immediately.
zh: {furrow}Kane，立刻去找 Bidwell 中士。

en: Kane, we got landmines ahead. Youre gonna have to shoot em to detonate em.
zh: Kane，前面有地雷。你得开枪把它们引爆。

en: Crap, that must be one of those drop turrets. Theyre dropped by stealth air units flying in low orbit. Intel says these buggers are nasty.
zh: 见鬼，那肯定是那种空投炮塔，由低轨道上的隐形飞行器投放。情报说这玩意儿相当难缠。

en: H Q, this is Famine. We are in transit now.
zh: 总部，这里是「饥荒」车队。我们已经上路。

en: Roger that, Famine. Pestilence is already underway. Godspeed.
zh: 收到，「饥荒」车队。「瘟疫」车队已经出发。一路顺风。

en: Ah, Corporal Kane, I trust you are ready for our mission. {happy}Its not everyday you get to save the Earth, eh?
zh: 啊，Kane 下士，想必你已经为任务做好准备了。{happy}拯救地球的机会可不是天天有，对吧？

en: But is it really a surprise that Sledge could {puzzled}defeat a Strogg? {idle}Look at him. Hes as big as a Russian bear.
zh: 不过话说回来，Sledge 能{puzzled}打赢一个 Strogg 很意外吗？{idle}瞧瞧他，块头跟俄国棕熊一样大。

en: H Q, this is War.
zh: 总部，这里是「战争」车队。

en: This is H Q, go ahead.
zh: 这里是总部，请讲。

en: We are proceeding to checkpoint one.
zh: 我们正前往一号检查点。

en: Kane, this is Voss. Keep your eyes open. Intelligence is reporting a high concentration of Strogg in your vicinity.
zh: Kane，我是 Voss。提高警惕，情报显示你附近有大量 Strogg 集结。

en: H Q, this is Eagle eight. We are doing a flyby of Famine. Everything is in the green.
zh: 总部，这里是雄鹰八号。正在对「饥荒」车队进行空中巡查，一切正常。

en: {puzzled}Have you heard the claim to fame of our very own Nikolai Slidjonovitch? {idle}He is the only human to have ever killed a Strogg with his bare hands.
zh: {puzzled}你听说过咱们这位 Nikolai Slidjonovitch 的成名事迹吗？{idle}他可是唯一一个赤手空拳杀死过 Strogg 的人类。

en: What makes Sledges encounter truly impressive is that he had a bullet lodged in his left lung during the battle.
zh: Sledge 那一战真正了不起的地方在于：交手时他左肺里还卡着一颗子弹。

en: Kane, you have to exit your tank to open the doors. But watch yourself. The Strogg might be waiting in ambush.
zh: Kane，你得下坦克才能开门。多加小心，Strogg 可能设了埋伏。

en: H Q, this is Death. We are moving forward and will keep you apprised of our status.
zh: 总部，这里是「死亡」车队。我们正在推进，会随时通报状况。

en: Youre doing a great job, Corporal. But keep sharp, theres still reports of Strogg in the area.
zh: 干得很出色，下士。但保持警觉，仍有报告说这一带有 Strogg。

en: H Q, H Q, this is War. We are under attack from Strogg infantry.
zh: 总部，总部，这里是「战争」车队。我们正遭到 Strogg 步兵袭击。

en: Roger that, War. Air support has been dispatched.
zh: 收到，「战争」车队。空中支援已经出动。

en: War, this is Eagle nine. You might want to duck and cover. This is going to get messy.
zh: 「战争」车队，这里是雄鹰九号。你们最好低头找好掩护，场面马上会很难看。

en: Woo hoo! Nice shootin, Eagle nine.
zh: 哇哦！打得漂亮，雄鹰九号。

en: My pleasure.
zh: 乐意效劳。

en: H Q, this is War. We are resuming our mission.
zh: 总部，这里是「战争」车队。我们继续执行任务。

en: H Q, this is Pestilence. We have reached check point one and are proceeding to check point two.
zh: 总部，这里是「瘟疫」车队。我们已抵达一号检查点，正前往二号检查点。

en: Death, this is H Q. What is your status?
zh: 「死亡」车队，这里是总部。报告你们的状况。

en: We are in the green and proceeding forward.
zh: 一切正常，正在继续推进。

en: Very good. H Q out.
zh: 很好。总部完毕。

en: Good job back there, Kane. You kept em off us. Heres your stop. Go ahead and get off.
zh: 刚才干得漂亮，Kane，是你把它们挡住的。你到站了，下车吧。

en: Its been a pleasure, Kane. Watch yourself.
zh: 合作愉快，Kane。自己当心。

en: Kane, this is Voss. You see that laser fence in front of you? Were gonna need your help taking it down.
zh: Kane，我是 Voss。看到你面前那道激光栅栏了吗？我们需要你帮忙把它弄掉。

en: H Q! H Q! This is the convoy Famine!! The Strogg have launched missiles on us.
zh: 总部！总部！这里是「饥荒」车队！！Strogg 朝我们发射了导弹。

en: Famine, this is H Q. Air support is on its way.
zh: 「饥荒」车队，这里是总部。空中支援正在赶来。

en: Negative. Do not send back up. The area is swarming with Strogg. Were a lost cause.
zh: 不必了。不要派增援，这一带全是 Strogg。我们已经没救了。

en: Kane, you still there? Were down to three convoys so haul ass meet me at the building just up ahead. We need you to take down that fence. Voss, out.
zh: Kane，还在吗？车队只剩三支了，赶紧跑步到前面那栋建筑跟我会合。我们需要你把那道栅栏弄掉。Voss 完毕。

en: What the hell are we doing messing with a bomb like this?
zh: 我们到底为什么要摆弄这么个炸弹？

en: Whats the worry? You got a pacemaker?
zh: 慌什么？你装了心脏起搏器？

en: I know an electromagnetic burst wont hurt us, but if this thing went off, the charge would fry every piece of electronic gear for half a mile.
zh: 我知道电磁脉冲伤不了人，可这玩意儿一旦引爆，方圆半英里的电子设备全得烧成废铁。

en: Dont worry, this isnt really a bomb, at least not a conventional one. Theres no explosion.
zh: 别担心，这其实算不上炸弹，至少不是常规炸弹。它不会爆炸。

en: What this device does is generate a magnetic pulse. A wave of energy that overloads any nearby electrical equipment.
zh: 这个装置的作用是产生磁脉冲——一股能让附近所有电气设备过载的能量波。

en: This bomb will burn out every electronic device in a half mile radius.
zh: 这颗炸弹能烧毁半英里半径内的所有电子设备。

en: Doesnt it make you nervous were heading in the opposite direction of everyone else?
zh: 大部队都往那边走，咱们偏偏反着来，你就不发怵吗？

en: Its meant to draw the Strogg forces away from us.
zh: 那是为了把 Strogg 的兵力从我们这边引开。

en: But what if were caught? The Strogg could turn around and use our E M P bombs against us.
zh: 可万一被抓住呢？Strogg 转手就能用我们的 EMP 炸弹来对付我们。

en: Im sure H Qs thought of that. At least I hope they have.
zh: 总部肯定考虑过这点。至少我希望他们考虑过。

en: I know the Rhino Squad is badass, but we really need more security on this convoy.
zh: 我知道犀牛小队很能打，可这支车队真该多派点警卫。

en: You know where wed be if the Strogg captured an E M P and set it off near the Hannibal? Wed be fightin the rest of this war with rocks and sticks.
zh: 你知道要是 Strogg 缴获一颗 EMP，在汉尼拔号旁边引爆会怎样吗？这场仗剩下的日子，我们就只能拿石头和棍子打了。

en: I know the war isnt exactly going our way, but this mission is too risky. Seems like we stand a good chance of making things a lot worse for ourselves.
zh: 我知道战局对我们不算有利，可这次任务风险太大了。搞不好反而把我们自己坑得更惨。

en: Hannibal, this is Death. Do you read?
zh: 汉尼拔号，这里是「死亡」车队。能收到吗？

en: Affirmative Death. Now switching to frequency 5 1 2.
zh: 收到，「死亡」车队。正在切换到 512 频率。

en: Roger that. Switching to frequency five one two now.
zh: 明白。现在切换到 512 频率。

en: I cant believe the level of security on this mission. I tried calling home and a couple of M Ps jumped me. Said I couldnt have any outside access.
zh: 这次任务的保密级别真是离谱。我就想往家里打个电话，立马被两个宪兵按住，说我不许和外界有任何联系。

en: Even if I was stupid enough to say something about our mission, it takes six freakin hours for messages to reach home. Were gonna be done long before that.
zh: 就算我蠢到把任务说漏了嘴，消息传回家也得六个钟头。那时候我们早就完事了。

en: Besides that do they think my Moms a Strogg sympathizer?
zh: 再说了，难道他们还怀疑我妈通 Strogg 不成？

en: Can you imagine the party for us back on Earth when this is over? Were gonna be war heroes!
zh: 你能想象打完仗回到地球，给咱们办的庆功会吗？我们可是战争英雄！

en: And, seein as how were the brave warriors who protected Earth, the girls are gonna be very appreciative. Oh, its gonna be a sweet time.
zh: 再说了，咱们可是保卫地球的勇士，姑娘们还不得对咱们感激涕零？哦，那日子想想都美。

en: But Im not quitting the Corps, even after the war is over. Its the perfect place for a man of my skills... and temperament.
zh: 不过就算仗打完了，我也不打算退伍。这地方太适合我这种有本事……又有脾气的人了。

en: {furrow}Kane! Where the hell have you been? Lieutenant Voss wants you to catch up with him. {idle}Hop on that truck and theyll get you where you need to be.
zh: {furrow}Kane！你死哪儿去了？Voss 中尉要你去跟他会合。{idle}跳上那辆卡车，他们会把你送到地方。

en: {furrow}What are you doin wasting my time? Get on that truck and get movin.
zh: {furrow}你在这儿浪费我时间干什么？上那辆卡车，赶紧走。

en: {furrow}Kane, you are tryin my patience. Get on that damn truck now!
zh: {furrow}Kane，你是在挑战我的耐性。立刻给我上那辆该死的卡车！

en: {furrow}Corporal, get on that truck before I throw your sorry ass on it myself!
zh: {furrow}下士，快上那辆卡车，别逼我亲手把你扔上去！

en: Welcome aboard, Corporal Kane. I hope youre handy with that weapon. Were gonna traveling through some pretty hot zones.
zh: 欢迎上车，Kane 下士。希望你那把枪使得顺手，我们要穿过几片相当危险的交战区。

en: There, to the left!
zh: 那儿，左边！

en: Over on the left!
zh: 在左边！

en: To your left!
zh: 你的左边！

en: Theres more on the left!
zh: 左边还有！

en: Look left!
zh: 看左边！

en: To the right!
zh: 右边！

en: Over to the right!
zh: 在右边！

en: On the right!
zh: 就在右边！

en: There, to your right!
zh: 那儿，你的右边！

en: Look right!
zh: 看右边！

en: Weve been hit!
zh: 我们中弹了！

en: Youve gotta stop em, Kane!
zh: 你得拦住它们，Kane！

en: Were takin damage!
zh: 我们一直在挨打！

en: Hey! Theyre hittin us!
zh: 嘿！它们在打我们！

en: Shoot em, damn it!
zh: 开枪打它们啊，妈的！

en: Kane, this is Morris. Youre supposed to take that vehicle elevator just ahead. From there you shouldnt have any trouble hooking up with us. Morris out.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。走前面那部载具电梯上来，之后跟我们会合应该就不难了。Morris 完毕。

en: H Q, this is Armadillo Squad. We entered the vehicle tunnels just as the power went out. Now were trapped because all doors are in lockdown. Well keep you apprised of our situation.
zh: 总部，这里是犰狳小队。我们刚进载具隧道就断电了。现在所有门都进入封锁状态，我们被困住了。有情况会随时向你们通报。

en: Kane, this is Lieutenant Voss. Head towards the facility dead ahead. See you there. Voss, out.
zh: Kane，我是 Voss 中尉。朝正前方的设施前进，我们在那儿碰头。Voss 完毕。

en: An admirable job, Corporal.
zh: 干得可圈可点，下士。

en: Quite easily because I won. Pay up.
zh: 很简单，因为我赢了。掏钱吧。

en: All right. All right. Hey, what do ya say we go for double or nothing? That okay with you, Kane?
zh: 行行行。嘿，要不咱们来把双倍或全免？Kane，你没意见吧？

en: ha ha ha
zh: 哈哈哈

en: What's the meaning of this?
zh: 这是什么意思？

en: Yes?
zh: 什么事？

en: Yes, sir. What is it?
zh: 是，长官。什么事？

en: But sir. Kane just got back.
zh: 可是长官，Kane 才刚回来。

en: Yes, sir. I'll see to it.
zh: 是，长官。我这就去办。

en: Kane, you have new orders...
zh: Kane，你有新的命令……

en: An admirable job? What the hell are you talkin about? Kane kicked the Makrons ass! Good job, buddy!
zh: 可圈可点？你说的这是什么屁话？Kane 把 Makron 揍了个稀巴烂！干得漂亮，伙计！

en: Come on back in, Kane. Your work's done.
zh: 回来吧，Kane。你的活儿干完了。

en: The Makron's dead and the Nexus is destroyed. Not a bad bit of work, Kane.
zh: Makron 死了，Nexus 也毁了。干得不赖，Kane。

en: And because of that, we have finally established a foothold on Stroggos.
zh: 正因如此，我们终于在 Stroggos 上站稳了脚跟。

en: It is more than just a foothold, Strauss. The Strogg forces are falling back as quickly as we can chase after them. And that is due entirely to the efforts of one man, Corporal Kane.
zh: 这可不只是站稳脚跟，Strauss。Strogg 部队正在全线溃退，我们追都追不上。而这一切，全靠一个人的功劳——Kane 下士。

en: lutenant Voss would have been proud of ya, buddy. You survived the impossible.
zh: Voss 中尉要是还在，一定会为你骄傲，伙计。你从绝境里活着回来了。

en: And speaking of that, there is the small matter of the wager I have won. Kane still lives.
zh: 说到这个，还有件小事——我赢的那个赌。Kane 还活着。

en: Alex, how could you bring up money at a time like this?
zh: Alex，都什么时候了，你还提钱？

en: Corporal Kane, can you hear me? Hopefully the shielding around the Core will not completely block my signal.
zh: Kane 下士，听得到吗？但愿核心周围的屏蔽层不会把我的信号完全隔断。

en: Kane. Security has been activated and The Core is lowering back into the ground. You are being sealed in the building and completely cut off from our help. But I will continue to track you as best I can. Remember your primary goal is to locate and destroy the Nexus.
zh: Kane，安保系统已经启动，核心正在沉回地下。你会被封死在建筑里，完全得不到我们的支援。但我会尽力持续追踪你。记住，你的首要目标是找到并摧毁 Nexus。

en: I must admit to being envious of you, Corporal Kane. The technology you are witnessing must be truly spectacular.
zh: 我必须承认我很嫉妒你，Kane 下士。你亲眼所见的科技，想必蔚为壮观。

en: Intruder detected in Security Bay. Tactical team dispatched.
zh: 安保区检测到入侵者。战术小队已出动。

en: Core security set to full alert.
zh: 核心安保进入全面警戒。

en: Invader detected. Terminate immediately.
zh: 检测到入侵者。立即消灭。

en: Teleportation to exterior locations deactivated.
zh: 通往外部地点的传送已关闭。

en: Scanners activated.
zh: 扫描器已启动。

en: Corporal Kane, you must find an elevator to the lower levels. There you will locate the Nexus.
zh: Kane 下士，你必须找到通往下层的电梯。Nexus 就在那里。

en: You are about to enter the room that houses the Nexus, Corporal Kane. Watch yourself, security will be at its strongest there.
zh: 你就要进入安置 Nexus 的房间了，Kane 下士。当心，那里的安保是最严密的。

en: You did it, Kane! You are now looking at a sight only the Makron has ever laid eyes on. The Nexus is the backbone of the Strogg war machine. Destroy it, and you save Earth.
zh: 你做到了，Kane！你眼前的景象，从前只有 Makron 亲眼见过。Nexus 是 Strogg 战争机器的支柱。摧毁它，你就拯救了地球。

en: This is H Q to all squads. A Marine named Matthew Kane is missing but presumed to be enroute to the waste level. Despite his Strogg appearance, he is friend not foe. Be careful of your targets.
zh: 总部呼叫各小队。陆战队员 Matthew Kane 目前失踪，推测正在前往废料层。虽然他外表像 Strogg，但他是友非敌。开火前务必认清目标。

en: What is this place?
zh: 这是什么地方？

en: It's where the Strogg ship Stroyant to their troops.
zh: Strogg 就是在这里把 Stroyent 输送给部队的。

en: What's Stroyant?
zh: Stroyent 是什么？

en: Food for the Strogg.
zh: Strogg 的食物。

en: It sure as hell reeks.
zh: 这味儿可真他妈冲。

en: To any Marines... Head to the Waste Facility. Just outside is your extraction point.
zh: 全体陆战队员……前往废料处理厂。撤离点就在厂外。

en: Holy shit! They've got machines here chopping up the bodies of captured Marines.
zh: 妈的！这里的机器在把被俘陆战队员的尸体剁碎。

en: That's what Stroyant is. They get rid of the body armor and bones, then they liquefy the flesh and add steroids.
zh: 这就是 Stroyent 的来历。他们先去掉盔甲和骨头，再把血肉液化，掺进类固醇。

en: This is Sasaki of Kodiak Squad. My squad was ambushed. I’m the only survivor. What are my orders?
zh: 我是棕熊小队的 Sasaki。小队遭到伏击，只有我一个人活下来了。请指示。

en: This is Cobra squad in the Waste Level. We're under attack! Three men are dead and Lieutenant Melendez is missing! Any teams nearby, please respond.
zh: 这里是废料层的眼镜蛇小队。我们遭到攻击！三人阵亡，Melendez 中尉失踪！附近的小队，请回话。

en: Morrison this is Cooper. We're in the level just below you and we're meeting heavy resistance. Get down here ASAP!
zh: Morrison，我是 Cooper。我们就在你们下面一层，遭遇顽强抵抗。赶紧下来支援！

en: To all Marines. Meet up at the primary extraction point just outside the Waste facility.
zh: 全体陆战队员注意。到废料处理厂外的主撤离点集合。

en: This is Cobra squad. We are entering the Waste Level.
zh: 这里是眼镜蛇小队。我们正在进入废料层。

en: H Q, this is Condor squad. Request permission to retreat. We have sustained heavy casualties.
zh: 总部，这里是神鹰小队。请求批准撤退。我们伤亡惨重。

en: Request granted, Condor squad. Return to the extraction point outside the waste facility.
zh: 批准撤退，神鹰小队。返回废料处理厂外的撤离点。

en: Roger that H Q.
zh: 收到，总部。

en: {scared}Shit, you need to be careful, I thought you were one of those freaks!
zh: {scared}妈的，你可小心点，我还以为你是那帮怪胎！

en: {puzzled}Rhino Squad, eh?
zh: {puzzled}犀牛小队的，是吧？

en: {puzzled}So what are we gonna do here?
zh: {puzzled}那我们在这儿要干什么？

en: Our mission's to clear hostiles out of the hangars so a demolitions team can work safely. Unfortunately comlink signals can't penetrate the rock of this mountain.
zh: 我们的任务是清除机库里的敌人，好让爆破组安全作业。可惜通讯信号穿不透这座山的岩层。

en: I suppose I could stay here and relay the com signals for you guys.
zh: 要不我留在这儿，帮你们中继通讯信号。

en: {happy}That'd be great. C'mon, let's go.
zh: {happy}那太好了。走，出发。

en: Viper Squad, this is Morris. H Q's finally located a demolition team for the hangars. They should be there soon.
zh: 毒蛇小队，我是 Morris。总部总算给机库找到了一支爆破组，他们应该很快就到。

en: Thanks, Morris. Viper Squad, out.
zh: 多谢，Morris。毒蛇小队，完毕。

en: C'mon. We gotta move fast.
zh: 走吧，我们得快点。

en: {furrow}You should be the one who has to hang back while I get to frag Strogg.
zh: {furrow}该留守的是你才对，让我去宰 Strogg。

en: {furrow}Here I am, the most talented war machine ever trained by the Marine Corps, and I'm kept out of action.
zh: {furrow}我，陆战队有史以来训练出的最天才的战争机器，居然被晾在一边没仗打。

en: Go. Just go. But ice a few freaks for me, would ya?
zh: 走吧走吧。不过替我多干掉几个怪胎，行不？

en: {furrow}Ya mind? You're crowding me.
zh: {furrow}介意让让吗？你都快贴到我身上了。

en: {furrow}What? What do you want?
zh: {furrow}干嘛？你想怎样？

en: There's no time to jaw. We gotta take out those hangars.
zh: 没时间闲扯了，我们得去端掉那些机库。

en: {furrow}Kid, men are dyin' every second we allow those hangars to operate.
zh: {furrow}小子，机库多运转一秒，就有弟兄在送命。

en: Why don't we just keep movin'?
zh: 我们还是继续前进吧？

en: The Strogg hangars operate on the same principle as old Earth aircraft carriers
zh: Strogg 机库的运作原理，和地球上的老式航空母舰如出一辙。

en: Strogg fliers are pretty much thrown out of the hangars like a rock in a kid's slingshot.
zh: Strogg 飞行器基本上是被机库甩出去的，就像小孩弹弓里射出的石子。

en: Strogg machinery is an odd combination of high and low tech. I guess once they find something that works, they don't try to improve it.
zh: Strogg 的机械是高科技和土办法的古怪结合。我猜他们只要发现什么好使，就懒得再改进了。

en: {puzzled}Are you the Matthew Kane everyone was talking about a few months back?
zh: {puzzled}你就是几个月前大家都在议论的那个 Matthew Kane？

en: {confused}Are you really under orders not to discuss what happened on that space station?
zh: {confused}上头真下了命令，不许你谈那个空间站上发生的事？

en: {puzzled}C'mon. What really happened up there?
zh: {puzzled}说嘛，上面到底发生了什么？

en: Here. Take Lieutenant Hughes weapon. I dont think hes gonna be needing it anytime soon.
zh: 给，拿上 Hughes 中尉的武器。我看他一时半会儿是用不上了。

en: {confused}Corporal Kane, right? {idle}I'm Corporal Mahler.
zh: {confused}Kane 下士，对吧？{idle}我是 Mahler 下士。

en: {furrow}Strogg fliers are a tremendous pain in the ass to our ground forces so it's our mission to destroy those hangars.
zh: {furrow}Strogg 飞行器让我们的地面部队吃尽了苦头，所以我们的任务就是摧毁那些机库。

en: Once we disable the hangars all these fliers'll be useless.
zh: 只要瘫痪机库，这些飞行器就全成废铁了。

en: {furrow}Damn. The door's locked and it's our only way through.
zh: {furrow}该死。门锁死了，这可是唯一的通路。

en: That window's reinforced glass. It'd take a lot more than our weapons to break it.
zh: 那扇窗是强化玻璃，光凭我们这些武器可打不破。

en: Hey, Kane. You're the scout. {puzzled}Why don't you see if there's another way into that section?
zh: 嘿，Kane，你是侦察兵。{puzzled}去看看有没有别的路能进那片区域？

en: {puzzled}What the Sam Hill's going on?
zh: {puzzled}这到底是搞什么名堂？

en: {confused}Kane, what are you doing?
zh: {confused}Kane，你在干什么？

en: {furrow}Son of a bitch! {scared}You're gonna kill us!
zh: {furrow}狗娘养的！{scared}你会害死我们的！

en: {happy}It worked! Good job, Kane!
zh: {happy}成功了！干得漂亮，Kane！

en: {happy}I bet the eggheads back at H Q would love to get their hands on this baby.
zh: {happy}我敢说总部那帮书呆子肯定想把这宝贝弄到手。

en: {puzzled}Wow, would ya look how they store their aircraft?  {idle}We could learn a lot from this place.
zh: {puzzled}哇，瞧瞧他们存放飞行器的方式。{idle}这地方能让我们学到不少东西。

en: {confused}Shit, no wonder they're giving our infantry so much trouble. {idle}Look at the number of fliers they got.
zh: {confused}妈的，难怪我们步兵被折腾得够呛。{idle}瞧瞧他们这飞行器的数量。

en: {furrow}Keep your shit wired tight. {idle}Were the first humans to ever set foot here and you can bet your ass we arent welcome.
zh: {furrow}都给我打起十二分精神。{idle}我们是头一批踏上这里的人类，我敢打包票，这儿不欢迎我们。

en: Aint this just fuckin sweet? Hold up a sec.
zh: 这可真他妈带劲，是吧？停一下。

en: Stay calm.
zh: 保持冷静。

en: Dont let em spook ya.
zh: 别被它们吓住。

en: Hold up.
zh: 停下。

en: Ready? . . . Go!
zh: 准备好了？……上！

en: {furrow}Cease fire! Cease fire!
zh: {furrow}停火！停火！

en: {furrow}Hold your fire!
zh: {furrow}别开枪！

en: The area appears secure. Hey, Morris, whats the E T A on the demo team?
zh: 这片区域看来安全了。嘿，Morris，爆破组还要多久到？

en: Lock and load!
zh: 子弹上膛！

en: {scared}Holy shit! Take those turrets out now!
zh: {scared}妈的！快把那些炮塔干掉！

en: The demolition team is waiting for the all clear before advancing.
zh: 爆破组正在等待安全信号，然后才会推进。

en: {scared}Puccini's been hit! He's down!
zh: {scared}Puccini 中弹了！他倒下了！

en: {scared}We just lost Elgar!
zh: {scared}Elgar 牺牲了！

en: {scared}Elgar's been killed!
zh: {scared}Elgar 阵亡了！

en: {scared}Damn it! We just lost Puccini!
zh: {scared}该死！Puccini 没了！

en: Morris, this is Viper squad. We've made a successful sweep of the area. Give an all clear to the demo team.
zh: Morris，这里是毒蛇小队。区域清剿完毕，通知爆破组可以推进了。

en: Kane, this is Morris. The demo team should be near the top of the elevator. Go meet 'em. There should be a little surprise for you.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。爆破组应该快到电梯顶层了，去接应他们。那儿还有个小惊喜等着你。

en: {happy}Still alive and kickin', eh Kane? {idle}I'm beginning to see how you made it off that space station.
zh: {happy}还活蹦乱跳呢，Kane？{idle}我算明白你是怎么从那个空间站活着出来的了。

en: {puzzled}Wait a minute. This is the Corporal Kane? {confused}I thought he'd be a lot bigger.
zh: {puzzled}等等，这就是那位 Kane 下士本尊？{confused}我还以为他块头会大得多。

en: Rhodes, if you're done with Viper squad, send em on down to my position.
zh: Rhodes，要是毒蛇小队那边完事了，就让他们下来我这边。

en: They're on their way, Morris. Rhodes out. You heard Morris. Get goin.
zh: 他们这就过去，Morris。Rhodes 完毕。都听到 Morris 说的了，出发。

en: Yes, sir.
zh: 是，长官。

en: {happy}C'mon, Kane. Let's go make some noise.
zh: {happy}来吧，Kane，咱们去闹出点大动静。

en: Wish I could go, but I've got orders to meet Corporal Morris.
zh: 我也想去，可我奉命要去见 Morris 下士。

en: Sorry. I've gotta meet up with Corporal Morris.
zh: 抱歉，我得去和 Morris 下士会合。

en: I can't go with you. My orders are to rendezvous with Corporal Morris.
zh: 我不能跟你们走。我的命令是去和 Morris 下士会合。

en: You heard Rhodes. I'm supposed to meet up with Corporal Morris.
zh: 你也听到 Rhodes 说的了，我得去找 Morris 下士。

en: Corporal Rhodes wants me to meet Corporal Morris.
zh: Rhodes 下士要我去见 Morris 下士。

en: You go on. I have to meet up with Corporal Morris.
zh: 你们先走，我得去和 Morris 下士会合。

en: What are you waitin' for? Lead the way to the hangars.
zh: 还等什么？带路去机库。

en: I can't find the hangars alone. Let's get going.
zh: 光靠我一个人可找不到机库。走吧。

en: Kane, try and keep the Strogg off me. These charges I'm carrying don't react well to gettin' hit by weapons fire. And, just so you know, these puppies do go off, they're gonna take out you, me and half this mountain.
zh: Kane，尽量别让 Strogg 近我的身。我背的这些炸药可经不起枪林弹雨。先跟你说清楚，这些宝贝真要是炸了，你、我，连半座山都得一起报销。

en: Aw shit, its gonna blow.
zh: 妈的，要炸了！

en: Okay, that's one.
zh: 好，这是第一处。

en: That's number two. C'mon, Kane. Let's get somewhere safe then we can fire these charges off. Follow me.
zh: 第二处搞定。来，Kane，咱们先找个安全的地方，再引爆这些炸药。跟我来。

en: {happy}C'mon. Let's go see the fireworks.
zh: {happy}来吧，咱们看焰火去。

en: Watch over there, Kane. H Q, charges are prepped to detonate.
zh: 盯着那边，Kane。总部，炸药已就绪，随时可以引爆。

en: Detonation in 3... 2... 1
zh: 起爆倒计时 3……2……1

en: {happy}Haaa, haaaa!! Those hangars are permanently closed for business.
zh: {happy}哈哈——！那些机库这下永久歇业了。

en: Hey, Rhodes. If you kids are done playin' around, why don't you send Kane down my way? Voss wants us back at the air defense cannon on the double.
zh: 嘿，Rhodes，你们这帮小子玩够了的话，就把 Kane 派到我这边来吧？Voss 要我们马上回防空炮那里。

en: Good. I've been lookin' forward to blowing that up.
zh: 好啊，我早就盼着把那玩意儿炸上天了。

en: Sorry, big boy. Voss wants you to stay put. Another team may need your services. Morris, out.
zh: 抱歉了，大块头。Voss 要你原地待命，别的小队可能还用得上你。Morris 完毕。

en: {furrow}Damn it. All right. Kane, go hook up with Morris. I'm gonna hang here. See ya later.
zh: {furrow}该死。行吧。Kane，你去和 Morris 会合，我就守在这儿。回头见。

en: You better go find Morris. Sounds like Rhino squad need you.
zh: 你最好去找 Morris，听起来犀牛小队需要你。

en: {furrow}Go on. Get out of here. Morris is waiting for you.
zh: {furrow}走吧，快去，Morris 还等着你呢。

en: {furrow}Kane, get your ass movin'. {idle}Rhino squad needs you and Morris.
zh: {furrow}Kane，赶紧给我动起来。{idle}犀牛小队需要你和 Morris。

en: {scared}Exactly how far behind enemy lines are we?
zh: {scared}我们到底深入敌后多远了？

en: {happy}Far enough that it doesnt matter anymore.
zh: {happy}远到多远都无所谓了。

en: {scared}What do you mean by that?
zh: {scared}这话是什么意思？

en: Were completely on our own.
zh: 我们完全只能靠自己了。

en: {scared}You mean it could take several minutes before we receive any back up?
zh: {scared}你是说增援可能要好几分钟才能到？

en: No, I mean we arent receiving any back up at all. Were cut off from the rest of the human forces.
zh: 不，我是说根本不会有任何增援。我们和人类大部队已经彻底断了联系。

en: {scared}I had no idea we would be so vulnerable. {puzzled}What if the Strogg should attack?
zh: {scared}我没想到我们会这么孤立无援。{puzzled}万一 Strogg 打过来怎么办？

en: {happy}Dont worry, Strauss. The Strogg wouldnt kill you. Theyd probably keep your brain alive in a jar so they could study it.
zh: {happy}别担心，Strauss，Strogg 不会杀你的。他们八成会把你的脑子泡在罐子里养着，好慢慢研究。

en: {furrow}I fail to understand why anyone would consider you amusing.
zh: {furrow}我实在无法理解，怎么会有人觉得你风趣。

en: All right, Marines. Listen up. The Strogg have taken out the other convoys, we're all that's left. This mission's too big for any screw ups. No one take any chances, no one try to be the hero. Voss out.
zh: 好了，陆战队员们，都听好。Strogg 干掉了其他车队，就剩我们了。这次任务事关重大，不容有失。谁都别去冒险，谁都别逞英雄。Voss 完毕。

en: {confused}Why is it so cold down here, Strauss?
zh: {confused}Strauss，这下面怎么这么冷？

en: The frigid atmosphere is no doubt the result of the Strogg communications equipment requiring cryogenic technologies.
zh: 这种严寒无疑是因为 Strogg 的通讯设备需要低温冷冻技术。

en: Kane, youre assigned to Strauss. Bring him up front. Voss out.
zh: Kane，你负责 Strauss，带他到前面来。Voss 完毕。

en: {confused}Why does he assign me only one guard? {Puzzled}Must I die to show Lieutenant Voss how important I am?
zh: {confused}他怎么只给我派一个护卫？{Puzzled}非得我死了，Voss 中尉才明白我有多重要吗？

en: {furrow}We're looking to get the E M P below the Teranode, the brains of this facility.
zh: {furrow}我们要把 EMP 送到四元节点下方，那玩意儿是这座设施的大脑。

en: The Tetranode routes billions of Strogg communications signals every second from the Nexus. If that were destroyed it'd effectively shut down the Strogg for this area.
zh: 四元节点每秒都在为 Nexus 中转数十亿条 Strogg 通讯信号。一旦摧毁它，这一带的 Strogg 就基本瘫痪了。

en: Once we get the Nexus down, our troops will have an easy time of it. The Strogg military will be completely disorganized.
zh: 只要搞垮 Nexus，我们的部队就轻松了。Strogg 的军队会彻底乱成一盘散沙。

en: {furrow}Damn is it cold down here.
zh: {furrow}妈的，这下面可真冷。

en: {furrow}Isn't there one spot, {confused}somewhere on Stroggos, {furrow}where I'm not either freezing my ass off or drowning in my own sweat?
zh: {furrow}这 Stroggos 上就没有一个地方，{confused}随便哪儿，{furrow}能让我既不冻掉屁股，也不被自己的汗淹死吗？

en: {puzzled}So who did you piss off that you always get stuck baby sitting Strauss?
zh: {puzzled}你到底得罪谁了，怎么总轮到你给 Strauss 当保姆？

en: {pain}It pains me that we must destroy this Strogg facility. {idle}The knowledge we could gain by studying it.
zh: {pain}非要摧毁这座 Strogg 设施，我实在心疼。{idle}好好研究它，我们能学到多少东西啊。

en: I had recommended that I head up a party to investigate this building before the convoys arrived. But, of course, my request was ignored.
zh: 我早就建议由我带队，赶在车队抵达之前勘察这栋建筑。当然了，我的请求被无视了。

en: Admittedly an exploratoration of this facility would have kept the war going on for another day or two. But imagine how this technology would benefit mankind.
zh: 不可否认，勘察这座设施会让战争多打上一两天。可想想看，这些科技能给人类带来多大的好处。

en: Corporal Kane, get back to Strauss immediately.
zh: Kane 下士，立刻回到 Strauss 身边。

en: Kane! You're Strauss's escort. Remain with him.
zh: Kane！你是 Strauss 的护卫，跟紧他。

en: Kane, I want you to stay near Strauss at all times!
zh: Kane，我要你时刻守在 Strauss 身边！

en: {scared}Corporal Kane, you must protect me at all costs.
zh: {scared}Kane 下士，你必须不惜一切代价保护我。

en: {furrow}You cannot leave me unprotected, Corporal Kane. I am far too important.
zh: {furrow}你不能丢下我不管，Kane 下士。我这个人实在太重要了。

en: {furrow}Corporal Kane, I cannot allow you to risk my life. Stay with me!
zh: {furrow}Kane 下士，我不允许你拿我的性命冒险。留在我身边！

en: Glad you gentlemen could make it. Listen up, Marines. We need to locate the console thatll open up the hatchways and allow the convoy through.
zh: 很高兴各位赶到了。都听好，陆战队员们。我们得找到那台控制台，它能打开舱门，放车队通过。

en: All clear.
zh: 安全。

en: Okay, men. Lets move out.
zh: 好了，弟兄们，出发。

en: {confused}What the hell was that?
zh: {confused}那他妈是什么东西？

en: {furrow}I dont know, but leave it alone.
zh: {furrow}不知道，别去招惹它。

en: Ah, very good. This looks to be the correct control room.
zh: 啊，很好。看来就是这间控制室没错。

en: Good job, Kane. You unlocked the hatchways.
zh: 干得好，Kane，你把舱门解锁了。

en: {furrow}Yes . . . well . . . I would have done that.
zh: {furrow}是啊……呃……我本来也能搞定的。

en: All right, convoy. Open the hatchways and advance.
zh: 好了，车队，打开舱门，前进。

en: {furrow}Negative. Do not open the hatchways and remain where you are.
zh: {furrow}不行。不要打开舱门，原地待命。

en: {furrow}I hope you have a real good reason for doin that, soldier.
zh: {furrow}你最好有个非常充分的理由，士兵。

en: I apologize but if they were to open the hatchway they would have been subjected to super cooled air. Their lungs would have frozen in a matter of seconds.
zh: 抱歉，可他们一旦打开舱门，就会暴露在超低温空气里，几秒钟内肺就会冻结。

en: Okay . . . {confused}so what do we do?
zh: 好吧……{confused}那我们该怎么办？

en: I must find the console that controls life support. From there, I should be able to raise the temperature to something a little less hostile.
zh: 我得找到控制生命维持系统的控制台。在那里，我应该能把温度调到不那么要命的程度。

en: Sounds good. Kane, youre with Strauss. Find that console.
zh: 好主意。Kane，你跟着 Strauss，去找那台控制台。

en: This way, Corporal Kane.
zh: 这边走，Kane 下士。

en: {scared}No! Thats a Strogg Gladiator! Protect me, Corporal!
zh: {scared}不！那是 Strogg 的 Gladiator（角斗士）！保护我，下士！

en: {scared}Corporal Kane! Do not let that thing near me!
zh: {scared}Kane 下士！别让那东西靠近我！

en: {scared}Kill it, Corporal! Destroy it!
zh: {scared}杀了它，下士！干掉它！

en: {furrow}I demand you save me!
zh: {furrow}我要求你救我！

en: {furrow}You must kill that beast, Corporal!
zh: {furrow}你必须干掉那头怪物，下士！

en: Ignore the Harvester, Corporal. It shouldnt bother us.
zh: 别理那台 Harvester（收割者），下士。它应该不会来烦我们。

en: Ah, yes. {puzzled}This is the correct console. {idle}Give me a moment.
zh: 啊，对。{puzzled}就是这台控制台。{idle}稍等片刻。

en: Corporal Kane, I should warn you it will be a rather lengthy journey so please move quickly. I do not wish to arrive at the rendezvous point before you.
zh: Kane 下士，我得提醒你，这段路相当漫长，请抓紧赶路。我可不希望比你先到会合点。

en: Corporal Kane, this is Strauss. I am in great danger. Rendezvous with me immediately!
zh: Kane 下士，我是 Strauss。我的处境非常危险，立刻来和我会合！

en: This is Strauss. You must move faster, Corporal Kane!
zh: 我是 Strauss。你必须再快一点，Kane 下士！

en: Corporal, this is Strauss. Hurry. I'm certain the Strogg know I'm here.
zh: 下士，我是 Strauss。快点，我敢肯定 Strogg 已经知道我在这儿了。

en: {furrow}Corporal Kane, you should have been here a long time ago! {idle}But we will speak of this later. Right now, we must concern ourselves with the Nexus. To destroy the Tetranode we must overheat it and that will require several steps. Our first objective is the power plant. Lead the way.
zh: {furrow}Kane 下士，你早就该到了！{idle}不过这笔账以后再算。现在，我们得专心对付 Nexus。要摧毁四元节点，就必须让它过热，这需要好几个步骤。第一个目标是发电厂。带路吧。

en: Please, let me open the doors. I can do it without activating security alarms.
zh: 请让我来开门。我能做到不触发警报。

en: Corporal Kane, go to the console over there and I will use this one. We must activate them in the correct sequence so as not to alert security. I will wait for you to activate yours first.
zh: Kane 下士，你去那边的控制台，我用这一台。我们必须按正确顺序启动，才不会惊动安保系统。我等你先启动你那台。

en: {furrow}Corporal Kane, you must go to the other console in this room and activate it.
zh: {furrow}Kane 下士，你必须去启动这个房间里的另一台控制台。

en: {furrow}I must insist that you activate the other console. I cannot overdrive the Tetranode until you do.
zh: {furrow}我必须坚持让你去启动另一台控制台。你不动手，我就没法让四元节点超载。

en: {furrow}Corporal Kane, activate the other console! We do not have much time.
zh: {furrow}Kane 下士，快启动另一台控制台！我们时间不多了。

en: There. Now I will raise the power plant output and that will cause a heat buildup.
zh: 好了。现在我来调高发电厂的输出功率，热量就会不断积聚。

en: Next we must disable the emergency shutoff or it will deactivate the Tetranode at the first sign of danger.
zh: 接下来必须废掉紧急停机装置，否则一有危险迹象，它就会关停四元节点。

en: {happy}Ah! A primary console. {idle}Exactly what I was searching for. This allows me to monitor all systems. I must remain here but I will guide you through the rest of our mission. You will have to go on without me.
zh: {happy}啊！一台主控制台。{idle}正是我要找的东西。有了它，我就能监控所有系统。我必须留在这里，但我会引导你完成余下的任务。接下来你得独自前进了。

en: Allow me to open the proper doors for you. It would be most unfortunate to have you alert security.
zh: 让我来为你打开该走的门。你要是惊动了安保系统，那可就太不妙了。

en: Corporal Kane, go through that door.
zh: Kane 下士，从那扇门过去。

en: That is the door you wish to use, Corporal Kane.
zh: 你要走的就是那扇门，Kane 下士。

en: Corporal Kane, use the door I just opened.
zh: Kane 下士，走我刚打开的那扇门。

en: Corporal Kane, in the next section is a system that stretches between all facilities in this area. Its name roughly translates to Cable Swamp. That is your destination.
zh: Kane 下士，下一区有一套连接这一带所有设施的系统，它的名字大致可以译作「线缆沼泽」。那就是你的目的地。

en: Nearby is a maintenance platform. It rides on top of the cables and allows the Strogg to perform upkeep. Get onboard the platform.
zh: 附近有一座维护平台，它在线缆上方行驶，供 Strogg 进行检修。登上那座平台。

en: Very good. I will now override the steering controls and take you to the desired cable bundle.
zh: 很好。现在我会接管转向控制，把你送到目标线缆束那里。

en: Go to the right.
zh: 往右。

en: Move the platform to the right.
zh: 把平台向右移。

en: Go to the left.
zh: 往左。

en: Move the platform to the left.
zh: 把平台向左移。

en: Move the platform forward.
zh: 把平台向前移。

en: Proceed forward.
zh: 继续向前。

en: Move the platform backward.
zh: 把平台向后移。

en: Go backward.
zh: 向后退。

en: Corporal Kane, I have taken you to the proper cable bundle. Activate the splicing arms. They will disable communication between the emergency shutoff and the Tetranode.
zh: Kane 下士，我已经把你送到了正确的线缆束。启动熔接臂，它们会切断紧急停机装置和四元节点之间的通讯。

en: I trust the wire bundle nearby has melted through? That means emergency shutoff has been deactivated. Now you must locate the next maintenance platform. From there I will take you to an area near the coolant pumps. Then you will be able to destroy the Tetranode.
zh: 我想你旁边那束线缆已经熔断了吧？这说明紧急停机装置已经失效。现在你得找到下一座维护平台，我会从那里送你去冷却泵附近的区域。然后你就能摧毁四元节点了。

en: Well done. You have arrived at the next maintenance platform. I will now steer you to the next area.
zh: 干得好，你已经到达下一座维护平台。现在我来送你去下一个区域。

en: The ride is over, Corporal Kane. Now you must locate the coolant pumps. Go, quickly.
zh: 旅程到此为止，Kane 下士。现在你必须找到冷却泵。快去。

en: The door I just opened for you leads to the coolant pumps.
zh: 我刚为你打开的那扇门通向冷却泵。

en: There should be a console in the center of the room, Corporal Kane. Activate that and the coolant pumps will shut down. In a matter of minutes, the Tetranode will overheat and destroy itself. And this will render the Nexus useless to the Strogg.
zh: 房间中央应该有一台控制台，Kane 下士。启动它，冷却泵就会停机。用不了几分钟，四元节点就会过热自毁。这样一来，Nexus 对 Strogg 就毫无用处了。

en: Ah, excellent. Corporal Kane, the Tertanode will soon be destroyed and the Nexus will become inoperative.
zh: 啊，太好了。Kane 下士，四元节点很快就会被摧毁，Nexus 也将随之瘫痪。

en: Hello? Do you read? We seem to be experiencing comlink difficulty
zh: 喂？收到吗？我们的通讯链路好像出了故障……

en: Corporal Kane, this is Strauss. I have detected a tremendously large life form in your vicinity. You must get out of there quickly.
zh: Kane 下士，我是 Strauss。我在你附近探测到一个体型极其庞大的生命体。你必须赶快离开那里。

en: Kane... Oh no! It can't be! ... It's the Makron!! He lives!!!
zh: Kane……不！不可能！……是 Makron！！他还活着！！！

en: Get out of there, Kane! Get out!!
zh: 快离开那里，Kane！快跑！！

en: ... who is there?
zh: ……谁在那儿？

en: Drop ships prepped and awaiting assigned troops.
zh: 登陆艇已就绪，等待指定部队登舰。

en: Alright you maggots. Haul ass or die!
zh: 好了，你们这帮蛆虫。不跑就等死！

en: All squads. Report for planetside dispersal.
zh: 各小队注意，前往报到，准备地面部署。

en: Go, go, go!
zh: 快快快！

en: We're clear!
zh: 全员就位！

en: Battle wave Delta launching in five...four...three...two...one
zh: Delta 攻击波次发射倒计时：五……四……三……二……一

en: Holy shit! This is some ride, hey buddy?
zh: 妈的！这一路够劲吧，伙计？

en: Who's the new guy?
zh: 新来的是谁？

en: Matthew Kane. One certified badass.
zh: Matthew Kane，官方认证的狠角色。

en: No shit. Nah, that can't be the Matthew Kane. He's got both eyes.
zh: 少来。不对，那不可能是那个 Matthew Kane，他两只眼睛都还在。

en: If you would notice, his eyes do not match.
zh: 你仔细看就会发现，他两只眼睛并不一样。

en: A man like Kane could get us killed.
zh: Kane 这种人会害死我们所有人。

en: Shut the hell up Strauss.
zh: 闭上你的臭嘴，Strauss。

en: Gentlemen.
zh: 先生们。

en: About that sir...um.
zh: 长官，那个……呃。

en: And I trust he has yours.
zh: 我也相信，他同样得到了你们的信任。

en: Good news in the war against the Strogg. A lone marine battled through enemy lines and killed the Strogg's leader, the Makron.
zh: 对 Strogg 的战争传来好消息：一名陆战队员孤身杀穿敌军防线，击毙了 Strogg 的首领 Makron。

en: Woo hoo yeah!
zh: 唔呼——好耶！

en: He's also disabled the Strogg's planetary defense guns. So it's a groundpounder's war from here on out. H Q's ordered us to assist clearing out a landing zone for a mobile command center.
zh: 他还瘫痪了 Strogg 的行星防御炮。所以接下来就是地面部队的仗了。总部命令我们协助清理出一片登陆区，好让移动指挥中心降落。

en: Anit aircraft's heavier than expected lieutenant. Make sure to...
zh: 防空火力比预想的猛，中尉。千万要……

en: We're hit! Another missile's locked on. Firing counter measures.
zh: 我们中弹了！又一枚导弹锁定了我们。发射干扰弹。

en: Get up! Get the fuck up!
zh: 起来！他妈的快起来！

en: Get up! Get the hell up!
zh: 起来！快给我起来！

en: Okay, Marine. Time to kill anything that's not you.
zh: 好了，陆战队员。除了你自己，见什么杀什么。

en: Flooding chamber with trichlorite and septazine.
zh: 正在向舱内注入三氯剂与七嗪。

en: Chamber at maximum saturation.
zh: 舱内已达最大饱和度。

en: Purging chamber.
zh: 正在排净舱室。

en: Decontamination cycle complete.
zh: 消毒流程完成。

en: You're clean. Come on through.
zh: 你没问题了，过来吧。

en: Hello, soldier.
zh: 你好，士兵。

en: Hey.
zh: 嘿。

en: {furrow}Hay? Hay? !! ? Do I look like a horse to you soldier? Is that how you greet a superior officer?
zh: {furrow}嘿？嘿？！！？我看着像匹马吗，士兵？你就是这么问候上级军官的？

en: {scared}Sir, yes, sir.
zh: {scared}长官，是，长官！

en: Good. So why don't we try it again? Hello, soldier.
zh: 很好。那我们再来一遍？你好，士兵。

en: Sir, hello, sir.
zh: 长官，您好，长官！

en: As you were, soldier.
zh: 稍息，士兵。

en: Hey, Meadows! Brandt! Your shift is over.
zh: 嘿，Meadows！Brandt！你们换班了。

en: Be right up.
zh: 马上就上来。

en: How's it been?
zh: 情况怎么样？

en: A couple of sightings. Other than that it's been quiet as a graveyard.
zh: 发现过几次目标。除此之外，安静得跟坟场一样。

en: Let's hope it stays that way.
zh: 但愿一直这么安静。

en: I'm sorry, sir, but you don't have clearance to enter the gun pods.
zh: 抱歉，长官，您没有进入炮舱的权限。

en: Sir, you cannot enter the pods. Please step away.
zh: 长官，您不能进入炮舱。请退开。

en: I don't want any problems so back it up, Marine.
zh: 我不想惹麻烦，退后，陆战队员。

en: You don't have clearance to be near the pods, so why don't you move along?
zh: 你没权限靠近炮舱，还是赶紧走吧。

en: Move it, soldier. This is a restricted area.
zh: 走开，士兵。这里是禁区。

en: I heard the mechanics are prepping four heavy trucks.
zh: 我听说机修工正在整备四辆重型卡车。

en: {puzzled}So what's that mean?
zh: {puzzled}那说明什么？

en: I'm not sure, but with that many trucks, H Q's planning something.
zh: 说不好，但要用上这么多卡车，总部肯定在盘算什么。

en: I also heard the war ain't goin' so well for us. What we've got around Stroggos is the last of our forces.
zh: 我还听说这仗打得不太妙。围在 Stroggos 周围的，已经是我们最后的家底了。

en: Our equipment's worn out and the soldiers are tired. We can't maintain this war much longer.
zh: 装备磨损殆尽，士兵疲惫不堪。这仗我们撑不了多久了。

en: H Q better have some big plan up it's collective sleeve or we're all gonna be Strogg.
zh: 总部最好是憋着什么大招，不然我们全都得变成 Strogg。

en: I heard the Strogg attacked Earth because it's a strategic location. From our planet they'd be able to get at dozens of other civilizations.
zh: 我听说 Strogg 攻打地球是因为它位置关键。以我们的星球为跳板，他们就能染指其他几十个文明。

en: I've also heard the Strogg are super soldiers left over from some major war in another part of our galaxy.
zh: 我还听说 Strogg 是银河系另一头某场大战留下的超级士兵。

en: Someone else told me the Strogg are the next step in human evolution. When you think about how much we rely on technology, maybe that's not too far from bein' right.
zh: 还有人跟我说，Strogg 是人类进化的下一步。想想我们现在多依赖科技，这话也许还真没说错多少。

en: {scared}I've been in the Corps six years and I've never seen carnage like today's landing. So many men died the ground couldn't soak up the blood.
zh: {scared}我入伍六年，从没见过今天登陆这样的惨状。死的人多到血都渗不进土里。

en: Tell me about. I jumped into a foxhole and found myself lying face down in the intestines of some other Marine.
zh: 可不是嘛。我跳进一个散兵坑，结果整张脸埋进了某个弟兄的肠子里。

en: {confused}Rhino Squad, eh? {idle}Well, it's good to finally meet one of you bastards.
zh: {confused}犀牛小队的？{idle}好啊，总算见着你们这帮混蛋中的一个了。

en: I heard your Lieutenant Voss is one tough son of a bitch. Word has it he was captured during the Mars uprising and they tortured him for six months.
zh: 听说你们的 Voss 中尉是条硬汉。传闻他在火星暴动时被俘，被折磨了整整六个月。

en: Yep, you gotta admire a soldier like Voss. He could have left the Marines after he was freed from that prison but Voss reenlisted.
zh: 是啊，Voss 这样的军人你不得不服。从那座监狱获释后，他本可以退伍，结果他又重新入伍了。

en: I worked with your squad mate, Rhodes, during a mission at Alpha Centauri. That man knows his shit about demolitions.
zh: 我在半人马座阿尔法星执行任务时，和你们队友 Rhodes 共过事。那家伙玩爆破是真有两下子。

en: I saw Rhodes cave in an underground bunker with nothing but three one pound charges. Just incredible.
zh: 我亲眼见过 Rhodes 只用三包一磅装药，就掀塌了一整座地下碉堡。简直不可思议。

en: {happy}And it took me two weeks to recover from the R and R we went on after that mission. Rhodes is a wild man.
zh: {happy}那次任务后我们一起去休假，玩得我整整两个星期才缓过来。Rhodes 就是个疯子。

en: {happy}So the Makron's dead, eh? The Marine who iced that squib deserves a chest full of medals and a years R and R.
zh: {happy}这么说 Makron 死了？宰了那杂碎的陆战队员，该给他挂满一胸口勋章，外加一年大假。

en: You heard the Makron was killed right? You know, the leader of the Strogg?
zh: 你听说 Makron 被干掉了吧？就是 Strogg 的那个头儿？

en: Some Marine managed to work his way behind enemy lines and frag the Makron. What I wouldn't give to see a vid of that fight.
zh: 有个陆战队员一路摸到敌后，把 Makron 给宰了。要能看上那场架的录像，让我出什么都行。

en: Hey, {puzzled}you're Matthew Kane, aren't you?
zh: 嘿，{puzzled}你是 Matthew Kane，对吧？

en: {furrow}No way.
zh: {furrow}不可能吧。

en: I saw you when they brought you back from Space Station Armstrong. You looked like you'd been mauled by a dozen pitbulls.
zh: 他们把你从 Armstrong 空间站送回来的时候我见过你。你那样子，就像被十几条斗牛犬撕咬过。

en: {furrow}I thought Matthew Kane was just a story they made up to scare recruits.
zh: {furrow}我一直以为 Matthew Kane 只是他们编来吓唬新兵的故事。

en: No, he's real and he's standing in front of us.
zh: 不，他是真人，就站在咱们面前。

en: You don't remember me, {confused}do you? {idle}I was one of the orderlies at the hospital when they wheeled you in from Armstrong.
zh: 你不记得我了，{confused}是吧？{idle}你从 Armstrong 被推进医院那会儿，我就是那儿的护工之一。

en: {puzzled}So what really happened at Space Station Armstrong? Was it some military experiment that went haywire?
zh: {puzzled}Armstrong 空间站到底出了什么事？是军方实验失控了吗？

en: {confused}How's that new eye of yours? {idle}I was surprised how much the military spent. It's top of the line, not like the usual replacements.
zh: {confused}你那只新眼睛怎么样？{idle}军方这次下的血本让我很意外。那可是顶级货，跟一般的替换品可不一样。

en: {puzzled}So you're really him, huh? Can you say what happened to the rest of your squad on that space station?
zh: {puzzled}你真是本尊啊？能说说你小队其他人在那个空间站上的遭遇吗？

en: When I heard the story about Armstrong, I figured it was made up by drill instructors.
zh: 我头回听到 Armstrong 的事时，还以为是教官编出来的。

en: {puzzled}What really went on up there?
zh: {puzzled}上面到底发生了什么？

en: {happy}This guy, Sargent Bidwell, has one guy thrown over his shoulder and is barking out orders as he blazes away with a rifle in his hand. The man was a freakin' machine.
zh: {happy}那个叫 Bidwell 的中士，肩上扛着一个人，一边吼着下命令，一边端着步枪扫射。那家伙简直就是台机器。

en: {puzzled}What squad was he with?
zh: {puzzled}他是哪个小队的？

en: Not sure, but he was protecting some obnoxious computer tech.
zh: 不清楚，反正他护着一个讨人嫌的电脑技术员。

en: Just heard we're moving up to the front. Our whole platoon is being mobilized.
zh: 刚听说我们要开赴前线了，全排都在动员。

en: There must be some major offensive in the works. They're getting all kinds of mechanized infantry prepped in the walker bays.
zh: 肯定是在筹备什么大规模攻势。机甲库里各式机械化步兵都在整备。

en: {furrow}I've got a real bad feeling about this one.
zh: {furrow}这次我有种很不祥的预感。
