en: Aaah, you get a real bad feeling all the time.
zh: 嗐，你哪次没有不祥的预感。

en: Hey, you're the Matthew Kane I heard about back on the Hannibal, {confused}aren't you?
zh: 嘿，你就是我在汉尼拔号上听说的那个 Matthew Kane，{confused}对吧？

en: After Space Station Armstrong you'd think they wouldn't send you to Stroggos.
zh: 经历过 Armstrong 空间站那档子事，按理说他们不该再把你派来 Stroggos。

en: {puzzled}Didn't you wind up spending some time in a psych ward after Space Station Armstrong?
zh: {puzzled}Armstrong 空间站的事之后，你不是进精神病房待过一阵吗？

en: {furrow}Did you need something, soldier?
zh: {furrow}有事吗，士兵？

en: {furrow}What do you want, soldier?
zh: {furrow}你想干什么，士兵？

en: {furrow}Got no time for this. I'm a busy man.
zh: {furrow}没工夫搭理这个，我忙着呢。

en: I told the Colonel the system would be operational at thirteen hundred hours.
zh: 我跟上校说了，系统会在十三点整投入运行。

en: But I've got a power coupling to overhaul, a plasma transducer to realign, and a faulty router to replace.
zh: 可我还得大修一个电力耦合器，校准一个等离子换能器，再换掉一个出故障的路由器。

en: {furrow}I don't want excuses. I want that system functional by thirteen hundred hours.
zh: {furrow}我不要借口。十三点整之前，系统必须能用。

en: But...
zh: 可是……

en: {furrow}That's an order!
zh: {furrow}这是命令！

en: Yes, sir!
zh: 是，长官！

en: Shit, I haven't slept in 28 hours trying to keep this old girl patched together.
zh: 妈的，为了让这条老船撑住不散架，我已经 28 个小时没合眼了。

en: Now don't get me wrong. The Hannibal's a great ship, she just needs a couple months in dry dock is all.
zh: 别误会，汉尼拔号是条好船，她只是需要进干船坞修上几个月罢了。

en: Okay, maybe she needs a year in dry dock. But the Hannibal's still a great ship.
zh: 好吧，也许得修上一年。但汉尼拔号依然是条好船。

en: The plasma coil in panel twenty four A has been reactivated.
zh: 24A 面板的等离子线圈已重新启动。

en: Report to life support services immediately. They're having a problem with a purification unit.
zh: 立刻到生命维持部门报到。他们有台净化装置出了问题。

en: Will do. Stills out.
zh: 这就去。Stills 完毕。

en: {confused}You want me to do what?
zh: {confused}你要我干什么？

en: Reroute the energy stabilizers. Wait two seconds and then purge 'em. The hit will cause the system to depolarize.
zh: 把能量稳定器改道，等两秒，然后排空。这一下冲击会让系统去极化。

en: {puzzled}But I could burn out every circuit on this deck.
zh: {puzzled}可这样会把这层甲板上的电路全烧了。

en: Kid, I know what this ship can and can't do.
zh: 小子，这船的斤两我一清二楚。

en: All right.
zh: 好吧。

en: Power restored in three... two... one.
zh: 电力恢复倒计时，三……二……一。

en: {happy}It worked!
zh: {happy}成功了！

en: Of course it worked. Now recalibrate that console, then get back here.
zh: 当然能成。现在把那台控制台重新校准，然后回来。

en: Sorry, I've got to recalibrate this console.
zh: 抱歉，我得重新校准这台控制台。

en: Did I mention I'm very busy and that I've got no time to talk?
zh: 我说过我很忙、没空聊天吗？

en: {furrow}Hey, buddy. Not to be antisocial, but why don't you take a hike?
zh: {furrow}嘿，伙计，不是我不合群，你还是哪儿凉快哪儿待着去吧？

en: {pain}Damn it! That hurt!!
zh: {pain}该死！疼死了！！

en: I told you these systems are finicky.
zh: 我说过这些系统很娇气。

en: These systems are ancient.
zh: 这些系统都老掉牙了。

en: Tell me about it. My grandfather served on this ship right out of bootcamp.
zh: 可不是嘛。我爷爷刚出新兵营那会儿，就在这条船上服役了。

en: You'd think they'd retire the old girl. Well, old or not, we gotta fix her.
zh: 按说早该让这老姑娘退役了。唉，老归老，咱们还得把她修好。

en: Not here.
zh: 不在这儿。

en: Not here either.
zh: 这儿也没有。

en: I'm not seeing it.
zh: 我没看到。

en: The glitch is in that sector.
zh: 故障就在那个扇区。

en: All right. I'll keep looking.
zh: 好吧，我再找找。

en: {scared}Oh, tell me I didn't do that. I did not forget to salute Colonel Thompson.
zh: {scared}噢，告诉我这不是真的。我不会真忘了向 Thompson 上校敬礼吧。

en: The Colonel will forget this, {puzzled}won't he? {idle}He's got plenty of other things to worry about, right?
zh: 上校会忘了这茬的，{puzzled}对吧？{idle}他要操心的事多着呢，是吧？

en: Who am I kidding? I said hey to a Colonel. {scared}I'm dead meat.
zh: 我骗谁呢？我居然对一位上校说「嘿」。{scared}我死定了。

en: How about now?
zh: 现在呢？

en: Nope. It's at fifty four percent.
zh: 不行，才百分之五十四。

en: Now?
zh: 现在呢？

en: Seventy four percent.
zh: 百分之七十四。

en: Okay, what's the reading?
zh: 好，读数多少？

en: Now it's at eighty three percent.
zh: 现在是百分之八十三。

en: {confused}Is it at least in the low nineties?
zh: {confused}好歹上九十了吧？

en: {happy}All right, a Rhino.
zh: {happy}好家伙，犀牛小队的。

en: I've been tryin' to get assigned to Rhino squad for a year now. I guess my ratings aren't high enough.
zh: 我申请调进犀牛小队都一年了，估计是我的评级还不够高。

en: Hey, who doesn't want to be a Rhino. I mean after what you guys did in Austin? That's the stuff of legends.
zh: 嘿，谁不想进犀牛小队啊。你们在奥斯汀干的那票？那可是传奇级别的。

en: You can't blame a guy for wanting to be part of the best, right?
zh: 想加入最强的队伍，这总不能怪我吧？

en: ... but the H B six oh seven has internal compensators and the X K one thousand doesn't.
zh: ……可 HB-607 有内置补偿器，XK-1000 没有。

en: I know that. But if you'd read the manual you'd know the X K one thousand has primary and secondary converters.
zh: 这我知道。可你要是读过手册，就该知道 XK-1000 有主副两组转换器。

en: {confused}What kind of converters?
zh: {confused}哪种转换器？

en: Radcliff twelves. They operate at twenty five milliamps.
zh: Radcliff 12 型，工作电流二十五毫安。

en: Twenty five milliamps isn't nearly enough.
zh: 二十五毫安可远远不够。

en: {furrow}You're crazy. {idle}Maybe if you use a G Moss splitter, but those are highly unstable.
zh: {furrow}你疯了吧。{idle}除非配上 G-Moss 分流器，可那玩意儿极不稳定。

en: Could you be any more misinformed? G Moss is the wave of the future.
zh: 你还能更孤陋寡闻点吗？G-Moss 可是未来的大势所趋。

en: That's ludicrous! G Moss is a fad. Reformattable K splitters will soon be the norm.
zh: 太荒唐了！G-Moss 就是一阵风。可重构 K 型分流器很快就会成为主流。

en: Private Mark Lorenzi, please report to medical bay 3.
zh: 列兵 Mark Lorenzi，请到 3 号医疗舱报到。

en: You are{confused}... Corporal Kane of Rhino Squad. {idle}Welcome aboard the Hannibal. You aren't expected at the briefing for a while. Feel free to look around the ship.
zh: 你是{confused}……犀牛小队的 Kane 下士。{idle}欢迎登上汉尼拔号。简报还要过一会儿才开始，你可以随意在舰上转转。

en: Continue on through the hangar and report to decontamination.
zh: 穿过机库，到消毒区报到。

en: Lieutenant Voss, report to briefing room 8.
zh: Voss 中尉，请到 8 号简报室报到。

en: Memorial Services for Colonel Westmore will be held at oh eight hundred hours.
zh: Westmore 上校的追悼仪式将于八点整举行。

en: Bison Squad, report to walker deck 2 immediately.
zh: 野牛小队，立即到 2 号机甲甲板报到。

en: Testing launch PODs 1 and 2.
zh: 正在测试 1 号和 2 号发射舱。

en: Say again, Hyena Squad.
zh: 请重复，鬣狗小队。

en: My team is pinned down by heavy fire. I'm requesting an artillery strike on a Strogg bunker.
zh: 我队被猛烈火力压制。请求对一处 Strogg 碉堡实施炮击。

en: I will relay your request to tactical. One moment.
zh: 我会把请求转给战术部门。请稍候。

en: Private Looms, G P S has located you.
zh: Looms 列兵，GPS 已定位到你。

en: Great, so where's my squad located?
zh: 太好了，那我的小队在哪儿？

en: They are three klicks north east of your current position.
zh: 他们在你当前位置东北方三公里处。

en: Okay, let 'em know I'm on my way.
zh: 好，告诉他们我这就过去。

en: Affirmative.
zh: 收到。

en: Thanks for the help. Looms out.
zh: 多谢帮忙。Looms 完毕。

en: Crew Chief Hammond, report to walker bay eight D immediately.
zh: 机务长 Hammond，立即到 8D 机甲库报到。

en: A welding crew is needed in armament.
zh: 军械部需要一支焊接班组。

en: All walkers for Bison Squad will need to be pre prepped by oh four hundred hours.
zh: 野牛小队的所有机甲须在四点整之前完成预整备。

en: Specialist Herman Ways, report to the main office immediately.
zh: 专业军士 Herman Ways，立即到总办公室报到。

en: A computer tech is needed in walker bay six C.
zh: 6C 机甲库需要一名电脑技术员。

en: Crew Chief Hanks, call two three two. Crew Chief Hanks, call two three two.
zh: 机务长 Hanks，请拨 232。机务长 Hanks，请拨 232。

en: We are unable to send or receive signals in that area due to Strogg interference.
zh: 由于 Strogg 干扰，我们无法在那片区域收发信号。

en: But a Strogg unit is headed directly for Cougar squad.
zh: 可有一支 Strogg 部队正直扑美洲狮小队。

en: Sorry, there's nothing we can do, Corporal.
zh: 抱歉，我们无能为力，下士。

en: Then they're all dead men. Richards out.
zh: 那他们就死定了。Richards 完毕。

en: Signal check for Pestilence.
zh: 这里是「瘟疫」，请求信号检测。

en: Your signal is strong Pestilence. Switch to secured frequency four six one.
zh: 「瘟疫」，你的信号很强。切换到加密频率 461。

en: Roger that. Switching to four six one.
zh: 收到。正在切换到 461。

en: {scared}Hannibal! I need a medic!
zh: {scared}汉尼拔号！我需要医疗兵！

en: Who are you? I'm not able to get a reading on your medchip.
zh: 你是谁？我读不到你的医疗芯片数据。

en: {pain}Corporal Thomas Alvarez. My medchip is damaged.
zh: {pain}下士 Thomas Alvarez。我的医疗芯片损坏了。

en: But that chip's implanted near your heart.
zh: 可那芯片是植入在心脏附近的。

en: {pain}I know. I'm looking at it right now.
zh: {pain}我知道。我现在正盯着它看呢。

en: I'm a scout on special assignment.
zh: 我是执行特殊任务的侦察兵。

en: Your identity has been confirmed. What is the message?
zh: 你的身份已确认。请讲内容。

en: Tell General Harper that there should be no problem entering the Hub from the lower level.
zh: 转告 Harper 将军，从下层进入 Hub 应该没有问题。

en: He will be informed. Hannibal out.
zh: 会转达给他。汉尼拔号完毕。

en: From D N A the subject has been identified as Samuel Darr. Listed as missing and presumed dead after the Strogg invasion of Earth.
zh: 根据 DNA，实验对象已确认为 Samuel Darr。Strogg 入侵地球后被列为失踪，推定死亡。

en: Apparently he was captured and forced to endure biomechanical implants.
zh: 看来他是被俘后，被迫接受了生物机械植入。

en: The procedure for attaching the implants is evidently quite traumatic. The subject must be kept alive by a combination of steroids and health packs.
zh: 植入体安装手术的过程显然极具创伤性。必须靠类固醇加医疗包的组合，才能维持对象存活。

en: Mmmhmm... Yes... Interesting.
zh: 嗯哼……对……有意思。

en: Fascinating...
zh: 妙极了……

en: Now I see...
zh: 原来如此……

en: Easy... a little left...
zh: 慢点……往左一点……

en: At ninety five percent.
zh: 百分之九十五。

en: I don't understand. Okay, let's try it again.
zh: 我搞不懂了。好吧，再试一次。

en: Baaack... baaaaack. Aaaaaand stop!
zh: 倒——倒——好，停！

en: Okay, so what's the problem with this beast?
zh: 好，这大家伙什么毛病？

en: The back shields cut out.
zh: 背部护盾失灵了。

en: Run a diagnostics on the primary emitter.
zh: 给主发射器跑一遍诊断。

en: Primary emitter is in the green.
zh: 主发射器一切正常。

en: So try the secondary emitters.
zh: 那就查副发射器。

en: Secondary emitters check out.
zh: 副发射器没有问题。

en: How about the ion converters?
zh: 那离子转换器呢？

en: All higher brain functions have atrophied, which indicates the subject was incapable of independent thought. The transceiver located at the base of the skull shows almost all action was dictated by an external source.
zh: 所有高级脑功能均已萎缩，说明实验对象已无法独立思考。颅底的收发器表明，他几乎所有行动都由外部信号支配。

en: I believe for a short time after Stroggification, the subject was aware of his actions but was unable to control them. A chilling scenario to say the least.
zh: 我认为在 Strogg 化后的短时间内，对象能意识到自己的行为，却无法控制。说是毛骨悚然都算轻的。

en: {happy}Hmmmmhmmmmm... hmmmmhmmm... hmmmhmm
zh: {happy}哼哼哼……哼哼……哼哼

en: Now there's something I didn't expect...
zh: 这倒是出乎我的意料……

en: My goodness...
zh: 我的天……

en: Do you see? It's just as I predicted.
zh: 看到了吗？和我预测的一模一样。

en: Indeed. The nanites infesting the muscle are repairing the tissue even after it's separated from the body.
zh: 确实。侵入肌肉的纳米机器人在组织脱离躯体后，仍在修复它。

en: Look at this. And this.
zh: 看这个。还有这个。

en: {puzzled}Why they would do that?
zh: {puzzled}他们为什么要这么做？

en: Here's something I didn't expect.
zh: 这是我没料到的。

en: Indeed.
zh: 确实。

en: Fascinating.
zh: 妙极了。

en: Yes, yes it is.
zh: 是啊，确实如此。

en: It won't work, Jacobson. The exoskeleton is harden tribinium.
zh: 没用的，Jacobson。这外骨骼是硬化 tribinium。

en: Nonsense. These saws cut through Marine body armor, it should have no trouble with this Strogg metal.
zh: 胡说。这锯子连陆战队的盔甲都锯得开，对付 Strogg 这点金属不在话下。

en: I just have to press a little harder.
zh: 我只要再用点力就行。

en: So... are they certain it's dead?
zh: 那……他们确定它死透了？

en: I was assured by Lieutenant Peers it's completely dead.
zh: Peers 中尉向我保证过，它已经彻底死了。

en: {scared}You remember this morning? {idle}They told us that one was dead too.
zh: {scared}还记得今天早上吗？{idle}那只他们也说死透了。

en: That I'll never forget.
zh: 那事我一辈子都忘不了。

en: You're more than welcome to stay and watch.
zh: 非常欢迎你留下来观摩。

en: We had a rather unpleasant experience with our last Strogg cadaver. It attacked us.
zh: 上一具 Strogg 尸体给我们留下了相当不愉快的经历——它袭击了我们。

en: If you see this corpse move, feel free to shoot it.
zh: 要是看见这具尸体动了，尽管开枪。

en: Get them away! GET THEM AWAY FROM ME!!
zh: 让它们走开！让它们离我远点！！

en: I don't understand... I gave him enough sedative to knock out an elephant.
zh: 我不明白……我给他打的镇静剂足够放倒一头大象了。

en: Doctor. If you would, please.
zh: 医生，麻烦你了。

en: Help! SOMEBODY HELP ME!!!!
zh: 救命！谁来救救我！！！！

en: Corporal Matthew Kane, the rest of Rhino Squad has already arrived. The briefing will commence shortly.
zh: Matthew Kane 下士，犀牛小队其他成员均已到达。简报会即将开始。

en: Looks like Kane made it back.
zh: 看来 Kane 平安回来了。

en: The blast will overload a device known as the Tetranode and effectively cut off the Strogg forces from the nexus and therefore their commanders. To ensure success, three other squads will be escorting additional E M Ps to the same location. Their convoys are code named War, Famine, and Pestilence.
zh: 爆炸将使一种名为四元节点（Tetranode）的装置过载，从而切断 Strogg 部队与 Nexus 乃至其指挥官的联系。为确保成功，另有三支小队将护送额外的 EMP 前往同一地点。他们的车队代号分别是「战争」「饥荒」和「瘟疫」。

en: Which means we are Death.
zh: 也就是说，我们是「死亡」。

en: Yeah, we're Death. Any questions?
zh: 没错，我们就是「死亡」。有问题吗？

en: The convoy will be deployed soon. Go to the armory and suit up. Dismissed.
zh: 车队很快就会出发。去军械库整装。解散。

en: Quit givin' him shit, Dell. Kane's all right.
zh: 别再挤兑他了，Dell。Kane 靠得住。

en: As you were.
zh: 稍息。

en: Rhino Squad, the following is highly classified and is not to be spoken of outside these walls.
zh: 犀牛小队，以下内容属最高机密，出了这间屋子谁也不许提。

en: The death of the Makron, couldn't have come at a better time. It's imperative we press that advantage which is the reason for our next operation. Lieutenant Voss, take over.
zh: Makron 死得正是时候。我们必须乘胜追击，这正是下一步行动的目的。Voss 中尉，交给你了。

en: Intelligence division has discovered that the Strogg function through a massive communication system called The Nexus. With it, Strogg leaders can instantly send instructions to soldiers in the field. And, although it's their strength, it's also their Achilles Heel.
zh: 情报部门发现，Strogg 依靠一套名为 Nexus 的庞大通讯系统运作。凭借它，Strogg 的首领能把指令即时下达给前线士兵。这既是他们的强项，也是他们的致命弱点。

en: Our target, known as The Hub, houses major communication lines to the Nexus.
zh: 我们的目标名为 Hub（枢纽），那里容纳着通往 Nexus 的主干通讯线路。

en: We will be escorting a convoy carrying an electromagnetic bomb to a sublevel of this building.
zh: 我们将护送一支运载电磁炸弹的车队，前往这座建筑的地下层。

en: The convoy will proceed to the  designated position and detonate it.
zh: 车队将开赴指定位置并引爆炸弹。

en: The Nexus sounds most intriguing. To be able to process the thoughts of billions of Strogg would require technology that is many generations beyond us.
zh: Nexus 听起来极为耐人寻味。要处理数十亿 Strogg 的思维，所需的技术得领先我们好几个世代。

en: Backup, would ya? I got work to do here.
zh: 退后行吗？我这儿还有活要干。

en: {furrow}Quit bustin' my chops, kid. I'm busy.
zh: {furrow}别烦我了，小子，我忙着呢。

en: {furrow}I've got 8 walkers I'm supposed to repair in six hours, so get the hell out of my way.
zh: {furrow}我得在六小时内修好 8 台机甲，所以给我让开。

en: Just who are they gonna call in when the life of every man, woman and child on Earth hangs in the balance? Rhino Squad of course.
zh: 等到地球上男女老幼的性命都悬于一线时，他们会找谁来救场？当然是犀牛小队。

en: {happy}You've gotta love the Marine Corps. Sure the pay ain't the greatest and the chow tastes like crap but where else am I gonna make a living blowin shit up?
zh: {happy}你不得不爱陆战队。工资确实不高，伙食也难吃得要命，可除了这儿，我上哪儿靠炸东西吃饭去？

en: You've done some good work today, Corporal. Lieutenant Voss had a feeling about you. Said you'd be trouble but you'd be worth it. The Lieutenant's never wrong.
zh: 你今天干得不错，下士。Voss 中尉早就看好你，说你是个麻烦，但值这个价。中尉从来没看走眼过。

en: Just think of it. Rhino Squad is participating in a mission that will turn the tide of this war. We will be saving the human race.
zh: 想想看，犀牛小队正在参与一场足以扭转战局的任务。我们将拯救全人类。

en: Kane, you've surprised a lot of people today. You've stood shoulder to shoulder with Rhino Squad and survived. {happy}Congratulations.
zh: Kane，你今天让很多人刮目相看。你和犀牛小队并肩作战，还活了下来。{happy}恭喜。

en: Kane, when we first dropped on Stroggos, I was certain you wouldn't last a day with Rhino Squad. {happy}I am pleased to say I was incorrect.
zh: Kane，刚空降到 Stroggos 那会儿，我笃定你在犀牛小队撑不过一天。{happy}我很高兴地承认，是我看走眼了。

en: Hey, Marine.  Youre gonna need this.  The extended clip should help in taking down the squibs.
zh: 嘿，陆战队员，你会用得上这个的。加长弹匣，打那些杂碎正合适。

en: Corporal Kane, your ride to the convoy is waiting for you. Step on through.
zh: Kane 下士，送你去车队的载具已经在等你了。过去吧。

en: How long we been at this now?
zh: 我们干了多久了？

en: 18 hours, Chief.
zh: 18 个小时了，头儿。

en: {furrow}Shit. Okay, let's warm this one up.
zh: {furrow}妈的。行，把这台预热起来。

en: Activate the torso batteries.
zh: 启动躯干电池组。

en: Check.
zh: 确认。

en: Boot up primary servo controls.
zh: 启动主伺服控制系统。

en: Cycle up navigation AI.
zh: 启动导航 AI。

en: Look at this, would ya? The M B L Bs weren't built for this kind of punishment.
zh: 你瞧瞧这个。MBLB 可不是造来挨这种蹂躏的。

en: What have the Strogg got that can do this kind of damage?
zh: Strogg 到底有什么家伙，能造成这种破坏？

en: Never seen damage like this. The battlefields must be hell.
zh: 从没见过这样的损伤。前线战场肯定跟地狱一样。

en: Hey, you're with Rhino Squad. When you see Rhodes, remind him he still owes me money from our last poker game.
zh: 嘿，你是犀牛小队的吧。见到 Rhodes 提醒他一声，上回打牌他还欠我钱呢。

en: Good ol Rhodes. Lucky with women, unlucky with cards.
zh: 好个 Rhodes，情场得意，牌场失意。

en: Hey, take it from someone who knows. Never go out on R and R with Rhodes. You'll end the night fighting with an M P.
zh: 嘿，听过来人一句劝：千万别跟 Rhodes 一起休假。到了半夜，你准得跟宪兵干上一架。

en: {confused}They call this Stroggification? {idle}Looks more like mutilation to me. Barely half of his original body left.
zh: {confused}这就是他们说的 Strogg 化？{idle}要我看更像肢解。他原来的身体连一半都不剩了。

en: I'll bring a scanner over. {furrow}Let's see what they've done to his brain.
zh: 我去把扫描仪推过来。{furrow}看看他们把他的脑子弄成了什么样。

en: {puzzled}Amazing. {idle}His arm was sheared off with a dirty saw blade.
zh: {puzzled}难以置信。{idle}他的手臂是被一片脏锯片生生锯下来的。

en: {furrow}He must have received a massive dosage of steroids to keep him alive through the process.
zh: {furrow}肯定给他打了大剂量的类固醇，才让他熬过了整个改造过程。

en: {puzzled}You know, I bet we could get a research grant studying this one.
zh: {puzzled}话说，研究这一具，说不定能申请到一笔科研经费。

en: I'll get the paper work started. {puzzled}Who knows, maybe we'll get lucky.
zh: 我这就去准备文书。{puzzled}谁知道呢，也许我们真能走运。

en: {furrow}Step back, freak.
zh: {furrow}退后，怪胎。

en: {furrow}You don't wanna be doin' this.
zh: {furrow}你最好别乱来。

en: {furrow}Don't come anywhere near me.
zh: {furrow}离我远点。

en: That is good because I would like to take Corporal Kane to a mission briefing.
zh: 那正好，我正想带 Kane 下士去参加任务简报。

en: Well, keep a close eye on him. Most of the men won't take kindly to having a Strogg walking through the Hannibal.
zh: 行，那你盯紧他。一个 Strogg 在汉尼拔号上走来走去，大多数弟兄可不会给好脸色。

en: I will make certain he remains safe. Kane, let us go to the briefing room.
zh: 我会确保他的安全。Kane，我们去简报室吧。

en: {furrow}I hope they brought you here to experiment on.
zh: 真希望他们把你弄来是当实验品的。

en: {puzzled}Is anything human left of you?
zh: 你身上还剩下几分人样？

en: You were human once but no more. {furrow}Now you're one of them.
zh: 你曾经是人类，但现在不是了。你已经是他们的一员。

en: {furrow}Get outta my face now!
zh: 马上从我眼前消失！

en: {furrow}Step back or this ain't gonna end well.
zh: 退后，不然没你好果子吃。

en: {furrow}You got a death wish, squib?
zh: 你是活腻了吗，杂碎？

en: {furrow}What's a piece of shit Strogg doin' onboard the Hannibal?
zh: 一坨 Strogg 烂货怎么会在汉尼拔号上？

en: {puzzled}How many Marines did they tear apart to build you?
zh: 他们拆了多少陆战队员，才拼出你这玩意儿？

en: {furrow}Be careful, freak. Lose your bodyguard and you're dead meat.
zh: 小心点，怪胎。哪天没了保镖，你就是块死肉。

en: {furrow}You eyeballing me, Strogg?
zh: 瞪我干什么，Strogg？

en: {furrow}You're real tough so long as you got a bodyguard, aren't ya?
zh: 有保镖撑腰就觉得自己很硬气，是吧？

en: {furrow}What do ya say we find out if your blood is still red?
zh: 不如咱们试试，看你的血还是不是红的？

en: {scared}Strogg! That's a Strogg!!
zh: Strogg！那是个 Strogg！！

en: {scared}No, this can't be happening...
zh: 不，这不可能……

en: {scared}Get away from me! Get back!!
zh: 离我远点！退后！！

en: {scared}What are you doing here? Why are you doing this?
zh: 你来这儿干什么？你为什么要这样？

en: {furrow}Leave me alone.
zh: 别来烦我。

en: {furrow}Why are you here? Go away.
zh: 你来干什么？走开。

en: {furrow}Stop looking at me!
zh: 别盯着我看！

en: {furrow}A Strogg! Kill it!!
zh: Strogg！宰了它！！

en: That's Matthew Kane. He's one of us.
zh: 那是 Matthew Kane。他是我们的人。

en: Don't tell me you're fallin' for that bullshit. {furrow}He's a Strogg.
zh: 你不会真信那套鬼话吧。他就是个 Strogg。

en: You're not a Strogg? Right. {furrow}Like I believe that.
zh: 你不是 Strogg？呵，鬼才信。

en: {furrow}You better haul ass off the Hannibal, freak.
zh: 你最好赶紧滚下汉尼拔号，怪胎。

en: {furrow}It might be worth the court martial to ice you right now!
zh: 就算上军事法庭，现在崩了你也值！

en: {confused}You just look like a Strogg. {puzzled}You're really one of us, right?
zh: 你只是长得像 Strogg 而已。你真是我们的人，对吧？

en: You might want to keep out of sight. Most of the other Marines are gonna want to see you dead.
zh: 你最好别太招摇。船上大多数陆战队员都巴不得你死。

en: We need to get to the mission briefing soon.
zh: 我们得尽快去参加任务简报。

en: Kane, we are expected at the mission briefing.
zh: Kane，任务简报在等着我们。

en: {puzzled}Perhaps you could walk a little faster? {idle}We need to get to the mission briefing.
zh: 能不能走快一点？我们还得赶去任务简报。

en: On Venus, the city of Portsmith is scheduled to have temperatures in the low to mid seventie's with rain from seven to eight am.
zh: 金星方面，Portsmith 市气温预计在华氏七十到七十五度之间，早间七点至八点有雨。

en: The city of New Berlin be in the mid to upper seventie's and clear.
zh: New Berlin 市气温华氏七十五度上下，天气晴朗。

en: And the spaceport, Aldrin, is still under repair from the meteor storm so the average temperature will be in the mid to upper four hundred's.
zh: 至于 Aldrin 航天港，流星风暴造成的损坏仍在抢修，平均气温将在华氏四百五十度左右。

en: {scared}Sir....
zh: 长官……

en: {furrow}At ease, Private.
zh: 稍息，列兵。

en: Rhino squad is waiting for you in the briefing room.
zh: 犀牛小队正在简报室等你。

en: Welcome back, Corporal Kane. {happy}May I be the first to say you look like shit.
zh: 欢迎归队，Kane 下士。请允许我第一个告诉你：你这模样简直惨不忍睹。

en: Son, you've got a lot of Strogg hardware attached to you. {furrow}And we don't have the equipment here to remove it.
zh: 孩子，你身上装了一大堆 Strogg 的机件。而我们这里没有能拆除它们的设备。

en: {furrow}Frankly, I don't think even one of our advanced medical facilities could do much. Those Strogg implants are too deeply connected to your central nervous system.
zh: 说实话，就算是我们最先进的医疗设施恐怕也无能为力。那些 Strogg 植入体和你的中枢神经系统连接得太深了。

en: But the good news is, the Strogg have no control over you. {happy}So we've given you a clean bill of health.
zh: 不过好消息是，Strogg 控制不了你。所以我们给你开了健康证明。

en: Shit, Kane really does look like a freakin' Strogg.
zh: 妈的，Kane 看上去还真像个该死的 Strogg。

en: Very good.
zh: 很好。

en: It's been determined The Nexus is too vast to be hurt by one E M P bomb or a dozen for that matter. The Strogg communication network needs to be cut off at the source.
zh: 已经查明，Nexus 太过庞大，一枚 EMP 炸弹奈何不了它，十几枚也一样。必须从源头掐断 Strogg 的通讯网络。

en: And that source housed in this building The Core.
zh: 而这个源头，就设在这座建筑里——核心区。

en: Were about to execute a massive assault to destroy the Core. Unfortunately its very well protected. we'll need to access the security stations at the tops of these nearby towers.
zh: 我们即将发动一场大规模突击，一举摧毁核心区。可惜那里防守得极其严密，我们必须先进入附近这几座高塔顶部的安保站。

en: That's enough, Rhodes.
zh: 够了，Rhodes。

en: General on deck!
zh: 将军到！

en: Ah... yeah. Matthew Kane. Our wayward Strogg. Can he be trusted?
zh: 啊……对。Matthew Kane，我们那位迷途知返的 Strogg。他信得过吗？

en: The doctors have given him a clean bill of health.
zh: 医生已经给他开了健康证明。

en: {happy}Kane, I've seen corpses that look healthier than you.
zh: Kane，我见过的尸体都比你气色好。

en: {happy}Heh, heh, heh. Sounds like it was pretty touch and go with you for a while.
zh: 呵呵呵，听说你有阵子可是在鬼门关前走了一遭。

en: They're really hoping you're going to be able to walk through Strogg security and get into the Core. If not, this mission may fail.
zh: 他们指望你能直接穿过 Strogg 的安保系统进入核心区。做不到的话，这次行动很可能会失败。

en: {confused}Didn't I say brute force would not win this war? {idle}We are too far from the resources of Earth to fight a battle like that.
zh: 我不是说过吗，靠蛮力赢不了这场战争？我们离地球的补给太远，打不起那种消耗战。

en: Ja, Head Quarters must now realize we need superior intellect to defeat the Strogg. And with my knowledge, I am that intellect.
zh: Ja，总部现在总算明白，要击败 Strogg 得靠超群的智慧。而凭我的学识，这智慧非我莫属。

en: Finally I will be given the respect that I deserve. And believe me, {furrow}I will not make it easy on those who have ignored me for so long.
zh: 我终于能得到应有的尊重了。相信我，那些无视了我这么久的人，我不会让他们好过的。

en: If anybody on the Hannibal gives you shit about how you look, let me know. {furrow}I'd be more than happy to straighten 'em out.
zh: 要是汉尼拔号上有谁拿你这副模样说三道四，跟我讲一声。我很乐意帮他们端正一下态度。

en: {confused}Does all that Strogg gear stuck to you hurt? {scared}'Cause, damn, it sure looks painful.
zh: 你身上那堆 Strogg 玩意儿疼不疼？妈呀，看着可真够受的。

en: {happy}You know, once the war's over, you're gonna have a hell of a time finding a girl that's gonna settle down and raise a family with you.
zh: 话说，等仗打完了，想找个姑娘跟你成家过日子，你可有得愁了。

en: {furrow}This war has taken quite a toll on our squad.  {idle}Private Anderson, Sargent Bidwell and Lieutenant Voss. {furrow}And almost you.
zh: 这场战争让我们小队损失惨重。列兵 Anderson、Bidwell 中士，还有 Voss 中尉。差一点连你也算上。

en: {happy}Morris was an excellent choice as squad leader. He knows the team better than anyone else. {idle}Sledge is an interesting choice as Sergeant. I believe he will perform quite well.
zh: 让 Morris 当队长是个绝佳的选择，没人比他更了解这支队伍。让 Sledge 当中士倒是挺有意思，不过我相信他会干得很出色。

en: {confused}Have you spoken to Strauss? {idle}He had a most interesting adventure after being captured by the Strogg.
zh: 你和 Strauss 聊过了吗？他被 Strogg 抓走之后，可是经历了一段相当有趣的冒险。

en: To hear Strauss talk, {furrow}he escaped all by himself. {idle}But I believe he had a small amount of help.
zh: 按 Strauss 的说法，他是全靠自己逃出来的。不过我相信，他多少还是得了点帮助。

en: Step right in, sir. This pod's for you.
zh: 请登舱吧，长官。这艘投送舱是给您准备的。

en: {furrow}Kane, I would remind you the existence of all humanity rests on your shoulders. But I wouldn't want you to feel any pressure. So all I will say, is {happy}don't get yourself killed, my friend.
zh: Kane，我本想提醒你，全人类的存亡都压在你的肩上。但我可不想给你任何压力。所以我只说一句——别把命丢了，我的朋友。

en: Good luck, sir. Automated navigation will take you right to the Data Storage Terminal. Have a safe flight.
zh: 祝您好运，长官。自动导航会把您直接送到数据存储终端。一路平安。

en: Paging Private Herman. Paging Private Paul Herman. Please report to General Harper's office.
zh: 呼叫列兵 Herman。呼叫列兵 Paul Herman。请立即到 Harper 将军办公室报到。

en: Evac drills for decks four and five to commence at oh two hundred hours.
zh: 四号与五号甲板的撤离演习将于零二〇〇时开始。

en: Security, report to deck two. A Strogg Warrior has been sighted.
zh: 警卫队请前往二号甲板。发现一名 Strogg 战士。

en: Condor squad, report to briefing room four.
zh: 神鹰小队，请到四号简报室报到。

en: I've tried bypassing node three, it's no use....
zh: 我试过绕开三号节点了，没用……

en: {scared}Holy shit. You're never gonna believe what I'm seein' right now.
zh: 我的老天。你绝对不会相信我现在看到了什么。

en: Hey, I'm just a tech. I don't want any trouble.
zh: 嘿，我只是个技术兵，我不想惹麻烦。

en: Get away from me!
zh: 离我远点！

en: Leave me alone!!
zh: 别来烦我！！

en: I imagine with all the hardware, you can read and understand spoken Strogg.
zh: 我猜，装了那么多硬件，你应该能看懂 Strogg 文字、听懂他们说话吧。

en: It's really far too dangerous to attempt to remove any of the implants. We have no idea what failsafe mechanisms that might activate.
zh: 贸然拆除任何植入体都太危险了。谁也不知道那会触发什么样的保险机制。

en: I'm sure there're a lot of doctors back at Prime Command who'd like to take a look at you.
zh: 我敢肯定，总指挥部有一大堆医生想好好研究研究你。

en: You think he's got a multiphase transmitter?
zh: 你说他身上装的是多相发射器吗？

en: Yeah. And get a load of the temporal implants, Those must be wired directly into the cerebral cortex.
zh: 没错。再看看那对颞部植入体，肯定是直接接进大脑皮层的。

en: I wonder what his RAM is?
zh: 不知道他的内存有多大？

en: Probably using onboard memory.
zh: 八成用的是板载存储。

en: Use his cerebral cortex?
zh: 拿他的大脑皮层当存储？

en: Well, sure. It's there, why not put it to good use?
zh: 那当然，现成的东西，不用白不用嘛。

en: You've got a point. Maybe H Q would let us run some tests on him.
zh: 有道理。说不定总部会批准我们在他身上做几项测试。

en: Excellent idea. Let's find out.
zh: 好主意，去问问看。

en: Do you have any idea how many instructions per second you can perform?
zh: 你知道自己每秒能执行多少条指令吗？

en: How much additional memory is stored in your skull?
zh: 你脑壳里还装了多少额外存储？

en: Could I run some diagnostics on you later?
zh: 回头我能在你身上跑几个诊断程序吗？

en: Did the Strogg give you photographic memory?
zh: Strogg 给你装了过目不忘的记忆力吗？

en: Do you have your own thoughts, or are you running purely on the A I programmed into the neurocyte?
zh: 你还有自己的思想吗？还是说完全靠神经控制体里预设的 AI 在运转？

en: Is it really that bad being a Strogg?
zh: 当个 Strogg 真有那么糟吗？

en: Security. This is Morrell on deck two. There's a freakin' Strogg down here!
zh: 警卫队！我是二号甲板的 Morrell。这下面有个该死的 Strogg！

en: That's Matthew Kane. He's not a Strogg and he's been given full clearance.
zh: 那是 Matthew Kane。他不是 Strogg，而且已获得完全通行权限。

en: Don't touch me!
zh: 别碰我！

en: What do you want from me?
zh: 你到底想把我怎么样？

en: Go away!!
zh: 走开！！

en: Kane, you are making the Marines on this ship nervous. Perhaps we should get to the pod bay.
zh: Kane，你让船上的陆战队员们很紧张。我们还是去投送舱区吧。

en: Morris was very specific that we go to the pod bay, Kane.
zh: Morris 特意交代过要我们去投送舱区，Kane。

en: We have delayed long enough. Let us go to the pod bay.
zh: 我们耽搁得够久了。去投送舱区吧。

en: Here, I guess even you get one of these. Its a shotgun thats been modified to take clips. Should make things easier on the front.
zh: 拿着，看来连你也能领一把。这是改装过的霰弹枪，能用弹匣供弹。上了前线能省不少事。

en: There have been great changes in Rhino squad since you were freed.
zh: 自你获救以来，犀牛小队发生了不少变动。

en: Corporal Morris has been given a field promotion of lieutenant and I have been promoted to Sergeant.
zh: Morris 下士战地晋升为中尉，而我升任了中士。

en: I know Morris will do a very good job, but this kind of responsibility is new to me. But rest assured I will do what is best for the squad.
zh: 我知道 Morris 会干得很出色，但这种担子对我来说还是头一回。不过放心，我一定会为小队做最好的打算。

en: What the hell is a squib doin' here?
zh: 一个杂碎跑到这儿来干什么？

en: The war can't be goin' that bad... can it?
zh: 战局总不至于糟到这地步吧……不至于吧？

en: Are we negotiating some kind of peace treaty with the Strogg?
zh: 难不成我们在跟 Strogg 谈什么和平条约？

en: You Strogg can't be trusted. Every human knows that.
zh: 你们 Strogg 根本信不得，这是人都知道。

en: Back the hell off!
zh: 给我滚远点！

en: Get outta my face, Strogg.
zh: 从我眼前消失，Strogg。

en: You don't scare me, freak.
zh: 你吓不倒我，怪胎。

en: Hey, look! A freak!!
zh: 嘿，快看！一个怪胎！！

en: What's that doin' onboard?
zh: 那玩意儿怎么上船的？

en: Has H Q lost it's mind? Why the hell are you being escorted around here?
zh: 总部是疯了吗？凭什么派人护送你在这儿晃悠？

en: Only dead Strogg should be on the Hannibal.
zh: 汉尼拔号上只欢迎死掉的 Strogg。

en: Better hope you don't lose your bodyguard, squib.
zh: 祈祷你的保镖别离身吧，杂碎。

en: Correct. Intelligence believes that because of his Strogg physiology, Kane is the only one who can deactivate the security stations. Kane, you most likely are our last, best hope of destroying the Nexus.
zh: 没错。情报部门认为，凭借 Strogg 化的身体机能，Kane 是唯一能解除安保站的人。Kane，你很可能是我们摧毁 Nexus 最后、也是最大的希望。

en: Strauss, we'll need your expertise at the Networking tower once we gain control.
zh: Strauss，一旦我们夺得控制权，就需要你在数据网络塔发挥专长。

en: Hacking the Strogg network will not be an easy task. But with the proper equipment, it can be done.
zh: 入侵 Strogg 的网络绝非易事。不过只要设备齐全，还是可以办到的。

en: Very good. Lieutenant Morris, you have the floor.
zh: 很好。Morris 中尉，交给你了。

en: All right, Gentlemen. This one's gonna turn the tide of the war so stay sharp.
zh: 好了，先生们。这一仗将扭转整个战局，都给我打起精神来。

en: Strauss, you're being transported by land. Kane, you're going out with the next pod assault wave. The launch bay is nearby.
zh: Strauss，你走陆路输送。Kane，你随下一波投送舱突击出发，发射舱区就在附近。

en: Battle stations. A Strogg force is incoming. Fliers and ground troops are confirmed.
zh: 全员进入战斗岗位。Strogg 部队来袭，已确认有飞行器和地面部队。

en: Guess they brought it to us. Let's make 'em regret it. Move out.
zh: 看来是他们先找上门的。那就让他们后悔来过。出发。

en: Data Storage...
zh: 数据存储……

en: Networking...
zh: 数据网络……

en: and Data Processing.
zh: 以及数据处理。

en: And that would be where Corporal Kane comes in.
zh: 这就要靠 Kane 下士出场了。

en: All systems are a go, you are cleared for launch, bay twelve.
zh: 各系统就绪。十二号舱位，准许发射。

en: Roger that, control.
zh: 收到，控制中心。

en: All right, Marine, just go down that corridor. Your pod is prepped and ready to launch.
zh: 好了，陆战队员，顺着那条走廊过去。你的投送舱已经准备就绪，随时可以发射。

en: Your pod is waiting for you at the end of that corridor. Good luck.
zh: 你的投送舱就在走廊尽头等着你。祝你好运。

en: Just go down that corridor. It'll take you straight to your pod.
zh: 顺着那条走廊走，直接就能到你的投送舱。

en: Bay eight, reload for launch. Your next passenger will be arriving shortly.
zh: 八号舱位，重新装载准备发射。下一位乘员马上就到。

en: I will be prepped for launch in two minutes, control.
zh: 控制中心，两分钟后完成发射准备。

en: {furrow}I'm a little busy here, pal. We've got a couple hundred pods to launch. {idle}Take that corridor, it'll get you to your pod.
zh: 伙计，我这儿忙得很，还有几百艘投送舱等着发射。走那条走廊，就能到你的舱位。

en: {furrow}Maybe you didn't hear the news, but we've got a major assault launching right now. Go on, move out.
zh: 你可能还没听说，大规模突击这会儿正在打响。快，出发。

en: {furrow}Marine, I've got zero time for this. Take that corridor to reach your pod.
zh: 陆战队员，我一秒钟都耗不起。走那条走廊去你的投送舱。

en: This is Bay 42. The pod is away. Running diagnostics for next launch cycle.
zh: 这里是 42 号舱位。投送舱已发射，正在为下一轮发射运行诊断。

en: Control, I'm having a little trouble with navigation.
zh: 控制中心，我的导航出了点问题。

en: I confirm that. Re transmitting pod flight plan.
zh: 已确认。正在重新传输投送舱飞行计划。

en: Yee ha! Man, is this a sight!
zh: 呀吼！伙计，这景象真带劲！

en: Humming to himself.
zh: （自顾自地哼着歌）

en: Damn it! Now's not the time for this.
zh: 该死！偏偏这时候掉链子。

en: Piece of shit...
zh: 破烂玩意儿……

en: This old bucket of bolts should have been decommissioned a long time ago.
zh: 这堆老破铜烂铁早该退役了。

en: We aren't going to win this war using outdated ships like the Hannibal.
zh: 靠汉尼拔号这种过时的老船，我们赢不了这场战争。

en: We have Strogg boarding parties on decks two and three!
zh: 二号和三号甲板发现 Strogg 登舰部队！

en: Security, report to hangar, deck two. Strogg boarding parties have been reported.
zh: 警卫队请前往二号甲板机库。据报有 Strogg 登舰部队。

en: Wolf squad, report to engineering and repel boarding parties.
zh: 野狼小队，前往轮机舱击退登舰部队。

en: Welcome, Corporal Matthew Kane. Navigation online.
zh: 欢迎，Matthew Kane 下士。导航系统已上线。

en: Engine prep cycle complete.
zh: 引擎预热流程完成。

en: Prepare for launch.
zh: 准备发射。

en: First wave has launched. All Pods are in the green.
zh: 第一波已发射。所有投送舱状态正常。

en: Funny, the Hannibal doesn't look as damaged from here.
zh: 有意思，从这儿看，汉尼拔号伤得没那么重嘛。

en: Crap! There's anti aircraft coming from all directions.
zh: 糟了！四面八方全是防空火力。

en: Do not deviate from assigned flight plans.
zh: 不得偏离既定飞行计划。

en: Mayday! Mayday! I'm hit! I'm goin' down!
zh: 求救！求救！我中弹了！我要坠落了！

en: The shields around the terminals are affecting navigation. Watch your landing vectors.
zh: 终端周围的护盾正在干扰导航，注意你们的着陆矢量。

en: There's a fire in my pod! I can't get fire suppression to activate!
zh: 我的舱里起火了！灭火系统启动不了！

en: Dammit! Navigation is down. I'm flyin' blind!
zh: 该死！导航失灵了，我这是在盲飞！

en: Kane, this is Morris. I'm not getting any younger. Get a move on.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。我可没工夫陪你耗，赶紧行动。

en: Research team Raven has arrived at the hangars and begun deploying equipment.
zh: 渡鸦研究小组已抵达机库，开始部署设备。

en: {confused}So I'm supposed to interface the secondary protocol?
zh: 所以我该接入二级协议？

en: Nein. I don't know how to make it any simpler, you have to engage the primary override first.
zh: Nein。我不知道还能怎么说得更简单——你得先启动主超控。

en: But you didn't say that.
zh: 可你之前没这么说。

en: I shouldn't have to. It's plainly obvious. Do I have to come down there and walk you through it?
zh: 这还用我说？明摆着的事。非要我下去手把手教你吗？

en: {furrow}No, that's not necessary. I'll figure it out.
zh: 不，不必了。我自己能搞明白。

en: Very well, Strauss out.
zh: 很好。Strauss，通话完毕。

en: {puzzled}Rhino Squad, eh? {idle}Your Private Strauss is about as friendly as a Strogg.
zh: 犀牛小队的？你们那位列兵 Strauss，友善程度跟 Strogg 有一拼。

en: I know Strauss is a super genius but damn, does he have to be such a pain in the ass?
zh: 我知道 Strauss 是个超级天才，可妈的，他非得这么招人烦吗？

en: I heard Strauss lost his cushy tech job after getting in a shouting match with a General. After that he was reassigned to your squad on the front lines.
zh: 听说 Strauss 跟一位将军对骂了一场，丢了原来那份清闲的技术差事，之后就被调到你们小队上前线了。

en: Kane, I'm getting tired of coolin' my heels. Get down here before I leave without you!
zh: Kane，我可等得不耐烦了。再不下来我就扔下你先走了！

en: Look at the configuration of the turbine.
zh: 你看这台涡轮的构型。

en: That has to be at least fifteen percent more efficient than anything we have.
zh: 这效率起码比我们手头任何型号都高百分之十五。

en: And see how they designed the fuel intake?
zh: 再看看他们这燃料进气道的设计？

en: Wow. We have to get this to the Hannibal as soon as it lands.
zh: 哇。等汉尼拔号一着陆，就得把这东西送上去。

en: Hmm, yeah? I'm a little busy here.
zh: 嗯，怎么？我这儿有点忙。

en: Would you look at this? The pre ignition coils are triple wound!
zh: 你瞧瞧这个！预点火线圈居然是三重绕组的！

en: Hmm? Maybe you should ask Baku.
zh: 嗯？这你恐怕得去问 Baku。

en: {confused}What? Did you want something?
zh: 什么？你有事吗？

en: I don't believe it! This has an avionic compensator built in to the onboard A I!
zh: 难以置信！这玩意儿的板载 AI 里居然内置了航电补偿器！

en: Maybe you should talk to Murphy.
zh: 这你还是去找 Murphy 吧。

en: {furrow}Corporal, I refuse to repair this power transfer until I am assigned additional protection.
zh: 下士，在给我加派护卫之前，我拒绝修理这个电力传输装置。

en: Strauss, we've been over this. It's not gonna happen.
zh: Strauss，这事我们谈过了。没门。

en: {scared}But I am in mortal danger! This area is filled with Strogg!
zh: 可我命悬一线啊！这一带到处都是 Strogg！

en: Thank you, Private Strauss. Your grievance is noted.
zh: 谢谢，Strauss 列兵。你的不满已记录在案。

en: Ah, hello, Corporal Kane, it is good to finally meet you. I am Private Johann Strauss, {puzzled}you have no doubt heard of me.
zh: 啊，你好，Kane 下士，总算见到你了。我是列兵 Johann Strauss——你想必早就听说过我。

en: I am far too valuable to be left defenseless. There should be a dozen soldiers guarding me.
zh: 我这么宝贵的人才，怎么能没人保护？起码该派一打士兵守着我。

en: {furrow}How can they do this to me? To ME! Johann Strauss. {idle}The war effort cannot afford to have me die.
zh: 他们怎么能这样对我？对我！Johann Strauss！这场战争可死不起我这号人物。

en: I am one of eight humans fluent in Strogg. One of four who understands Strogg programming. And yet our leaders continue to risk my life on a daily basis.
zh: 全人类精通 Strogg 语的只有八个人，我是其中之一；看得懂 Strogg 程序的只有四个，我也算一个。可我们的长官们还天天拿我的命去冒险。

en: {confused}What the hell were you doin'. Chattin' it up with some of local Strogg women? {idle}C'mon, let's get back to Rhino Squad.
zh: 你他妈干什么去了？跟本地的 Strogg 娘们儿唠嗑呢？走，回犀牛小队去。

en: C'mon, {confused}what are we stopping for? {idle}Let's get to the Air Defense Cannon.
zh: 走啊，停下来干什么？咱们去防空炮那边。

en: Kane, we've got no time to stop. Lieutenant Voss is waiting for us.
zh: Kane，没时间停留了。Voss 中尉还等着我们呢。

en: {puzzled}What are you doing? {idle}Let's get to the Air Defense Cannon.
zh: 你在干什么？快去防空炮那边。

en: Look! We've got fliers to study!
zh: 看！有飞行器可以研究了！

en: Kane, this is Morris. Where the hell are you? Get down here quick. We've got a war to win, remember?
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。你死哪儿去了？赶紧下来。还等着打赢这场仗呢，忘了吗？

en: H Q, H Q do you copy? H Q, this is Raven squad. I'm getting no response, Captain. We're gonna need a radio relay placed at the entrance of the mountain.
zh: 总部，总部，听到请回答？总部，这里是渡鸦小队。上尉，没有任何回应。我们得在山体入口架一台无线电中继器。

en: I want this gear prepped and ready in one hour.
zh: 一小时内，这批装备必须准备就绪。

en: It takes a full hour just to uncrate this equipment, sir.
zh: 长官，光开箱就得整整一个小时。

en: {furrow}I've got no time for excuses, Marine. I want results.
zh: 我没工夫听借口，陆战队员。我只要结果。

en: You mind, buddy? I've got a shit load of work to do.
zh: 让让行吗，伙计？我这儿一堆活儿要干。

en: {furrow}Look, I don't mean to be a dick, but I'm really busy right now.
zh: 听着，我不是想摆脸色，但我现在真的很忙。

en: {furrow}Unless you wanna help me uncrate, hook up and activate this equipment, you better just step away.
zh: 除非你想帮我开箱、接线、调设备，不然就麻烦你靠边站。

en: I want a full analysis of that primary console in the southern hangar, and I want it five minutes ago.
zh: 南机库那台主控制台，我要一份完整分析——五分钟前就该交了。

en: You. Download the launch software from that console in back.
zh: 你，去把后面那台控制台里的发射软件下载下来。

en: {puzzled}Corporal Kane, right? {idle}Good job clearing out the hangars. We're gonna learn a lot about the Strogg from this facility.
zh: Kane 下士，对吧？机库清剿得漂亮。这处设施能让我们摸清 Strogg 不少底细。

en: This is the first time we've been in a Strogg hangar. Why studying just one of the consoles is gonna keep us busy for months.
zh: 这是我们头一回进 Strogg 的机库。光研究其中一台控制台，就够我们忙上好几个月了。

en: We've never had the chance to study an undamaged flier before. Now we have dozens to work with.
zh: 以前我们从没机会研究完好无损的飞行器，现在一下子有几十架可以摆弄。

en: Once we've had some time to understand the fliers, we'll be knocking them out of the sky with ease.
zh: 等我们吃透了这些飞行器，把它们从天上打下来就是小菜一碟。

en: Cmon, Marine! Lets get to the L Z and join the party!
zh: 快走，陆战队员！去着陆区凑凑热闹！

en: Lets get to the landing zone, Marine!
zh: 去着陆区，陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Stop pissing around. We have to get to the L Z.
zh: 别磨磨蹭蹭的，我们得赶去着陆区。

en: The Hannibals gonna be landing soon. We have to get there ASAP!
zh: 汉尼拔号马上就要着陆了，我们得尽快赶过去！

en: {happy}Damn. That cannon sure knocked the shit out of the containment door.
zh: 好家伙，这门炮可把隔离门轰了个稀巴烂。

en: Where the hell are these things coming from?
zh: 这些鬼东西到底是从哪儿冒出来的？

en: Time for a little more target practice.
zh: 又到打靶练习时间了。

en: Come here, Strogg. I got a present for ya.
zh: 过来呀，Strogg，我给你备了份大礼。

en: A little further and we should be at the Landing Zone.
zh: 再走一段，应该就到着陆区了。

en: The L Z is straight through here.
zh: 着陆区就在这条路直走到头。

en: This way to the Hannibals landing area.
zh: 往这边走，就是汉尼拔号的着陆场。

en: The U.S.S. Hannibal's landing cycle has begun.
zh: 汉尼拔号已进入着陆程序。

en: Damn. We have to get to those Marines! Wait for the towers to reload, then run for it.
zh: 该死，我们得赶到那些陆战队员身边！等炮塔装填的间隙，抓紧冲过去。

en: The Hannibal is passing through the mesosphere. Heat shield is fully operational.
zh: 汉尼拔号正在穿越中间层。隔热罩运转正常。

en: Now passing through the stratosphere. Breaking procedure has begun.
zh: 正在穿越平流层。减速程序已启动。

en: The Hannibal is now in the troposphere. Landing zone in sight.
zh: 汉尼拔号已进入对流层。着陆区已在视野之内。

en: Get down! Those guns are tearing us apart!
zh: 趴下！那些炮火快把我们撕碎了！

en: Hannibal. Requesting air stike on that Strogg gun emplacement.
zh: 汉尼拔号，请求对那处 Strogg 炮位实施空袭。

en: We copy that.
zh: 收到。

en: All right! Thanks Hannibal.
zh: 太好了！多谢，汉尼拔号。

en: Our pleasure.
zh: 乐意效劳。

en: Breaking jets activated. Deploying landing struts.
zh: 减速喷口已启动。着陆支架展开中。

en: The U.S.S. Hannibal has landed. I repeat, the Hannibal has landed. Welcome aboard, Marines.
zh: 汉尼拔号已着陆。重复，汉尼拔号已着陆。欢迎登舰，陆战队员们。

en: Fuckin A! Shes down! Come on, lets get to the Hannibal!
zh: 太他妈带劲了！她落地了！走，上汉尼拔号！

en: What are you waiting for? Let’s get to the ship!
zh: 还愣着干什么？快上船！

en: We can board the ship by getting on the lift.
zh: 搭那部升降梯就能登舰。

en: Cmon, lets get to The Hannibal.
zh: 走吧，上汉尼拔号。

en: Finally. A chance to get out of the line of fire for a couple hours.
zh: 可算能离开火线，清静几个小时了。

en: Corporal Kane, {puzzled}enjoying your first day with Rhino Squad? {idle}Here's something I found you might be able to use.
zh: Kane 下士，在犀牛小队的第一天过得还愉快吗？我找到了点东西，你或许用得上。

en: Now that the hangars are out of commission we have a clear path to the air defense cannon. Lets move.
zh: 机库已经瘫痪，通往防空炮的路畅通无阻了。行动。

en: That door's our only way into the gun control room. Find a way to open it. Good luck.
zh: 那扇门是进入炮控室的唯一通道。想办法打开它。祝你好运。

en: {furrow}Damn . . . {idle}this doors locked and its our only way in.
zh: 该死……门锁死了，这可是唯一的入口。

en: Kane, find a way to open this. Sledge and Morris, take up a position. Were staying here.
zh: Kane，想办法把门打开。Sledge、Morris，占据位置。我们守在这里。

en: Yes sir.
zh: 是，长官。

en: Go on, Kane. Find a way to open this door.
zh: 去吧，Kane。想办法打开这扇门。

en: Kane, we have to take this cannon down now.
zh: Kane，我们必须立刻拿下这门炮。

en: {furrow}I just gave you an order, Soldier. Find a way to open this door.
zh: 我刚下过命令，士兵。想办法把这扇门打开。

en: Good job, Kane. Sledge, cmon. Youre with us. Morris stay here and watch our backs.
zh: 干得好，Kane。Sledge，走，你跟我们行动。Morris 留在这儿掩护后方。

en: Shit, Im missing out on all the fun today.
zh: 妈的，今天的好戏全跟我没份。

en: Its locked. This just isnt our day for doors.
zh: 锁死了。今天咱们跟门算是犯冲了。

en: We got squibs above us!
zh: 头顶上有杂碎！

en: Get in there! Move!
zh: 冲进去！快！

en: Sledge, gimme suppressing fire from that railing. Kaine, push forward!
zh: Sledge，到栏杆那儿给我火力压制。Kane，向前推进！

en: Good job, men. Mission accomplished.
zh: 干得好，弟兄们。任务完成。

en: This is Lieutenant Voss to H Q, the cannon is under Marine control.
zh: Voss 中尉呼叫总部，火炮已被陆战队控制。

en: Affirmative, Lieutenant. The Hannibal is now in geosynchronous orbit and beginning descent.
zh: 确认，中尉。汉尼拔号已进入同步轨道，开始下降。

en: Sir, how are we gonna get to the landing zone with that locked surface door in our way?
zh: 长官，地表那扇门锁着，我们要怎么去着陆区？

en: Good point. Kane, hop in the cannon and see if you cant open the door.
zh: 问得好。Kane，钻进炮座，看看能不能把那扇门「打开」。

en: Now what do you say we put this gun to good use? See that locked door over there? Let's blow it to hell.
zh: 现在，咱们让这门炮发挥点余热怎么样？看见那边那扇锁着的门了吗？把它轰上天。

en: Kane, since you were first in, you do the honors.
zh: Kane，你是第一个冲进来的，这份荣幸归你。

en: Go ahead, Kane. Fire away.
zh: 来吧，Kane，开炮。

en: All you gotta do is aim the cannon at the door and fire, Kane.
zh: Kane，你只要把炮口对准那扇门，开火就行。

en: If you use the controls there, you can point this cannon at that door and destroy it.
zh: 用那边的操纵装置，就能把炮口转向那扇门，把它摧毁。

en: Nice shootin', Kane.
zh: 打得漂亮，Kane。

en: This is Lieutenant Voss to all squads. Were in business. Make a sweep of the Hannibal landing zone! Rhodes, do you read me?
zh: Voss 中尉呼叫各小队。行动开始，把汉尼拔号着陆区给我扫荡一遍！Rhodes，听到了吗？

en: Get to my position ASAP. I need your talents.
zh: 尽快赶到我的位置，我需要你的本事。

en: On my way, sir.
zh: 马上到，长官。

en: Sledge, youre with me on clean up detail. Kane, you go help clear out the L Z. Good luck.
zh: Sledge，你跟我负责清剿扫尾。Kane，你去帮忙肃清着陆区。祝好运。

en: Kane, you've got your orders. Go through that door and help clear out the landing zone.
zh: Kane，命令已经下了。穿过那扇门，去帮忙肃清着陆区。

en: Kane, I want you to get out there and help clear the landing zone.
zh: Kane，我要你出去协助肃清着陆区。

en: {furrow}Corporal Kane, I gave you an order! Get to the M C C landing zone!
zh: Kane 下士，我下的是命令！立刻赶去 MCC 着陆区！

en: Did you not hear Lutenant Voss? He wants you to help secure the landing zone for the Mobile Command Center.
zh: 你没听见 Voss 中尉的话吗？他要你去协助保障移动指挥中心的着陆区。

en: I would strongly recommend you do not piss off the Lieutenant.
zh: 我强烈建议你别去惹恼中尉。

en: Kane, go to the L Z before the Lieutenant decides to make your life hell.
zh: Kane，快去着陆区，免得中尉打定主意让你吃不了兜着走。

en: {happy}Todays turnin out to be pretty fun, eh, Kane? See ya on the Hannibal!
zh: 今天玩得挺痛快，是吧，Kane？汉尼拔号上见！

en: Clear the cannon for detonation!
zh: 火炮周围清场，准备起爆！

en: Charges activated.
zh: 炸药已激活。

en: Detonation in three . . two . . . one.
zh: 起爆倒计时：三……二……一。

en: {happy}Ha, haaa! Do I love my job!
zh: 哈哈！我可太爱这份工作了！

en: Cleared for detonation.
zh: 已清场，可以起爆。

en: Look! They're gonna destroy the cannon.
zh: 看！他们要把那门炮炸掉了。

en: There's been a cave in further down. There's nothing to see here.
zh: 前面塌方了，这儿没什么好看的。

en: Go on, soldier. This cave's unstable.
zh: 走吧，士兵。这个洞窟不稳固。

en: Didn't you hear me? Get out of here. The cave could collapse.
zh: 没听见吗？快离开这儿，洞窟随时可能塌。

en: {furrow}Dammit, soldier. Walk the hell out of here before you need to be carried out.
zh: 该死的，士兵，趁还能自己走，赶紧滚出去，别等着被人抬出去。

en: Behavioral program downloaded to neurocyte.
zh: 行为程序已下载至神经控制体。

en: Be ah heteg vehl pevroom deh er bo deh thir Ehn ev erka thi.
zh: Be ah heteg vehl pevroom deh er bo deh thir Ehn ev erka thi.

en: Take 'em down!
zh: 干掉他们！

en: {scared}Lieutenant! According to the med chip, this is Matthew Kane.
zh: 中尉！医疗芯片显示，这是 Matthew Kane！

en: {confused}Is he Strogg?
zh: 他是 Strogg 吗？

en: No. The neurocyte in his head hasn't been activated. The Strogg don't control him.
zh: 不是。他脑内的神经控制体还没被激活，Strogg 控制不了他。

en: {furrow}How do we know the neurocyte isn't gonna suddenly switch on and he winds up fully Strogg?
zh: 谁能保证那玩意儿不会突然启动，让他彻底变成 Strogg？

en: He won't. I guarantee it.
zh: 不会的。我担保。

en: H Q, this is Rhino squad. {furrow}We've got an injured Marine who needs immediate evac.
zh: 总部，这里是犀牛小队。有一名伤员需要立即后送。

en: Rhino squad, meet Falcon five at the coordinates being sent.
zh: 犀牛小队，请按发送的坐标与猎鹰五号会合。

en: Roger that, H Q. Rhino squad, out.
zh: 收到，总部。犀牛小队，通话完毕。

en: {happy}Welcome back to the land of the living, Kane.
zh: 欢迎重返人间，Kane。

en: {furrow}C'mon. Let's move out.
zh: 走，我们出发。

en: {furrow}Flank left! Flank left!
zh: 左翼包抄！左翼包抄！

en: I'm on it!
zh: 这就去！

en: All clear!
zh: 安全！

en: We're too late for this one.
zh: 这个人，我们来晚了。

en: {furrow}I'm doin' you a favor, Marine.
zh: 我这是在帮你解脱，陆战队员。

en: {scared}Wait!
zh: 等等！

en: Take a reading on him.
zh: 给他做个检测。

en: You can't go running around unarmed. Grab Moore's weapons.
zh: 你总不能空着手到处跑。把 Moore 的武器拿上。

en: Yeah... {happy}the Strogg really did a number on you.
zh: 是啊……Strogg 可真没少折腾你。

en: You have to keep up with us, Kane.
zh: 你得跟上我们，Kane。

en: What are you waitin' for? The Strogg? Let's go!
zh: 你还等什么呢？等 Strogg 吗？快走！

en: C'mon, Kane. Keep up with us.
zh: 快，Kane，跟紧我们。

en: {furrow}Stick with the group, Kane. There's no telling when Strogg might show up.
zh: 跟紧队伍，Kane。说不准 Strogg 什么时候就冒出来。

en: Kane, you look like hell.
zh: Kane，你这模样真够呛。

en: {happy}You're damn lucky we happened to be in the neighborhood.
zh: 你小子真他妈走运，我们正好路过这一带。

en: {happy}Heh, if we'd been a couple minutes later, you'd be a squib.
zh: 嘿，我们要是再晚来几分钟，你就成杂碎了。

en: You better say a lot of prayers tonight because someone's sure watchin' over you.
zh: 今晚你可得多祷告几遍，绝对是有人在保佑你。

en: We were passing through this building trying to get to the extraction point. Never thought we'd find you here.
zh: 我们本来只是借道这栋楼去撤离点，压根没想到会在这儿找到你。

en: We all thought you died back at the hub along with Strauss.
zh: 我们都以为你和 Strauss 一起死在枢纽站了。

en: If we'd been five or ten seconds later, youd be a full Strogg right now.
zh: 我们要是再晚个五秒十秒，你现在已经是个彻头彻尾的 Strogg 了。

en: It's a lucky thing Voss recognized you, because no one else would underneath all that Strogg gear.
zh: 幸亏 Voss 认出了你。裹着那一身 Strogg 装置，换别人根本认不出来。

en: They're gonna have a heck of a time getting all the Strogg implants off you.
zh: 要把你身上那些 Strogg 植入体全拆下来，他们可有得忙了。

en: {puzzled}Did you want something?
zh: 你有什么事吗？

en: {confused}You okay?
zh: 你没事吧？

en: {puzzled}You feelin' all right, Kane?
zh: 感觉还好吗，Kane？

en: It's locked.
zh: 锁住了。

en: Okay, Anderson. You escort Kane to Falcon five. We'll get this door open and proceed without you.
zh: 好，Anderson，你护送 Kane 去猎鹰五号。我们把这扇门弄开，先行一步。

en: {scared}I'm supposed to escort him alone?
zh: 让我一个人护送他？

en: {happy}You did guarantee he wouldn't turn Strogg, didn't you?
zh: 你不是打过包票，说他不会变成 Strogg 吗？

en: {furrow}Yeah, but...
zh: 是没错，可是……

en: It'll be fine, Anderson.
zh: 不会有事的，Anderson。

en: Huh. C'mon, Kane. This way.
zh: 唉，走吧，Kane。这边。

en: Let me see what I can do.
zh: 让我来试试看。

en: Rhino, this is H Q. What is your status?
zh: 犀牛小队，这里是总部。报告你们的状况。

en: We should be at the evac coordinates in ten minutes.
zh: 我们十分钟内就能抵达撤离坐标。

en: There's a medic with Falcon five. Take the injured marine to them. The rest of your men will have to continue on to the original extraction point.
zh: 猎鹰五号上有医疗兵，把伤员交给他们。你余下的人继续前往原定撤离点。

en: Copy that. Rhino, out.
zh: 收到。犀牛小队，通话完毕。

en: Hey, stick with me.
zh: 嘿，跟紧我。

en: We can't split up like this.
zh: 我们不能就这么分散开。

en: Don't go running off.
zh: 别乱跑。

en: It's safer if we stay together.
zh: 待在一起更安全。

en: Anderson, this is Falcon five. Get to the L Z on the double. Radar shows Strogg headed our way.
zh: Anderson，这里是猎鹰五号。跑步赶到着陆区，雷达显示有 Strogg 正朝我们过来。

en: {scared}Don't leave without us.
zh: 别丢下我们先走。

en: We'll stay as long as possible. Falcon five out.
zh: 我们会尽量多撑一会儿。猎鹰五号，通话完毕。

en: Hey, Kane, look. There's our ticket out of here.
zh: 嘿，Kane，快看，那就是咱们离开这儿的门票。

en: Anderson, this is Falcon five. Sorry but we have to dust off now. We have incoming.
zh: Anderson，这里是猎鹰五号。抱歉，我们必须马上起飞，有敌人来袭。

en: H Q... H Q this is Falcon five. We request...
zh: 总部……总部，这里是猎鹰五号。我们请求——

en: {scared}Holy shit . . . they're dead . . . that was our only ride out of here.
zh: 老天爷……他们全完了……那可是我们唯一的脱身机会。

en: Anderson, this is Lieutenant Voss. Things are looking seriously fubared. Rendezvous back with us at the medlab storage facility. We'll head to the primary extraction point.
zh: Anderson，我是 Voss 中尉。局面已经彻底乱套了。回到医疗实验室仓储区与我们会合，然后一起前往主撤离点。

en: I copy, Lieutenant. Anderson, out.
zh: 收到，中尉。Anderson，通话完毕。

en: A human force has been located in the Docking Bay Bridges. Respond to the threat immediately.
zh: 已在停泊舱桥区探测到人类部队。立即应对威胁。

en: You try that door over there, I'll try this one.
zh: 你去试那边那扇门，我来试这扇。

en: Hey, Kane. {happy}This one's open. Come on.
zh: 嘿，Kane，这扇开了。过来。

en: Kane, this Lieutenant Voss. H Q just told me about Anderson. I'm sorry to hear about that. He was one of the best medics I've ever known.
zh: Kane，我是 Voss 中尉。总部刚把 Anderson 的事告诉我了。我很难过，他是我认识的最出色的医疗兵之一。

en: But let's focus on getting you to safety. You're gonna to have to catch up with the squad, Kane. Meet us at the medlabs storage facility. We'll wait for you there.
zh: 但眼下先把你安全带回来。你得赶上大部队，Kane。到医疗实验室仓储区与我们会合，我们在那儿等你。

en: {pain}Kane? Kane is that you? This section caved in. {furrow}I'm not sure where the rest of the squad is. My comlink is damaged. Find your way around this mess and we'll figure out a way to get out of here.
zh: Kane？Kane，是你吗？这一段塌了。其他队员在哪儿我也不清楚，我的通讯器坏了。你先绕过这片废墟，然后我们一起想办法离开。

en: Corporal Kane, I am very busy so I will make this brief.
zh: Kane 下士，我很忙，所以长话短说。

en: This is the time you must deactivate the Core security interface. Once you have completed that objective, you will be taking the teleporter into the Core. There you must destroy the Nexus.
zh: 现在，你必须去解除核心区安保接口。完成该目标后，你将乘传送器进入核心区，在那里摧毁 Nexus。

en: For the moment, concern yourself with getting to the top of this tower. I will step you through the rest of this mission as you go.
zh: 眼下，你只需专心登上这座塔的顶层。之后的任务步骤，我会一路指点你。

en: Corporal Kane, perhaps you misunderstood. I need you to activate the Core Interface now.
zh: Kane 下士，你大概是没听明白。我要你现在就去启动核心接口。

en: Corporal, I have no time for your games! Find the Core Interface now!!
zh: 下士，我没工夫陪你玩！立刻去找核心接口！！

en: Your ignorance is intolerable! Find the Core Interface for this tower immediately!!
zh: 你的无知让人无法容忍！马上找到这座塔的核心接口！！

en: Private Strauss, it looks like Corporal Kane has arrived.
zh: Strauss 列兵，看来 Kane 下士到了。

en: Send him to me immediately.
zh: 立刻让他来见我。

en: {furrow}I don't care if he is a super genius, he's still a dick. And if he yells at me one more time, I'm takin' a swing at him.
zh: 管他是不是超级天才，反正就是个混蛋。他再冲我吼一次，我非揍他一拳不可。

en: {furrow}How do they allow anyone with a weapon near Strauss? It'd be too big a temptation.
zh: 他们怎么敢让带枪的人靠近 Strauss？这诱惑也太大了。

en: {furrow}Anyone ever think to test and see if Strauss is just really a Strogg in disguise?
zh: 就没人想过测一测，Strauss 会不会其实是 Strogg 假扮的？

en: How does it know? Maybe if I try this. Damn it. Maybe this. Crap. This is way beyond any A I I've dealt with before.
zh: 它是怎么察觉的？也许试试这个。该死。那这个呢？完蛋。这远远超出我以前对付过的任何 AI。

en: There's some type of intelligence that's actually inside the Nexus. If Strauss weren't so fast, the entity would have locked us out of the Nexus long ago.
zh: Nexus 里面确实存在某种智能。要不是 Strauss 手速够快，那个存在早就把我们锁在 Nexus 之外了。

en: The entity in the Nexus is doing everything it can to sever our connection. If that happens we're dead in the water.
zh: Nexus 里的那个存在正在想方设法切断我们的连接。真要断了，我们就彻底动弹不得了。

en: You got any idea what to do here?
zh: 你知道这儿该怎么弄吗？

en: I'm guessing about connections the same as you.
zh: 接线这事儿，我跟你一样，全靠猜。

en: Just to warn you - Schilder touched the wrong wire and his hand caught on fire.
zh: 先给你提个醒——Schilder 碰错了一根线，一只手当场烧着了。

en: That's comforting to hear.
zh: 听着可真让人安心。

en: Your friend Strauss is a little high strung isn't he?
zh: 你那位朋友 Strauss，神经绷得也太紧了点吧？

en: A little while ago Strauss ordered Captain Drake to leave because he wanted absolutely silence in the control room. I've never seen the Captain so angry.
zh: 刚才 Strauss 嫌控制室不够绝对安静，居然把 Drake 上尉给轰了出去。我从没见上尉气成那样。

en: You might want to hurry up and see Strauss before he tries to have you hung for insubordination.
zh: 你最好赶紧去见 Strauss，免得他找个抗命的由头把你送上绞架。

en: That didn't do anything. Try the next conduit.
zh: 没反应。试试下一根导管。

en: Okay, how about now?
zh: 好，现在呢？

en: Hey, that did the trick! I have access to the first floor security. Now to shut down the security scanners.
zh: 嘿，成了！我拿到一层的安保权限了。接下来关掉安检扫描器。

en: That's him. That's Kane.
zh: 就是他。那就是 Kane。

en: He looks like a Strogg to me.
zh: 我看他就是个 Strogg。

en: What the hell's in these crates, lead bars?
zh: 这些箱子里装的什么鬼，铅条吗？

en: More gear for that Strauss guy.
zh: 还不是给那个叫 Strauss 的家伙运的装备。

en: As if there isn't enough in the Control Room already.
zh: 好像控制室里堆的还不够多似的。

en: What has he been up to?
zh: 他最近都在搞什么名堂？

en: I'm not sure. He's difficult to keep under surveillance.
zh: 说不好。要盯住他可不容易。

en: Does he represent a threat?
zh: 他构成威胁吗？

en: I don't believe so.
zh: 我认为不构成。

en: Keep a close eye on him. Section thirteen, out.
zh: 继续严密监视他。十三科，通话完毕。

en: Hello Corporal Kane. I trust everything is going well?
zh: 你好，Kane 下士。一切都还顺利吧？

en: {puzzled}Your Strogg implants aren't giving you any difficulties, are they?
zh: 你那些 Strogg 植入体没给你添什么麻烦吧？

en: {confused}You would inform your superiors if you were having difficulty, wouldn't you? {idle}That's not to say we don't trust you, we're just very interested in your well being.
zh: 要是有什么不对劲，你会向上级报告的，对吧？倒不是说我们信不过你，我们只是非常关心你的健康。

en: so the big guy picks up a rocket launcher under each arm, like they were nothin', and starts firing directly into the advancing Strogg.
zh: 然后那大块头一边胳膊底下夹一具火箭发射器，跟拎着玩具似的，照着压上来的 Strogg 就是一顿猛轰。

en: He wasn't hurt by the backwash?
zh: 尾焰没把他自己燎着？

en: If he was, he didn't let on. He just kept firing. Must have killed twenty Strogg all by himself.
zh: 就算燎着了，他也没吭一声，只顾一个劲儿地开火。一个人少说干掉了二十个 Strogg。

en: What was his name?
zh: 他叫什么名字？

en: Don't know, I'm pretty sure he was Russian.
zh: 不知道，但我敢肯定他是个俄国人。

en: This is Lieutenant Morris to all teams stationed at the Networking Tower. Matthew Kane will be arriving shortly.
zh: Morris 中尉呼叫数据网络塔各驻守小组：Matthew Kane 马上就到。

en: This is Falcon six making a run on the Networking Tower. Anti aircraft is heavy.
zh: 猎鹰六号正在向数据网络塔突进。防空火力很猛。

en: I'm hit! Energizers are off line attempting to
zh: 我中弹了！供能器离线，正在尝试——

en: Kane. Over here.
zh: Kane，这边。

en: I can see now why they wanted me to protect Strauss. I'm not sure who wants him dead more, the Strogg or the humans. But he does indeed possess the unique skills to hack into the Strogg Nexus.
zh: 现在我明白他们为什么派我保护 Strauss 了。说不好谁更想要他的命——Strogg 还是人类。不过要入侵 Strogg 的 Nexus，也确实只有他有这份独门本事。

en: While Strauss has always lacked people skills, the strain he is under shows him at his worst.
zh: Strauss 向来不怎么会与人相处，如今压力当头，更是把他最糟的一面全逼出来了。

en: With the way Strauss is ordering everyone around, you'd think he was a General... a very temperamental General.
zh: 看 Strauss 指挥所有人的那副架势，你会以为他是位将军……一位脾气很坏的将军。

en: Nein! That is completely wrong! The relays must be set to a differential of point zero zero eight. Go and correct your error.
zh: Nein！完全错了！继电器必须设成〇点〇〇八的差值。去把你的错误改过来。

en: Friedman's out!
zh: Friedman 不行了！

en: Friedman's down!
zh: Friedman 倒下了！

en: Eagle ten making our run on the Networking Tower. Damn. The air defenses are strong.
zh: 雄鹰十号正在向数据网络塔突进。该死，防空火力真强。

en: I'm hit! I have to abort.
zh: 我中弹了！必须中止行动。

en: Kane is here, sir.
zh: 长官，Kane 到了。

en: Send him on up.
zh: 让他上来。

en: Hello, sir. There's a scout team awaiting you in the elevator lobby. But be careful. This area is not secure. Strogg could be anywhere.
zh: 您好，长官。电梯厅里有一支侦察小组在等您。不过请当心，这片区域还没肃清，Strogg 随时可能出现。

en: Aaaaaaaah! Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!
Shit. Get a medic up here ASAP! We were trying to demo a door and the charge misfired. Lieutenant Leonard was hurt.
zh: 妈的，赶紧派个医疗兵上来！我们爆破房门的时候炸药走火了，Leonard 中尉受了伤。

en: A medic has been dispatched.
zh: 医疗兵已经派出。

en: Do something!
zh: 快想想办法！

en: It's too late. He's dead.
zh: 太迟了，他已经死了。

en: No, damn it. No.
zh: 不，该死，不……

en: Sorry, I did what I could. But I'm not a medic.
zh: 抱歉，我尽力了。可我不是医疗兵。

en: We were trying to set charges on that door when one went off prematurely. Lieutenant Leonard took the full force of the blast. What a freakin' waste.
zh: 我们正往那扇门上装炸药，有一枚提前引爆了。Leonard 中尉整个人被炸了个正着。真他妈冤枉。

en: No time for grieving. Looks like we've got a fight on our hands.
zh: 没时间悲伤了。看样子有一场硬仗要打。

en: All right, Marines! Let's kick some ass for the L T!
zh: 好了，陆战队员们！为中尉狠狠干他们一场！

en: Meuller's down!
zh: Meuller 倒下了！

en: Meuller's dead!
zh: Meuller 死了！

en: Coppel's been hit!
zh: Coppel 中弹了！

en: They killed Coppel!
zh: 他们打死了 Coppel！

en: Corporal Kane, I have bypassed security for the floor you are on. Take the door that is now opening.
zh: Kane 下士，我已绕过你所在楼层的安保系统。走那扇正在打开的门。

en: We don't dare risk landing pods on the roof until the anti aircraft guns are taken out.
zh: 防空炮一天不拔掉，我们就一天不敢冒险往楼顶投放投送舱。

en: Preparing to make a bombing run on the air defenses.
zh: 准备对防空阵地进行轰炸。

en: Roger that. I'm following you in.
zh: 收到，我跟在你后面进入。

en: I can barely see the target through all the...
zh: 我几乎看不见目标了，这漫天全是……

en: Eagle twelve's been hit!
zh: 雄鹰十二号被击中了！

en: Corporal Kane, leave one of your squad in the control room you're passing now.
zh: Kane 下士，在你们正经过的控制室里留下一名队员。

en: Radar shows something large headed this way.
zh: 雷达显示有大型目标正朝这边过来。

en: We have a visual. The Guardian creature is headed our way. Damn is it fast.
zh: 已目视确认。那只守卫（Guardian）巨兽正朝我们扑过来。妈的，它速度真快。

en: Kane, use the teleporter in front of you now. It will take you to the floor directly below the rooftop. There, you will have access to the security  station.
zh: Kane，马上使用你面前的传送器。它会把你送到顶层正下方的楼层，在那里你就能进入安保站。

en: Corporal Kane, this is Strauss. You are now only one floor beneath your objective. Walk up to the roof and disable the security station.
zh: Kane 下士，我是 Strauss。你现在离目标只差一层。上到楼顶，解除那座安保站。

en: The Guardian has landed on the side of the tower.
zh: 守卫已经落在塔身侧面。

en: Ah, the Core security station is finally deactivated. I won't bother asking what took you so long. Quickly make your way to the Core Teleporter.
zh: 啊，核心区安保站总算解除了。我就不问你为什么磨蹭了这么久了。赶快前往核心区传送器。

en: Gaaaaaahhh
zh: 嘎啊——

en: He's dead! Barrister's dead!
zh: 他死了！Barrister 死了！

en: I told him not to go through.
zh: 我早跟他说了别过去。

en: H Q, we have a Marine down at the Core teleporter.
zh: 总部，核心区传送器这边有一名陆战队员阵亡。

en: Perhaps he should have listened to me rather than trying to play the hero.
zh: 他要是听我的话，而不是急着逞英雄，也许就不会这样了。

en: He just wanted to get in there and battle the Strogg.
zh: 他只是想冲进去和 Strogg 拼一场。

en: That proved to be a mistake, didn't it?
zh: 事实证明这是个错误，不是吗？

en: Kane, ignore the unfortunate soul laying dead on the ground. Because of your Strogg physiology you will be able to use the teleporter. Go now, it is the only way into the Core, and that houses the Nexus.
zh: Kane，别管地上那个倒霉鬼了。凭你 Strogg 化的身体，你可以使用传送器。快去，这是进入核心区的唯一通道，Nexus 就在里面。

en: Corporal Kane, why do you hesitate to use the teleporter? Trust me when I say it is completely safe for you.
zh: Kane 下士，你还在犹豫什么？相信我，传送器对你来说绝对安全。

en: Please, Corporal, use the teleporter. Men are dying as you hesitate to enter the Core.
zh: 拜托，下士，快用传送器。你在核心区门口每犹豫一秒，就有人在送命。

en: Corporal Kane, it is imperative you use the teleporter now. The Nexus must be destroyed.
zh: Kane 下士，你必须立刻使用传送器。Nexus 非摧毁不可。

zh: odd
