en: seizure
zh: seizure

en: Well, that was certainly entertaining.
zh: 呵，这可真是「精彩」。

en: Kane, this is Morris. Data Processing Tower's shut down. Looks like the Strogg are trying to stop us from reaching the core. You'll have to find  a way to bring it back online. Sledge is on his way. He should rendezvous with you shortly. Good luck. Morris out.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。数据处理塔断电停摆了，看来 Strogg 是想阻止我们接近核心区。你得想办法让它恢复运转。Sledge 已经在路上，很快会和你会合。祝好运。Morris，通话完毕。

en: Good job, Kane. The building's back online.
zh: 干得好，Kane。整栋建筑恢复运转了。

en: Kane, this is Morris. Sledge just arrived at the Processing Tower. Hook up with him as soon as you can.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。Sledge 刚到数据处理塔，尽快跟他会合。

en: Kane, over here.
zh: Kane，这边。

en: It is good to see you, Kane. I do not know if you have heard, but the attack on the Core has cost many lives. {furrow}We must succeed so that they will not have died in vain. {idle}Let us find the security interface at the top of this tower. Lead the way.
zh: 见到你真好，Kane。不知你听说了没有，这次进攻核心区已经付出了许多条人命。我们必须成功，才不辜负他们的牺牲。我们去塔顶找安保接口吧。你来带路。

en: {puzzled}Why don't we concentrate on getting to the top of this tower?
zh: 我们还是专心先登上塔顶吧？

en: Let us continue with our mission and get to the top of this Processing tower.
zh: 继续执行任务吧，登上这座数据处理塔的顶层。

en: {furrow}A great number of lives depend on us, Kane. We must keep moving forward.
zh: 无数人的性命都系在我们身上，Kane。我们必须继续前进。

en: Gentlemen, Strauss's finally arrived at the Data Networking Tower. This mission is gonna get more technical so I'm handing over communications to him. Good luck, guys. Get this mission done. Morris out.
zh: 先生们，Strauss 总算抵达数据网络塔了。接下来的任务技术含量会越来越高，通讯指挥就交给他了。祝好运，伙计们，把任务给我拿下。Morris，通话完毕。

en: Cortez, this is Morris. Are you and Kane at the Processing Tower yet?
zh: Cortez，我是 Morris。你和 Kane 到数据处理塔了吗？

en: Yes, we have just arrived.
zh: 是的，我们刚刚到达。

en: Okay, drop off Kane. You're needed at the Networking Tower right away. Another tram will be sent for Kane once he's taken care of the security station at the top of the Processing Tower.
zh: 好，让 Kane 下车。数据网络塔那边马上需要你。等 Kane 解决掉数据处理塔顶的安全站，会再派一辆轨道车去接他。

en: But I had hoped to stay with Kane.
zh: 可我本想和 Kane 一起行动。

en: No can do, Alex. Sledge will be here soon enough to lend Kane a hand.
zh: 不行，Alex。Sledge 很快就到，会给 Kane 搭把手。

en: Very well. Cortez out. I am sorry, Kane. But I must go. Good luck to you, my friend.
zh: 那好吧。Cortez 通话完毕。抱歉，Kane，我必须走了。祝你好运，我的朋友。

en: Greetings, this is Strauss. I have finally being to hack into the Nexus. Soon I will know all there is to know about the tower you are in.
zh: 各位好，我是 Strauss。我总算侵入 Nexus 了。用不了多久，你们所在塔楼的底细我就能摸得一清二楚。

en: The large machines in the area you have just entered are data pumps. They move information from the Networking Tower to the Storage Tower. This is a vital area to the Strogg so expect to meet strong resistance.
zh: 你们刚进入的区域里，那些大型机器是数据泵，负责把信息从数据网络塔输送到数据存储塔。这里对 Strogg 至关重要，准备好迎接顽强抵抗吧。

en: I am very sorry, my friend. But I have been ordered to proceed to the Networking tower. You are to go to the top of this tower and deactivate the security station.
zh: 非常抱歉，我的朋友。我奉命前往数据网络塔。你要登上这座塔的顶层，关闭那里的安全站。

en: Kane, you need to disable the security station. After that, you will have just one more station in the Networking terminal to access.
zh: Kane，你得关闭这个安全站。之后就只剩数据网络终端里最后一个站点要处理了。

en: {confused}Do you not understand? {furrow}If you don't disable the security station you will not be able to gain access to the Core building. Go now.
zh: {confused}你还不明白吗？{furrow}不关闭安全站，你就进不了核心建筑。快去。

en: {furrow}Humph, the elevator must be all the way at the top of this tower. How I hate to wait for elevators.
zh: {furrow}哼，电梯准是停在塔顶了。我最讨厌等电梯。

en: {puzzled}Strauss, what are those devices on the ceiling?
zh: {puzzled}Strauss，天花板上那些装置是什么？

en: They are information routers... but they appear to be out of alignment. Kane should be able use the consoles to correct this problem.
zh: 那是信息路由器……不过看起来偏离了校准位。Kane 应该能用控制台修正这个问题。

en: Ah, good job. But I wonder if that unlocked the door?
zh: 啊，干得好。不过我在想，门这下解锁了没有？

en: {furrow}I'm no Strauss, but I believe that router is also damaged.
zh: {furrow}我不是 Strauss，不过要我看，那台路由器也坏了。

en: Why have you not completed your task, gentlemen? Please, hurry up.
zh: 先生们，你们的任务怎么还没完成？请抓紧。

en: Hmm, Strogg security must have shut down this elevator.
zh: 唔，准是 Strogg 的安保系统把这部电梯停了。

en: Now we must find the security station on the roof. Lead the way.
zh: 现在得去找楼顶的安全站。你带路。

en: {happy}Ah, good. That door must now be open.
zh: {happy}啊，好。那扇门现在应该开了。

en: The Core security interlock from the Processing Tower is now deactived. Well done, Corporal Kane. And Sergeant Slidjonovitch, I would ask you to remain there and not allow the Strogg to reset that console.
zh: 数据处理塔通往核心的安全联锁已经解除。干得好，Kane 下士。还有 Slidjonovitch 中士，请你留在原地，别让 Strogg 重置那台控制台。

en: Understood, Strauss. I will comply.
zh: 明白，Strauss。我会照办。

en: Kane, you must now take a tram to the Data Networking tower. I will meet you there. Strauss, out.
zh: Kane，现在乘轨道车前往数据网络塔，我在那里等你。Strauss 通话完毕。

en: Good luck to you, Kane. Ah, but then you don't need luck so long as you have a weapon in your hands. Fare well.
zh: 祝你好运，Kane。啊，不过只要你手里有枪，运气这东西就用不着了。保重。

en: Go now, Kane. You must take a tram to the Networking Tower. I will remain behind and protect this security station.
zh: 走吧，Kane。你得乘轨道车去数据网络塔。我留下守住这个安全站。

en: {furrow}Kane, you are needed at the Networking Tower. Go quickly. Many lives depend on you.
zh: {furrow}Kane，数据网络塔那边需要你。快去，很多人的命都指望你了。

en: {furrow}Kane, don't make me pull rank. Get to the Networking Tower immediately.
zh: {furrow}Kane，别逼我拿军衔压你。立刻去数据网络塔。

en: This is Falcon eight making a flyby of the Processing Tower. I just sighted that Guardian Creature. Anyone on the top of the tower better be careful. He looks pissed.
zh: 这里是猎鹰八号，正在飞掠数据处理塔。我刚看见那头守卫巨兽了。塔顶上的人都当心点，它看着火气不小。

en: Viper squad, this is H Q. A group of cornered Marines have been located in your area.
zh: 毒蛇小队，这里是总部。在你们区域发现一批被困的陆战队员。

en: Roger that, H Q. Viper squad is enroute now to help.
zh: 收到，总部。毒蛇小队正赶去支援。

en: A research team should be studying this facility. Somehow the Strogg are able to break the Stroyant down into pure enzymes.
zh: 真该派个研究组来查查这地方。Strogg 不知用什么法子，能把 Stroyent 分解成纯酶。

en: This is Private Sasaki, the only survivor of Kodiak squad. The Strogg are attempting to corner me at the Dispersal facility. Please, I need immediate assistance.
zh: 我是列兵 Sasaki，棕熊小队唯一的幸存者。Strogg 正想把我堵死在疏散设施。求你们，我需要立即支援。

en: This is corporal Hatten to any member of Cobra. It is imperative we regroup.
zh: 我是下士 Hatten，呼叫眼镜蛇小队任何一名队员。我们必须马上集结。

en: I just discovered how the Stroyent is being broken down into enzymes. This defies description. I... Aaaaaaaah!
zh: 我刚弄明白 Stroyent 是怎么被分解成酶的了。这简直没法形容。我……啊——！

en: I just found the Lieutenant... or what's left of him.
zh: 我刚找到中尉了……或者说，他剩下的那部分。

en: To all escaped Marines, this is the evac team. Meet us outside the Waste Level.
zh: 各位逃出来的陆战队员，这里是撤离队。到废料处理层外面与我们会合。

en: All of my squad is dead. How the hell do I get out of here?
zh: 我们小队全死光了。我他妈到底怎么才能出去？

en: Remain calm, Private...
zh: 保持冷静，列兵……

en: Shit, I've been spotted.
zh: 妈的，我被发现了。

en: You want me? Come and get me you sons of bitches! Woooo hoooo!!!!
zh: 想要我的命？有种就来拿啊，狗娘养的！呜——吼——！！

en: Stroyant processor has been terminated. All units respond to threat.
zh: Stroyent 处理装置已被终止。全体单位，应对威胁。

en: I think you're in the assembly control room. Find the console and activate it.
zh: 你现在应该是在组装控制室。找到控制台，启动它。

en: Good work! Assembly's functioning now.
zh: 干得漂亮！组装系统恢复运转了。

en: So get back to that central control room and see if you can reboot the system.
zh: 那就回中央控制室，看看能不能把系统重启。

en: Shit, I just heard something. I'll be back in a minute.
zh: 妈的，我好像听到什么动静。我马上回来。

en: Okay, I'm back. It was nothing. My mind's just playing tricks on me.
zh: 好了，我回来了。什么都没有，是我自己吓自己。

en: You're in the sterilization control room. There should be a console in there.
zh: 你在消毒控制室里。里面应该有台控制台。

en: Shit, it's locked up. Hold on, let me try something.
zh: 妈的，锁死了。等等，我试试别的办法。

en: Okay, the assembly system is running.
zh: 好，组装系统跑起来了。

en: Now get back to that central control room and see if you can reboot the system.
zh: 现在回中央控制室，看看能不能重启系统。

en: Yes! It's working!! Get back here on the double.
zh: 成了！系统好使了！！快跑步回来。

en: Kane, I got company. Get your ass back here now!
zh: Kane，有敌人摸过来了。赶紧给我滚回来！

en: Aaaaahhh! AAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHH!
Aaah! Aaaaaaaaaahhhhhh!
{furrow}Hey! You up there! Let me out!
zh: {furrow}嘿！上面的！放我出去！

en: {furrow}Help me! I'm down here!
zh: {furrow}救命！我在下面！

en: {furrow}Damn it, get me out of here!
zh: {furrow}该死的，快放我出去！

en: Hey, {furrow}you're Matthew Kane... {idle}Right after we got word about you, the Strogg attack my squad. I was the only survivor. C'mon, let's get the hell out of here.
zh: 嘿，{furrow}你是 Matthew Kane……{idle}我们刚收到你的消息，Strogg 就袭击了我的小队。就我一个活下来。走，咱们赶紧离开这鬼地方。

en: Come here. I can do a quick upgrade to your hyperblaster.
zh: 过来。我可以给你的速射爆能枪来个快速升级。

en: There. I just did a little modification. It'll make the rounds from your hyperblaster ricochet.
zh: 好了。我做了点小改装，你这速射爆能枪打出的弹丸能弹射了。

en: It looks like there's a passage out of this area right above us. But the only way we're gonna reach it is by stacking some of these barrels up.
zh: 看样子正上方有条通道能离开这片区域。可想够到它，只能把这些桶摞起来。

en: The storage system should set them up for us. Why don't you go find the console that activates it and I'll stay here and monitor you?
zh: 仓储系统应该能替咱们把桶码好。不如你去找启动它的控制台，我留在这儿给你盯着？

en: I'm staying right here. The Strogg would kill me in a minute.
zh: 我就待在这儿不动。出去的话，Strogg 一分钟就能要了我的命。

en: No thanks. If I went with you I'd be hanging from a meat hook in no time.
zh: 不了，谢谢。跟你走的话，用不了多久我就得挂上肉钩。

en: I'd be more help to you if I stay here and monitor the system.
zh: 我留在这儿盯着系统，对你帮助更大。

en: {confused}What are you still doing here?
zh: {confused}你怎么还在这儿？

en: {puzzled}Don't you want to escape?
zh: {puzzled}你不想逃出去吗？

en: {furrow}Go! Get this system fired up so we can get out of here!
zh: {furrow}快去！把系统点起来，咱们好离开这儿！

en: Cobra squad, this is H Q. Please respond. What is your status?
zh: 眼镜蛇小队，这里是总部。请回话，报告你们的状况。

en: Holy shit! I just hit the mother load of Strogg data on this console. Now if I can just figure out how to use it without alerting security.
zh: 我操！我在这台控制台上挖到 Strogg 数据的大金矿了。现在就差琢磨出怎么用它还不惊动安保。

en: You okay, Kane?
zh: 你还好吗，Kane？

en: Kane, are you hurt?
zh: Kane，你受伤了吗？

en: Kane, don't go dyin' on me. I need you to get out of here.
zh: Kane，可别死在我跟前。我还指着你带我出去呢。

en: Hey, Kane, remember you don't need to kill every Strogg you see.
zh: 嘿，Kane，记住，不是见一个 Strogg 就非得杀一个。

en: Long... Raffel... Newquist... where the hell is everyone?
zh: Long……Raffel……Newquist……人都他妈死哪儿去了？

en: Great. Looks like the whole system needs to be rebooted. You're gonna have to locate and restart the sterilization and assembly subsystems.
zh: 这下好了。看来整个系统都得重启。你得找到消毒和组装两个子系统，把它们重新启动。

en: C'mon. Through here! Move it! Move it! Move it!
zh: 快！走这边！快跑！快跑！快跑！

en: Hey, {confused}you all right? {idle}You're pod came in pretty hard.
zh: 嘿，{confused}你没事吧？{idle}你那空投舱砸得可够狠的。

en: Incoming! We've got incoming!! Uuugh!!
zh: 来袭！有炮火来袭！！呃啊！！

en: Concentrate all fire on....
zh: 集中全部火力，目标……

en: This is creepy as hell. The Strogg use human torsos to store bioelectrical power. The whole tower runs off it.
zh: 这里瘆人到家了。Strogg 拿人的躯干储存生物电能，整座塔全靠这个供电。

en: This is Private Terrance Garr. My pod crashed. I need a medic. I... I think my left leg's been severed.
zh: 我是列兵 Terrance Garr。我的空投舱坠毁了，需要医疗兵。我……我的左腿好像整个断掉了。

en: Cobra squad, I'm in the level below you. I could use a hand here.
zh: 眼镜蛇小队，我在你们下面一层。这边需要搭把手。

en: We're on our way.
zh: 我们这就过去。

en: I hate flying in those freakin' pods. They're big metal coffins.
zh: 我最烦坐那破空投舱了。那就是一口口大铁棺材。

en: We've done it, H Q! We've broken into the main armory!
zh: 我们成功了，总部！我们攻进主军械库了！

en: Look! It's Sasaki! He's alive!
zh: 看！是 Sasaki！他还活着！

en: He's a Strogg! Shoot him!! Shoot him!!!
zh: 他是 Strogg！开枪！！打死他！！！

en: What a fubared assault. Most Marines are nowhere near the right landing zones.
zh: 这次突击真是烂成一锅粥。大部分陆战队员离预定着陆区差着十万八千里。

en: Why didn't intelligence know the energy shielding around these towers would screw up our pods onboard computers?
zh: 情报部门怎么就不知道这些塔周围的能量护盾会把空投舱的机载电脑搅成一团糟？

en: We need to find an officer to regroup.
zh: 我们得找个军官来重新集结。

en: Shit! My nav computer is screwed up! I'm gonna crash! I'm gonna....
zh: 妈的！导航电脑失灵了！我要坠毁了！我要……

en: My pod landed in a lower floor and it's pitch black in here. Somebody tell me where I am.
zh: 我的空投舱落到下层了，这里面漆黑一片。谁能告诉我我在哪儿？

en: Someone get me out of this pod! Heeelp meee.
zh: 谁来把我从这舱里弄出去！救——命——啊。

en: We just located the pod containing Captain Marin's body. I think I'm gonna be sick.
zh: 我们刚找到装着 Marin 上尉遗体的空投舱。我想吐。

en: To all Marines at the Storage Tower. This is Lieutenant Hollenbeck. Regroup at my position ASAP.
zh: 数据存储塔的全体陆战队员注意，我是 Hollenbeck 中尉。尽快到我的位置集结。

en: {puzzled}You hear that? {idle}C'mon let's find Hollenbeck.
zh: {puzzled}听见了吗？{idle}走，去找 Hollenbeck。

en: Aaaah! My pod! It's on fire!!!
zh: 啊——！我的空投舱！着火了！！！

en: H Q, this is Cobra Squad. We have assembled and are advancing.
zh: 总部，这里是眼镜蛇小队。我们已集结完毕，正在推进。

en: Just when I think the Strogg can't sink any lower I see shit like this.
zh: 每次我以为 Strogg 已经烂到底了，就会看见这种玩意儿。

en: Lieutenant Morris, Corporal Kane just showed up.
zh: Morris 中尉，Kane 下士刚到。

en: Don't let the Strogg makeup fool ya. He's a damn fine Marine.
zh: 别被他那身 Strogg 行头唬住。他可是个顶呱呱的陆战队员。

en: Got it, Hollenbeck out.
zh: 收到，Hollenbeck 通话完毕。

en: Kane, good to meet you. Those torso things are supplying bioelectric power to this facility, but they've been shut off. Take the elevator down below and reactivate them so we can open the door to the hangar and let our guys land. {confused}Got it? {furrow}Move out.
zh: Kane，见到你很高兴。那些躯干装置负责给这座设施供应生物电能，现在被关掉了。乘电梯下去把它们重新激活，我们才能打开机库大门，让弟兄们降落。{confused}明白了？{furrow}出发。

en: {furrow}You have your orders, Kane. Take the elevator down to where the torso devices are stored and reactivate them.
zh: {furrow}命令已经下了，Kane。乘电梯下到存放躯干装置的地方，把它们重新激活。

en: {furrow}What's your problem? Get down to Distribution and reactivate the torso storage devices. We need that ASAP!
zh: {furrow}你有什么毛病？下到配电区去，把躯干存储装置重新激活。这事十万火急！

en: {furrow}Marine, I expect you to follow orders! Get to Distribution and deploy the T S Ds now!
zh: {furrow}陆战队员，我要你服从命令！立刻去配电区部署 TSD！

en: H Q, this is Grizzly squad. We're in deep shit. Send... aaahh!
zh: 总部，这里是灰熊小队。我们麻烦大了。快派……啊——！

en: Rutger and Mills, accompany Kane down to distribution.
zh: Rutger、Mills，陪 Kane 下配电区。

en: Will do.
zh: 遵命。

en: Somebody help me! I'm trapped down in level 8. They're gonna be coming through any second!
zh: 谁来救救我！我被困在第 8 层了。它们随时都会冲进来！

en: Corporal Kane, our orders are to accompany you down to distribution.
zh: Kane 下士，我们奉命陪你下配电区。

en: You lead, we'll follow.
zh: 你带头，我们跟上。

en: You know all the dismembered torsos around here? The Strogg use them to store bioelectric power.
zh: 看见这儿到处都是的残缺躯干了吗？Strogg 拿它们储存生物电能。

en: What kind of sick mind designed this to run off bioelectrical power?
zh: 得是多变态的脑子，才能设计出靠生物电能运转的这套东西？

en: I know a little about Strogg weaponry. Mind if I take a look at your rail gun?
zh: 我对 Strogg 的武器略知一二。介意我看看你的轨道炮吗？

en: I just upped the field output by 300 percent. Now that rail gun is gonna really rip the Strogg a new asshole.
zh: 我刚把场强输出提高了 300%。现在这门轨道炮真能把 Strogg 轰出个新屁眼来。

en: Good thing Lieutenant Hollenbeck was here to pick up the pieces. Captain Marin was supposed to run this show.
zh: 幸好有 Hollenbeck 中尉在这儿收拾残局。这场行动本来该由 Marin 上尉指挥。

en: I saw Captain Marin's pod when it landed. It was swarmed by Strogg before he could even get out.
zh: 我看见 Marin 上尉的空投舱落地了。人还没来得及出来，就被 Strogg 围了个水泄不通。

en: The Strogg tore Marin to pieces in seconds. Shit, there was blood everywhere.
zh: Strogg 几秒钟就把 Marin 撕碎了。妈的，到处都是血。

en: Kane, good job restoring the bioelectric power. Now I need you to locate the control room that opens the hangar doors. Move quick, troop transports are waiting to land.
zh: Kane，生物电能恢复得漂亮。现在我要你找到控制机库大门的控制室。动作快点，运兵机还等着降落。

en: Kane is going alone. I need you on the perimeter.
zh: Kane 一个人去。你们去外围警戒。

en: {furrow}Yes, sir.
zh: {furrow}是，长官。

en: {furrow}Yes, Lieutenant.
zh: {furrow}是，中尉。

en: This is Badger Squad in the hangar. We're being slaughtered here. Send...
zh: 这里是机库的猛獾小队。我们正遭到屠杀。快派……

en: {furrow}You, police the area for weapons and ammo. {idle}There's no telling when that thing could return..
zh: {furrow}你，把这片区域的武器弹药收拢起来。{idle}谁也说不准那东西什么时候会回来。

en: {furrow}You, contact H Q. Have them send medics immediately.
zh: {furrow}你，联系总部，让他们立刻派医疗兵来。

en: {scared}We just got our asses handed to us. {furrow}Some creature ambushed my team. {idle}It must be guarding the towers.
zh: {scared}我们刚被打得屁滚尿流。{furrow}有头怪物伏击了我的队伍。{idle}它八成是在守卫这些塔。

en: Don't you die.
zh: 你可别死。

en: C'mon. Stay with me.
zh: 撑住，别昏过去。

en: {furrow}Shit.
zh: {furrow}妈的。

en: Aaaah. Aaaaah! Damn it hurts.
zh: 啊……啊——！该死，疼死了。

en: Hold on. I gave you something to dull the pain.
zh: 撑住。我给你打了点止痛的。

en: This is...... Badger Squad in the hangar. We're being...... slaughtered.
zh: 这里是……机库的猛獾小队。我们正……遭到屠杀。

en: Aaaaaahhh.
Kane. This is Rhodes. Find me, we gotta get moving.
zh: Kane，我是 Rhodes。来找我，咱们得赶紧行动。

en: Kane, where are you? Find me so we can get the hell out of here.
zh: Kane，你在哪儿？快来找我，咱们好离开这鬼地方。

en: Kane, this is Rhodes. What are you doin'? Find me so we can get on with our mission.
zh: Kane，我是 Rhodes。你磨蹭什么呢？快来找我，咱们好继续执行任务。

en: Damn, what a mess. {furrow}That tower Guardian tore through us like a tornado of knives. {idle}All right, Strauss. Both Kane and I are in the Data Storage Tower. {puzzled}What now?
zh: 该死，一片狼藉。{furrow}那头塔楼守卫像一阵刀子旋风，把我们撕了个稀烂。{idle}好了，Strauss。我和 Kane 都在数据存储塔。{puzzled}接下来干什么？

en: Greetings, Corporal Rhodes. You must locate the security interface. There is one in each terminal that must be disabled to gain access to the Core. But be careful, only Corporal Kane can use it.
zh: 你好，Rhodes 下士。你们必须找到安全接口。每座终端里都有一个，全部解除才能进入核心。不过注意，只有 Kane 下士能操作它。

en: Will do. Rhodes out. {furrow}You heard the man, let's find that security station.
zh: 明白。Rhodes 通话完毕。{furrow}都听见了吧，咱们去找那个安全站。

en: {confused}I wonder how the rest of our squad is doing? {idle}I think everyone got off the Hannibal in one piece.
zh: {confused}不知道小队其他人怎么样了？{idle}大家离开汉尼拔号的时候，应该都还全须全尾。

en: Last I saw of Strauss, he was surrounded by about fifty Marine bodyguards. He also got a big group of techs, bowing and scraping to him. {happy}It's the happiest I ever seen him.
zh: 我最后一次见到 Strauss，他身边围着差不多五十个陆战队保镖，还有一大帮技师对他点头哈腰。{happy}我从没见他那么快活过。

en: Maybe you didn't hear me. I need you to find the control room that opens the hangar doors.
zh: 你大概没听清。我要你去找到能打开机库大门的控制室。

en: Is there a problem, Corporal? I want you to find the control room and open the hangar doors on the double.
zh: 有什么问题吗，下士？我要你跑步前进，找到控制室，把机库大门打开。

en: Soldier, I gave you an order! Find a way to open the hangars door now!
zh: 士兵，我下的是命令！马上想办法把机库大门打开！

en: Grenade! Gre...
zh: 手雷！手——

en: Aaaahhh! My arm! MY ARRRRRRMMM!!!
zh: 啊——！我的胳膊！我的胳膊——！！！

en: This is Falcon one, awaiting activation of the hangar doors.
zh: 这里是猎鹰一号，等待机库大门开启。

en: This is Falcon one. We're burning up fuel here. I need those hangar doors opened.
zh: 这里是猎鹰一号。我们在白白烧油，赶紧把机库大门打开。

en: This is Falcon one, what's the hold up? This zone is hot and I need to land!
zh: 这里是猎鹰一号，还在磨蹭什么？这片空域交火激烈，我必须降落！

en: That heat source is moving rapidly towards the hangar. Whatever it is, you can bet it isn't friendly.
zh: 那个热源正快速逼近机库。不管那是什么，保准不是友军。

en: That did it! The hangar doors are open! Falcon one to commence landing procedure.
zh: 成了！机库大门开了！猎鹰一号开始降落程序。

en: Falcon one has landed. Troops are being deployed. Shit, something's under the hangar floor.
zh: 猎鹰一号已着陆，部队正在下机。妈的，机库地板下面有东西。

en: Shit. It's trying to beat it's way through. Immediate dust off in...
zh: 妈的，它想砸穿地板冲上来。立即起飞，倒计时……

en: A Strogg creature just tore through the hangar floor like it was wet cardboard. It's huge. I estimate thirty feet tall. We're taking heavy casualties.
zh: 一头 Strogg 怪物刚把机库地板撕开了，跟撕湿纸板似的。这家伙巨大无比，目测有三十英尺高。我们伤亡惨重。

en: The creature. Its huge! Light weapons don't hurt it!
zh: 那怪物，太大了！轻武器根本伤不了它！

en: Nothing's slowing it down!
zh: 什么都拦不住它！

en: Locked. The Strogg must have sealed off all access to the elevators. Huh. {happy}I got a little something that'll clear it away.
zh: 锁死了。Strogg 准是把通往电梯的路全封了。哼。{happy}我这儿正好有点小玩意儿，能把它清出条道来。

en: Stand back.
zh: 退后。

en: {furrow}Back up, Kane. You're too close to the explosives.
zh: {furrow}退后，Kane。你离炸药太近了。

en: {furrow}Kane, I can't fire the explosives with you standing there.
zh: {furrow}Kane，你站在那儿我没法引爆。

en: {furrow}Kane, get the hell out of the way.
zh: {furrow}Kane，赶紧让开。

en: {happy}Ha. They ain't no door that a little compressed Comptazine won't unlock. Let's roll.
zh: {happy}哈，就没有一点压缩 Comptazine 开不了的门。出发。

en: Ho, man, this is incredible. Would you look at all this?
zh: 嚯，老天，太壮观了。你瞧瞧这一片。

en: {happy}Shit, I think I can see my house from here.
zh: {happy}妈的，我觉得从这儿都能看见我家房顶了。

en: Lets get you to that security interface at the top of this tower.
zh: 咱们这就送你去塔顶那个安全接口。

en: Well done, Corporal Kane! The Core security interface from Data Storage is disabled. Corporal Rhodes, you should remain there and guard the console in case the Strogg should attempt to reactivate it. Corporal Kane should locate the tram and take it to the Data Processing Tower. There he will have to deactivate the second security station at the top. Strauss out.
zh: 干得好，Kane 下士！数据存储塔通往核心的安全接口已解除。Rhodes 下士，你应留在原地看守控制台，以防 Strogg 试图将其重新激活。Kane 下士则应找到轨道车，乘它前往数据处理塔，在塔顶解除第二个安全站。Strauss 通话完毕。

en: Damn, that man's about as warm as a bag of ice. Well, you better get goin', Kane. See ya around.
zh: 啧，那家伙可真热情，跟一袋冰块似的。行了，你该上路了，Kane。回头见。

en: Go on now. Don't worry about me. You're the only one who can activate the security consoles at the tops of the towers.
zh: 快走吧，别担心我。塔顶那些安全控制台，只有你一个人能操作。

en: {furrow}Kane, come on. Haul ass to the Strogg tram. You have to get to the Process tower.
zh: {furrow}Kane，快点。撒腿跑去 Strogg 轨道车那儿。你必须赶到数据处理塔。

en: {furrow}amn it, Kane. Get out of here. You're needed at the Process tower.
zh: {furrow}该死，Kane，快走。数据处理塔那边需要你。

en: Lieutenant Morris, this is Cortez, do you read me?
zh: Morris 中尉，我是 Cortez，收到了吗？

en: This is Morris. Go ahead.
zh: 我是 Morris，请讲。

en: I have hijacked a tram and am currently passing through the Storage Tower.
zh: 我劫下了一辆轨道车，目前正穿过数据存储塔。

en: Good. Proceed to the Process Tower. It’s our next rendezvous point.
zh: 很好。继续前往数据处理塔，那是我们下一个会合点。

en: Many of the tram tracks have been destroyed. I will most likely have to go to the main station.
zh: 很多轨道已经被毁。我多半得绕去总站。

en: Just so long as you make it to the party. See you, Alex. Morris, out.
zh: 只要你能赶上这场好戏就行。回见，Alex。Morris 通话完毕。

en: Is this what the Strogg have planned for all of us if they take over the Earth?
zh: 要是 Strogg 占领了地球，这就是他们给我们所有人准备的下场吗？

en: Why? Why would the Strogg do this?
zh: 为什么？Strogg 为什么要干出这种事？

en: H Q, this Cobra squad. We've just taken level five and we are continuing to advance.
zh: 总部，这里是眼镜蛇小队。我们刚拿下第五层，正继续推进。

en: This is like something out of a nightmare.
zh: 这简直像从噩梦里搬出来的。

en: H Q, we've located, Lieutenant Shoemaker in the lower levels... or at least pieces of him.
zh: 总部，我们在下层找到了 Shoemaker 中尉……或者说，找到了他的碎块。

en: Whatever the hell that is, leave it alone. It looks dangerous.
zh: 管那玩意儿是什么，别去碰。看着就危险。

en: Something about that gives me the creeps. Don't touch it.
zh: 那东西看着就让我发毛。别碰。

en: Kane, this is Hollenbeck. Good job, the T S D's are being redeployed. Now get back up here on the double.
zh: Kane，我是 Hollenbeck。干得好，TSD 正在重新部署。现在跑步回到上面来。

en: Wish all our missions were this easy. Hey, what's that?
zh: 要是每次任务都这么轻松就好了。嘿，那是什么？

en: This wasn't such a tough mission. Hmm, what's that doing?
zh: 这任务也没多难嘛。唔，那玩意儿在干什么？

en: H Q, my scanners show a large heat source in the center of the building. It's moving upward rapidly.
zh: 总部，我的扫描仪显示大楼中央有一个大型热源，正在快速上移。

en: Quiet!  Keep your eyes open!
zh: 安静！眼睛都放亮点！

en: Heh, if we'd been a couple minutes later, you'd be a squib.
zh: 嘿，我们要是再晚到几分钟，你就变成 Strogg 杂碎了。

en: Scorpion, no evac units are in your immediate area. Secure the bridge control room and sit tight.
zh: 天蝎小队，你们附近没有撤离单位。守住大桥控制室，原地待命。

en: Do the best you can, Scorpion. An evac unit is en route. H Q, out.
zh: 尽力撑住，天蝎小队。撤离单位已在路上。总部通话完毕。

en: Thanks for the assist, Kane. We were dropped into an ambush.
zh: 多谢支援，Kane。我们一落地就进了埋伏圈。

en: Yeah, you musta seen what the bastards did to the rest of our squad. Now were just trying to get out of here.
zh: 是啊，那帮杂种把我们小队其他人祸害成什么样，你八成也看见了。现在我们只想活着出去。

en: Kane, youre probably looking to get to the next tower. Come with us. We have orders to secure the bridge control center. From there you can catch a tram at the hub a couple of clicks away.
zh: Kane，你八成是想去下一座塔吧。跟我们走。我们奉命去占领大桥控制中心，从那儿走几公里到枢纽站，你就能搭上轨道车。

en: {happy}Hear that . . . . thats our ride out of this hell hole!
zh: {happy}听见没……那就是带咱们离开这鬼地方的班车！

en: {scared}Shit! Its a Strogg transport! Look out!
zh: {scared}妈的！是 Strogg 运输机！小心！

en: Here. I scavanged this off a dead Strogg. It looks like it'd work on your lightning weapon. Give it a try.
zh: 给。这是我从一具 Strogg 尸体上捡的，看着能装到你那闪电枪上。试试看。

en: I'll fix your armor.
zh: 我来修你的护甲。

en: Let me repair that.
zh: 让我来修一下。

en: Youre good to go.
zh: 修好了，走吧。

en: Ready? Hit it!
zh: 准备好了？动手！

en: {happy}Ha! We kicked their asses good!
zh: {happy}哈！咱们把它们揍得屁滚尿流！

en: Okay, Kane. Head upstairs and find a way to extend the bridge to the hub area. We'll stay here and guard your back.
zh: 好了，Kane。上楼去想办法把桥伸到枢纽区那边。我们留在这儿给你殿后。

en: Kane. You are lucky I recognized you. We were ambushed and the men are scattered. So I will accompany you. Lead the way.
zh: Kane，算你走运，我认出了你。我们中了埋伏，弟兄们都被打散了。所以我跟你一起走。你带路。

en: Lieutanant Morris, this is Cortez again. I am nearing the tram hub but it will still be a while before I make it to the Processing Tower.
zh: Morris 中尉，还是我，Cortez。我快到轨道车枢纽了，不过赶到数据处理塔还得再花些时间。

en: I copy that. Just get to there as soon as you can. Morris, out.
zh: 收到。尽快赶过来就行。Morris 通话完毕。

en: The tram I was in took a direct hit from a rocket. I was knocked out of the car, but I managed to find safety.
zh: 我乘的那辆轨道车被火箭弹直接命中。我被震出了车厢，好在找到了安全的地方。

en: I had hoped to never again ride in another one of these. Please, allow me to drive.
zh: 我本来发誓再也不坐这种东西了。请让我来开。

en: 601 . . .602 . . .603. {happy}Ha. Stroggos is proving to be a target rich planet.
zh: 601……602……603。{happy}哈，事实证明，Stroggos 真是个靶子管够的星球。

en: Hello, Kane. You are quite lucky I didnt shoot when I first had that Strogg face of yours in my crosshairs. But then, had I killed you, I would have lost the bet with Rhodes. And that would not do.
zh: 你好，Kane。你那张 Strogg 脸刚进我准星的时候，我没扣扳机，算你运气好。不过话说回来，要是把你打死了，我跟 Rhodes 打的赌就输了。那可不行。

en: I am on my way to the Processing Tower, {puzzled}why don't you accompany me? But before we can proceed this tram must be rotated in the proper direction and the track must be repaired. Search around and see what you can do.
zh: 我正要去数据处理塔，{puzzled}不如你和我同行？不过出发之前，这辆轨道车得转到正确的方向，轨道也得修好。四处找找，看看你能做点什么。

en: This tram can't take much more abuse.
zh: 这辆轨道车再挨几下就要散架了。

en: {furrow}Damn it, Kane. Do something!
zh: {furrow}该死，Kane，想想办法！

en: We are so screwed.
zh: 我们这回真是完了。

en: {furrow}Was I hit? Do you see any blood?
zh: {furrow}我中弹了吗？你看见血了没有？

en: Shit, there's nothing I can do. We've gotta sit and wait until  that tram car goes by. Keep the Strogg off our backs until the track clears.
zh: 妈的，我一点办法都没有。咱们只能干等着那节车厢开过去。在轨道空出来之前，顶住 Strogg，别让它们咬上来。

en: {furrow}About damn time. Let me get this crate moving again.
zh: {furrow}可算等到了。让我把这破车再发动起来。

en: Good job, Kane. The tram is now facing the right direction. Return to the tram and we can be on our way.
zh: 干得好，Kane。轨道车已经转到正确方向了。回车上来，我们就能出发了。

en: Good job, Kane. The tram is now facing the right direction. But you still need to find a way to repair the track.
zh: 干得好，Kane。轨道车已经转到正确方向了。不过你还得想办法把轨道修好。

en: Excellent, Kane. The track has been repaired. Return to the tram and we can be on our way.
zh: 太好了，Kane。轨道已经修复。回车上来，我们就能出发了。

en: Excellent, Kane. The track has been repaired. But now you must find some way to turn the tram so that it faces the right direction.
zh: 太好了，Kane。轨道已经修复。但你还得想办法把轨道车转到正确的方向。

en: I must apologize for the condition of this tram. It has been damaged and will not run at full speed.
zh: 这辆轨道车的状况，我得说声抱歉。它受了损伤，跑不到全速了。

en: This is where my squad was ambushed. The track was damaged so I had to head back alone. The tech guy in my squad said the Strogg should have some type of repair bots around here to fix  the break. Lets try to find em.
zh: 我的小队就是在这儿中的埋伏。轨道坏了，我只好一个人往回走。我们队里的技术兵说，Strogg 在这附近应该有那种维修机器人，能把断轨修好。咱们找找看。

en: Wait! Wait! This is Corporal Kane.
zh: 等等！别开枪！这位是 Kane 下士。

en: Lybeck? What are you doin' here?
zh: Lybeck？你怎么在这儿？

en: Trying to catch up with our squad.
zh: 想追上咱们小队。

en: Don't bother. I'm the only survivor. Well, other than that Cortez guy.
zh: 别费劲了。就我一个活口。哦，还有那个叫 Cortez 的。

en: Stay sharp, Kane. We will no doubt have issues getting through the hot zone on the way to the Processing Tower.
zh: 保持警惕，Kane。去数据处理塔的路上要穿过交火区，肯定不会太平。

en: We have only a few miles to go, but there have been reports of Strogg in the area. Keep on your toes.
zh: 只剩几英里路了，不过有报告说这一带出现了 Strogg。打起精神来。

en: I do not like the looks of this at all.
zh: 这情形我一点都不喜欢。

en: I can't leave Macklin alone. He'd die.
zh: 我不能丢下 Macklin 不管。那样他会死的。

en: I've got no choice. I'm stayin' here.
zh: 我没得选。我就留在这儿。

en: Watch yourself, Kane!
zh: 当心，Kane！

en: Look out!
zh: 小心！

en: The bastards!
zh: 这帮杂种！

en: Kane, the other side!
zh: Kane，另一边！

en: Watch the other side!
zh: 注意另一边！

en: Welcome back, my friend. Next stop, the Strogg Data Processing Tower.
zh: 欢迎回来，我的朋友。下一站，Strogg 数据处理塔。

en: Strogg to our right!
zh: 右边有 Strogg！

en: Watch out. We have company on the right!
zh: 当心，右边有敌人！

en: Over to the right side!
zh: 在右边！

en: Kane! To our right!
zh: Kane！右边！

en: We have Strogg on the right side!
zh: 右侧出现 Strogg！

en: Kane, watch to the right!
zh: Kane，注意右边！

en: Strogg on the left side!
zh: 左边有 Strogg！

en: Look to the left!
zh: 看左边！

en: Watch the left side!
zh: 注意左侧！

en: Shoot the Strogg on our left!
zh: 打左边的 Strogg！

en: Kane! There are more on the left!
zh: Kane！左边还有！

en: We have enemies to the left!
zh: 左侧有敌人！

en: Kane, stop them!
zh: Kane，拦住它们！

en: That was too close.
zh: 好险，就差一点。

en: They hit us!
zh: 我们被打中了！

en: The tram cannot take much more of this abuse.
zh: 这辆轨道车经不起再这么折腾了。

en: The Strogg know nothing of a fair fight.
zh: Strogg 根本不懂什么叫公平较量。

en: We are very lucky to be alive.
zh: 我们能活着，实在是万幸。

en: Are you unhurt, Kane?
zh: 你没受伤吧，Kane？

en: This is not going as easily as planned.
zh: 事情没有按计划那么顺利。

en: Perhaps we should have walked to our next objective.
zh: 也许我们真该走着去下一个目标。

en: I trust we do not have much further to go.
zh: 但愿我们离目的地不远了。

en: Of all the... I missed the switch! That track to the left would have taken us to the Processing tower. Now we must take this entire track around again.
zh: 真是的……我错过了道岔！左边那条轨道本可以直达数据处理塔。现在我们只能沿这整圈轨道再绕一遍。

en: Kane, look! That flier is going to crash!
zh: Kane，快看！那架飞行器要坠毁了！

en: It hit the fuel lines! We cannot move any further. Find a way to shut off the lines and stop the fire.
zh: 它撞上燃料管线了！我们没法再前进了。想办法关掉管线，把火扑灭。

en: I don't care what your situation is, soldier. We need Strauss at the Networking tower now.
zh: 我不管你们什么处境，士兵。数据网络塔现在就需要 Strauss。

en: But we're under fire, Captain.
zh: 可我们正遭受火力压制，上尉。

en: I want that man here in 10 minutes or I'll come looking for him myself.
zh: 10 分钟之内把人给我送到，不然我亲自去找他。

en: The fire is out, Kane. We may now proceed in the tram.
zh: 火灭了，Kane。我们可以继续乘轨道车前进了。

en: Kane, this is Morris. Wolf squad's just ahead and they need your help. Look for Corporal Osterhaus to meet you at the tram station.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。野狼小队就在前面，他们需要你帮忙。去轨道车站找 Osterhaus 下士接应你。

en: Lutenant Morris told me you'd be coming. My squad's trying to blow up the boulders blocking the tram track. But there's an emplacement of Strogg pinning us down. I'm gonna circle around one way while you go the other. Let's see if we can't flush the squibs out.
zh: Morris 中尉说过你会来。我的小队正想把堵住轨道的巨石炸掉，可有一处 Strogg 工事把我们压得抬不起头。我从一边绕过去，你走另一边。看看能不能把那帮杂碎撵出来。

en: Lutenant Morris told me you'd be coming. My squad's trying to blow up the boulders blocking the tram. But there's an emplacement of Strogg pinning us down. I'll stay here and keep you updated on our status.
zh: Morris 中尉说过你会来。我的小队正想把堵住轨道车的巨石炸掉，可有一处 Strogg 工事把我们压得抬不起头。我留在这儿，随时向你通报我们的情况。

en: We've got a walker to destroy the boulders, but we can't get near enough to use it because of the Strogg emplacement.
zh: 我们有一台步行机甲能炸掉那些巨石，可 Strogg 的工事挡着，根本没法靠近使用。

en: Normally walkers don't fear much from Strogg infantry, but these squibs have rocket propelled grenades.
zh: 平时步行机甲根本不怵 Strogg 步兵，可这帮杂碎手里有火箭榴弹。

en: We've got a team ready to set charges on those rocks but we can't get close because of the Strogg emplacement up there.
zh: 我们有个小组随时能去岩石上安放炸药，可上头那处 Strogg 工事让人根本靠不过去。

en: It'd only take a few seconds to set up the charges but the Strogg are really  keeping the team pinned down.
zh: 安放炸药只要几秒钟，可小组被 Strogg 压得死死的，动都动不了。

en: Corporal Kane, this is Corporal Johnson. Are you having any luck finding that Strogg emplacement?
zh: Kane 下士，我是 Johnson 下士。那处 Strogg 工事找到了吗？

en: Kane, this is Johnson. The Strogg are really putting pressure on my squad. We're gonna have to move fast.
zh: Kane，我是 Johnson。Strogg 把我的小队压得够呛。我们的动作得快了。

en: Kane, we've gotta take out those Strogg soon.
zh: Kane，得赶紧把那些 Strogg 干掉。

en: You did it, Kane! Now we can open the track to the Networking Tower.
zh: 你成功了，Kane！现在可以打通去数据网络塔的轨道了。

en: Hey, Kane, keep an eye on those boulders blocking the tram. You might enjoy this.
zh: 嘿，Kane，盯着点那些堵住轨道车的巨石。有好戏看了。

en: Now that's what I call fireworks! Thanks for your help, Kane.
zh: 这才叫烟花嘛！多谢帮忙，Kane。

en: {furrow}I'm busted up, but damn . . . {pain}koff, koff  . . . {furrow}you look worse than me.
zh: {furrow}我是伤得不轻，可是妈呀……{pain}咳、咳……{furrow}你看着比我还惨。

en: Take my walker and {pain}koff, koff {idle}get help. {pain}koff {furrow}There's more Marines to the north at the dispersal facility. {pain}koff . . . koff
zh: 开上我的机甲，{pain}咳、咳，{idle}去搬救兵。{pain}咳。{furrow}北边的疏散设施还有不少陆战队员。{pain}咳……咳。

en: {pain}Take my walker and get help.
zh: {pain}开上我的机甲去搬救兵。

en: Go on. I'll be fine {pain}koff, koff {furrow}I just need to . . .  {pain}aaaaah . .  . damn it . . . . uhhhhh
zh: 走吧，我不碍事。{pain}咳、咳。{furrow}我只是得……{pain}啊……该死……呃……

en: I'm busted up, but damn...you look worse than me. Take my walker and  get help. There's more Marines to the north at the dispersal facility. Go on. I'll be fine  I just need to... aaaaah... damn it.... uhhhhh
zh: 我是伤得不轻，可是妈呀……你看着比我还惨。开上我的机甲去搬救兵，北边的疏散设施还有不少陆战队员。走吧，我不碍事，我只是得……啊……该死……呃……

en: To all Marines in all squads. We are retreating from this area. I repeat, we are retreating from this area. Rendezvous at the Waste facility. Aircraft will be waiting there for immediate dustoff.
zh: 各小队全体陆战队员注意：我们正从该区域撤退。重复，我们正从该区域撤退。到废料处理厂会合，飞机将在那里待命，随时起飞撤离。

en: All right, Marines, haul ass. The clock is ticking and this is one flight we don’t wanna miss.
zh: 好了，弟兄们，撒腿快跑。时间不等人，这趟班机咱们可误不起。

en: H Q, this is Viper squad! Our Lieutenant is severely wounded. Request immediate evac.
zh: 总部，这里是毒蛇小队！我们中尉伤势严重，请求立即撤离。

en: I wish we could help but evac from your current location is impossible. That zone is too hot.
zh: 我们也想帮忙，但你们当前位置无法撤离。那片区域交火太激烈了。

en: Shit. All right, thanks H Q. We’ll get out of here somehow.
zh: 妈的。行吧，多谢总部。我们自己想办法出去。

en: This is Eagle seventeen, preparing to make a strafing run.
zh: 这里是雄鹰十七号，准备进行一轮扫射。

en: To all units, this is Badger Squad. Do not take the north pass. The Strogg have fortified gun emplacements here. It’s an ambush.
zh: 全体单位注意，这里是猛獾小队。不要走北面隘口。Strogg 在这里修了坚固的炮位。这是个埋伏。

en: Mayday, mayday, mayday! This is Falcon eighteen! I’ve been hit! My location is four five six by six zero nine.
zh: 求救！求救！求救！这里是猎鹰十八号！我被击中了！我的位置：四五六——六零九。

en: Scanners report multiple targets on our six. They’ll be on us in five minutes.
zh: 扫描仪报告，正后方出现多个目标。五分钟后它们就会咬上我们。

en: Then we’re done runnin’. Marines, dig in. We got company.
zh: 那咱们就不跑了。陆战队员们，就地构筑工事。有客人上门了。

en: Shit! A flier squadron! Get to cover! Get to cover!
zh: 妈的！一整队飞行器！快找掩护！快找掩护！

en: H Q! This is Badger Squad. We made it through the north pass but we took heavily casualties. Do not let the evac take off without us.
zh: 总部！这里是猛獾小队。我们穿过北面隘口了，但伤亡惨重。别让撤离飞机丢下我们起飞。

en: Affirmative, Badger Squad. Evac awaits your arrival.
zh: 明白，猛獾小队。撤离飞机等你们到达。

en: This is command H Q repeating an order to all units. A full retreat has been ordered. All squads are to meet at Waste Facility for immediate evac.
zh: 这里是指挥总部，向全体单位重复命令：全面撤退令已经下达。各小队立即前往废料处理厂集合，随即撤离。

en: H Q, H Q, this is Private John Calhoun.  I’ve been cut off from my squad and am being pursed by three Strogg. I need coordinates to the evac zone.
zh: 总部，总部，我是列兵 John Calhoun。我和小队失散了，后面有三个 Strogg 在追。我需要撤离区的坐标。

en: Private Calhoun, we just lost your medchip signal. What is your status? Private Calhoun, please respond.
zh: 列兵 Calhoun，我们刚失去了你的医疗芯片信号。报告你的状况。列兵 Calhoun，请回话。

en: H Q! H Q! This is Kodiak squad. Strogg have overrun our position. I request an immediate artillery barrage on our location!
zh: 总部！总部！这里是棕熊小队。Strogg 已经冲垮了我们的阵地。请求立即向我方坐标实施炮火覆盖！

en: Walker Squad Bison, you are directed to take up a defensive position at your current location.
zh: 野牛机甲小队，命令你们在当前位置转入防御。

en: H Q, there’s over two hundred Strogg hot on our tail.
zh: 总部，两百多个 Strogg 正咬着我们的尾巴。

en: I copy that, Bison. But you’re covering the retreat of four infantry squads.
zh: 收到，野牛小队。但你们要掩护四个步兵小队撤退。

en: Understood. Bison Squad, full halt and deploy weapons. We’re buying the evac some time.
zh: 明白。野牛小队，全体停止前进，展开武器。我们给撤离争取时间。

en: Eagle two, Eagle nine, this is Eagle twelve. Form up on me.  Let’s see if we can’t offer Bison squad some assistance.
zh: 雄鹰二号、雄鹰九号，这里是雄鹰十二号。向我编队。咱们去给野牛小队搭把手。

en: Roger that.
zh: 收到。

en: {pain}Kane... Kane...
zh: {pain}Kane……Kane……

en: {pain}Kane... {furrow}it's too late for me... save yourself... get... out of here
zh: {pain}Kane……{furrow}我不行了……你自己保命……快……离开这里

en: {pain}Go on. The Strogg'll be coming soon. {furrow}Get... the hell out... of here.
zh: {pain}走吧。Strogg 马上就来了。{furrow}快……他妈的……离开这儿。

en: These aren't zombies. They're partially Stroggified Marines. This is some kind of dumping ground for botched transfers.
zh: 这些不是僵尸，是 Strogg 化改造到一半的陆战队员。这儿八成是个倾倒场，专门扔改造失败的家伙。

en: {happy}Hey, you're Matthew Kane. {idle}My squad was scattered. I just got word we're assembling back at the entrance to this facility. {furrow}Watch yourself. {idle}There's acid sprayers in here that'll chew through armor in no time.
zh: {happy}嘿，你是 Matthew Kane。{idle}我的小队被打散了。刚收到消息，大家在这座设施的入口处重新集结。{furrow}当心点，{idle}这里面有喷酸的家伙，几下就能把护甲腐蚀穿。

en: {pain}Take the shot!
zh: {pain}开枪啊！

en: I can't!
zh: 我下不了手！

en: {furrow}Do it! Kill me!
zh: {furrow}动手！杀了我！

en: {confused}Are you Kane? {idle}You've got no idea how happy I am to see you.
zh: {confused}你是 Kane？{idle}你不知道见到你我有多高兴。

en: Gaaah
zh: 嘎啊……

en: No! My grenade!
zh: 不！我的手雷！

en: I heard the voice again. It was Cowell!
zh: 我又听见那个声音了。是 Cowell！

en: Marines, this is Krimpkey. It's imperative we regroup. Each man take a... No! Noooooooooo!
zh: 弟兄们，我是 Krimpkey。我们必须马上集结。每人负责一……不！不——！

en: Where's the exit? I need to find the damn exit! I've gotta get outta here!
zh: 出口在哪儿？我得找到那该死的出口！我必须离开这儿！

en: My gun's jammed! Someone. Anyone. I need backup now!
zh: 我的枪卡壳了！来人啊，谁都行，我现在就需要支援！

en: GaaaahHeeeeeeelp me! Heeeelp meee!
zh: 嘎啊——救命！救——命——啊！

en: Hey, it's that Kane guy.
zh: 嘿，是那个叫 Kane 的。

en: {happy}Damn are we lucky to see you. {idle}We're the last of Cobra squad. That door's the exit out but we can't get through the security scanner.
zh: {happy}见到你可真是走了大运。{idle}我们是眼镜蛇小队最后的几个人了。那扇门就是出口，可我们过不了安全扫描仪。

en: {scared}Yeah, it fried Private Baleman when he tried to go through.
zh: {scared}是啊，列兵 Baleman 想硬闯，直接被它烤焦了。

en: I analyzed the scanning circuits. All they're looking for is proper Strogg I D codes.
zh: 我分析过扫描电路了。它们要验的，无非是合规的 Strogg 身份码。

en: {confused}Wouldn't Kane's strogg parts contain those codes?
zh: {confused}Kane 身上那些 Strogg 部件里，不就该有这些码吗？

en: Yeah... yeah, I bet they do.
zh: 对……对啊，我打赌肯定有。

en: {puzzled}How about it, Kane? {confused}You wanna trying walking through? {idle}It should read you as Strogg.
zh: {puzzled}怎么样，Kane？{confused}想不想走过去试试？{idle}它应该会把你识别成 Strogg。

en: {scared}Kane! You have to get out of here!!
zh: {scared}Kane！你必须马上离开！！

en: {scared}Kane! You have to get out of here!! I CAN'T CONTROL IT. {furrow}RUN!!
zh: {scared}Kane！你必须马上离开！！我控制不住它了。{furrow}快跑！！

en: {furrow}Go! GET OUT OF HERE!!
zh: {furrow}走！快离开这里！！

en: {furrow}I CAN'T CONTROL IT. RUN!!

en: Kane! Is there a console in there that'll turn this thing off so we can get through?

en: {puzzled}Wow, he was your L T? {scared}Damn, there was nothing you could do. {idle}If he'd lived, the Strogg would have gotten a lot of military secrets from him. C'mon, let's get the hell out of here.

en: Look! It's Matthew Kane! He's alive! Come on. Get onboard. We'll have you back at the Hannibal in no time.
zh: 看！是 Matthew Kane！他还活着！快，上来。我们马上送你回汉尼拔号。

en: Come on! Get onboard! Move it! Move it!

en: HQ, we've located the few survivors of the Waste Facility. We are dusting off now and en route to your position.
zh: 总部，我们找到了废料处理厂的少数幸存者，现已起飞，正返回你处。

zh: 又来了，我清清楚楚听见有人叫我的名字。这下面到底他妈怎么回事？

en: You saved my life. Thank you.
zh: 你救了我一命。谢谢。

en: That Strogg would have killed me. I am in your debt, Kane.
zh: 那个 Strogg 差点就要了我的命。我欠你一次，Kane。

en: Ha, you did quite well!

en: An excellent shot, my friend!
zh: 好枪法，朋友！

en: You are quite the marksman.
zh: 你可真是个神射手。

en: I could not have done better myself!
zh: 换我上也不过如此了！

en: Kane, you have a talent for killing Strogg!

en: {furrow}Check your target!

en: {furrow}Watch who you're shooting at, Kane!

en: {furrow}Damn you! Be careful!

en: {furrow}Shoot the enemy, not me!

en: {furrow}I am not a Strogg, so don't shoot me!

en: {furrow}Kane! Are the Strogg controlling you?

en: {furrow}Are you a Strogg now?

en: {furrow}Have you finally joined the Strogg, Kane?

en: {furrow}Do you realize you just fragged a Marine?

en: {furrow}Kane just killed one of us!

en: {furrow}Have you lost your mind? You killed a squadmate!
zh: {furrow}你疯了吗？你杀了自己的队友！

en: {furrow}Kane, are you under Strogg control?

en: {furrow}Have you become a Strogg, Kane?
zh: {furrow}你已经变成 Strogg 了吗，Kane？

en: Activate lights!
zh: 打开照明！

en: It's dark in here!
zh: 这里面真黑！

en: Are you trying to blind me?

en: Hey! Point that light away from me!
zh: 嘿！别拿灯照我！

en: There are enemies just ahead.
zh: 前方就有敌人。

en: We have Strogg in this area.

en: Strogg are behind you!

en: There! In back of you!
zh: 那儿！就在你背后！

en: They're flanking left!
zh: 他们在从左翼包抄！

en: There's movement to the left!

en: Strogg to the right!
zh: 右边有 Strogg！

en: There on the right!

en: Enemy above us!

en: A Strogg is up there!

en: I'll take your life, Strogg!

en: You don't stand a chance!

en: Come on! Let's play, squib!

en: Prepare to die, Strogg!

en: Do you require something, Kane?

en: Perhaps you should back up.

en: {furrow}I would strongly suggest you back up.

en: {puzzled}Kane, why are you doing this?

en: {concerned}You aren't by chance becoming Strogg, are you?

en: {concerned}Tell me. Are you becoming Strogg?

en: I'm with you. Lead the way.
zh: 我跟你走。带路吧。

en: I've got orders to accompany you.

en: Let's go. You can lead.

en: I have to stop, but you keep going.

en: This is where we part company.

en: You go ahead, I'm staying here.
zh: 你先走，我留在这儿。

en: Sorry. Can't talk right now.

en: {furrow}I can't talk right now.
zh: {furrow}我现在没空说话。

en: {furrow}Why don't you move along, soldier?

en: {furrow}You're startin' to get on my nerves, Marine.
zh: {furrow}你开始让我心烦了，大兵。

en: I gotta find cover!

en: I'm gettin' out of the line of fire!

en: I'm gettin' behind something.

en: Keep out of sight!

en: I'll advance on the Strogg!

en: I'm moving ahead!

en: I'm going forward!

en: Forward!

en: I have to withdraw!

en: There's a casualty here!

en: Marine down!

en: There's a soldier down here!

en: Got 'em!

en: That one was mine!

en: Yeah

en: Ha ha haaaa!

en: Didn't expect that, did ya?

en: Who's next?

en: Sleep tight, squib.

en: I took out the Strogg to your back.

en: There was a Strogg at your back, but I took care of him.
zh: 你背后刚才有个 Strogg，我把它解决了。

en: I just saved your life, soldier.

en: They got me cornered here!

en: How about a little help?

en: I'll hold them here.

en: They aren't gettin' outta this.

en: Squad, fire on my target!

en: I want a suppressing fire on these Strogg!

en: Thanks, Marine. I would have died.

en: I should have seen that one comin'.

en: Thanks for the assistance.

en: Nice job, soldier!

en: Way to go!

en: Good shot, Marine!

en: Keep it up, soldier!

en: You're gettin' good at this!

en: All right! Good one.

en: Ha, ha! Nice shot!

en: Rip 'em up, Marine!

en: {furrow}Check your targets!

en: {furrow}Dammit, you just hit me!

en: {furrow}Watch the friendly fire!

en: {furrow}Soldier, who's side are you on?

en: {furrow}Check your fire!
zh: {furrow}管好你的火力！

en: {furrow}What do you think you're doing, Marine?

en: {furrow}Watch where you're pointing that weapon.
zh: {furrow}看清楚你的枪口冲着谁。

en: {furrow}Who in blazes are you firing at?
zh: {furrow}你到底在朝谁开火？

en: {furrow}You just shot me! Are you going Strogg?
zh: {furrow}你刚打中我了！你是要变成 Strogg 吗？

en: {furrow}Corporal, are those Strogg implants taking you over?
zh: {furrow}下士，是不是那些 Strogg 植入体在控制你？

en: {furrow}Point that weapon away from me.
zh: {furrow}把枪口从我身上挪开。

en: {furrow}Do you know you just killed a Marine?
zh: {furrow}你知道你刚杀了一名陆战队员吗？

en: {furrow}You just fragged someone on our side!

en: {furrow}Stop shooting at soldiers!
zh: {furrow}别再朝自己的士兵开枪了！

en: {furrow}Corporal, you just killed a Marine! Have you become a Strogg?
zh: {furrow}下士，你刚杀了一名陆战队员！你已经变成 Strogg 了吗？

en: {furrow}You just fragged a soldier! Did you finally turn Strogg?

en: {furrow}Which team are you fighting for, Corporal?

en: Let's get some light in here.

en: Get that out of my eyes!

en: Turn the other way, soldier!

en: Watch it. There's Strogg ahead.

en: Look behind you!

en: In back of you!

en: Strogg to the left side!

en: Target on your left!

en: They're flanking right!

en: There's one to your right!

en: There's Strogg up there!

en: Look up above!

en: This Strogg's mine!

en: Got a squib over here!

en: Time to die!

en: Bring it on, Strogg!

en: I'm ready for ya!

en: Target acquired!

en: Haven't you got something better to do?

en: You better move along.
zh: 你最好赶紧走开。

en: Corporal, are those Strogg implants functioning properly?
zh: 下士，你那些 Strogg 植入体运转还正常吧？

en: You would warn us if the Strogg were trying to influence you.
zh: 要是 Strogg 想影响你，你可得提醒我们一声。

en: Damn it!
zh: 该死！

en: Hold up, Marine. I'm a medic.
zh: 站住别动，弟兄。我是医疗兵。

en: Stay right there. I'll give you a medpack.
zh: 待在原地。我给你上个医疗包。

en: Don't move from there. I'll heal you.
zh: 别乱动，我来给你治疗。

en: Stay there, Kane. I'm a medic!
zh: 待在那儿，Kane。我是医疗兵！

en: Don't move from there, Kane. I'll fix you up.
zh: 别动，Kane。我来给你包扎。

en: I'm comin' over to patch you up, Kane.
zh: 我这就过来给你包扎，Kane。

en: Kane, I'm a medic! Stay right where you are!

en: Stop movin' around.

en: This won't hurt.

en: Stop fidgetin'!

en: I only need a couple of seconds to patch you up.

en: Dammit, hold still.

en: All done. Go give 'em hell. Marine.
zh: 搞定。去让他们好看吧，弟兄。

en: There, you're fixed.

en: Finished! Now go kill some Strogg.

en: That's it. Get goin'!

en: Stay there. I can help you.

zh: 你在那儿等着，我就能给你修护甲，Kane 下士。

en: Hold still while I fix this for you.

en: There you are. Get back in the battle.
zh: 好了，回去接着打吧。

en: That's it. I'm done.
zh: 就这样，修好了。

en: I'm coming along. Lead the way.

en: You keep on moving - I have to remain here.

en: I'm taking up a position here.

en: You go without me. I have orders to stop at this position.

en: {furrow}Corporal, I'm a little preoccupied at the moment.
zh: {furrow}下士，我这会儿有点忙。

en: {furrow}Move along. I'm busy.
zh: {furrow}走开，我忙着呢。

en: {furrow}This isn't a wise move, Marine.

en: {furrow}You better start walkin' away right now, Soldier.
zh: {furrow}你最好现在就走人，士兵。

en: I have to find cover!

en: I'm getting out of the line of fire.
zh: 我先撤出火线。

en: It's not so safe out here.
zh: 外面这儿可不太安全。

en: Marines, take cover!

en: Keep low! And keep movin'!

en: I'll take the forward position.

en: I'm advancing on the Strogg.

en: I'll move ahead.

en: Retreat!

en: We've got a casualty here!

en: Yeah! I nailed 'em!

en: Bring on another one!

en: Ha, ha!

en: Don't mess with a Marine!

en: Yeeeah!
Squib is down!
zh: 杂碎倒下了！

en: Burn forever, freak.
zh: 下地狱慢慢烧吧，怪胎。

en: Corporal, I took care of the Strogg at your back.

en: A Strogg had you dead to rights, but I got him.

en: I'm taking heavy fire over here!

en: They aren't budging from that spot.

en: They're stuck right there!

en: Don't let 'em up!

en: I want suppressing fire!

en: Marines, pin them down!

en: Thanks, soldier. You saved my hide.
zh: 谢了，士兵。你救了我一条命。

en: Thanks.

en: Thanks for the assist, Corporal.

en: Yes! That's what I like to see!
zh: 好！我就爱看这个！

en: Good one!

en: That was a beautiful shot!

en: Keep tearin' 'em up!

en: Nice!

en: Well done, Marine!

en: Activate lights.

en: There's Strogg at your back!

en: Keep an eye to the left!

en: They're on your left!
zh: 他们在你左边！

en: We've got hostiles to the right!
zh: 右边有敌人！

en: Squib on the right!
zh: 右边有杂碎！

en: There's Strogg up top!
zh: 顶上有 Strogg！

en: Up above!
zh: 在上面！

en: I've got a contact above us!
zh: 上方发现敌情！

en: Got a Strogg right here!
zh: 这儿就有个 Strogg！

en: Gimme your best, squib!
zh: 使出你的绝活来，杂碎！

en: Feeling strong, freak?
zh: 觉得自己挺能打是吧，怪胎？

en: You're in the wrong place, squib!
zh: 你来错地方了，杂碎！

en: You've had it, squib!
zh: 你完蛋了，杂碎！

en: Just you and me, Strogg!
zh: 咱俩单挑，Strogg！

en: Something troubling you, Marine?
zh: 有什么心事吗，大兵？

en: You run out of things to do, soldier?
zh: 你是闲得没事干了吗，士兵？

en: Move it or I'll move it for you.
zh: 自己挪窝，不然我帮你挪。

en: That's some pretty fancy Strogg gear you've got attached to you.
zh: 你身上装的这套 Strogg 玩意儿还挺花哨。

en: Were you given a clean bill of health by the medics?
zh: 医疗兵真给你开了健康证明？

en: Should you really be carrying a weapon?
zh: 你真的适合带枪吗？

en: Soldier, stay there! I'll fix you up.
zh: 士兵，待在那儿！我来给你包扎。

en: Don't move, Marine! You're hurt!
zh: 别动，弟兄！你受伤了！

en: Stay down! I'm a medic!
zh: 趴着别动！我是医疗兵！

en: Kane, hold up! Let me give you a medkit!
zh: Kane，停一下！让我给你上个医疗包！

en: Kane, I'll be right there to fix you up!
zh: Kane，我马上过去给你包扎！

en: Wait a minute, Kane! I'll heal you.
zh: 等一下，Kane！我来治你。

en: Would you be still?
zh: 你能不能别动？

en: The more you move, the longer this takes.
zh: 你越乱动，我弄得越慢。

en: Just give me a few seconds here.
zh: 就给我几秒钟。

en: You're a lousy patient.
zh: 你这病人可真难伺候。

en: Done! Move out, Marine.
zh: 好了！出发吧，弟兄。

en: That's as much as I can do.
zh: 我只能帮你到这儿了。

en: Go on, I'm done.
zh: 走吧，我这边完事了。

en: That's as good as it gets.
zh: 这已经是最好的效果了。

en: Stay where you are. I'll fix your body armor.
zh: 待在原地，我来修你的护甲。

en: Wait there. I can repair your armor.
zh: 在那儿等着，我能修好你的护甲。

en: Wait for me and I'll fix your body armor.
zh: 等我过来，我给你修护甲。

en: Kane, wait for me. I can fix your body armor.
zh: Kane，等等我。我能修好你的护甲。

en: Stay there, corporak Kane. I'll repair your armor.
zh: 待在那儿，Kane 下士。我来修你的护甲。

en: Kane, wait and I'll fix your body armor.
zh: Kane，等一下，我给你修护甲。

en: Stop moving for a second.
zh: 先站定几秒钟。

en: I can't work with you fidgeting around.
zh: 你这么扭来扭去我没法干活。

en: Hold still. This won't take long.
zh: 别动，很快就好。

en: I'm done. Get moving marine.
zh: 修好了。行动吧，弟兄。

en: Ok, I'm finished. Good luck marine.
zh: 好了，完工。祝你好运，弟兄。

en: Corporal, I'm taggin' along with you. Let's go.
zh: 下士，我跟你一块儿行动。走吧。

en: We're movin' out. You have point.
zh: 我们出发。你打头阵。

en: You go on without me. I'm stopping here.
zh: 你自己走吧，我就到这儿了。

en: I have orders to stay here.
zh: 我奉命留守这里。

en: I have this point covered. You keep moving.
zh: 这个点有我盯着，你继续前进。

en: {furrow}You're wasting my time, Marine.
zh: {furrow}你在浪费我的时间，大兵。

en: {furrow}Do I look like I want to talk?
zh: {furrow}我看着像想聊天的样子吗？

en: {furrow}Have you got a problem, Marine?
zh: {furrow}你有意见吗，大兵？

en: {furrow}You're gonna have a big problem real soon if you don't stop bugging me.
zh: {furrow}你再来烦我，马上就有大麻烦了。

en: I'm stayin' low!
zh: 我先趴低点！

en: It's not safe in the open!
zh: 开阔地不安全！

en: I'm getting something between me and the Strogg!
zh: 我得找个东西挡在我和 Strogg 中间！

en: Take cover!
zh: 找掩护！

en: Squad, get to cover!
zh: 小队，找掩护！

en: Everyone, get out of the line of fire!
zh: 所有人，撤出火线！

en: I'll move ahead!
zh: 我先往前推！

en: Squad, attack!
zh: 小队，进攻！

en: Let's get 'em, boys!
zh: 兄弟们，上！

en: I have to retreat to reload.
zh: 我得退下来换弹。

en: I'm pullin' back!
zh: 我先撤了！

en: There's too much fire! I've gotta fall back!
zh: 火力太猛了！我得后撤！

en: Marines, get back!
zh: 陆战队员们，退后！

en: Fall back to secondary positions!
zh: 后撤到第二阵地！

en: Retreat! Move it!
zh: 撤退！快跑！

en: Stay down! There's a sniper nearby!
zh: 趴下别动！附近有狙击手！

en: Looks like we got a Strogg sharpshooter!
zh: 看来碰上 Strogg 神枪手了！

en: Find cover! We got a sniper!
zh: 找掩护！有狙击手！

en: Marine down!
zh: 有队员倒下了！

en: They're picking us apart!
zh: 我们正被他们逐个点名！

en: They just iced a Marine!
zh: 他们刚干掉了一名队员！

en: We're taking casualties!
zh: 我们出现伤亡了！

en: Hell yeah!
zh: 太他妈爽了！

en: Where's my next victim?
zh: 下一个送死的在哪儿？

en: Ha, ha, ha, ha!
zh: 哈哈哈哈！

en: Fear me, freak!
zh: 怕了吧，怪胎！

en: You're not so tough now!
zh: 现在不嚣张了吧！

en: I just kicked your ass, freak!
zh: 你被我揍趴下了，怪胎！

en: You Strogg ain't worth shit!
zh: 你们 Strogg 屁都不值！

en: I fragged the Strogg at your back, Corporal.
zh: 你背后那个 Strogg 被我崩了，下士。

en: A Strogg was gonna waste you, but I took care of him.
zh: 有个 Strogg 正要干掉你，我把它解决了。

en: Stay alert, Soldier. That Strogg woulda killed you.
zh: 保持警惕，士兵。那个 Strogg 差点要了你的命。

en: I need some help here!
zh: 这边需要支援！

en: I'm trapped over here!
zh: 我被困在这边了！

en: Get these Strogg off me!
zh: 帮我把这些 Strogg 打跑！

en: Keep the bastards here.
zh: 把这些混蛋拖在这儿。

en: I'll lay down suppressing fire!
zh: 我来打压制火力！

en: I've got 'em trapped now!
zh: 这下他们被我困住了！

en: Suppressing fire on my target now!
zh: 立刻朝我的目标火力压制！

en: Keep 'em pinned down, Marines!
zh: 压住他们，弟兄们！

en: Keep pouring on the firepower!
zh: 火力别停，继续倾泻！

en: Hey, nice shot. You sure saved my ass.
zh: 嘿，好枪法。你可真救了我一条命。

en: Thanks for savin' me. Guess this makes you my guardian angel.
zh: 多谢救命。看来你成我的守护天使了。

en: Thanks, Marine. I hope I can return the favor.
zh: 谢了，弟兄。希望我能还你这个人情。

en: Yeah! That's the way to do it, Marine!
zh: 爽！就得这么干，弟兄！

en: Ha, ha, ha, haaaa!
zh: 哈哈哈哈——！

en: That was freakin' beautiful!
zh: 刚才那下简直绝了！

en: Shit, that was great!
zh: 妈的，太漂亮了！

en: Niiiice!
zh: 漂——亮！

en: Marine, you got some talents.
zh: 弟兄，你是真有两下子。

en: It's a pleasure to watch you work, Soldier.
zh: 看你干活真是种享受，士兵。

en: You freakin' nailed his ass!
zh: 你把他崩得漂漂亮亮！

en: {furrow}Don't pull that trigger unless you're sure of your target!
zh: {furrow}没看准目标就别扣扳机！

en: {furrow}You just freakin' shot me!
zh: {furrow}你他妈刚打中我了！

en: {furrow}Are you blind?
zh: {furrow}你瞎了吗？

en: {furrow}Are you some squib sympathizer?
zh: {furrow}你是不是心疼那帮杂碎？

en: {furrow}Do not fire at me, Soldier!
zh: {furrow}不许朝我开火，士兵！

en: {furrow}Do I look like a freakin' Strogg?
zh: {furrow}我看着像他妈的 Strogg 吗？

en: {furrow}Do you need glasses, Marine?
zh: {furrow}你需要配副眼镜吗，大兵？

en: {furrow}Hey! I'm one of the good guys!
zh: {furrow}嘿！我是自己人！

en: {furrow}That was friendly fire, wasn't it Corporal?
zh: {furrow}刚那是误伤对吧，下士？

en: {furrow}Corporal, are you startin' to work for the Strogg?
zh: {furrow}下士，你是开始给 Strogg 卖命了吗？

en: {furrow}You're shootin' like a Strogg would.
zh: {furrow}你这打法跟 Strogg 一个样。

en: {furrow}You just fragged a human!
zh: {furrow}你刚干掉了一个人类！

en: {furrow}Hey, moron, you just killed a Marine!
zh: {furrow}嘿，蠢货，你刚杀了一名陆战队员！

en: {furrow}I should have you thrown in the brig for that!
zh: {furrow}就凭这个，我该把你扔进禁闭室！

en: {furrow}Corporal, just because you look like a Strogg doesn't mean you can kill Marines!
zh: {furrow}下士，你长得像 Strogg，不代表你就能杀陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Have you gone Strogg on me?
zh: {furrow}你这是变成 Strogg 了吗？

en: {furrow}Don't make me fragg your Strogg ass!
zh: {furrow}别逼我崩了你这 Strogg 玩意儿！

en: Lights up!
zh: 开灯！

en: Point that somewhere else!
zh: 照别的地方去！

en: Knock that shit off!
zh: 把那破玩意儿关了！

en: Watch your ass - we got Strogg nearby.
zh: 当心点——附近有 Strogg。

en: We have some squibs up ahead.
zh: 前面有几个杂碎。

en: We got enemies behind us!
zh: 敌人在我们后面！

en: Freaks are in back!
zh: 怪胎在后面！

en: There's Strogg behind you!
zh: 你背后有 Strogg！

en: There's Strogg to the left!
zh: 左边有 Strogg！

en: Contact to the left!
zh: 左侧发现敌人！

en: Enemy on the right.
zh: 右边有敌人。

en: On the right flank!
zh: 在右翼！

en: There's a squib up high!
zh: 高处有个杂碎！

en: Look, we got Strogg above us!
zh: 看，上面有 Strogg！

en: You're already dead.
zh: 你已经是个死人了。

en: I'm gonna mess you up, freak!
zh: 我要把你拆了，怪胎！

en: It's ass kickin' time!
zh: 揍人时间到！

en: Come on, freak!
zh: 来啊，怪胎！

en: You eyeballin' me, squib?
zh: 你瞅我干嘛，杂碎？

en: You're courting trouble here, Soldier.
zh: 你这是在自找麻烦，大兵。

en: I don't take too kindly to this.
zh: 我可不吃这一套。

en: So you're lookin' to enter a new world of pain.
zh: 这么说，你是想尝尝生不如死的滋味了。

en: Don't be thinkin' your special Strogg status has everyone fooled.
zh: 别以为你那特殊的 Strogg 身份能把所有人都糊弄住。

en: Lots of us are keepin' an eye on you.
zh: 我们不少人都盯着你呢。

en: You make one wrong move and you're toast.
zh: 你敢走错一步，就死定了。

en: Wait a minute! I'm a medic!
zh: 等等！我是医疗兵！

en: Don't go anywhere! I'll heal you up.
zh: 哪儿也别去！我来给你治伤。

en: Stay there! I've got a medpack for you!
zh: 待在那儿！我这有医疗包！

en: Kane, I'm a medic! Wait there!
zh: Kane，我是医疗兵！在那儿等着！

en: I'm on my way, Kane! I've got a medpack for you!
zh: 我这就来，Kane！医疗包给你备着呢！

en: Kane, stay put. I'll patch you up!
zh: Kane，别动。我来给你包扎！

en: Wait right there, Kane! I'll try to fix you up.
zh: 就在那儿等着，Kane！我来想办法治好你。

en: Damn it, hold still.
zh: 该死，别乱动。

en: This won't hurt a bit.
zh: 一点都不疼的。

en: Gimme a few seconds and you'll be okay.
zh: 给我几秒钟，你就没事了。

en: This is just what the doctor ordered.
zh: 这就叫对症下药。

en: I've done what I can. Go get 'em soldier.
zh: 我能做的都做了。上吧，大兵。

en: All done. Now try and keep low, would ya?
zh: 全好了。以后记得放低身子，成不？

en: That's it! Go frag some Strogg!
zh: 好了！去痛宰 Strogg 吧！

en: You're good to go.
zh: 你没问题了，上吧。

en: Stay there marine. I'll repair your armor.
zh: 待在那儿，陆战队员。我来修你的护甲。

en: Hold up a second and I'll fix your body armor.
zh: 稍等一下，我来修你的护甲。

en: Wait for me. I can repair your armor.
zh: 等等我。我能修好你的护甲。

en: Lemme fix your armor.
zh: 让我给你修修护甲。

en: Stay there, corporal Kane. I can fix your armor.
zh: 待在那儿，Kane 下士。我能修好你的护甲。

en: Let me catch up and I'll fix your armor, Kane.
zh: 等我跟上来就给你修护甲，Kane。

en: Just wait a second and I'll be done.
zh: 稍等一下，马上就好。

en: I'll fix your body armor.
zh: 我来修你的护甲。

en: Hold still. I'll fix your armor.
zh: 别动。我来修护甲。

en: There you go. Try to be a little more careful, all right?
zh: 好了。下回当心着点，行吗？

en: That's all I can do. See you around, marine.
zh: 我只能修成这样了。回见，陆战队员。

en: Finihed. Back into the war, marine.
zh: 完工。回战场去吧，陆战队员。

en: I'm goin' with you, Corporal.
zh: 我跟你一起走，下士。

en: I'm under orders to follow along.
zh: 我奉命跟你同行。

en: What are you waiting for? Let's move out.
zh: 还愣着干嘛？出发。

en: You'll have to go it alone. I'm campin' at this position.
zh: 你只能一个人上了。我就蹲守在这个位置了。

en: You go on by yourself. I'm staying at this location.
zh: 你自己往前走吧。我留在这里。

en: Go without me. I'll stay here and guard your back.
zh: 别管我，走吧。我留下来给你殿后。

en: {furrow}Sorry, buddy. I'm a little busy.
zh: {furrow}抱歉，伙计。我这儿有点忙。

en: {furrow}Excuse me, but I'm busy.
zh: {furrow}不好意思，我正忙着呢。

en: {furrow}You're startin' to get on my nerves.
zh: {furrow}你开始让我心烦了。

en: {furrow}Maybe you don't realize what you're doin'.
zh: {furrow}你大概不知道自己在干什么吧。

en: This zone is hot. I'm headin' for cover!
zh: 这片区域太危险，我去找掩护！

en: This is crazy! I'm not standin' out in the open!
zh: 疯了吧！我可不站在空地上挨枪子儿！

en: Find a defensive position!
zh: 找好防御位置！

en: Take cover and keep down!
zh: 找掩护，趴低点！

en: Stay out of sight!
zh: 别暴露自己！

en: I'm movin' forward!
zh: 我往前推进了！

en: I'm gonna move ahead!
zh: 我先往前上了！

en: I'm taking point!
zh: 我来开路！

en: Everyone, advance!
zh: 全体，前进！

en: Advance on the Strogg position!
zh: 向 Strogg 阵地推进！

en: I havta retreat!
zh: 我得撤了！

en: I gotta fall back and reload!
zh: 我得后撤装弹！

en: Retreat! They've got us out gunned!
zh: 撤退！他们火力比我们猛！

en: Fall back Marines! Move it! Move it!
zh: 后撤，陆战队员！快！快！

en: We have to withdraw and regroup!
zh: 我们必须撤下去重整！

en: There's a damn Strogg sniper around here!
zh: 这附近有个该死的 Strogg 狙击手！

en: Sniper! We gotta find him!
zh: 狙击手！得把他揪出来！

en: Stay down! We got a sniper!
zh: 趴下！有狙击手！

en: A Marine was just iced!
zh: 刚有个陆战队员被干掉了！

en: The damn Strogg are wearin' us down!
zh: 这帮该死的 Strogg 快把我们耗干了！

en: Shit, we just lost a man!
zh: 妈的，我们又折了一个人！

en: They fragged another soldier!
zh: 他们又干掉了一个弟兄！

en: Oh yeah I liked that!
zh: 哦耶，太带劲了！

en: You're lookin' mighty dead, freak!
zh: 瞧你这死相，怪胎！

en: That rocked!
zh: 真带劲！

en: Now I gotta scrape you off my boots.
zh: 完了我还得把你从靴底刮下来。

en: Ain't war hell? Ha, ha!
zh: 都说战争是地狱，哈哈！

en: Is it any wonder I love the Corps?
zh: 你说我能不爱陆战队吗？

en: Don't worry, I got 'em for ya.
zh: 别担心，我替你把他们收拾了。

en: Watch your back, buddy.
zh: 当心背后，伙计。

en: A freak had you in his sights, but I took care of the problem.
zh: 有个怪胎瞄上你了，不过问题已经被我解决了。

en: Shit! I can't move!
zh: 妈的！我动不了！

en: I'm pinned down!
zh: 我被火力压制了！

en: I'll keep the freaks down!
zh: 我来压制这帮怪胎！

en: I got 'em right where I want 'em.
zh: 他们正好落在我枪口上。

en: These Strogg aren't goin' nowhere!
zh: 这些 Strogg 哪儿也去不了！

en: Give me suppressing fire on these freaks!
zh: 给我火力压制这帮怪胎！

en: Help me pin this Strogg down!
zh: 帮我摁住这个 Strogg！

en: Don't let 'em advance!
zh: 别让他们推进！

en: I should be dead right now. Thanks, Corporal.
zh: 按理说我这会儿已经死了。谢了，下士。

en: I owe you, Marine.
zh: 我欠你个人情，陆战队员。

en: You saved me. Thanks, buddy.
zh: 你救了我。谢了，伙计。

en: Oh, that was beautiful!
zh: 哦，太漂亮了！

en: You do the Marine's proud, Soldier!
zh: 你给陆战队长脸了，大兵！

en: Damn, Corporal. You got some skill with that weapon.
zh: 好家伙，下士。你这枪法真有两下子。

en: Did you do that?
zh: 那是你干的？

en: You truly are a terror!
zh: 你可真是个煞星！

en: Shit! That was great!
zh: 妈的！太漂亮了！

en: {furrow}Check your freakin' line of fire!
zh: {furrow}看清你那该死的射界！

en: {furrow}Damn it! You just shot me!
zh: {furrow}该死！你打到我了！

en: {furrow}Watch the friendly fire Corporal!
zh: {furrow}当心误伤友军，下士！

en: {furrow}You coulda killed me!
zh: {furrow}你差点把我打死！

en: {furrow}Check your fire, damn it!
zh: {furrow}看着点打，该死的！

en: {furrow}Don't shoot! I'm on your side!
zh: {furrow}别开枪！我是自己人！

en: {furrow}Stop pointing that weapon at me!
zh: {furrow}别拿枪指着我！

en: {furrow}Shoot the Strogg why don't ya?
zh: {furrow}你倒是打 Strogg 啊？

en: {furrow}Do you know for sure you're a Marine?
zh: {furrow}你确定自己还是个陆战队员吗？

en: {furrow}You're really startin' to behave like a Strogg.
zh: {furrow}你现在越来越像 Strogg 了。

en: {furrow}Corporal, are those implants short circuiting your brain?
zh: {furrow}下士，是不是那些植入体把你脑子搞短路了？

en: {furrow}You just iced one of us!
zh: {furrow}你刚干掉了一个自己人！

en: {furrow}Your friendly fire just killed a Marine!
zh: {furrow}你的误伤刚打死了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}You just killed a freakin' soldier!
zh: {furrow}你刚打死了一个自家大兵！

en: {furrow}Corporal, it's gettin' so I can't trust you.
zh: {furrow}下士，我都快没法信任你了。

en: {furrow}I don't care how valuable you are to H Q. Watch the friendly fire, Kane.
zh: {furrow}我才不管你对指挥部多重要。当心误伤友军，Kane。

en: {furrow}Are you becoming a Strogg, Corporal?
zh: {furrow}你是要变成 Strogg 了吗，下士？

en: It's no good travelin' in the dark.
zh: 摸黑赶路可不行。

en: Get your lights on.
zh: 把灯打开。

en: Crap, I can't see!
zh: 见鬼，我看不见！

en: Yes, I can see that your flashlight is working!
zh: 知道了知道了，你的手电好使得很！

en: Careful. We got Strogg ahead of us.
zh: 小心。前头有 Strogg。

en: I have a contact.
zh: 发现敌人。

en: There in back!
zh: 后面！就在那儿！

en: We've got weapons fire in back!
zh: 后方有交火！

en: Strogg on the left!
zh: 左边有 Strogg！

en: Look to your left!
zh: 看你左边！

en: On the left flank!
zh: 左翼！

en: Aim to the right!
zh: 瞄准右边！

en: There's squibs to the right!
zh: 右边有杂碎！

en: Weapons fire on the right!
zh: 右边有交火！

en: Look up!
zh: 往上看！

en: Aim above us!
zh: 瞄准上面！

en: I own you, freak!
zh: 你归我了，怪胎！

en: Got a squib right here!
zh: 这儿就有个杂碎！

en: Let's dance!
zh: 来过过招吧！

en: Bring it!
zh: 放马过来！

en: It's go time!
zh: 开干了！

en: You're dead meat, squib!
zh: 你死定了，杂碎！

en: Hmmm?
What?
zh: 干嘛？

en: Don't think you can scare me just cause you look like a Strogg.
zh: 别以为你长得像 Strogg 就能吓住我。

en: You even think of stepping out of line and I'll frag your Strogg ass.
zh: 你敢有半点出格的念头，我就崩了你这 Strogg 屁股。

en: Do we understand each other?
zh: 咱们说明白了吧？

en: Stay right there! I'll heal you!
zh: 就待在那儿！我来治你！

en: Keep down! I'll be right there to patch you up!
zh: 趴低点！我马上过来给你包扎！

en: Don't move! I'm a medic!
zh: 别动！我是医疗兵！

en: Corporal Kane, don't move! I'll heal you up!
zh: Kane 下士，别动！我来给你治伤！

en: I'm a medic, Kane. Stay there, I'll fix you up!
zh: 我是医疗兵，Kane。待在那儿，我来治好你！

en: Hold up, Corporal Kane. I'm a medic!
zh: 停一下，Kane 下士。我是医疗兵！

en: Stay at your position, Kane. I'll heal you.
zh: 待在原地，Kane。我来治你。

en: This doesn't look so bad.
zh: 伤得不算重嘛。

en: Looks like you need a medpack.
zh: 看样子你需要个医疗包。

en: Stop fidgeting.
zh: 别扭来扭去的。

en: Just stay put for a minute longer.
zh: 再多待一会儿别动。

en: This won't take long.
zh: 用不了多久。

en: See? That didn't hurt a bit.
zh: 瞧见没？一点都不疼吧。

en: Go on. That's the best I can do.
zh: 去吧。我只能治到这份上了。

en: Done. Now go ice some freaks, Marine!
zh: 好了。去干翻几个怪胎吧，陆战队员！

en: That's it. You're back in action.
zh: 行了。你可以重返战斗了。

en: Wait there, marine. Your armor's damaged.
zh: 在那儿等着，陆战队员。你的护甲坏了。

en: Wait and I'll fix your body armor.
zh: 等一下，我来修你的护甲。

en: Hold up, marine. I can fix your armor.
zh: 停一下，陆战队员。我能修好你的护甲。

en: Kane, wait. Your armor's damaged.
zh: Kane，等等。你的护甲坏了。

en: Corporal Kane. Wait, and I'll repair your armor.
zh: Kane 下士。等一下，我来修你的护甲。

en: I can fix your armor, Kane.
zh: 我能修好你的护甲，Kane。

en: I'l have you patched up in no time.
zh: 马上就给你修得妥妥的。

en: Just a few seconds and you'll be right back into the fight.
zh: 就几秒钟，你马上就能重回战斗。

en: You're good to go, marine.
zh: 你可以行动了，陆战队员。

en: That's all I can do. Good luck.
zh: 我只能做到这一步了。祝你好运。

en: There, finished. Now try to be more careful.
zh: 好，修好了。以后多加小心。

en: I'm taggin' along with you.
zh: 我跟你一路。

en: Looks like it's you and me, Corporal.
zh: 看来就咱俩搭伙了，下士。

en: HQ told me to join up with you.
zh: 指挥部让我跟你会合。

en: I have to stop at this position, so you go on without me.
zh: 我得留守这个位置，你自己继续吧。

en: HQ gave me explicit orders to stay here.
zh: 指挥部明令我守在这里。

en: Sorry, Marine. You're running solo from this point on.
zh: 抱歉，陆战队员。从这儿起你就得单干了。

en: Can't talk right now.
zh: 现在没空说话。

en: {furrow}Can't you find someone else to annoy?
zh: {furrow}你就不能去烦别人吗？

en: {furrow}You should just walk away, right now.
zh: {furrow}你最好现在就走开。

en: {furrow}What the hell is with you?
zh: {furrow}你到底什么毛病？

en: I'm taking a defensive position.
zh: 我去占个防御位置。

en: This zone's too hot! I'm not stayin' in the open.
zh: 这片火力太猛！我可不待在空地上。

en: Marines, take a defensive position!
zh: 陆战队员们，占据防御位置！

en: Get behind something, now!
zh: 快找掩体躲好，快！

en: Keep down!
zh: 趴低点！

en: I'm pressin' ahead!
zh: 我继续往前压！

en: I'm gonna advance to the front!
zh: 我要往前线推进了！

en: Squad, move up!
zh: 小队，向前推进！

en: Let's get us some squibs!
zh: 咱们去宰几个杂碎！

en: Advance and attack!
zh: 前进，进攻！

en: I'm movin' back!
zh: 我先往后撤！

en: I have to retreat but I'll be back!
zh: 我得先撤，去去就回！

en: Marines, withdraw to safer positions!
zh: 陆战队员们，撤到更安全的位置！

en: We're moving back now!
zh: 我们现在后撤！

en: Pay attention! We got a sniper!
zh: 都注意！有狙击手！

en: Sniper! Don't let him get a bead on you!
zh: 狙击手！别让他瞄上你！

en: We've just taken a casualty.
zh: 我们刚折了一个人。

en: There's not gonna be many of us left at this rate.
zh: 照这么打下去，我们剩不了几个人。

en: The bastards fragged one of us!
zh: 那帮混蛋干掉了我们一个弟兄！

en: Ha, ha! This is gettin' fun!
zh: 哈哈！越来越有意思了！

en: Eat it, Strogg!
zh: 吃我一枪，Strogg！

en: Yeah!
zh: 爽！

en: Ha, ha, ha, haaaaa!
zh: 哈哈哈哈——！

en: A shame you didn't live a little longer.
zh: 可惜你没能多活一会儿。

en: Look at you all busted up, freak!
zh: 瞧瞧你这稀巴烂的德行，怪胎！

en: Score one for the marines.
zh: 陆战队再添一分。

en: Ya gotta keep watchin' behind you.
zh: 你得时刻留意身后。

en: I fragged a Strogg that was sneakin' upon you.
zh: 有个 Strogg 想偷袭你，被我干掉了。

en: Marine, watch your back. You came really close to dyin'.
zh: 陆战队员，当心背后。你刚才离死可就差一步了。

en: I'm under heavy fire over here!
zh: 我这边火力太猛了！

en: Shit! They got me pinned down!
zh: 妈的！我被压得动不了！

en: I'll keep the freaks back!
zh: 我来挡住这帮怪胎！

en: I'll make sure the squibs don't move.
zh: 我保证这帮杂碎动弹不得。

en: Ice these Strogg while I got 'em trapped!
zh: 趁我把这些 Strogg 困住，快干掉他们！

en: All marines fire on my target!
zh: 所有陆战队员，朝我的目标开火！

en: I want suppressing fire on these Strogg!
zh: 给我火力压制这些 Strogg！

en: Help me keep these squibs pinned down!
zh: 帮我把这些杂碎摁住！

en: Thanks, buddy.
zh: 谢了，伙计。

en: Damn, you saved my life!
zh: 好家伙，你救了我一命！

en: Thanks for helpin' me out.
zh: 多谢帮忙。

en: I bet he didn't like that at all.
zh: 我敢打赌他可一点都不好受。

en: That was freakin' great!
zh: 真他妈漂亮！

en: Wow! Nice!
zh: 哇哦！漂亮！

en: Good job!
zh: 干得好！

en: Shit. He ain't gettin' up from that.
zh: 妈的，这下他别想爬起来了。

en: He looks pretty dead to me.
zh: 要我看，他是死透了。

en: Not bad!
zh: 不赖嘛！

en: You really busted him up!
zh: 你把他轰了个稀烂！

en: {furrow}Always check your line of fire!
zh: {furrow}开火前先看清射界！

en: {furrow}Watch your freakin' target!
zh: {furrow}看清你那该死的目标！

en: {furrow}You just hit me!
zh: {furrow}你打到我了！

en: {furrow}Stop shooting! I'm on your side!
zh: {furrow}别开枪了！我是自己人！

en: {furrow}Hey! Watch the friendly fire!
zh: {furrow}嘿！当心误伤友军！

en: {furrow}Dammit! Kill the Strogg, not me.
zh: {furrow}该死！去打 Strogg，别打我。

en: {furrow}Are you losing it, Marine?
zh: {furrow}你是失控了吗，陆战队员？

en: {furrow}Did you just shoot at me?
zh: {furrow}你刚才是朝我开枪了？

en: {furrow}Looks like the Strogg Marine might be changing sides!
zh: {furrow}看来咱们这位 Strogg 陆战兵要倒戈了！

en: {furrow}Are the Strogg starting to take hold of your mind?
zh: {furrow}是不是 Strogg 开始控制你的脑子了？

en: {furrow}I've got my eye on you, Corporal!
zh: {furrow}我盯着你呢，下士！

en: {furrow}You just fragged a soldier!
zh: {furrow}你刚干掉了一个自己人！

en: {furrow}Calm down, and stop shooting marines!
zh: {furrow}冷静点，别再朝陆战队员开枪了！

en: {furrow}Check your target, Marine!
zh: {furrow}看清目标，陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Are you a squib? You just iced a Marine!
zh: {furrow}你是杂碎吗？你刚干掉了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Are those Strogg circuits turning on? You just killed a Marine!
zh: {furrow}是不是你那身 Strogg 电路通电了？你刚打死了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Corporal, this isn't the time to shoot like a Strogg!
zh: {furrow}下士，现在可不是学 Strogg 开枪的时候！

en: Everyone turn your lights on!
zh: 所有人把灯打开！

en: Hey, watch that light!
zh: 嘿，注意你的灯！

en: You're blinding me, Corporal!
zh: 你晃得我眼都睁不开了，下士！

en: There's Strogg ahead of us.
zh: 前面有 Strogg。

en: Careful. We got squibs close by.
zh: 小心。附近有杂碎。

en: Look out behind you!
zh: 当心身后！

en: In back!
zh: 后面！

en: We got Strogg on the left!
zh: 左边有 Strogg！

en: They're trying to flank left!
zh: 他们想从左边包抄！

en: Strogg on the right side!
zh: 右边有 Strogg！

en: There's Strogg above us!
zh: 上面有 Strogg！

en: Strogg are up there!
zh: Strogg 在上头！

en: Bring it, freak!
zh: 放马过来，怪胎！

en: Gimme your best shot!
zh: 使出你的看家本事来！

en: Got a freak right here!
zh: 这儿有个怪胎！

en: What do ya got, squib?
zh: 你有几斤几两，杂碎？

en: I hope you like pain, freak!
zh: 但愿你喜欢吃苦头，怪胎！

en: Back up.
zh: 退后。

en: Really. I mean it. Back up.
zh: 我说真的。退后。

en: Don't make me tell you again.
zh: 别让我说第二遍。

en: Can you be trusted?
zh: 你这人到底靠不靠得住？

en: How much do we really know about Strogg technology?
zh: 我们对 Strogg 的技术又真正了解多少？

en: Could your circuits switch on at any minute?
zh: 谁知道你那身电路会不会说通电就通电？

en: Remain there, soldier! I've got a medpack!
zh: 待在那儿，大兵！我有医疗包！

en: Stay put! I'll fix you up!
zh: 别动！我来治好你！

en: Marine! Hold up!
zh: 陆战队员！停一下！

en: Corporal Kane, remain there! I'm a medic!
zh: Kane 下士，待在那儿！我是医疗兵！

en: I've got a medpack for you, Corporal Kane.
zh: Kane 下士，我这有医疗包给你。

en: Stay where you are, Kane. I'll heal you.
zh: 待在原地，Kane。我来治你。

en: Corporal Kane, don't move. I'll be there with a medpack in a second.
zh: Kane 下士，别动。我马上带医疗包过去。

en: Marine, you gotta remember to duck once in a while.
zh: 陆战队员，你得记着时不时低头躲一躲。

en: Here, this should help.
zh: 来，这个应该管用。

en: One minute and you'll be fine.
zh: 一分钟就好，你会没事的。

en: Would you hold still?
zh: 你能不能别乱动？

en: One medpack, comin' up.
zh: 医疗包一份，这就来。

en: You're done. Move out Marine.
zh: 好了。出发吧，陆战队员。

en: Finished. You're back in the war Marine.
zh: 搞定。回战场去吧，陆战队员。

en: There you go. See you around.
zh: 好了。回头见。

en: I've got orders to move out with you.
zh: 我奉命跟你一起行动。

en: I'll be watching your back for now. Lead on.
zh: 接下来我帮你盯着背后。带路吧。

en: Look like your stuck with me for the time being. Let's go.
zh: 看来这阵子你得跟我搭伙了。走吧。

en: This is as far as I go. Good luck, Corporal.
zh: 我只能送到这儿了。祝你好运，下士。

en: We've gotta split up. I have to stay at this position.
zh: 我们得分头行动了。我必须守在这个位置。

en: This is where I have to stop. You go on alone.
zh: 我就到这儿了。你一个人继续吧。

en: Sorry, I'm a kinda occupied right now.
zh: 抱歉，我这会儿有点脱不开身。

en: {furrow}I can't talk right now. I'm busy.
zh: {furrow}现在没空聊。我忙着呢。

en: {furrow}I wish I could help you, but I can't.
zh: {furrow}我也想帮你，可实在帮不上。

en: {furrow}Are you doin' this on purpose?
zh: {furrow}你是故意的吧？

en: This is crazy. I'm headin' for cover!
zh: 太疯狂了。我去找掩护！

en: I need to find cover.
zh: 我得找个掩护。

en: Take cover! There's heavy fire!
zh: 找掩护！火力太猛了！

en: Get down! Get down!!
zh: 趴下！趴下！！

en: I'm movin' up!
zh: 我往前推了！

en: I'm gonna close in on 'em!
zh: 我要贴上去收拾他们！

en: I'll take point!
zh: 我来开路！

en: We've gotta advance!
zh: 我们必须推进！

en: Squad, move forward! Go go go!
zh: 小队，前进！快快快！

en: Let's get in there and clear 'em out!
zh: 冲进去把他们清干净！

en: I'm pullin back!
zh: 我先撤了！

en: I've gotta reload!
zh: 我得装弹了！

en: We've gotta retreat!
zh: 我们必须撤退！

en: Marines, we're pullin out!
zh: 陆战队员们，我们撤！

en: Withdraw to a defensive position!
zh: 撤到防御位置！

en: Watch out! We got a sniper!
zh: 当心！有狙击手！

en: There's a sniper around here!
zh: 这附近有狙击手！

en: Sniper! Keep low!
zh: 狙击手！放低身子！

en: There's a soldier down!
zh: 有士兵倒下了！

en: Dammit! They fragged a Marine!
zh: 该死！他们干掉了一个陆战队员！

en: Ha, ha! I liked that!
zh: 哈哈！这我喜欢！

en: Ha! And they said the Strogg were tough!
zh: 哈！还有人说 Strogg 难对付呢！

en: Ooooyeah!
zh: 哦——耶！

en: That freak's dead!
zh: 那怪胎死透了！

en: Oooorah.
zh: 呜——啦。

en: Gimme another Strogg to shoot!
zh: 再给我来个 Strogg 练练枪！

en: Don't mess with the Marines, Strogg.
zh: 别惹陆战队，Strogg。

en: I iced the Strogg behind you.
zh: 我把你背后那个 Strogg 干掉了。

en: You can thank me later for fragging that Strogg.
zh: 帮你崩了那个 Strogg，回头记得谢我。

en: You've gotta watch your back.
zh: 你得留神背后。

en: The Strogg have me trapped!
zh: Strogg 把我困住了！

en: Those squibs got me pinned down over here!
zh: 那帮杂碎把我压在这儿动不了！

en: Help! Get these Strogg off my ass!
zh: 救命！把这帮 Strogg 从我屁股后头轰走！

en: I'll keep these freaks right here!
zh: 我把这帮怪胎钉死在这儿！

en: I've got 'em taken care of.
zh: 他们已经被我盯死了。

en: These squibs ain't going anywhere!
zh: 这些杂碎哪儿也别想去！

en: Marines, fire on my target!
zh: 陆战队员们，朝我的目标开火！

en: I need suppressing fire on these Strogg!
zh: 我需要火力压制这些 Strogg！

en: Help me keep these Strogg pinned down!
zh: 帮我把这些 Strogg 摁住！

en: Hey, thanks for risking your neck for me.
zh: 嘿，多谢你替我玩命。

en: Thanks, Corporal. You're a regular hero.
zh: 谢了，下士。你真是个正儿八经的英雄。

en: That Strogg woulda fragged me if it weren't for you.
zh: 要不是你，那 Strogg 早把我干掉了。

en: That Strogg didn't know what hit 'em!
zh: 那 Strogg 到死都不知道自己怎么死的！

en: Nice work!
zh: 干得漂亮！

en: You're quite a shot!
zh: 你这枪法真了得！

en: That Strogg's outta commission.
zh: 那 Strogg 彻底报废了。

en: That was sweet!
zh: 太漂亮了！

en: Great kill!
zh: 杀得漂亮！

en: Smoooth!
zh: 干净利落！

en: {furrow}Check your freakin' fire!
zh: {furrow}你他妈看着点打！

en: {furrow}Damn it! Watch your target!
zh: {furrow}该死！看清目标！

en: {furrow}Check your line of fire.
zh: {furrow}看清你的射界。

en: {furrow}What in hell are you doin'?
zh: {furrow}你到底在搞什么鬼？

en: {furrow}Don't aim at me damn it!
zh: {furrow}别拿枪瞄我，该死的！

en: {furrow}Where'd you learn to shoot?
zh: {furrow}你这枪法跟谁学的？

en: {furrow}Are you trying to kill me?
zh: {furrow}你是想弄死我吗？

en: {furrow}Remember you're a Marine, not a Strogg.
zh: {furrow}记住，你是陆战队员，不是 Strogg。

en: {furrow}Don't you dare turn Strogg on me!
zh: {furrow}你敢在我面前变成 Strogg 试试！

en: {furrow}I'm watching you, Corporal!
zh: {furrow}我盯着你呢，下士！

en: {furrow}Stand down! That was a marine!
zh: {furrow}住手！那是个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}That was a human you iced!
zh: {furrow}你干掉的可是个人类！

en: {furrow}You just killed a soldier!
zh: {furrow}你刚打死了一个士兵！

en: {furrow}Did you finally join the Strogg, Corporal?
zh: {furrow}你到底还是投靠 Strogg 了吗，下士？

en: {furrow}I'm startin' to think you're a Strogg, Corporal.
zh: {furrow}我开始觉得你就是个 Strogg 了，下士。

en: {furrow}Is that Strogg AI kicking in, Corporal?
zh: {furrow}是你那 Strogg AI 发作了吗，下士？

en: Let's see some lights.
zh: 都把灯亮起来。

en: You're blindin' me!
zh: 你晃得我睁不开眼了！

en: Stop that, damn it!
zh: 别照了，该死的！

en: Stay alert. We have hostiles ahead.
zh: 保持警惕。前方有敌人。

en: We got Strogg in the vicinity.
zh: 附近有 Strogg 出没。

en: Look to the back!
zh: 看后面！

en: There's Strogg are behind you!
zh: 你身后有 Strogg！

en: Hostiles on the left flank!
zh: 左翼有敌人！

en: Weapons to the left!
zh: 枪口朝左！

en: Hostiles on the right flank!
zh: 右翼有敌人！

en: Strogg are up above!
zh: Strogg 在上面！

en: It's go time, freak!
zh: 开干了，怪胎！

en: I'm gonna bust you up!
zh: 我要把你拆成零件！

en: You're dead!
zh: 你死定了！

en: You want something?
zh: 想干嘛？

en: Back off!
zh: 退后！

en: Hi, Corporal... you okay?
zh: 嗨，下士……你还好吧？

en: You'd let us know if you were hearin' Strogg voices in your head, right?
zh: 要是你脑子里听到 Strogg 的声音，你会告诉我们的，对吧？

en: Are you turning into a Strogg?
zh: 你是要变成 Strogg 了吗？

en: Stay at your position! I'm a medic!
zh: 待在原地！我是医疗兵！

en: I've got a medpack for you!
zh: 我这有医疗包给你！

en: Don't move, Marine! I'll fix you up!
zh: 别动，陆战队员！我来治好你！

en: Corporal Kane, I have a medpack for you!
zh: Kane 下士，我这有医疗包给你！

en: I'll heal you, Corporal Kane.
zh: 我来治你，Kane 下士。

en: Stay put, Kane. I'm on my way!
zh: 别动，Kane。我这就来！

en: Corporal Kane, remain there. I'll be there in a second.
zh: Kane 下士，待在那儿。我马上就到。

en: You're lucky I got here when I did.
zh: 算你走运，我来得及时。

en: Just gimme a second.
zh: 给我几秒钟就好。

en: Hold still. You'll be back in the fight in a few seconds.
zh: 别动。几秒钟后你就能重回战斗。

en: This oughta help.
zh: 这个应该管用。

en: There. Back into the battle, Marine.
zh: 好了。回战场去吧，陆战队员。

en: There, good as new.
zh: 好了，跟新的一样。

en: Enough loungin' around, Marine. Back into the fight!
zh: 别歇着了，陆战队员。回去接着打！

en: Go on. Lead the way.
zh: 走吧。你来带路。

en: I'll accompany you for a while.
zh: 我陪你走一段。

en: Move out. I'll follow you.
zh: 出发吧。我跟着你。

en: Go on, I need to secure this point.
zh: 你先走，我得守住这个点。

en: I've been told to hook up with another squad. You're on your own now.
zh: 上头让我去跟另一支小队会合。接下来你得靠自己了。

en: I have to stop at this position. You go on.
zh: 我得留在这个位置。你继续。

en: {furrow}I'm a little busy right now.
zh: {furrow}我现在有点忙。

en: {furrow}Hey, I said I 'm busy, all right?
zh: {furrow}嘿，我说了我很忙，行不行？

en: {furrow}What is it with you? Move along.
zh: {furrow}你什么毛病？一边儿去。

en: {furrow}Soldier, you tryin' to annoy me?
zh: {furrow}大兵，你是成心烦我吗？

en: I've gotta find cover!
zh: 我得找掩护！

en: Marines, take cover immediately!
zh: 陆战队员们，立刻找掩护！

en: Keep low and keep movin'.
zh: 放低身子，别停下。

en: I'm going in!
zh: 我上了！

en: I'm gonna go forward!
zh: 我要往前推了！

en: Everyone advance! Move it move it!
zh: 全体前进！快快快！

en: Marines, overrun their position!
zh: 陆战队员们，踏平他们的阵地！

en: Attack!
zh: 进攻！

en: I'm gonna fall back!
zh: 我要后撤了！

en: I need to withdraw and reload!
zh: 我得撤下去装弹！

en: Everyone retreat!
zh: 全体撤退！

en: We gotta withdraw!
zh: 我们必须撤！

en: Squad, retreat to fallback positions!
zh: 小队，撤到预备阵地！

en: Look out! Sniper!
zh: 当心！狙击手！

en: Keep down! Sniper!
zh: 趴低点！狙击手！

en: We've got a Marine down!
zh: 有陆战队员倒下了！

en: They got a Marine!
zh: 他们干掉了一个陆战队员！

en: That was all mine!
zh: 这个全算我的！

en: Scratch one freak!
zh: 报销一个怪胎！

en: Gotcha!
zh: 逮到你了！

en: Yesss!
This is gettin' fun!
zh: 越打越有意思了！

en: Squib's down!
zh: 杂碎倒了！

en: Ha! That was easy!
zh: 哈！太轻松了！

en: I just fragged a Strogg behind you.
zh: 我刚干掉了你背后的一个 Strogg。

en: You should watch your six better, marine.
zh: 你的六点钟方向得多留点神，陆战队员。

en: Watch your back.
zh: 当心背后。

en: Help! I'm pinned down!
zh: 救命！我被压制住了！

en: I can't move with all that squib fire!
zh: 杂碎火力太猛，我动不了！

en: The Strogg got me trapped here!
zh: Strogg 把我困在这儿了！

en: These freaks ain't movin'!
zh: 这些怪胎休想动一步！

en: I'll keep 'em pinned down.
zh: 我来把他们摁住。

en: They ain't movin' a step if I can help it!
zh: 有我在，他们一步都别想挪！

en: Give me suppressing fire on these Strogg!
zh: 给我火力压制这些 Strogg！

en: Let's keep those squibs pinned down!
zh: 把那些杂碎压得抬不起头来！
