en: I want suppressing fire now!
zh: 立刻给我火力压制！

en: Thanks, Corporal. That was a close one.
zh: 谢了，下士。刚才真悬。

en: Damn, that Strogg had me dead in his sights.
zh: 好家伙，那 Strogg 的准星都咬死我了。

en: Guess I owe you one. Thanks.
zh: 看来我欠你个人情。谢了。

en: Damn, that was sweet!
zh: 好家伙，太漂亮了！

en: All right!
zh: 好样的！

en: That Strogg was yours!
zh: 那个 Strogg 算你的战果！

en: Couldn't a done better myself!
zh: 换我上也打不了这么漂亮！

en: That was freakin' amazing!
zh: 简直神了！

en: Ooo, nice!
zh: 哦，漂亮！

en: You're deadly, Marine!
zh: 你真是个狠角色，陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Hey! Check your line of fire!
zh: {furrow}嘿！看清你的射界！

en: {furrow}Watch your targets!
zh: {furrow}看清目标！

en: {furrow}Do I look like a Strogg to you?
zh: {furrow}你看我长得像 Strogg 吗？

en: {furrow}Whose side are you on?
zh: {furrow}你到底是哪边的？

en: {furrow}Point that gun away from me!
zh: {furrow}把枪口从我身上挪开！

en: {furrow}Corporal, you better not be thinkin' about goin' Strogg!
zh: {furrow}下士，你最好别动投靠 Strogg 的念头！

en: {furrow}Stay with us Corporal. Don't become a Strogg.
zh: {furrow}挺住，下士。别变成 Strogg。

en: {furrow}Is your Strogg AI turning on?
zh: {furrow}你那 Strogg AI 是不是启动了？

en: {furrow}Shit! You iced a Marine!
zh: {furrow}妈的！你干掉了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Stop shootin' guys on our side!
zh: {furrow}别再朝自己人开枪了！

en: {furrow}Dammit! You killed a Marine!
zh: {furrow}该死！你打死了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Corporal you killed a Marine! Are you becoming a Strogg?
zh: {furrow}下士，你打死了一个陆战队员！你是要变成 Strogg 了吗？

en: {furrow}You're firing on teammates! Do the Strogg control you?
zh: {furrow}你在朝队友开火！是 Strogg 控制了你吗？

en: {furrow}Are you a Strogg spy, Corporal?
zh: {furrow}你是 Strogg 的奸细吗，下士？

en: Let's get some light.
zh: 来点亮光。

en: Activate your lights.
zh: 打开照明灯。

en: Hey, watch the lights!
zh: 嘿，注意你的灯！

en: Get that freakin' light out of my eyes!
zh: 把那该死的灯从我眼前挪开！

en: Careful. Enemy's just ahead.
zh: 小心。敌人就在前头。

en: There's Strogg up ahead.
zh: 前方有 Strogg。

en: There's Strogg in back!
zh: 后面有 Strogg！

en: There's freaks behind you!
zh: 你背后有怪胎！

en: Aim left!
zh: 瞄准左边！

en: Squibs to the right
zh: 右边有杂碎

en: C'mon squib.
zh: 来啊，杂碎。

en: Target sighted!
zh: 发现目标！

en: Bring it, Strogg!
zh: 放马过来，Strogg！

en: This one's mine!
zh: 这个归我！

en: You're dead meat, freak!
zh: 你死定了，怪胎！

en: I got this one!
zh: 这个我来搞定！

en: Why don't you take a step back?
zh: 你还是退后一步吧？

en: You got a problem? Back it up.
zh: 有意见吗？退后。

en: I said back it up!
zh: 我说了，退后！

en: You look just like a Strogg.
zh: 你看上去跟 Strogg 一模一样。

en: From a distance, it'd be impossible to tell you from the real thing.
zh: 隔远点看，根本分不出你和真家伙有什么两样。

en: You ever afraid someone's gonna mistake you for a bad guy?
zh: 你就不怕哪天有人把你错当成敌人吗？

en: Crap!
zh: 见鬼！

en: Stay put, Soldier! I'll patch you up.
zh: 别动，大兵！我来给你包扎。

en: Don't move. I'm on my way!
zh: 别动。我这就来！

en: Hold up. I've got medpacks!
zh: 停一下。我有医疗包！

en: Corporal Kane, hold up! I'm a medic!
zh: Kane 下士，停一下！我是医疗兵！

en: Stay at your position, Kane. I'll heal you!
zh: 待在原地，Kane。我来治你！

en: Stay there, Corporal Kane. I'll have you fixed up in no time!
zh: 待在那儿，Kane 下士。我马上就能把你治好！

en: Stop movin' around, would ya?
zh: 别来回乱动了，行不？

en: Now for a little medpack magic.
zh: 下面轮到医疗包大显神通了。

en: Here you go.
zh: 来，好了。

en: Now just hold still a minute.
zh: 现在稳住，别动一会儿。

en: That's it. Time to kill more Strogg Marine.
zh: 好了。该去多杀几个 Strogg 了，陆战队员。

en: You're finished. Move out soldier.
zh: 治好了。出发吧，大兵。

en: You're healed. Back at it, Marine.
zh: 治好了。接着干吧，陆战队员。

en: That should do it.
zh: 这样应该就行了。

en: I've got orders to hook up with you. Let's go.
zh: 我奉命跟你会合。走吧。

en: I'll back you up. Lead on.
zh: 我给你压阵。带路吧。

en: Go ahead. I'll follow you.
zh: 你先走。我跟着你。

en: This is where I stop. Good luck to you.
zh: 我就送到这儿了。祝你好运。

en: You're on your own. I haveta stay at this position.
zh: 你得靠自己了。我必须守在这个位置。

en: I'm staying here. I'll see you around.
zh: 我留在这儿。回头见。

en: {furrow}I've got no time for talkin'.
zh: {furrow}我没工夫闲聊。

en: {furrow}Don't you have something else to do?
zh: {furrow}你就没别的事可干了吗？

en: {furrow}Get away from me.
zh: {furrow}离我远点。

en: {furrow}Stop buggin' me, Soldier.
zh: {furrow}别烦我了，大兵。

en: I need cover!
zh: 我需要掩护！

en: I've gotta get out of the line of fire.
zh: 我得离开火线。

en: I have to find some cover.
zh: 我得找个掩体。

en: Get behind somethin'!
zh: 找东西躲起来！

en: Squad, get out of the open!
zh: 小队，快离开空地！

en: I'll advance!
zh: 我来推进！

en: I'm gonna move forward!
zh: 我要往前上了！

en: Let's press forward!
zh: 咱们往前压！

en: Move out and advance!
zh: 出发，前进！

en: I gotta retreat!
zh: 我得撤了！

en: I have to fall back and reload!
zh: 我得后撤装弹！

en: Retreat and regroup!
zh: 撤退，重新集结！

en: Everyone, fall back!
zh: 所有人，后撤！

en: Watch out! Sniper!
zh: 小心！狙击手！

en: We got a Marine down!
zh: 有陆战队员倒下了！

en: Dammit! They fragged another Marine!
zh: 该死！他们又干掉了一个弟兄！

en: We got a casualty!
zh: 我们有人伤亡！

en: There's a Marine down!
zh: 有队员倒下了！

en: That Squib is out of commission.
zh: 那杂碎报废了。

en: Feel the burn!
zh: 尝尝灼烧的滋味！

en: Target destroyed!
zh: 目标已消灭！

en: Enjoy hell, freak.
zh: 地狱里好好待着吧，怪胎。

en: Fear me, Strogg!
zh: 怕了吧，Strogg！

en: One less freak in this world.
zh: 世上又少了个怪胎。

en: Ha, ha, haaaa!
zh: 哈哈，哈——！

en: I just fragged the Strogg in back of ya.
zh: 你背后那只 Strogg，我刚替你干掉了。

en: There was a squib at your back, but I iced him.
zh: 你背后刚才有只杂碎，被我做掉了。

en: You gotta watch your back more.
zh: 你得多留神背后。

en: Help! I'm pinned down over here!
zh: 救命！我被压制在这儿了！

en: I'm trapped!
zh: 我被困住了！

en: The freaks have me pinned down!
zh: 那帮怪胎把我压得抬不起头！

en: Got 'em right where I want 'em!
zh: 他们正好撞我枪口上了！

en: I've got these Strogg pinned down.
zh: 这几只 Strogg 被我压制住了。

en: The Strogg ain't movin' from that spot!
zh: 那些 Strogg 别想挪窝！

en: Suppressing fire!
zh: 火力压制！

en: I need suppressing fire on my target!
zh: 朝我的目标火力压制！

en: Concentrate your fire on my target!
zh: 集中火力打我的目标！

en: Whew, I almost bought it that time.
zh: 呼，刚才差点交代了。

en: Hey, thanks for the assist.
zh: 嘿，多谢搭把手。

en: I thought I was dead. Thanks.
zh: 我以为自己死定了。谢了。

en: That was pretty damn nice!
zh: 干得真他妈漂亮！

en: Not bad.
zh: 不赖。

en: You sure showed that Strogg!
zh: 你可给那 Strogg 好好上了一课！

en: Hey, that was sweet!
zh: 嘿，这下真带劲！

en: You got 'em, Marine!
zh: 干掉他了，好样的！

en: Great shot!
zh: 好枪法！

en: Nice one, Soldier!
zh: 漂亮，士兵！

en: {furrow}Watch your damn line of fire!
zh: {furrow}看好你他妈的射界！

en: {furrow}Hey! I'm not your target!
zh: {furrow}嘿！我不是你的目标！

en: {furrow}What the hell are you doin'?
zh: {furrow}你到底在干什么？

en: {furrow}Stop shooting me!
zh: {furrow}别朝我开枪！

en: {furrow}Why the hell are you shootin' at me?
zh: {furrow}你他妈为什么朝我开枪？

en: {furrow}Careful! I'm in your line of fire!
zh: {furrow}小心！我在你的火线上！

en: {furrow}Hey! Watch your targets!
zh: {furrow}嘿！看清目标！

en: {furrow}You shot at me by mistake, right?
zh: {furrow}你是不小心打到我的，对吧？

en: {furrow}Corporal, are you under Strogg influence?
zh: {furrow}下士，你是不是被 Strogg 影响了？

en: {furrow}Are you becoming an active Strogg?
zh: {furrow}你是不是快变成真正的 Strogg 了？

en: {furrow}Dammit! You iced a soldier!
zh: {furrow}该死！你干掉了一名士兵！

en: {furrow}Shoot the Strogg, not our guys!
zh: {furrow}打 Strogg，别打自己人！

en: {furrow}You just fragged a Marine!
zh: {furrow}你刚干掉了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}You killed a Marine! Are you a Strogg?
zh: {furrow}你杀了陆战队员！你是 Strogg 吗？

en: {furrow}Have you lost your humanity, Corporal?
zh: {furrow}下士，你的人性丢光了吗？

en: {furrow}Did you shoot that Marine on purpose?
zh: {furrow}你是故意射杀那个队员的吗？

en: Dammit! Get that outta my eyes.
zh: 该死！别拿那玩意晃我的眼。

en: You're blindin' me.
zh: 你晃得我睁不开眼了。

en: There's hostiles nearby.
zh: 附近有敌人。

en: The Strogg are just ahead.
zh: Strogg 就在前面。

en: The Strogg are in back!
zh: Strogg 在后面！

en: You got company behind you!
zh: 小心，你背后有敌人！

en: They're on the left flank!
zh: 他们在左翼！

en: We got Strogg to the left!
zh: 左边有 Strogg！

en: Look to right!
zh: 看右边！

en: Strogg to the right side!
zh: 右边有 Strogg！

en: Strogg up high!
zh: 上面有 Strogg！

en: Look up there!
zh: 看上面！

en: Freak's above us!
zh: 怪胎在我们头顶！

en: It's game time, freak!
zh: 好戏开场了，怪胎！

en: This freak's mine!
zh: 这只怪胎归我！

en: Got a Strogg in my sights!
zh: 一只 Strogg 进我准星了！

en: Die, squib!
zh: 去死吧，杂碎！

en: Stand back, this one's mine!
zh: 都让开，这只是我的！

en: Back it up, Soldier.
zh: 退后点，士兵。

en: You ever heard of the term Personal Space?
zh: 听说过“个人空间”这词儿吗？

en: Move back before you fall back.
zh: 自己退后，别等我把你撂倒。

en: Your special status isn't fooling anyone.
zh: 你那“特殊身份”骗不了任何人。

en: We're all watching. And waitin' for you to slip up.
zh: 我们都盯着呢，就等你露马脚。

en: And when you do slip up, we're gonna come down on you like a ton of lead.
zh: 等你一露馅，我们会像千斤铅锤一样砸到你头上。

en: I'm on my way, Marine!
zh: 我这就过来，坚持住！

en: Remain there. I'll fix you up!
zh: 待在原地，我来给你处理！

en: Corporal Kane, remain there! I'll heal you!
zh: Kane 下士，待在原地！我来治疗你！

en: Wait there, Kane. I'm a medic!
zh: 在那儿等着，Kane。我是医疗兵！

en: Don't move Corporal Kane. I've got a medpack for you!
zh: 别动，Kane 下士，我这儿有医疗包！

en: I'm on my way, Corporal Kane!
zh: 我这就过来，Kane 下士！

en: Here ya go.
zh: 好了，给你。

en: You've gotta stay out of the line of fire, Marine.
zh: 你得离火线远点，士兵。

en: Okay, now don't move.
zh: 好，现在别动。

en: Okay, I'm done. Go frag some squibs.
zh: 好了，处理完了。去多宰几只杂碎吧。

en: That's it. See you around.
zh: 搞定。回头见。

en: I'm done, Marine. Remember to keep low.
zh: 好了，士兵。记得放低身子。

en: That's as much as I can do. Watch yourself, Marine.
zh: 我只能帮你到这儿了。自己当心，士兵。

en: I'm goin' with you, Kane.
zh: 我跟你一起走，Kane。

en: You just found yourself a travelin' buddy. Let's move.
zh: 你现在多了个同行的伙计。走吧。

en: Lucky for you, I'm taggin' along.
zh: 算你走运，我跟你一道。

en: Keep on goin', Kane. I'm holdin' up here.
zh: 你继续走，Kane。我就守在这儿。

en: It was fun, but I'm stopping here. You go on without me.
zh: 一路挺痛快，但我到这儿就止步了。你自己继续吧。

en: {furrow}Why don't we chat later?
zh: {furrow}有话回头再聊行吗？

en: {furrow}Yeah, yeah, very nice. Move along.
zh: {furrow}行行行，挺好。该干嘛干嘛去。

en: {furrow}You're tryin' my patience, Kane.
zh: {furrow}你在磨我的耐性，Kane。

en: {furrow}You sure you wanna keep doin' this?
zh: {furrow}你确定还要这么闹下去？

en: This is insane. I'm findin' cover!
zh: 这也太疯狂了，我得找掩护！

en: I need to get behind something.
zh: 我得找个东西躲躲。

en: This is no time to be in the open.
zh: 这时候可不能傻站在空地上。

en: Everyone get your ass down!
zh: 都他妈趴下！

en: Get yourself some cover!
zh: 都找掩护去！

en: Let's go! I'm advancing!
zh: 上啊！我要推进了！

en: Don't know about you but I'm movin' up!
zh: 不管你们怎样，反正我先上了！

en: Push forward!
zh: 往前压！

en: Squad, advance!
zh: 小队，前进！

en: C'mon, advance. Go go go!
zh: 快，往前推。上上上！

en: I gotta withdraw for now.
zh: 我得先撤一步。

en: I gotta fall back!
zh: 我得后撤！

en: We have to retreat now!
zh: 我们现在必须撤退！

en: Let's go! Withdraw!
zh: 快走！撤！

en: Squad! We got a sniper!
zh: 小队！有狙击手！

en: Sniper! Sniper!
zh: 狙击手！狙击手！

en: Look out! There's a sniper around here!
zh: 当心！这附近有狙击手！

en: A soldier's down!
zh: 有士兵倒下了！

en: Shit! The Strogg got one of us.
zh: 妈的！Strogg 干掉了我们一个。

en: I think I got a piece of you on my boot!
zh: 我靴子上好像还沾着你一块肉呢！

en: Look at you, all messy and dead!
zh: 瞧瞧你这德行，稀巴烂还死翘翘！

en: Damn, you were lame.
zh: 妈的，你可真菜。

en: Yeeeeeah!
You are one sorry ass Strogg.
zh: 你可真是只可悲的 Strogg。

en: Now that's what I call fun.
zh: 这才叫过瘾。

en: You know a Strogg almost fragged your ass?
zh: 知道吗，刚才差点有只 Strogg 送你上西天？

en: Kane, you can thank me for savin' your life later.
zh: Kane，救命之恩，回头再谢也不迟。

en: Don't expect me to save you all the time.
zh: 别指望我每回都救你。

en: I can't get out of here!
zh: 我出不去了！

en: Crap! I'm stuck here!
zh: 靠！我被堵在这儿了！

en: They aren't lettin' me up!
zh: 他们压得我抬不起头！

en: You freaks ain't goin' nowhere!
zh: 你们这帮怪胎哪儿也别想去！

en: Ha! Those squibs are stayin' put!
zh: 哈！那些杂碎被钉死在原地了！

en: Keep it right there!
zh: 都给我待在那儿！

en: Squad, don't let these bastards up!
zh: 小队，别让这帮混蛋抬头！

en: Direct your fire at my target.
zh: 朝我的目标开火。

en: Use suppressing fire on these Strogg!
zh: 对这些 Strogg 火力压制！

en: Damn, that was too close. You saved my life.
zh: 妈的，刚才太悬了。你救了我一命。

en: I was a little sloppy there. Thanks for the assist, Kane.
zh: 刚才我有点大意了。多谢帮忙，Kane。

en: Shit. So now do I gotta save your life?
zh: 妈的，这下轮到我欠你一条命了？

en: Yeah! That's the way to do it!
zh: 好！就该这么干！

en: Hey Kane, are you keepin' score?
zh: 嘿 Kane，你在记战绩吗？

en: Ha, ha, ha! You sure dusted his ass!
zh: 哈哈哈！你可把他轰成渣了！

en: Kane, you've got some potential.
zh: Kane，你小子有点潜力。

en: You're almost as deadly as me!
zh: 你快跟我一样致命了！

en: {furrow}Kane, check your targets, damn it!
zh: {furrow}Kane，看清目标，该死的！

en: {furrow}Don't be mistakin' me for a Strogg!
zh: {furrow}别把我当成 Strogg！

en: {furrow}Watch where you're pointin' that weapon!
zh: {furrow}看清你的枪口冲着哪儿！

en: {furrow}Who the hell are you shootin' at?
zh: {furrow}你他妈到底在朝谁开枪？

en: {furrow}Crap! You tryin' to frag me?
zh: {furrow}靠！你想干掉我吗？

en: {furrow}Kane, now's not the time to be turnin' Strogg.
zh: {furrow}Kane，现在可不是变成 Strogg 的时候。

en: {furrow}You sure you're still a Marine?
zh: {furrow}你确定自己还是个陆战队员？

en: {furrow}If I didn't know better I'd think you were a Strogg.
zh: {furrow}要不是了解你，我真以为你是 Strogg 了。

en: {furrow}What in hell are you thinkin'? You fragged a Marine!
zh: {furrow}你到底在想什么？你干掉了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Watch who you're killin'!
zh: {furrow}看清楚你杀的是谁！

en: {furrow}Kane, you just iced one of us!
zh: {furrow}Kane，你刚做掉了我们自己人！

en: {furrow}Did you mean to kill that soldier?
zh: {furrow}你是故意杀那个士兵的吗？

en: {furrow}You fragged a Marine! Have the Strogg finally got to you?
zh: {furrow}你干掉了一个陆战队员！Strogg 终于把你腐蚀了吗？

en: {furrow}Tell me you iced that Marine by mistake.
zh: {furrow}告诉我，你是失手打死那队员的。

en: Gimme some light.
zh: 来点光。

en: Watch where you're pointin' that light!
zh: 看着点，你那灯往哪儿照呢！

en: Dammit, that hurts!
zh: 该死，疼死了！

en: We got squibs up ahead.
zh: 前面有杂碎。

en: Keep on your toes. I just spotted a Strogg.
zh: 都精神点，我刚发现一只 Strogg。

en: Hey! Behind you!
zh: 嘿！你身后！

en: Strogg to the back!
zh: 后面有 Strogg！

en: We got freaks to the left!
zh: 左边有怪胎！

en: Look left! Look left!!
zh: 看左边！看左边！！

en: On the right side!
zh: 在右边！

en: The squibs are overhead!
zh: 杂碎在头顶上！

en: You ain't gonna like this, squib.
zh: 你不会喜欢接下来这出的，杂碎。

en: Show me what you got, freak!
zh: 有什么本事使出来，怪胎！

en: Come on! It's go time!
zh: 来吧！开干！

en: You picked the wrong Marine to screw with.
zh: 你惹错陆战队员了。

en: Back up a step or two!
zh: 退后一两步！

en: Give me some room.
zh: 给我腾点地方。

en: That's some nice lookin' Strogg gear you got.
zh: 你这身 Strogg 行头还挺帅啊。

en: I bet the doctors'll be able to get you back to normal in no time.
zh: 我打赌军医很快就能把你修回原样。

en: All those Strogg implants must itch like hell.
zh: 那一身 Strogg 植入体肯定痒得要命吧。

en: I'm headin' out with you. You're on point.
zh: 我跟你一起行动，你打头阵。

en: I'm goin' too, partner. Let's move.
zh: 我也去，搭档。走吧。

en: Kane, we're travlin' together. You lead, I'll follow.
zh: Kane，咱们同行。你带路，我跟着。

en: Sorry, Kane but I'm stopping here.
zh: 抱歉，Kane，我到这儿就不走了。

en: Go on without me. I'm stayin' put.
zh: 你自己走吧，我就待在这儿。

en: Later, partner. I gotta stop here.
zh: 回见，搭档。我得留在这儿了。

en: {furrow}I'm a little tied up right now.
zh: {furrow}我这会儿有点脱不开身。

en: {furrow}Why don't you go bother someone else?
zh: {furrow}你去烦别人行不行？

en: {furrow}Don't be tryin' to piss me off, Kane.
zh: {furrow}别来惹毛我，Kane。

en: {furrow}You're about to get the business end of the bull.
zh: {furrow}再闹下去，就让你尝尝犀牛角的厉害。

en: It's too hot out here! I'm takin' cover!
zh: 外面火力太猛了！我先找掩护！

en: I'm gettin' behind something solid.
zh: 我去找个结实的东西挡着。

en: Time to push forward.
zh: 该往前推了。

en: Hey! I'm movin' ahead!
zh: 嘿！我要往前上了！

en: Everyone, attack!
zh: 所有人，进攻！

en: Let's haul ass forward!
zh: 都给我往前冲！

en: I have to fall back.
zh: 我得后撤。

en: I've gotta retreat for now!
zh: 我得先撤了！

en: 'I'll be right back.
zh: 我去去就回。

en: Everyone, retreat immediately!
zh: 所有人，立刻撤退！

en: Let's fall back!
zh: 我们后撤！

en: The Strogg are too strong! Withdraw!
zh: Strogg 太强了！撤！

en: Shit, fire! We got a sniper!
zh: 妈的！有狙击手！

en: Watch your ass, there's a sniper!
zh: 都当心点，有狙击手！

en: Keep outta sight! We got a sniper!
zh: 别露头！有狙击手！

en: They got one of us!
zh: 我们有人中招了！

en: There's a man down here!
zh: 这边有人倒下了！

en: Ha! You ain't so big and tough now!
zh: 哈！现在牛不起来了吧！

en: Shit, you're kinda dead.
zh: 妈的，你这算是死透了。

en: Not so scary now, are ya, freak?
zh: 现在不吓人了吧，怪胎？

en: Oooooorah!
Wanna get up and try again?
zh: 想爬起来再试一次吗？

en: Hope you enjoy hell, squib.
zh: 祝你在地狱玩得开心，杂碎。

en: A Strogg had you in his sights, but I took care of him.
zh: 有只 Strogg 拿枪瞄着你呢，被我解决了。

en: Buddy, I just saved your life, but think nothin' of it.
zh: 伙计，我刚救了你一命——小事，别放心上。

en: Watch your back. Cause I'm not always gonna be here to protect ya.
zh: 看好自己背后。我可不会一直在旁边护着你。

en: Shit! These bastards won't let me up!
zh: 妈的！这帮混蛋压得我抬不起头！

en: This oughta hold 'em down!
zh: 这下够压住他们了！

en: Stay right where you are, freaks!
zh: 都给我待在原地，怪胎们！

en: I'm not lettin' 'em up!
zh: 我不会让他们抬头的！

en: Give me suppressing fire on these squibs!
zh: 朝这些杂碎火力压制！

en: Don't let up on these Strogg!
zh: 别给这些 Strogg 喘气的机会！

en: Team! Fire on my target!
zh: 全队！朝我的目标开火！

en: Thanks, partner. I owe you one.
zh: 谢了，搭档。算我欠你一个人情。

en: Thanks for the help.
zh: 多谢帮忙。

en: Damn, Kane. You just saved my life.
zh: 好家伙，Kane，你刚救了我一命。

en: Ha! Give 'em hell!
zh: 哈！狠狠收拾他们！

en: Ooo, that was sweet!
zh: 哦，这下真漂亮！

en: You're pretty handy with that weapon, Kane!
zh: 你这枪使得真顺手啊，Kane！

en: Damn, you're good!
zh: 妈呀，你真有两下子！

en: That's it! Show no mercy!
zh: 就这样！别留情！

en: {furrow}Where the hell are you aimin'?
zh: {furrow}你到底在瞄哪儿呢？

en: {furrow}Stop shootin' at me!
zh: {furrow}别朝我开枪！

en: {furrow}Watch your target!
zh: {furrow}看清目标！

en: {furrow}Hey! I'm on your side.
zh: {furrow}嘿！我是自己人。

en: {furrow}Kane, you better not be thinkin' about goin' Strogg!
zh: {furrow}Kane，你最好别动变成 Strogg 的念头！

en: {furrow}Stay with us, Kane. Don't become a Strogg.
zh: {furrow}挺住，Kane，别变成 Strogg。

en: {furrow}Is some of that Strogg AI kickin' in?
zh: {furrow}是不是你体内那套 Strogg 程序开始作怪了？

en: {furrow}Kane, you just killed one of our own.
zh: {furrow}Kane，你刚杀了我们自己人。

en: {furrow}What do you think you're doin'?
zh: {furrow}你以为你在干什么？

en: {furrow}Watch the friendly fire, Kane.
zh: {furrow}当心误伤自己人，Kane。

en: {furrow}Have the Strogg taken you over? You just iced a Marine!
zh: {furrow}你被 Strogg 控制了吗？你刚做掉了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}You killed a soldier! Are those Strogg circuits kickin' in?
zh: {furrow}你杀了一名士兵！是你那身 Strogg 电路开始运转了吗？

en: {furrow}Dammit, Kane! Now's no time to become a Strogg!
zh: {furrow}该死，Kane！现在可不是变 Strogg 的时候！

en: This situation needs some light.
zh: 这情况得来点光。

en: It's a little too dark in here.
zh: 这里面有点太黑了。

en: What are you tryin' to do? Blind me?
zh: 你想干嘛？闪瞎我吗？

en: Get your damn light outta my face.
zh: 把你那破灯从我脸上挪开。

en: The enemy's close.
zh: 敌人很近了。

en: Keep your eyes wide, they're nearby.
zh: 眼睛睁大点，他们就在附近。

en: Hostiles in the back!
zh: 后方有敌人！

en: They're flankin' left!
zh: 他们在从左翼包抄！

en: Squibs to the left!
zh: 左边有杂碎！

en: Hostiles to the right!
zh: 右边有敌人！

en: Look right! Look right!!
zh: 看右边！看右边！！

en: Movement up above!
zh: 上面有动静！

en: Let's see what you're made of, freak!
zh: 让我看看你有几斤几两，怪胎！

en: I'm gonna paint the floors with you!
zh: 我要用你的血把地板刷一遍！

en: You picked the wrong bull to tangle with.
zh: 想顶牛？你惹错犀牛了。

en: This one's all mine!
zh: 这只全归我！

en: What's up, Kane?
zh: 怎么了，Kane？

en: You're a little too close for comfort, partner.
zh: 你凑得有点太近了，搭档。

en: Back it up, right now.
zh: 退后，马上。

en: Maybe all those Strogg modifications made you forget about common courtesy.
zh: 也许那一身 Strogg 改造让你把基本礼貌都忘光了。

en: I don't care how valuable you are to HQ, you're in my space.
zh: 我不管你对指挥部多金贵，你挤到我的地盘了。

en: Don't Strogg need a little breathin' room? Cause humans do.
zh: Strogg 就不需要点喘气的空间吗？反正人类需要。

en: Kane, we will be traveling together.
zh: Kane，我们要结伴同行。

en: I am to accompany you. Let us go.
zh: 我奉命随你同行。我们走。

en: Lead the way and I will follow, Kane.
zh: 你带路，我跟上，Kane。

en: Now I must stop, Kane. But you are to continue without me.
zh: 我得在这里停下了，Kane。你要继续前进，别管我。

en: You must keep going, but I have to stop here.
zh: 你必须继续走，我得留在这里。

en: Please, continue on alone. This is where I must stop.
zh: 请你独自前进吧，我只能送到这里。

en: {furrow}I am preoccupied at the moment.
zh: {furrow}我现在腾不出手来。

en: {furrow}Perhaps you should find someone else to bother.
zh: {furrow}也许你该去烦别的人。

en: {furrow}This is a very foolish thing to do.
zh: {furrow}你这么做非常愚蠢。

en: {furrow}I am warning you to go away.
zh: {furrow}我警告你，走开。

en: This is quite unsafe. I must find protection.
zh: 这里太危险了，我必须找掩护。

en: It is far too dangerous to be in the open.
zh: 待在空地上实在太危险了。

en: You must get to cover!
zh: 你必须进掩体！

en: Get to safety!
zh: 快到安全的地方去！

en: I will advance on the enemy!
zh: 我要向敌人推进了！

en: I am proceeding forward!
zh: 我正在向前推进！

en: Now I will move ahead!
zh: 现在我要上前了！

en: We must move forward!
zh: 我们必须前进！

en: Advance and destroy them!
zh: 前进，消灭他们！

en: Marines! Attack!
zh: 陆战队员们！进攻！

en: Now I must retreat.
zh: 现在我必须撤退。

en: I am afraid I must fall back!
zh: 恐怕我必须后撤了！

en: We must draw back for now.
zh: 我们必须暂时后撤。

en: Marines, fall back!
zh: 陆战队员们，后撤！

en: There's a sniper in the area!
zh: 这一带有狙击手！

en: Keep low! There's a sniper here!
zh: 放低身子！这里有狙击手！

en: We just lost a soldier!
zh: 我们刚失去了一名士兵！

en: There's been a casualty!
zh: 有人伤亡了！

en: We have a Marine down!
zh: 有陆战队员倒下了！

en: Ha! You were weak like a kitten!
zh: 哈！你弱得跟小猫崽似的！

en: Is that the best you could do?
zh: 你就这点能耐吗？

en: Show me another Strogg to kill.
zh: 再给我一只 Strogg 来杀。

en: Ha! Ha! Haaaaaa!
Humph, pathetic Strogg.
zh: 哼，可悲的 Strogg。

en: Well, that wasn't so bad.
zh: 嗯，还算过得去。

en: Did you not see the Strogg that was going to kill you?
zh: 你没看见那只差点杀了你的 Strogg 吗？

en: A Strogg was about to kill you Kane. But I killed him first.
zh: 有只 Strogg 差点要了你的命，Kane。不过我先干掉了他。

en: You can thank me later for saving your life.
zh: 救命之恩，你可以以后再谢。

en: A little help would be nice! I'm trapped!
zh: 来人搭把手！我被困住了！

en: Damn! I cannot get out of here!
zh: 该死！我出不去了！

en: I won't let them up!
zh: 我不会让他们抬头！

en: Concentrate your fire on these Strogg.
zh: 集中火力打这些 Strogg。

en: We must use suppressing fire!
zh: 我们必须火力压制！

en: Thank you, Kane.
zh: 谢谢你，Kane。

en: Thank you for helping me.
zh: 谢谢你帮我。

en: Thank you for saving my life, Kane.
zh: 谢谢你救了我的命，Kane。

en: Well done, my friend!
zh: 干得好，我的朋友！

en: Ah! That was very good!
zh: 啊！打得非常漂亮！

en: Ha ha! He won't be getting up from that!
zh: 哈哈！挨了这下他可爬不起来了！

en: You kicked his ass good!
zh: 你把他收拾得够狠！

en: Congratulations on yet another kill.
zh: 恭喜你又添一个战果。

en: {furrow}You must check your targets!
zh: {furrow}你必须看清目标！

en: {furrow}What in hell are you doing?
zh: {furrow}你到底在干什么？

en: {furrow}Kane, I am on your side.
zh: {furrow}Kane，我是你这边的。

en: {furrow}Stop shooting at me!
zh: {furrow}别朝我开枪！

en: {furrow}Shoot the Strogg, not me.
zh: {furrow}打 Strogg，别打我。

en: {furrow}Are you no longer human, Kane?
zh: {furrow}Kane，你已经不是人类了吗？

en: {furrow}You are beginning to shoot like a Strogg!
zh: {furrow}你开枪的样子越来越像 Strogg 了！

en: {furrow}You're beginning to make me think you're a Strogg, Kane.
zh: {furrow}Kane，你快让我觉得你就是个 Strogg 了。

en: {furrow}Stop it! You just killed one of us!
zh: {furrow}住手！你刚杀了我们自己人！

en: {furrow}Have you lost your mind?
zh: {furrow}你疯了吗？

en: {furrow}Damn you! You have killed a human!
zh: {furrow}该死的！你杀了一个人类！

en: {furrow}Are you a Strogg? You killed a Marine!
zh: {furrow}你是 Strogg 吗？你杀了陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Have you lost your humanity, Kane?
zh: {furrow}Kane，你的人性丢光了吗？

en: Let's brighten this up.
zh: 来点亮光吧。

en: I don't like this darkness.
zh: 我不喜欢这片黑暗。

en: Keep your light out of my eyes!
zh: 别拿灯照我的眼睛！

en: I just saw Strogg ahead of us.
zh: 我刚看见前方有 Strogg。

en: Be on guard. Strogg are in the vicinity.
zh: 保持警惕，附近有 Strogg。

en: We have movement on the left!
zh: 左边有动静！

en: Strogg on the right!
zh: 右边有 Strogg！

en: Look to the right!
zh: 看右边！

en: Strogg are above us.
zh: Strogg 在我们上方。

en: I have my next target.
zh: 我找到下一个目标了。

en: Ah good! Another Strogg to kill!
zh: 啊，好！又有 Strogg 可杀了！

en: You Strogg don't know when to quit.
zh: 你们这些 Strogg 就是不知道什么叫收手。

en: Come meet your death, Strogg!
zh: 来送死吧，Strogg！

en: Kane, you are crowding me.
zh: Kane，你挤到我了。

en: Why do you do this?
zh: 你为什么要这样？

en: Are those Strogg implants bothering you, Kane?
zh: 那些 Strogg 植入体让你难受了吗，Kane？

en: If you did feel the Strogg were trying to control you you would warn us, right?
zh: 如果你觉察到 Strogg 想控制你，你会提醒我们的，对吧？

en: If you warned us in time we could perhaps save you.
zh: 只要你及时提醒，我们或许还能救你。

en: Guvno!
zh: Guvno！

en: aargh
zh: 呃啊——

en: I have been instructed to accompany you Corporal Kane. So lead the way.
zh: 我接到指令与你同行，Kane 下士。带路吧。

en: I must travel with you. But you may go first.
zh: 我必须与你同行。不过你先请。

en: Corporal Kane, we are to travel together, but you are to take point.
zh: Kane 下士，我们要一起行动，但由你打头阵。

en: I will stay at this location. You must continue without me.
zh: 我会留在这个位置。你必须独自继续前进。

en: I have orders to remain here - but you have keep going.
zh: 我奉命留守此地——但你得继续前进。

en: Continue on alone. I must remain here.
zh: 你独自前进吧，我必须留在这里。

en: {furrow}I'm quite busy right now.
zh: {furrow}我现在很忙。

en: {furrow}I have no time to chat.
zh: {furrow}我没时间闲聊。

en: {furrow}Do you not understand me?
zh: {furrow}你听不懂我的话吗？

en: {furrow}Go away! You are annoying me!
zh: {furrow}走开！你惹恼我了！

en: I must find cover immediately!
zh: 我必须立刻找到掩护！

en: I could get killed. I must hide!
zh: 我会没命的，我得躲起来！

en: I must find protection right now!
zh: 我现在就得找人保护！

en: Squad, protect me!
zh: 小队，保护我！

en: Everyone, take cover!
zh: 所有人，找掩护！

en: We must all find protection!
zh: 我们都得找地方躲起来！

en: I will advance!
zh: 我要推进了！

en: I will move ahead!
zh: 我这就上前！

en: Marines, move forward!
zh: 陆战队员们，前进！

en: We must advance now!
zh: 我们现在必须推进！

en: Advance on the Strogg!
zh: 向 Strogg 推进！

en: I must retreat and find safety.
zh: 我必须撤退，找个安全的地方。

en: I have to fall back for my own protection!
zh: 为了自身安全，我必须后撤！

en: I have to retreat or I could die!
zh: 我必须撤退，不然会没命的！

en: Retreat! And protect me!
zh: 撤退！顺便保护我！

en: Guard me and I'll fall back!
zh: 掩护我，我要后撤了！

en: We must all withdraw or we will perish!
zh: 我们必须全体撤离，否则都得完蛋！

en: I need protection from the sniper!
zh: 谁来帮我挡住那个狙击手！

en: Help! A sniper is trying to kill me!
zh: 救命！有狙击手想杀我！

en: Save me from the sniper!
zh: 快把我从狙击手枪口下救出去！

en: There is a man down!
zh: 有人倒下了！

en: Ah! I just saw a soldier die!
zh: 啊！我刚亲眼看见一名士兵死掉！

en: A Marine's been killed.
zh: 有个陆战队员阵亡了。

en: You were no challenge for me!
zh: 你对我毫无挑战性！

en: The Strogg are so predictable!
zh: Strogg 的套路也太好猜了！

en: I am getting quite good at this.
zh: 我这手艺是越来越精了。

en: I could grow to like this.
zh: 我说不定会爱上这活儿。

en: This is most invigorating.
zh: 这可真是提神醒脑。

en: I saved your life, and you didn't even see it.
zh: 我救了你一命，你居然都没瞧见。

en: A Strogg would have killed you, if I hadn't killed him first.
zh: 要不是我先下手，那只 Strogg 早把你干掉了。

en: You really must learn to watch your back, Corporal Kane.
zh: 你真得学学怎么提防背后了，Kane 下士。

en: Ahh! They are trying to kill me!
zh: 啊！他们想杀我！

en: Help! These Strogg want to murder me!
zh: 救命！这些 Strogg 要谋杀我！

en: Save me! I cannot move from this position!
zh: 救救我！我在这儿动弹不得！

en: How well do they handle suppressing fire?
zh: 不知他们承受火力压制的能力如何？

en: I will keep them right where they are.
zh: 我会把他们钉在原地。

en: Trust me, they will not move from that spot!
zh: 相信我，他们绝对挪不了窝！

en: I suppose I should thank you.
zh: 看来我该谢谢你。

en: If you hadn't killed that Strogg, I would have.
zh: 你不杀那只 Strogg，我也会动手的。

en: A 'thank you' is expected, I imagine.
zh: 我猜，你在等一句“谢谢”吧。

en: Humph, that was a pretty good shot.
zh: 哼，这枪打得还算不错。

en: He looks quite dead.
zh: 他看起来死得很彻底。

en: That was okay.
zh: 还凑合。

en: Good shot.
zh: 好枪法。

en: {furrow}Don't shoot at me as if I were a Strogg.
zh: {furrow}别把我当 Strogg 一样打。

en: {furrow}Don't pull that trigger when I'm in your sight.
zh: {furrow}我在你准星里的时候，别扣扳机。

en: {furrow}Make sure you are shooting at a Strogg!
zh: {furrow}开枪前先确认你打的是 Strogg！

en: {furrow}What are you trying to prove?
zh: {furrow}你想证明什么？

en: {furrow}Don't you know who to shoot at?
zh: {furrow}你连该朝谁开枪都不知道吗？

en: {furrow}You shot at me by mistake right?
zh: {furrow}你是失手才打到我的，对吧？

en: {furrow}Corporal Kane, are you under Strogg influence?
zh: {furrow}Kane 下士，你是不是被 Strogg 影响了？

en: {furrow}Have you become an active Strogg?
zh: {furrow}你已经变成真正的 Strogg 了吗？

en: {furrow}You imbecile - you killed a Marine!
zh: {furrow}你这蠢货——你杀了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Fool! Have you lost your mind?
zh: {furrow}蠢货！你疯了吗？

en: {furrow}Corporal, you killed a Marine!
zh: {furrow}下士，你杀了一个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}You are firing on teammates! Do the Strogg control you?
zh: {furrow}你在朝队友开火！是 Strogg 在控制你吗？

en: {furrow}Are you a Strogg spy, Corporal Kane?
zh: {furrow}你是 Strogg 的奸细吗，Kane 下士？

en: I want lights now!
zh: 立刻给我照明！

en: Turn your lights on immediately!
zh: 马上把灯打开！

en: Idiot. Get that light out of my eyes!
zh: 蠢货，把灯从我眼前拿开！

en: Stop that!
zh: 住手！

en: I believe there are Strogg in front of us.
zh: 我认为前方有 Strogg。

en: Stay near me. The enemy is close by.
zh: 待在我身边，敌人就在附近。

en: There are Strogg at your back!
zh: 你背后有 Strogg！

en: To the left side!
zh: 在左边！

en: They are flanking right!
zh: 他们在从右翼包抄！

en: Look to your right!
zh: 看你的右边！

en: Strogg are positioned above us!
zh: Strogg 占据了我们上方的位置！

en: You will be no challenge for me.
zh: 你对我构不成任何挑战。

en: I will defeat you!
zh: 我会打败你的！

en: I am not frightened of you, Strogg.
zh: 我可不怕你，Strogg。

en: Strogg, you are pitiful!
zh: Strogg，你真可怜！

en: Ja?
zh: Ja？

en: Do not get so close.
zh: 别靠这么近。

en: Please, keep back from me.
zh: 麻烦你，离我远一点。

en: Corporal Kane, you aren't by chance, feeling influence from the Strogg?
zh: Kane 下士，你该不会正感觉到 Strogg 的影响吧？

en: I realize the Strogg would never kill a human like me. My brain would be worth a great deal to them.
zh: 我明白，Strogg 绝不会杀我这样的人类。我这颗大脑对他们来说可值钱了。

en: The Strogg do know everything you know correct? So they do know I am a genius, ya?
zh: 你知道的一切 Strogg 都知道，对吧？那他们自然也知道我是个天才，ja？

en: That hurt!
zh: 好疼！

en: Remain where you are. I can repair your armor.
zh: 待在原地别动，我可以修理你的护甲。

en: Dont move. I will fix your armor.
zh: 别动，我来修你的护甲。

en: Stay where you are, Corporal Kane. I'll repair your armor.
zh: 待在原地，Kane 下士，我来修理你的护甲。

en: Corporal Kane, wait for me. I can fix your armor.
zh: Kane 下士，等等我，我能修好你的护甲。

en: I'm on my way to repair your armor, Corporal Kane.
zh: 我这就过来给你修护甲，Kane 下士。

en: I cannot work if you move around.
zh: 你动来动去我没法干活。

en: Be still. You are making my work difficult.
zh: 别乱动，你这是在给我添麻烦。

en: You must hold still.
zh: 你必须保持不动。

en: Go. My repairs are complete.
zh: 走吧，修理完毕。

en: I have finished my work. Be on your way.
zh: 我的活儿干完了，你上路吧。

en: That is all I can do. Go now.
zh: 我只能做到这一步了，走吧。

en: Corporal, I'm with you. So let's move out.
zh: 下士，我跟你一起行动。出发吧。

en: Take point, Kane. We're movin' out together.
zh: 你打头阵，Kane。我们一起出发。

en: I have to stop here but you keep going.
zh: 我得留在这儿，你继续前进。

en: Corporal, this where we split up.
zh: 下士，我们在这儿分头行动。

en: You go on, Corporal. I'm stayin' here.
zh: 你继续走，下士。我留在这儿。

en: {furrow}Corporal, this isn't the time.
zh: {furrow}下士，现在不是时候。

en: {furrow}Corporal, not right now.
zh: {furrow}下士，现在不行。

en: {furrow}Don't make me pull rank.
zh: {furrow}别逼我拿军衔压你。

en: {furrow}You don't wanna know what happens if pulling rank doesn't work.
zh: {furrow}军衔要是压不住你，接下来的事你可不会想知道。

en: I'm taking cover!
zh: 我先找掩护！

en: I'm keepin' low.
zh: 我保持低姿。

en: I'm staying down.
zh: 我先趴着不动。

en: Everyone, down!
zh: 所有人，卧倒！

en: I'm advancing on the Strogg!
zh: 我要向 Strogg 推进了！

en: I'm moving up on their position!
zh: 我正向他们的阵地逼近！

en: Let's take the fight to them!
zh: 把战火烧到他们头上！

en: Marines! Advance!
zh: 陆战队员们！前进！

en: Overrun their position!
zh: 碾平他们的阵地！

en: I have to withdraw.
zh: 我必须后撤。

en: I've gotta fall back and reload!
zh: 我得后撤装弹！

en: Squad, retreat!
zh: 小队，撤退！

en: Withdraw now!
zh: 立刻撤离！

en: Keep low! There's a sniper in the area!
zh: 放低身子！这一带有狙击手！

en: Dammit! We just lost a Marine!
zh: 该死！我们又折了一个陆战队员！

en: There's a casualty over here!
zh: 这边有人伤亡！

en: We have a man down!
zh: 有人倒下了！

en: Was that the best you could do, Strogg?
zh: 就这点本事吗，Strogg？

en: No wonder you squibs couldn't take the Earth.
zh: 难怪你们这帮杂碎拿不下地球。

en: You lose, Strogg.
zh: 你输了，Strogg。

en: I bet that hurt.
zh: 这下肯定很疼。

en: And I was just getting' warmed up.
zh: 我这才刚热完身呢。

en: Any other Strogg around here?
zh: 附近还有别的 Strogg 吗？

en: I took care of the Strogg behind you.
zh: 你身后那只 Strogg，我解决了。

en: That Strogg would have killed you, if I hadn't stepped in.
zh: 我要是不出手，那只 Strogg 已经要了你的命。

en: Be sure to watch your back. That Strogg almost got you.
zh: 务必留意背后。刚才那只 Strogg 差点得手。

en: Gimme a hand! They've got me trapped!
zh: 搭把手！我被他们困住了！

en: The Strogg won't let me move!
zh: Strogg 压得我动弹不得！

en: How about a little suppressing fire?
zh: 来点火力压制怎么样？

en: They're stayin' right wehere they are!
zh: 他们被钉在原地了！

en: Light 'em up Marines!
zh: 火力全开，陆战队员们！

en: Marines, give me additional firepower now!
zh: 陆战队员们，立刻给我加强火力！

en: Thanks for saving my skin, Corporal.
zh: 多谢你救了我一命，下士。

en: Good job. That Strogg would have killed me.
zh: 干得好。再晚一步，那 Strogg 就要了我的命。

en: Don't think you're getting a promotion just for saving my life, Corporal.
zh: 别以为救了我一命就能升职，下士。

en: Well done, Corporal!
zh: 干得好，下士！

en: You shoot as well as the rest of Rhino squad.
zh: 你这枪法，不输犀牛小队的任何人。

en: All right! Nice shot.
zh: 好样的！打得漂亮。

en: Pretty impressive shot, Corporal.
zh: 这一枪相当漂亮，下士。

en: {furrow}Check your fire, Marine!
zh: {furrow}看清目标再开枪，陆战队员！

en: {furrow}I'm on your side, Corporal!
zh: {furrow}我是自己人，下士！

en: {furrow}Calm down, Marine.
zh: {furrow}冷静点，陆战队员。

en: {furrow}Be sure you're shooting the Strogg.
zh: {furrow}看准了，要打的是 Strogg。

en: {furrow}Are you turning Strogg, Corporal?
zh: {furrow}你这是要变成 Strogg 吗，下士？

en: {furrow}Corporal, are you becoming a Strogg?
zh: {furrow}下士，你是不是快变成 Strogg 了？

en: {furrow}Have the Strogg taken control of you?
zh: {furrow}你是被 Strogg 控制了吗？

en: {furrow}What the hell are you doin? You killed one of our own!
zh: {furrow}你他妈在干什么？你杀的是自己人！

en: {furrow}Do you realize you iced a human?
zh: {furrow}你知不知道你干掉的是个人类？

en: {furrow}Damn it! That was a Marine you just killed!
zh: {furrow}该死！你刚打死的是个陆战队员！

en: {furrow}Corporal, exactly who's side are you on?
zh: {furrow}下士，你到底站在哪一边？

en: {furrow}Watch it. I've got my eye on you, Corporal.
zh: {furrow}小心点。我盯上你了，下士。

en: {furrow}Are the Strogg influencing you?
zh: {furrow}你是不是受 Strogg 影响了？

en: Hey, put the light down.
zh: 嘿，把手电放下。

en: Watch where you're pointin' that light.
zh: 看着点，你那手电往哪儿照呢。

en: Good news. We got Strogg ahead.
zh: 好消息。前头有 Strogg。

en: The enemy's just in front of us.
zh: 敌人就在我们正前方。

en: Movement to the right!
zh: 右侧有动静！

en: There's Strogg up high!
zh: 高处有 Strogg！

en: I got this one.
zh: 这个交给我。

en: Watch and learn Marines.
zh: 看好了，学着点，陆战队员们。

en: C'mon, Strogg. Do your worst.
zh: 来啊，Strogg。有什么本事尽管使出来。

en: Just you and me, Strogg.
zh: 就你和我了，Strogg。

en: What did you want, Corporal?
zh: 找我什么事，下士？

en: I really don't have time for this.
zh: 我真没工夫管这个。

en: I said I don't have time for this.
zh: 我说了，我没工夫管这个。

en: Corporal, you're important to HQ, so why don't you give us a little distance?
zh: 下士，总部拿你当个宝，你就离我们稍微远点，成吗？

en: Strogg or human, you don't want to get on my bad side.
zh: 不管你是 Strogg 还是人类，最好都别惹到我头上。

en: Corporal, maybe you don't understand you're pissing off your Lieutenant.
zh: 下士，你大概还没意识到，你已经把你的中尉惹毛了。

en: aaaaargh
zh: 啊啊啊——！

en: Sorry we have orders to stay here. And you have orders to find your squad.
zh: 抱歉，我们奉命守在这里。而你的命令，是去找你的小队。

en: You better get movin if you want to find your squad.
zh: 想找到你的小队，就赶紧动身吧。

en: We cant go with you. Were under orders to help secure this area.
zh: 我们不能跟你走。我们奉命协助防守这片区域。

en: If I was you, I'd be lookin for my squad.
zh: 我要是你，这会儿早去找自己的小队了。

en: {puzzled}You're Rhino squad? {idle}Take that door and it'll get you to your squad.
zh: {puzzled}你是犀牛小队的？{idle}走那扇门，就能找到你的小队。

en: Make it quick. We dont want to be stuck in one place too long.
zh: 动作快点。我们可不想在一个地方耗太久。

en: Thats up to my gunner. All Im doin is drivin. Ready? Cause here we go, Kane.
zh: 那得看我的炮手了，我只管开车。准备好了吗？咱们这就出发，Kane。

en: Shit. Hang on!
zh: 妈的。坐稳了！

en: Behind us!
zh: 在我们后面！

en: Damn it! Theyre everywhere!
zh: 该死！它们到处都是！

en: You still out there?
zh: 你还在外头吧？

en: I cant see a thing!
zh: 我什么都看不见！

en: This is insane!
zh: 这简直是疯了！

en: Howd I manage to get this mission!
zh: 我怎么就摊上了这趟任务！

en: Hang on Kane.  Theres one more batch of turrets to take out.
zh: 坚持住，Kane。还有一批炮塔要清掉。

en: Rhodes! Get up here pronto and disarm these land mines.
zh: Rhodes！马上上来，把这些地雷拆掉。

en: On my way!
zh: 这就来！

en: Kane, be sure to protect Rhodes! He's the only one who can disarm those mines.
zh: Kane，一定保护好 Rhodes！只有他能拆掉那些地雷。

en: Don't sweat it. Kane won't let me die . . . right, ol buddy?
zh: 别担心。Kane 不会让我死的……对吧，老伙计？

en: First ones deactivated.
zh: 第一颗解除了。

en: Okay. On to the next.
zh: 好。去下一颗。

en: This'd go faster if I wasn't bein shot at!
zh: 要不是有人一直朝我开枪，我能拆得更快！

en: Got this one.
zh: 这颗搞定。

en: Another's done.
zh: 又拆好一颗。

en: Got em all. Now lets get the hell out of here!
zh: 全拆完了。咱们赶紧离开这鬼地方！

en: Hey, Kane. Thanks for keepin me in one piece. I owe ya.
zh: 嘿，Kane。多谢你保我毫发无损。这份情我记下了。

en: H Q, this is Pestilence. A Strogg patrol just went by us.
zh: 总部，这里是瘟疫车队。一支 Strogg 巡逻队刚从我们旁边过去。

en: Were you spotted?
zh: 你们暴露了吗？

en: I dont think so. We should be fine.
zh: 应该没有。我们没事。

en: H Q, this Famine. I think a flier might have seen us.
zh: 总部，这里是饥荒车队。恐怕有架飞行器发现了我们。

en: If you feel your mission has been compromised, you may return to base.
zh: 如果你们判断任务已经暴露，可以返回基地。

en: Negative, H Q. Were fine. And were going to continue on.
zh: 不必，总部。我们没事，将继续前进。

en: H Q, War is now underway.
zh: 总部，战争车队已经上路。

en: Good luck to you, War.
zh: 祝你们好运，战争车队。

en: Death, this is H Q. You are now the last convoy. Do you understand the gravity of this situation?
zh: 死亡车队，这里是总部。你们现在是最后一支车队了。明白事态有多严重吗？

en: Yes H Q we can fully appreciate our importance to the war effort.
zh: 明白，总部，我们完全清楚自己对整个战局有多重要。

en: Do you believe you will achieve your goal?
zh: 你们有把握完成目标吗？

en: I wouldnt be out here if I didn’t.
zh: 没把握我就不会出这趟任务了。

en: Kane, this is Morris. Where the hell are you? Hook up with us as soon as you can. Morris, out.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。你到底在哪儿？尽快跟我们会合。Morris，完毕。

en: H Q, this is Death. Weve had to stop. A squad of Strogg are guarding the road ahead of us.
zh: 总部，这里是死亡车队。我们被迫停下了。前方道路有一队 Strogg 把守。

en: What are your plans?
zh: 你们打算怎么办？

en: Well see if we cant wait em out. Otherwise well just have to go in with guns blazing.
zh: 先看看能不能耗到它们走。不行的话，就只能开足火力硬闯了。

en: Hey, Kane. Too bad you werent here with us waiting on this Strogg squad to move. You could walk over to em and see what the hell theyre waitin for.
zh: 嘿，Kane。可惜你没跟我们一起干等这队 Strogg 挪窝。不然你可以走过去问问，它们到底在磨蹭什么。

en: Death, this is H Q. Ive been instructed to order you back to base.
zh: 死亡车队，这里是总部。上面指示我命令你们返回基地。

en: Negative, H Q. We cannot comply. From our current position, we would be spotted if we move in any direction.
zh: 办不到，总部。无法执行。以我们现在的位置，往任何方向动都会暴露。

en: Roger that, Death.
zh: 收到，死亡车队。

en: Good news, H Q. The Strogg squad looks to be gathering up its gear and moving on.
zh: 好消息，总部。那队 Strogg 看样子在收拾装备，准备开拔了。

en: What are your intentions, Death?
zh: 你们有什么打算，死亡车队？

en: If its all the same to you, wed like to continue on our mission.
zh: 要是总部没意见，我们想继续执行任务。

en: Affirmative, Death. Keep us apprised of your situation.
zh: 同意，死亡车队。随时报告你们的情况。

en: Death, whats your status?
zh: 死亡车队，报告状态。

en: The going is slow. Theres a lot of Strogg patrols out. But so far, were doing fine.
zh: 走得很慢。外面到处是 Strogg 巡逻队。不过到目前为止，我们还行。

en: Hey, Kane. Stop doggin it. If you dont catch up with us soon, youre gonna miss out on all the fun.
zh: 嘿，Kane。别磨蹭了。再不赶上来，好戏可就全让你错过了。

en: H Q, this is Death. We have arrived at our destination. The access doors are open.
zh: 总部，这里是死亡车队。我们已抵达目的地。通道大门是开着的。

en: Well done, Death. Please, be cautious.
zh: 干得好，死亡车队。务必小心。

en: I copy that, H Q.
zh: 收到，总部。

en: Remember your primary goal is to locate and destroy the Nexus. That is the key to disabling the Strogg communication network.
zh: 记住，你们的首要目标是找到并摧毁 Nexus。那是瘫痪 Strogg 通讯网络的关键。

en: Viper Squad, this is Morris. H Qs finally located a demolitionist to destroy the hangars. He should be there soon.
zh: 毒蛇小队，我是 Morris。总部总算找到一名爆破手去炸机库了。他应该很快就到。

en: Kane, this is Morris. The demolitionist should be near the top of the elevator.
zh: Kane，我是 Morris。那名爆破手应该就在电梯顶层附近。

en: It pains me that we must destroy this Strogg facility. The knowledge we could have gained by studying it.
zh: 要摧毁这座 Strogg 设施，实在令我心痛。若能好好研究，我们本可以学到多少东西啊。

en: Listen up, Marines. Were looking to get below the Tetranode, the brains of this facility, and destroy it with our E M P bomb. Once thats accomplished, the Strogg lines of communication will be cut and our troops will have an easy time of it. But first we need to locate the controls thatll unlock the hatchways and allow the convoy through.
zh: 都听好了，陆战队员们。我们要设法深入四元节点（Tetranode）下方——那是这座设施的大脑——用我们的 EMP 炸弹把它摧毁。一旦得手，Strogg 的通讯线路就会被切断，我们的部队就好打多了。但首先得找到能解锁舱门的控制装置，让车队通过。

en: There, I have unlocked the passage..
zh: 好了，通道已经解锁。

en: {furrow}Negative. Remain where you are.
zh: {furrow}不行。待在原地。

en: I must find the temperature controls. From there, I should be able to raise the temperature to something a little less hostile.
zh: 我必须找到温控装置。有了它，我应该能把温度调高一些，不至于这么要命。

en: Sounds good. Kane, youre with Strauss. Find those controls.
zh: 好主意。Kane，你跟着 Strauss，去把那些控制装置找出来。

en: You assign me only one guard? Must I die to show you how valuable I am? Never mind. This way, Corporal Kane.
zh: 就派一个人保护我？非得我死了，你们才明白我有多重要？算了。这边走，Kane 下士。

en: Be extremely cautious, Corporal. We do not want to attract that Harvesters attention.
zh: 千万小心，下士。我们可不想引起那台收割者的注意。

en: Ah, yes. Precisely what I was looking for. Give me a moment.
zh: 啊，没错。正是我要找的。稍等片刻。

en: Kane, you must protect me while I adjust the temperature controls!
zh: Kane，我调节温控的时候，你必须保护我！

en: Lieutenant Voss, I must remain here or conditions will return to their frigid state.
zh: Voss 中尉，我必须留在这里，否则环境会重新冻回冰窖。

en: Okay. Stay there. Kane, get back here with us.
zh: 好。你待在那儿。Kane，回我们这边来。

en: Double time it, Kane. I need you here to help clear the way for the convoy.
zh: 跑步前进，Kane。我需要你来帮车队开路。

en: Kane, check that tunnel. The shutoff to the forcefield might be in there.
zh: Kane，去查查那条隧道。力场的关闭开关可能就在里面。

en: Open fire!
zh: 开火！

en: Lieutenant Voss, this is Strauss. What has happened? I cannot open the door. Please, I need help, Lieutenant.
zh: Voss 中尉，我是 Strauss。出什么事了？门打不开了。拜托，我需要支援，中尉。

en: Strauss, this is Lieutenant Voss. Weve managed to pickup the pieces here. Any idea how we can open the hatchway and get out of this room?
zh: Strauss，我是 Voss 中尉。我们这边刚勉强收拾完残局。你知道怎么打开舱门、让我们离开这个房间吗？

en: Have one of the techs there use the commands I am downloading to you now. By entering these into the primary servos, the hatchway will open.
zh: 让你们那边的一名技术兵使用我现在传给你们的指令。把指令输入主伺服系统，舱门就会打开。

en: Lieutenant Voss, I must complain. Corporal Kane is taking far too long to reach me.
zh: Voss 中尉，我必须提出抗议。Kane 下士到现在还没到我这里，实在太慢了。

en: Calm down, Strauss. I’m sure Kanes moving as fast as he can.
zh: 冷静点，Strauss。Kane 肯定已经在全速赶路了。

en: {furrow}Corporal Kane, you should have been here a long time ago! {idle}But we will speak of this later.
zh: {furrow}Kane 下士，你早就该到了！{idle}不过这笔账我们以后再算。

en: That . . . is the Tetranode. Destroying it is our primary objective.
zh: 那……就是四元节点。摧毁它是我们的首要目标。

en: We can accomplish this in three steps. And because this is the hub of the facility, you will have to return here after each step is completed. Our first objective is the power plant. Lead the way.
zh: 我们分三步来完成。这里是整座设施的枢纽，所以每完成一步，你都得回到这里。第一个目标是发电厂。你带路。

en: What are you waiting for, Corporal Kane? You must return to the Tetranode room to complete your next objective.
zh: 你还在等什么，Kane 下士？你必须回到四元节点机房，完成下一个目标。

en: Corporal, return to the Tetranode room so that we can continue this mission.
zh: 下士，回四元节点机房去，我们的任务才能继续。

en: Why do you take so long, Corporal Kane? Go to the Tetranode room, then we can continue our mission.
zh: 怎么这么磨蹭，Kane 下士？去四元节点机房，我们才能继续任务。

en: Strauss, those codes look to be working. Were opening the hatchway now.
zh: Strauss，那些代码看来管用。我们正在打开舱门。

en: Ambush! Take cover!
zh: 有埋伏！找掩护！

en: Morris . . . Morris can you hear me?
zh: Morris……Morris，听得见吗？

en: I want you to take Cortez and flank left. Rhodes, I want you to flank right.
zh: 你带上 Cortez 从左翼包抄。Rhodes，你从右翼包抄。

en: I'm on it.
zh: 这就去。

en: Rhodes! Rhodes where are you?
zh: Rhodes！Rhodes，你在哪儿？

en: Strauss, were having some trouble with those codes you sent us. They dont appear to be opening the door. You may have to resend them. I'll let you know shortly.
zh: Strauss，你发来的代码有点问题，门好像打不开。可能得重发一次。我稍后再联系你。

en: Let us return to the Tetranode. From there we must find a way to disable the emergency shutoff. If we take too long, the shutoff will sense the heat buildup and deactivate all systems.
zh: 我们回四元节点去。接下来必须设法解除紧急停机装置。要是拖得太久，它就会侦测到热量积聚，关停所有系统。

en: Before we can disable the emergency shutoff, we must locate the Visual Processing area. Let us take the elevator to the second floor. We should be able to find it there.
zh: 要解除紧急停机装置，得先找到视觉处理区。我们乘电梯上二层，应该能在那里找到。

en: Corporal Kane, in the next section is a system that stretches between all facilities in this area. I call it the Tetranode Maintenance Bay. That is your destination.
zh: Kane 下士，下一区有一套贯通这片区域所有设施的系统，我称之为四元节点维护舱。那就是你的目的地。

en: Nearby is a maintenance platform. Get onboard.
zh: 附近有一座维护平台。上去吧。

en: Hey, Strauss, Kane. Just to give you an update, the squad is still alive. Were still trapped but Lieutenant Voss is working on a plan. How are you doin?
zh: 嘿，Strauss、Kane，通报一下情况：小队还都活着。我们仍然被困着，不过 Voss 中尉正在想办法。你们那边怎么样？

en: Despite Corporal Kanes tendency to dawdle, we are making good progress.
zh: 虽说 Kane 下士总爱磨蹭，我们的进展还是不错的。

en: Okay, Morris, give the word!
zh: 好了，Morris，下令吧！

en: Move out, Marines! Go! Go!! GO!!!
zh: 出发，陆战队员们！上！上！！上！！！

en: Were currently working our way back towards the vehicle elevator. Its slow going but were gaining ground. Whats your situation, Strauss?
zh: 我们正朝车辆电梯往回打。进展缓慢，但一直在推进。你那边情况如何，Strauss？

en: Had I known Corporal Kane would work this slowly, I would have accompanied him to speed things up. But we are making reasonable progress.
zh: 早知道 Kane 下士动作这么慢，我就该亲自跟着他加快进度。不过进展尚可。

en: Okay. Keep me informed.
zh: 好。随时向我汇报。

en: Cortez is hit! I repeat, Cortez is hit!!
zh: Cortez 中弹了！重复，Cortez 中弹了！！

en: Get a medic over there, now!
zh: 叫医疗兵过去，快！

en: The ride is over, Corporal Kane. You must now return to the Tetranode room. Locate another maintenance platform to take you back there.
zh: 旅程到此为止，Kane 下士。你现在必须返回四元节点机房。找另一座维护平台送你回去。

en: Morris! Get that truck on the elevator!
zh: Morris！把那辆卡车开上电梯！

en: Were not leaving you behind, sir.
zh: 我们不会丢下您的，长官。

en: Damn straight youre not. Cortez and I are going to give you cover. Then well be up.
zh: 那是当然。我和 Cortez 给你们打掩护，随后就上去。

en: So far you have done well, Corporal Kane. Your final task will be to shut down the coolant pumps. This will cause a complete meltdown of the Tetranode.
zh: 到目前为止，你干得不错，Kane 下士。你最后的任务是关闭冷却泵。这会让四元节点彻底熔毁。

en: Okay, Strauss. Were holding a position just outside the facility. Let us know when you want us to come get you.
zh: 好，Strauss。我们就守在设施外面。需要我们来接你们时说一声。

en: It will be as soon as Corporal Kane deactivates the coolant pumps. And at his pace, it could take hours.
zh: 等 Kane 下士一关掉冷却泵就行。不过照他这速度，怕是得几个小时。

en: Strauss, this is Voss. Whats your situation?
zh: Strauss，我是 Voss。你们情况如何？

en: We are very close to finishing our objective.
zh: 我们就快完成目标了。

en: Hannibal, this is Raven squad. Weve got an injured Marine who cant be moved.
zh: 汉尼拔号，这里是渡鸦小队。我们有一名伤员，无法移动。

en: Roger that, Raven. A medic will be dispatched.
zh: 收到，渡鸦小队。医疗兵马上派过去。

en: You guys go on, Ill stay here.
zh: 你们继续走，我留在这儿。

en: Hang in there, buddy. Helps on the way.
zh: 撑住，兄弟。救援这就到。

en: What are you waiting for? Lets get to the ship!
zh: 还等什么？快上船！

en: Are you the medic they sent for Raven squad?
zh: 你就是派来支援渡鸦小队的医疗兵？

en: Yeah, wheres the wounded soldier?
zh: 对。伤员在哪儿？

en: Back near that truck. Follow me.
zh: 就在后面那辆卡车旁边。跟我来。

en: Your post is here, guarding the lift. Theyll be deploying walkers soon and I dont want any surprises.
zh: 你的岗位在这儿，守住升降梯。他们很快就要部署步行机甲了，我可不想出什么岔子。

en: Warning, lift is in motion. Warning, lift is in motion.
zh: 警告，升降梯运行中。警告，升降梯运行中。

en: {scared}Holy shit . . . that was our ticket out of here.
zh: {scared}妈的……那可是我们逃出去的指望啊。

en: They treat us like . . . animals. Less than animals . . . like experiments.
zh: 他们拿我们当……牲口。连牲口都不如……拿我们做实验。

en: No, get away from me! Get away!
zh: 不，离我远点！走开！

en: Kane, save yourself. Leave while you can.
zh: Kane，自己保命吧。趁还能走，快走。

en: When I left the Hannibal for the Processing Tower, I was one of eight men. They were new recruits, all eager for combat, certain the others would die and they alone would live. I, on the other hand, was willing to die to protect them.
zh: 我离开汉尼拔号前往处理塔的时候，一行共有八个人。其余都是新兵，个个求战心切，都笃定死的会是别人，自己一定能活下来。而我恰恰相反——我情愿用命去保住他们。

en: It is ironic that I am the only one who still draws breath, isnt it, Kane?
zh: 结果如今还喘着气的偏偏只剩我一个。很讽刺，是吧，Kane？

en: You have perhaps heard rumors that I killed a Strogg without a weapon. The story is true. It happened during the Strogg invasion of Earth.
zh: 你或许听过传闻，说我赤手空拳杀死过一个 Strogg。确有其事，就发生在 Strogg 入侵地球期间。

en: The previous commander of Rhino squad, Lieutenant Wells, had been hurt, as had I. I was forced to drop my weapon so that I could carry the Lieutenant out.
zh: 犀牛小队的前任指挥官 Wells 中尉负了伤，我也一样。为了把中尉背出去，我不得不丢下武器。

en: Just when it looked like we had reached safety, a Strogg confronted me. I fought him with the only weapons I had available, my hands.
zh: 眼看就要脱险，一个 Strogg 拦住了我。我只能用仅剩的武器和它拼——我这双手。

en: I hope to never again experience such a thing. It is far easier to take someones life with a gun, than it is to choke it out of them.
zh: 那种事，我希望这辈子不要再经历第二次。用枪结果一条命，比亲手把命掐断，容易太多了。

en: That data stream you see will act as a guide. Once its path is corrected, the stream will lead you to the top floors of the processing tower.
zh: 你看到的那道数据流会充当向导。修正它的路径之后，它就会把你引到处理塔的顶层。

en: Rhino Squad, be aware that Cougar squad has just been launched in pods. They will be landing at the processing tower shortly.
zh: 犀牛小队注意，美洲狮小队刚乘着陆舱发射升空，稍后将在处理塔着陆。

en: Did you hear that Kane? It appears we will be having some help very soon.
zh: 听到了吗，Kane？看来我们很快就有帮手了。

en: H Q! H Q! This is Cougar squad. Weve got trouble!
zh: 总部！总部！这里是美洲狮小队。我们遇到麻烦了！

en: Whats your situation?
zh: 情况如何？

en: Were almost to the Processing Tower but weve been intercepted by a squadron of fliers!
zh: 我们快到处理塔了，却被一中队飞行器拦截了！

en: Mayday, mayday! My pods been hit! I'm going down! I'm going down!!
zh: 求救，求救！我的着陆舱被击中了！我在坠落！我在坠落！！

en: Theyre all over us! We need air support!
zh: 它们把我们缠死了！我们需要空中支援！

en: Shit! I'm comin in too fast!
zh: 妈的！我降得太快了！

en: Dont bunch up! Youre all too close!!
zh: 别扎堆！你们全都靠得太近了！！

en: Damn it! Theres a flier on my six!
zh: 该死！有架飞行器咬住我尾巴了！

en: Navigations out . . . . propulsions damaged. I'm coming in like a rock!
zh: 导航失灵……推进器受损。我这是直接往下砸啊！

en: Were screwed! Were totally fubar!
zh: 完了！我们彻底完蛋了！

en: Strauss, we are unable to proceed.
zh: Strauss，我们过不去了。

en: There is nothing I can do for you in that section. Kane will have to find a solution.
zh: 那个区域我无能为力。只能靠 Kane 自己想办法了。

en: Very well done, Kane. Lets go.
zh: 干得漂亮，Kane。我们走。

en: Strauss, what are we looking at here?
zh: Strauss，我们眼前这是个什么东西？

en: I . . . I do not know. The technology is quite advanced.
zh: 我……我也不知道。这技术相当先进。

en: But I'm sure after a few minutes of study it would be easy to understand.
zh: 不过我敢说，只要让我研究几分钟，就没什么难懂的。

en: Besides it is of no interest to us. Continue to follow the data stream. It will lead you to the roof elevator.
zh: 况且它与我们的任务无关。继续沿数据流前进，它会把你引到天台电梯。

en: That must be all that remains of Cougar squad.
zh: 那大概就是美洲狮小队最后的残骸了。

en: We are almost there, Kane.
zh: 我们快到了，Kane。

en: Do you hear that Kane? That is the sound of hundreds of Marines landing on this tower. We must be sure to leave them a few Strogg to kill.
zh: 听见了吗，Kane？那是几百名陆战队员在这座塔上着陆的声音。我们可得记着给他们留几个 Strogg 杀。

en: Cougar Squad must be landing.
zh: 一定是美洲狮小队在着陆。

en: I'm sure Strauss would enjoy studying this facility.
zh: Strauss 要是能研究这座设施，肯定乐坏了。

en: Strauss would have a field day here.
zh: Strauss 到了这儿非得乐疯不可。

en: This is the elevator to the roof. Get ready.
zh: 这就是通往天台的电梯。准备好。

en: This is no time to sight see. Lets go, Kane.
zh: 现在不是观光的时候。走了，Kane。

en: Come along, Kane. We must follow the data stream.
zh: 跟上，Kane。我们得沿着数据流走。

en: Here. I scavanged this off a dead Strogg. I bet it'd work on your lightning weapon. It looks powerful enough to overload the personal shields some of the Strogg use.
zh: 拿着。我从一具 Strogg 尸体上捡的。我打赌它能装在你的闪电枪上。看这功率，足以过载某些 Strogg 的单兵护盾。

en: Lets head back outside and sweep the area. Weve gotta secure the bridge. Kane, you lead.
zh: 我们回到外面，扫清这片区域。必须守住这座桥。Kane，你打头。

en: Thanks for the help, Kane. Weve got orders to keep this bridge secured. You can go on to the processing tower.
zh: 多谢帮忙，Kane。我们奉命守住这座桥。你继续往处理塔去吧。

en: I am on my way to the Processing Tower, why dont you accompany me? But before we can proceed this tram must be rotated in the proper direction.
zh: 我正要去处理塔，不如与我同行？不过在出发之前，得先把这辆电车转到正确的方向。

en: Many men died to get us this far, Kane. We must take control of the Process Tower at all costs.
zh: 为了走到这一步，死了太多弟兄，Kane。无论付出什么代价，我们都必须拿下处理塔。

en: Excellent. This looks to be the hub control room. See if you can find some way to rotate the tram from here.
zh: 很好。这里看起来就是枢纽控制室。看看能不能从这里把电车转过来。

en: Very good, Kane. The tram is now facing the right direction, but it appears the track is damaged.
zh: 非常好，Kane。电车已经调正方向，不过轨道似乎损坏了。

en: There is a door leading to a construction site below the tram. Head there and locate some repair bots to fix the track. I will remain here and guard the tram.
zh: 有扇门通往电车下方的施工场地。你去那儿找几台维修机器人来修轨道。我留在这里看守电车。

en: Excellent, Kane. The track has been repaired. Return to the tram and we can be on our way to the process tower.
zh: 太好了，Kane。轨道修好了。回电车上来，我们这就出发去处理塔。

en: We need to find a way to get up to the second floor.
zh: 我们得想办法上到二层去。

en: Kane, stay there. I will be right up.
zh: Kane，待在那儿别动。我马上上来。

en: Hurry up, Kane. We must keep moving.
zh: 快点，Kane。我们不能停下。

en: You have no idea how difficult it was to liberate this tram. I ran several miles, from station to station, but they were all either empty or the trams were wrecked.
zh: 你根本想不到，为了弄到这辆电车我费了多大劲。我一站接一站跑了好几英里，可那些站要么空着，要么电车全毁了。

en: I even began toying with the idea of interrogating the Strogg, using Strauss as an interpreter.
zh: 我甚至一度琢磨着抓个 Strogg 来审问，让 Strauss 当翻译。

en: Then I chanced upon a station that had this tram we are riding in now. Unfortunately it was protected by several squads of Strogg.
zh: 后来我碰巧找到一座车站，就停着我们现在坐的这辆电车。可惜，有好几队 Strogg 把守着。

en: Luckily, the Strogg were not as proficient with a gun as me. I have fired more rounds today than I have in the past 2 months , and you know how I am about wasting ammunition.
zh: 幸好那些 Strogg 的枪法不如我。我今天打出去的子弹比过去两个月加起来还多——你知道的，我最见不得浪费弹药。

en: Those fuel lines have ruptured! We cannot move any further until you find a way to shut off the lines and stop the fire.
zh: 那些燃料管线破裂了！你必须想办法关闭管线、扑灭火焰，否则我们寸步难行。

en: Do not stop, Kane! I will keep them off you!
zh: 别停，Kane！我来挡住它们！

en: Keep going! I will not let them hurt you.
zh: 继续走！我不会让它们伤到你。

en: Watch your step.
zh: 脚下小心。

en: Be careful, Kane. There are more coming!
zh: 小心，Kane。又有敌人来了！

en: Do not slow down, whatever you do.
zh: 不管怎样，千万别放慢速度。

en: Kane, this is H Q. You just picked up a weapons upgrade. Now if you zoom in with your nail gun, the nails will attempt to follow the target. Youll find its great for shooting around corners.
zh: Kane，这里是总部。你刚拿到一件武器升级：现在用钉枪瞄准镜锁定目标，钉弹就会自动追踪。你会发现，拐角处射击特别好使。

en: There. He's stabilized for the moment.
zh: 好了。他的情况暂时稳定下来了。

en: Sorry we have orders to stay here. You should find your squad.
zh: 抱歉，我们奉命守在这里。你还是去找你的小队吧。

en: Sorry se cant go with you. Were under orders to secure this area.
zh: 抱歉，我们不能跟你走。我们奉命固守这片区域。

en: Hey, over here.
zh: 嘿，这边。

en: Holy Mother of . . . That thing's frickin huge! Edwards, get back!
zh: 我的老天……那玩意儿大得吓人！Edwards，快退后！

en: Heads up. The Strogg are breaking through our perimiter. They'll be on us in 3...2...1
zh: 注意。Strogg 正在突破我们的防线。它们马上就冲进来了，3……2……1

en: Oh my God!
zh: 哦，天哪！

en: Badger squad, requesting reinforcements!
zh: 猛獾小队，请求增援！

en: Bravo Team here! We've got a situaton in alpha niner. Requesting backup for the  . . . Oh, God, just send backup now!
zh: 这里是 Bravo 组！Alpha-9 区出状况了。请求增援，目标是……哦老天，别管了，快派增援！

en: Let me clear the room.
zh: 让我先把这屋清了。

en: Now! We need it now!
zh: 现在！我们现在就要！

en: Oh, this is not good!
zh: 哦，这下糟了！

en: I can't see a thing!
zh: 我什么都看不见！

en: Someone get these lights back on ASAP!
zh: 谁快去把灯重新打开，马上！

en: Gaaaaahhhh!
zh: 嘎啊啊啊——！

en: What are you standing around for? take me to the door they want opened!
zh: 你们还愣着干什么？带我去他们要打开的那扇门！

en: Damn it! Get me to that door!
zh: 该死！快带我去那扇门！

en: Come on Doyle! Get us out of here!
zh: 快啊，Doyle！带我们离开这儿！

en: {happy}Our guys are really cleaning up the fliers since you blew up the hangars, Kane.
zh: {happy}自打你把机库炸了，咱们的人收拾起飞行器来那叫一个痛快，Kane。

en: All right, Marines, keep on our toes. This area isn't secure.
zh: 好了，陆战队员们，都警醒着点。这片区域还不安全。

en: They just took out the end truck!
zh: 它们刚干掉了队尾那辆卡车！

en: Kane, this is voss. We can't move forward until you take out the turrets defending this area.
zh: Kane，我是 Voss。你不把守着这片区域的炮塔干掉，我们就无法前进。

en: We can't move until you destroy those turrets
zh: 你不摧毁那些炮塔，我们就动不了。

en: Hang on!
zh: 坐稳了！

en: Howd I manage to get assigned to this detail?
zh: 我怎么就被派来干这苦差事了？

en: Kane, protect Rhodes! He's the only one who can disarm those mines.
zh: Kane，保护好 Rhodes！只有他能拆掉那些地雷。

en: First ones disarmed.
zh: 第一颗拆除了。

en: Okay. On to the next one.
zh: 好。去下一颗。

en: Zebra 2, this is Bison 8. See anything?
zh: 斑马 2 号，这里是野牛 8 号。看到什么了吗？

en: I got nothing.
zh: 什么都没有。

en: Wait a second. I've got a reading.
zh: 等等。我这儿有个读数。

en: Holy shit! What IS that?!
zh: 我的妈呀！那到底是个什么东西？！

en: Get us the hell out of here! Go! Go!
zh: 赶紧带我们离开这儿！快走！快走！

en: H Q, H Q, this is Bison 8! We are under attack!
zh: 总部，总部，这里是野牛 8 号！我们遭到攻击！

en: There you go. I increased the rate of fire. That ought to add a little more punch to it.
zh: 好了。我调高了射速。这下打起来该更有劲了。

en: Death, this is HQ. You are the only convoy left. You must get that E M P to the target.
zh: 死亡车队，这里是总部。你们是仅存的车队了。必须把那枚 EMP 送到目标位置。

en: Hear that Rhinos?  It's up to us now.  Stay sharp, they're going to be all over us.
zh: 听到了吗，犀牛小队的弟兄们？现在就看我们的了。都警醒点，它们会蜂拥而上。

en: Good job, buddy!
zh: 干得好，伙计！

en: Kane did an adequate job executing my plan.
zh: Kane 执行我的计划，表现还算称职。

en: Humble to the end Strauss. Kane's actions have sent the Strogg forces into disarray.
zh: 你可真是谦虚到家了，Strauss。Kane 这一通操作，已经把 Strogg 部队搅得阵脚大乱。

en: Remember your primary goal is to locate and destroy the Nexus. That will disable the Strogg communication network.
zh: 记住，你们的首要目标是找到并摧毁 Nexus。这样就能瘫痪 Strogg 的通讯网络。

en: You are about to enter the room that houses the Nexus, Corporal Kane. Watch yourself, no doubt it will be heavily guarded.
zh: 你即将进入安放 Nexus 的房间，Kane 下士。千万当心，那里必定戒备森严。

en: This is Private Sasaki. The Strogg are attempting to corner me at the Dispersal facility. Please, I need immediate assistance.
zh: 我是 Sasaki 列兵。Strogg 正试图把我围堵在疏散设施这里。求求你们，我需要立即支援。

en: Viper Squad, this is Morris. H Qs finally located a demolitionist for the hangars. He should be there soon.
zh: 毒蛇小队，我是 Morris。总部总算给机库找到一名爆破手了。他应该很快就到。

en: Here. Take this shotgun. It's gonna come in handy.
zh: 来，拿上这把霰弹枪。会派上用场的。

en: {puzzled}Wow, would ya look at this place.
zh: {puzzled}哇哦，瞧瞧这地方。

en: {furrow}Keep your shit wired tight. {idle}You can bet your ass we arent gonna be welcome here.
zh: {furrow}都给我打起十二分精神。{idle}我敢拿屁股打赌，这地方绝不欢迎咱们。

en: Listen up, Marines. We've almost reached our objective.  Now we just need to find the Tetranode and set off our E M P bomb. That will knock out the Strogg lines of communication and our troops will have an easy time of it. Let's find a way to open that hatch so we can move forward.
zh: 都听好了，陆战队员们。我们离目标已经不远。现在只需找到四元节点（Tetranode），引爆我们的 EMP 炸弹，就能瘫痪 Strogg 的通讯线路，我们的部队就好打多了。先想办法打开那道舱门，才能继续推进。

en: Ah, very good. This appears to be the control room.
zh: 啊，很好。这里看来就是控制室。

en: I must find the temperature controls. From there, I should be able to make the atmosphere a little less hostile.
zh: 我必须找到温控装置。有了它，我应该就能让这里的环境不那么要命。

en: {furrow}I demand you protect me!
zh: {furrow}我要求你们保护我！

en: Kane, you must protect me while I adjust the temperature!
zh: Kane，我调节温度的时候，你必须保护我！

en: Lieutenant Voss, I must remain here and maintain the temperature controls or the areaa will return to its frigid state.
zh: Voss 中尉，我必须留在这里维持温控，否则这片区域又会冻回冰窖。

en: Kane, check that door. The shutoff to the forcefield might be in there.
zh: Kane，去查查那扇门。力场的关闭开关可能就在里面。

en: Lieutenant Voss, this is Strauss. What has happened?
zh: Voss 中尉，我是 Strauss。出什么事了？

en: Calm down, Strauss. I'm sure Kane's moving as fast as he can.
zh: 冷静点，Strauss。Kane 肯定已经在全速赶路了。

en: The entire facility is centered around this room. We need to find the power plant. Lead the way.
zh: 整座设施都是围绕这个房间建造的。我们得找到发电厂。你带路。

en: Ah, these are the controls to the power plant.
zh: 啊，这就是发电厂的控制装置。

en: Let us return to the Tetranode. From there we must find a way to disable the emergency shutoff. If we don't disable it, it will detect the heat buildup and deactivate all systems.
zh: 我们回四元节点去。接下来必须设法解除紧急停机装置。若不解除，它侦测到热量积聚，就会关停所有系统。

en: We can disable the emergency shutoff from the Visual Processing area. Let us take the elevator to the second floor. There we should be able to find it.
zh: 紧急停机装置可以从视觉处理区解除。我们乘电梯上二层，应该能在那里找到。

en: {happy}Ah! The emergency shut off controls.
zh: {happy}啊！紧急停机控制装置。

en: The area you are in stretches between all facilities in this complex.
zh: 你所在的区域贯通了这片综合设施的所有建筑。

en: Corporal Kane, you should now be at the emergency shutoff relays. Use the splicing controls to cut the cable in front of you. That will disable the emergency shutoff system and allow us to overheat the Tetranode.
zh: Kane 下士，你现在应该已经到了紧急停机继电器。用接线控制装置切断你面前的线缆，这样紧急停机系统就会失效，我们才能让四元节点过热。

en: This is Voss.  We're currently working our way back to the elevator. It's slow going but we're gaining ground. What's your situation, Strauss?
zh: 我是 Voss。我们正朝电梯往回打。进展缓慢，但一直在推进。你那边情况如何，Strauss？

en: Kane...! It can't be! ... It's the Makron!! \nv <Kane> k18s EY3q \t
zh: Kane……！不可能！……是 Makron！！\nv <Kane> k18s EY3q \t

en: Here, I guess even you get one of these. Its a shotgun thats been modified to take clips. You can reload it all at once now.
zh: 拿着，看来连你也能领一把。这霰弹枪改装过，能用弹匣供弹，现在一次就能装满。

en: Yes, I am. Now double time it and meet me at the elevator.
zh: 对，是我。现在跑步前进，到升降梯口跟我会合。

en: This way to the landing area.
zh: 着陆区往这边走。

en: Let's get to the lift.
zh: 我们去升降梯那儿。

en: Good point. Kane, hop in the cannon and see if you can't blow open the door.
zh: 说得对。Kane，上那门炮，看看能不能把门轰开。

en: This is disgusting!
zh: 太恶心了！

en: Aaahhhhhhhh!  Help me!
zh: 啊啊啊啊——！救救我！

en: Rhino Squad, be aware that Cougar squad is incoming. They will be landing at the processing tower shortly.
zh: 犀牛小队注意，美洲狮小队即将抵达，稍后将在处理塔着陆。

en: Besides it is of no interest to us. Continue to follow the data stream. It will lead you to the roof.
zh: 况且它与我们的任务无关。继续沿数据流前进，它会把你引到天台。

en: I think you're in the assembly control room. See if you can activate the system.
zh: 你现在应该是在装配控制室。看看能不能启动系统。

en: Get back to that central control room and see if you can reboot the system.
zh: 回中央控制室去，看看能不能重启系统。

en: Huh! I just heard something. I'll be back in a minute.
zh: 咦！我刚听到什么动静。我去去就回。

en: You're in the sterilization control room. There should be a way to turn on the system.
zh: 你在消毒控制室里。应该有办法把系统打开。

en: It looks like there's a passage out of this area right above us. But the only way we're gonna reach it is by stacking some of these barrels up and climbing over them.
zh: 看样子正上方就有一条离开这里的通道。但想够到它，只能把这些桶摞起来，踩着爬上去。

en: The storage system should set the barrels up for us. Why don't you go find a way to activate it and I'll stay here and monitor you?
zh: 仓储系统应该能帮我们把桶码好。不如你去想办法把它启动，我留在这儿给你盯着？

en: I just hit the mother load of Strogg data on this computer. Now if I can just figure out how to use it.
zh: 我刚在这台电脑上挖到一大堆 Strogg 数据，简直是金矿。现在只差搞明白怎么用了。

en: Great. Looks like the whole system needs to be rebooted. You're gonna have to locate and restart both the sterilization and assembly subsystems.
zh: 好嘛。看来整套系统都得重启。你得把消毒和装配两个子系统都找到，挨个重启。

en: Greetings, Corporal Rhodes. You must locate the security interfaces. There is one at the top of each tower that must be disabled to gain access to the Core. But be careful, only Corporal Kane can access them.
zh: 你好，Rhodes 下士。你们必须找到安保接口。每座塔的顶部各有一个，全部解除后才能进入核心。但要小心，只有 Kane 下士才能操作它们。

en: {happy}Ha. They ain't no door that a little Comptazine won't unlock. Let's roll.
zh: {happy}哈。就没有 Comptazine 打不开的门。出发。

en: Damn, that man's about as warm as a bag of ice. Well, you better get goin, Kane. I gotta stay and guard this console. See ya around, pal.
zh: 妈的，那家伙冷得跟揣了一兜冰似的。行了，Kane，你赶紧上路吧。我得留下守着这台控制台。回见，哥们儿。

en: Yeah, you musta saw what the bastards did to the rest of our squad. Now were just trying to get out of here.
zh: 是啊，那帮杂种把我们小队其他人弄成什么样，你八成也看见了。现在我们只想活着离开这儿。

en: Kane, youre probably looking to get to the next tower. Come with us. We have orders to secure the bridge control center. From there you should be able to find a tram.
zh: Kane，你应该是想去下一座塔吧。跟我们走。我们奉命去占领桥梁控制中心，从那儿你应该能找到一辆电车。

en: Here. I scavanged this off a dead Strogg. It'll make your lightning gun damage multiple targets. Give it a try.
zh: 拿着。我从一具 Strogg 尸体上捡的。装上它，你的闪电枪就能同时电到多个目标。试试看。

en: You know, that lightining gun will disrupt the shields that the gladiators use.
zh: 知道吗，那把闪电枪能瘫痪角斗士用的护盾。

en: Thanks for the help, Kane. Weve got orders to keep this area secured. You can go on to the processing tower.
zh: 多谢帮忙，Kane。我们奉命守住这片区域。你继续往处理塔去吧。

en: ninety three . . . ninety four . . . ninety five . {happy}Ha. Stroggos is proving to be a target rich planet.
zh: 九十三……九十四……九十五……{happy}哈。Stroggos 这星球，靶子真是打不完。

en: Many men died to get us this far, Kane. We must take control of the Processing Tower at all costs.
zh: 为了走到这一步，死了太多弟兄，Kane。无论付出什么代价，我们都必须拿下处理塔。

en: Perhaps we can use some of the strogg repair bots to fix the track.  There is a door leading to a construction site below the tram, you may be able to acqurie some repair bots there. I will remain here and guard the tram.
zh: 或许我们可以用 Strogg 的维修机器人来修轨道。有扇门通向电车下方的施工场地，你也许能在那里弄到几台维修机器人。我会留在这里看守电车。

en: You have no idea how difficult it was to liberate this tram.
zh: 你根本想不到，为了弄到这辆电车我费了多大劲。

en: Luckily, the Strogg were not as good a shot as I am.
zh: 幸好那些 Strogg 的枪法不如我。

en: Here Kane, let me adjust your nailgun.  Use the sight to zoom in on your targets and the nails will track them.
zh: 来，Kane，我给你调一下钉枪。用瞄具锁定目标，钉弹就会自动追踪。

en: To all units, this is Badger Squad. Do not take the north pass. The Strogg have fortified gun emplacements there.
zh: 各单位注意，这里是猛獾小队。不要走北侧隘口。Strogg 在那里修筑了坚固的炮位。

en: H Q! This is Badger Squad. We made it through the north pass. Do not let the evac take off without us.
zh: 总部！这里是猛獾小队。我们冲过北侧隘口了。别让撤离艇丢下我们起飞。

en: This is command H Q to all units. A full retreat has been ordered. All squads are to meet at Waste Facility for immediate evac.
zh: 指挥总部呼叫各单位。全面撤退命令已经下达。所有小队立即前往废料处理厂集合，马上撤离。

en: H Q, H Q, this is Private Calhoun.  I’ve been cut off from my squad. I need coordinates to the evac zone.
zh: 总部，总部，我是 Calhoun 列兵。我和小队被切断了联系。请求撤离区坐标。

en: H Q, there’s a shitload of Strogg on our tail.
zh: 总部，我们屁股后面咬着一大帮 Strogg。

en: {scared}Yeah, it fried Private Johnson when he tried to go through.
zh: {scared}是啊，Johnson 列兵想穿过去，当场就被烤焦了。

en: {confused}Wouldn't Kane have those codes? He looks pretty Strogg to me
zh: {confused}这些密码 Kane 不是该有吗？要我说，他看着都快成 Strogg 了。

en: Here, Kane. You should take this.
zh: 来，Kane。这个你拿着。

en: Hey, Kane. Could you come over here?
zh: 嘿，Kane。过来一下好吗？

en: Get going, Kane.
zh: 出发吧，Kane。

en: C'mon Kane. You have to follow me.
zh: 来吧，Kane。你得跟我走。

en: Kane! Hey, Kane!
zh: Kane！嘿，Kane！

en: Hey, good one, Kane!
zh: 嘿，漂亮，Kane！

en: Kane, look out!
zh: Kane，小心！

en: This is for you, Kane.
zh: 这是给你的，Kane。

en: Kane, would you come here?
zh: Kane，能过来一下吗？

en: Time to get moving, Kane.
zh: 该动身了，Kane。

en: Follow me, Kane.
zh: 跟我来，Kane。

en: Kane! Over here.
zh: Kane！这边。

en: Very good, Kane.
zh: 非常好，Kane。

en: Careful, Kane!
zh: 小心点，Kane！

en: Take this, Kane. It'll come in handy.
zh: 拿着，Kane。会派上用场的。

en: Kane, get over here.
zh: Kane，快过来。

en: You need to go there, Kane.
zh: 你得去那边，Kane。

en: Over here, Kane!
zh: 这边，Kane！

en: Nice one, Kane!
zh: 干得漂亮，Kane！

en: Stay there. I'll fix your body armor.
zh: 站着别动。我来修你的护甲。

en: Let me patch your armor.
zh: 让我来给你补护甲。

en: I'll repair your armor.
zh: 我来修护甲。

en: Kane wait, and I'll fix your body armor.
zh: Kane，等等，我给你修护甲。

en: Ok, I'm finished. Good luck marine.
zh: 好，完工。祝你好运，陆战队员。

en: here, Kane. Take this.
zh: 来，Kane。拿着。

en: Corporal Kane. Come here.
zh: Kane 下士。过来。

en: Go that way, corporal Kane.
zh: 往那边走，Kane 下士。

en: C'mon Kane, lets go.
zh: 来吧，Kane，我们走。

en: Hey, Corporal Kane!
zh: 嘿，Kane 下士！

en: Good job, Corporal Kane!
zh: 干得好，Kane 下士！

en: Look out, Kane!
zh: 小心，Kane！

en: Corporal Kane, you're going to need this.
zh: Kane 下士，你会用得上这个。

en: Over here, Corporal Kane.
zh: 这边，Kane 下士。

en: Head that way, Corporal Kane.
zh: 往那边去，Kane 下士。

en: Let's move out, Kane.
zh: 出发吧，Kane。

en: Corporal Kane!
zh: Kane 下士！

en: Well done, Kane!
zh: 干得好，Kane！

en: Heads up, Kane!
zh: 注意，Kane！

en: Watch out, Kane!
zh: 当心，Kane！

en: Let me repair your armor.
zh: 我来修一下你的护甲。

en: Let me fix your body armor.
zh: 我来给你修护甲。

en: Wait up! I can repair your armor.
zh: 等等！我能修你的护甲。

en: Wait up, Kane! I'll fix your body armor.
zh: 等等，Kane！我给你修护甲。

en: Don't move, Kane. I can fix your armor.
zh: 别动，Kane。我能修好你的护甲。

en: Let me fix your armor, Kane.
zh: 我给你修护甲，Kane。

en: Just wiat a second and I'll be done.
zh: 稍等一下，马上就好。

en: One minute adn you'll be back in the battle.
zh: 一分钟后你就能重返战场。

en: Hold still and I'll fix your armor.
zh: 别动，我来修护甲。

en: That's all I can do. See you around, Marine.
zh: 我只能修到这个程度了。回头见，陆战队员。

en: Finished. Back into the war, marine.
zh: 完工。回战场去吧，陆战队员。

en: Corporal Kane, this should come in handy.
zh: Kane 下士，这个应该用得上。

en: Come here, Kane.
zh: 过来，Kane。

en: Kane, go over there.
zh: Kane，去那边。

en: Kane, let's go.
zh: Kane，我们走。

en: Nice job, Kane!
zh: 干得漂亮，Kane！

en: Wait there, Marine. Your armor's damaged.
zh: 在那儿等着，陆战队员。你的护甲受损了。

en: Hold up, Marine. I can fix your armor.
zh: 停一下，陆战队员。我能修你的护甲。

en: Corporal Kane. Wait and I'll repair your armor
zh: Kane 下士。稍等，我给你修护甲。

en: I'll have you patched up in no time.
zh: 我马上就能给你修利索。

en: There. Finished. Now try to be more careful.
zh: 好了。完工。以后小心着点。

en: Nice job, Kane.
zh: 干得漂亮，Kane。

en: Hey, Kane. You better take this with you.
zh: 嘿，Kane。这个你最好带上。

en: Hey, Kane. Come here.
zh: 嘿，Kane。过来。

en: Kane, you gotta go.
zh: Kane，你得走了。

en: C'mon, Kane. Follow me.
zh: 来，Kane。跟我走。

en: Very nice, Kane.
zh: 非常漂亮，Kane。

en: You will need this, Kane. Take it.
zh: 你会需要这个的，Kane。拿着。

en: Corporal Kane, please come here.
zh: Kane 下士，请过来。

en: You will want to get going, Kane.
zh: 你该动身了，Kane。

en: Kane, please follow me.
zh: Kane，请跟我来。

en: Well done, Kane.
zh: 干得好，Kane。

en: Watch it, Kane!
zh: 留神，Kane！

en: Take this, Corporal Kane. It should be most useful.
zh: 拿着，Kane 下士。它应该大有用处。

en: Corporal Kane, come here now.
zh: Kane 下士，立刻过来。

en: Corporal Kane, you must proceed.
zh: Kane 下士，你必须继续前进。

en: You must follow me, Corporal Kane.
zh: 你必须跟我来，Kane 下士。

en: Corporal Kane.
zh: Kane 下士。

en: Good, Corporal Kane.
zh: 很好，Kane 下士。

en: Watch yourself, Corporal Kane!
zh: 自己当心，Kane 下士！

en: Strogg to your left!
zh: Strogg 在你左边！

en: Here, Kane. You’ll need this.
zh: 来，Kane。你会用得上的。

en: Kane. Come here.
zh: Kane。过来。

en: Kane, head out in that direction.
zh: Kane，朝那个方向走。

en: Kane, you're with me. Let's go.
zh: Kane，你跟着我。走。

en: Kane, over here!
zh: Kane，这边！

en: Heads up, Kane.
zh: 注意，Kane。

en: You're Kane, right? My name's Anderson. Here let me heal you.
zh: 你就是 Kane 吧？我叫 Anderson。来，我给你治疗。

en: If you get hurt, find a medic. They'll heal you up.
zh: 受了伤就去找医疗兵，他们会给你治好。

en: Our squad's already left. Go see Morris over there for orders.
zh: 我们小队已经出发了。去那边找 Morris 领命令。

en: I'm too late. He's dead. There was nothing I could do.
zh: 我来得太迟了。他已经死了。我无能为力。

en: Damn it all. Bidwell was a good man... a good Marine.
zh: 该死的……Bidwell 是个好人……是个好陆战队员。

en: Strauss, the E M P's destroyed but we still have to shutdown this facility. Any ideas?
zh: Strauss，EMP 炸弹已经毁了，但我们还是得让这座设施停摆。有什么办法？

en: Ja. But it means I have to go directly to the Tetranode.
zh: Ja。但这意味着我必须直接前往四元节点。

en: All right. Kane's the only one who's uninjured, so he's going with you.
zh: 好吧。现在没受伤的只剩 Kane 了，让他跟你去。

en: If my memory of the building schematics is correct, Kane must take a crawlway out and I will meet him at the other end.
zh: 如果我对建筑图纸的记忆无误，Kane 必须钻一条检修爬道出去，我会在另一头与他会合。

en: Sounds like a plan. Voss out.
zh: 就这么办。Voss 完毕。

en: Kane, I don't need to tell you how important this is. Whatever the cost, you must destroy the Tetranode and bring down the Nexus.
zh: Kane，这件事有多重要，不用我多说。无论付出什么代价，你都必须摧毁四元节点，让 Nexus 瘫痪。

en: I just upped the field output by 300 percent. Now that rail gun is gonna really kick ass.  You'll be able to shoot straight through guys.
zh: 我刚把力场输出提升了 300%。现在这把轨道炮真带劲了，能把敌人一枪打个对穿。

en: Let me see that Rocket Launcher.  Here, now if you hold scope down after you've fired a rocket, you can guide it where you want it to go.  It's great for shooting around cover.
zh: 把火箭发射器给我看看。好了，现在发射火箭后按住瞄准镜不放，就能操纵它飞向你想打的地方。绕过掩体射击特别好使。

en: Kane! Over here!
zh: Kane！这边！

en: Careful, Kane.
zh: 小心点，Kane。

en: Hold up there, Marine. Let me see your nail gun for a second.
zh: 站住，陆战队员。把你的钉枪给我看一眼。

en: Well done, Kane. I have almost finished my work here. Damn.
zh: 干得好，Kane。我这边的活儿也快干完了。该死。

en: But I need protection, Lieutenant.
zh: 可我需要保护，中尉。

en: Corporal, check that tunnel. The shutoff to the forcefield might be in there.
zh: 下士，去查查那条隧道。力场的关闭开关可能就在里面。

en: What the hell's goin' on here?
zh: 这里到底出什么事了？

en: Wait. Listen.
zh: 等等。听。

en: Quick! Fire off the EMP!
zh: 快！引爆 EMP！

en: Almost there...
zh: 就快好了……

en: Marines! Open fire!
zh: 陆战队员们！开火！

en: SHUT THE HELL UP, STRAUSS! Half the squad is dead, So why don't you just be quiet while we pick up the pieces?
zh: 你他妈给我闭嘴，Strauss！小队死了一半人，我们收拾残局的时候，你就不能消停会儿？

en: Ah, so you did survive. Ha, ha! I've won the bet with Rhodes.
zh: 啊，你果然活下来了。哈哈！我赢了跟 Rhodes 打的赌。

en: Don't worry. You'll be fine. Here.
zh: 别担心，你会没事的。来。

en: I gave him a medpack and sedated him. He'll be fine.
zh: 我给他用了医疗包，还打了镇静剂。他不会有事的。

en: Contacts!
zh: 发现敌人！

en: This is H Q, Viper squad. Reinforcements E T A is 10 minutes.
zh: 毒蛇小队，这里是总部。增援预计 10 分钟后到达。

en: H Q, the Strogg bunker has been tagged with a a targeting laser.
zh: 总部，已用瞄准激光标记 Strogg 碉堡。

en: Direct hit, H Q! Target has been neutralized!
zh: 直接命中，总部！目标已被摧毁！

en: Viper squad, this is H Q. Mantis squad is M I A and unresponsive. Fall back to rally point alpha niner four.
zh: 毒蛇小队，这里是总部。螳螂小队失踪，联络不上。后撤至 Alpha-94 集结点。

en: H Q, this is Bison Squad. Primary target has been nullified. We'd like to aid the infantry now.
zh: 总部，这里是野牛小队。主要目标已被清除。我们请求现在去支援步兵。

en: Bison squad has been informed of your status.
zh: 野牛小队已获知你们的状况。

en: H Q, H Q, this is Cougar Squad. We can't get to the Air Defense Cannon. The Strogg air support is too heavy!
zh: 总部，总部，这里是美洲狮小队。我们无法接近防空炮，Strogg 的空中支援火力太猛了！

en: There's too many damn fliers. We can't get near.
zh: 该死的飞行器太多了，我们根本靠不上去。

en: Five... four... three... two... one...
C'mon, Kane. Let's get going.
zh: 来，Kane。我们该走了。

en: Let me patch your armor.
zh: 让我来给你补护甲。

en: I will patch your armor for you.
zh: 我会为你修补护甲。

en: {puzzled}Kovitch, what took you so long to get back?
zh: {puzzled}Kovitch，你怎么去了这么久才回来？

en: {scared}Kane.
zh: {scared}Kane。

en: {scared}They're stealing everything I know.
zh: {scared}他们在偷走我知道的一切。

en: Kane! Is there some way to turn off this grid so we can get through?
zh: Kane！有没有办法关掉这道电网，让我们过去？

en: {puzzled}Wow, he was your L T? {scared}You had to do it man. {idle}If he'd lived, the Strogg would have gotten a lot of military secrets from him. C'mon, let's get the hell out of here.
zh: {puzzled}哇，他就是你们中尉？{scared}你也是没办法，伙计。{idle}他要是活着，Strogg 能从他脑子里挖出一堆军事机密。走，咱们赶紧离开这鬼地方。

en: Here, let me adjust your nailgun.
zh: 来，我给你调一下钉枪。

en: You're Kane, right?  My name's Anderson.  Here, let me heal you.
zh: 你就是 Kane 吧？我叫 Anderson。来，我给你治疗。

en: If you get hurt, find a medic, they'll heal you up.
zh: 受了伤就找医疗兵，他们会给你治好。

en: Lead the way and let us see if we can find the Hub control room.
zh: 你带路，我们看看能不能找到枢纽控制室。

en: Now you can use the sight to zoom in on your targets and the nails will track them.
zh: 现在你可以用瞄具锁定目标，钉弹会自动追踪它们。
